String.Dest: 神々に感謝を！

String.Source: I've found a new candidate, ripe for Harkon's Gift. I'm sending you to welcome this soul into our family.
String.Dest: ハルコンの贈り物を捧げる新たな候補者を見つけたぞ。我々の家族にしてやってくれ

String.Source: I mean... as much as anyone. Not a lot.
String.Dest: 人並みには。それほどではありませんわ

String.Source: And among those, it seems, only when the heavens show the correct aspects.
String.Dest: さらにその者にあっても、天が正しき様相を見せている時のみに限られるが

String.Source: Idiot! I can't get to the scroll with Durnehviir attacking us!
String.Dest: 馬鹿者！ ダーネヴィールに攻撃されながら書を手に入れる事はできないわ！

String.Source: The Dawnguard have increased their operations and have been aggressively recruiting.
String.Dest: ドーンガードはその活動範囲を広げ、積極的に構成員を募集している

String.Source: I've read stories. Stories about fools that managed to... communicate with them.
String.Dest: 色々な話を読みましたわ。彼らとの… 疎通を成功させた愚かな者達の話を

String.Source: Ooh, good. I was just starting to get bored.
String.Dest: わあ、素敵。待つのに退屈してたところよ

String.Source: I do not practice my art for free, however. I doubt you can afford my services. You have the smell of the vagabond about you.
String.Dest: ただし、無料では施術しないわよ。支払えるとは思えないわ。あなたからは放浪者の匂いがするもの

String.Source: Yyyaaahh!
String.Dest: イイヤァー！

String.Source: Back already? Can't wait.
String.Dest: もう戻ってきたの？ 早く見せて

String.Source: Let's go. My mother must be waiting on the other side of that thing.
String.Dest: 行きましょう。母があの向こう側で待っているに違いありませんわ

String.Source: Tradition dictates the females be offered to Molag Bal on his summoning day. Few survive the ordeal. Those that do emerge as a pure-blooded vampire.
String.Dest: 伝統により、モラグ・バルの召喚日には女性が捧げられる。その試練を生き延びる者はほぼいない。生き延びた者は純血の吸血鬼となって現れる

String.Source: I suppose you're right. I should have a little more faith.
String.Dest: それはそうかも。もう少し信じるようにすべきなのかも…

String.Source: Never made it far in the Companions, but now... I'd like to see any of them try and call me "whelp" again.
String.Dest: 同胞団ではうまくいかなかったけど、今は… あの中に私をまた“お嬢さん”と呼ぶ者がいるか見てみたいわ

String.Source: Oh no...
String.Dest: ああ、なんて事かしら…

String.Source: I knew she was deep into necromancy. I mean, she taught me everything I know.
String.Dest: 母が死霊術にのめりこんでいた事は存じておりましたわ。だって、わたしの知っている事はすべて母から教わったものですのよ

String.Source: All right Isran, you've got us all here. Now what do you want?
String.Dest: イスラン、来てやったぞ。お次は何だ？

String.Source: I used to walk through here after evening meals. It was beautiful, once.
String.Dest: 夕食のあと、よくここを散歩したものですわ。当時はなんとも美しい場所でしたのよ

String.Source: I requested refuge in the Soul Cairn, and in exchange, I would provide the Ideal Masters the souls that they craved.
String.Dest: ソウル・ケルンでかくまってもらうよう頼み、見返りにアイディール・マスターが切望する魂を提供するつもりだった

String.Source: It all comes back to my father.
String.Dest: すべては父にまつわる話なのです

String.Source: Lah!
String.Dest: ラー！

String.Source: She wasn't, always. But I think you're right.
String.Dest: 昔は違いましたのよ。でもその通りかも知れませんわね

String.Source: Let's get to my home, and I'll have a better sense of where we all stand.
String.Dest: 家に着けば、我々がどういう状況にいるのかがもう少し分かるはずですわ

String.Source: My vision darkens, and I see no more.
String.Dest: 暗くてもう見えないよ

String.Source: Here we are.
String.Dest: 着いたか

String.Source: We should keep it small. Too many people, and we'll draw unwanted attention to ourselves.
String.Dest: 集団の規模は小さい方がいい。人が多すぎると余計な注目を浴びてしまう

String.Source: I have no choice. As I told you before, I'm a Daughter of Coldharbour.
String.Dest: 仕方ないわ。以前話した通り、私はコールドハーバーの娘よ

String.Source: Serana? What are you doing here? Where's your father?
String.Dest: セラーナ？ ここで何をしているの？ あなたの父親はどこ？

String.Source: Excuse us. I need to fetch the Bloodstone Chalice.
String.Dest: 失礼。ブラッドストーンの聖杯を取ってこなければ

String.Source: No doubt she'd like you to lead her into such a place. Then, when you're alone and beyond help, the fangs will come out!
String.Dest: そのような場所に誘い込んで、助けの来ない場所で一人になった時に牙をむく、ってやつかもね…

String.Source: I am sure Nazir's cooking is great and all, but my appetites are a little more... discerning.
String.Dest: ナジルの料理は確かに申し分ないわ、でも私はもう少し… 舌が肥えているの

String.Source: Any ideas?
String.Dest: 他にいい考えは？

String.Source: Destroy the Keepers that are tending them, and it should bring the barrier down.
String.Dest: それを見張っている番人達を倒せば、障壁は崩れるはずよ

String.Source: I wish Orthjolf and Vingalmo would just get it over with and kill each other. I'm tired of listening to them.
String.Dest: オースユルフとヴィンガルモが吹っ切れて互いを殺せばいいのに。彼らの話を聞くのはうんざりよ

String.Source: Get it wrong, and... well. You've seen what happened when I tried it.
String.Dest: 間違えれば… ええと。あたしが試した時の結果は知ってるよね

String.Source: Brother Adalvald had been there not long ago. Said he found something of great importance.
String.Dest: アダルヴァルド修道士はほんの少し前にそこに行き、何かとても重大なものを発見したと言っていた

String.Source: Nobody really knows.
String.Dest: 誰も本当の事を知りませんわ

String.Source: Ah. Been working more on his secret hideout, has he? It'll be interesting to see how much progress he's made.
String.Dest: ああ、ずっと秘密の隠れ家で仕事してたのね？ どれだけ進んだか、見るのが楽しみだわ

String.Source: People say there's someone in Riften that can... change your face. Make you look completely different. Do you believe that?
String.Dest: うわさではリフテンに… 顔を変えられる者がいるらしい。外見を完全に変えるんだ。信じられるか？

String.Source: Did you have anything to ask before you depart?
String.Dest: 出発の前に何か聞く事はあった？

String.Source: Watch your step.
String.Dest: 足元に注意して

String.Source: Do you actually believe any of that?
String.Dest: あんな話をちょっとでも信じてるのか？

String.Source: There's an unused inlet on the northern side of the island that was used by the previous owners to bring supplies into the castle.
String.Dest: 島の北側に放棄された入り江がありますの。前の所有者達が城に荷物を持ち込む時に使っていた場所なのですけれど

String.Source: It certainly seems the Vigilants of Stendarr can't help themselves. No surprise there.
String.Dest: ステンダールの番人は手詰まりのようだな。あの体たらくでは驚くに値しないが

String.Source: But, my techniques only work on the living, not those that have crossed over into undeath.
String.Dest: でも、私の技術は生者にしか使えない。アンデッドへ足を踏み入れた者には無理よ

String.Source: Now this is a find! Plans for improving the Dwemer crossbow. This should add some extra punch to an already devastating weapon.
String.Dest: これは大発見ね！ ドゥーマーのクロスボウを改良するための設計図だわ。ただでさえ強力な武器に、さらなる威力を与えられる

String.Source: Hope you're getting along with Isran. He takes some getting used to.
String.Dest: イスランとは、うまくやれてる？ 彼、慣れないうちは難しいタイプだから

String.Source: Well done. Nothing like a good kill to get the blood pumping, is there?
String.Dest: よくやったわ。いい殺しほど血の巡りを良くするものはないわよね？

String.Source: No, sire. I have not.
String.Dest: いいえ。まだです

String.Source: That letter's the last I've heard of him and mentions where he is. Now please, leave me alone.
String.Dest: あれが彼から届いた最後の手紙だ。居場所が書いてある。さあ、もう一人にしてくれ

String.Source: I see you chose a suitably high profile target. Well done.
String.Dest: ちゃんと人目につく標的を選んだようだな。よくやった

String.Source: Yes. I once practiced my art in the salons and manors of Tamriel's great and good. Now, the scum of Skyrim are my only clients.
String.Dest: ええ。かつてはタムリエルの名士達のサロンや邸宅で施術していたわ。今では、スカイリムのクズが唯一の顧客よ

String.Source: Let's see... Ooh! This diagram explains how to fashion a bolt that will send a jolt of shock through whatever it hits.
String.Dest: どれどれ… シビれるわね！ 当たったものに大きな衝撃を与えるボルトの作り方が記してある！

String.Source: The scroll!
String.Dest: 星霜の書か！

String.Source: I was. But unlike some of my brethren, I sought solutions outside the norm in order to maintain my superiority.
String.Dest: いかにも。だが同族の一部とは違い、我は優位を保つために尋常ならざる策を求めたのだ

String.Source: All of the ingredients for our potions came from there. She used to say that my father couldn't stand the place. Too... peaceful.
String.Dest: うちの薬の材料はみんなそこで採っておりましたの。母いわく、父はその場所が大嫌いだったようですわ。ちょっと… 和やかすぎるから

String.Source: Yes, he's a fanatic... he's changed. But he's still my father. Why can't you understand how that makes me feel?
String.Dest: ええ、お父様は狂信的に… 変わってしまいましたわ。それでもわたしのお父様なのです。そういう父親を持った娘がどんな気持ちでいるのか、どうして分かってくれませんの？

String.Source: Well, don't just stand there!
String.Dest: ほら、突っ立ってないで！

String.Source: As much as it pains me to send you and Serana back alone, I can't take the risk.
String.Dest: あなたとセラーナだけを送り返すのはつらいけれど、危険は冒せない

String.Source: How do we get inside? We have to talk.
String.Dest: どうすれば中に入れますの？ 話がありますのよ

String.Source: You know more than I do now. Arkay has us both beaten, but he's not giving up all his secrets.
String.Dest: もう、教えられる事はない。アーケイはもっと知ってるが、秘密は明かさないだろう

String.Source: What're you up to, Garan?
String.Dest: 何を考えてる、ガラン？

String.Source: Right. I'll settle in and then Arkay and I will start to put things right. Don't you worry.
String.Dest: よし。落ち着いたら、アーケイと共に何とかしよう。もう心配いらない

String.Source: I'm not going to talk you out of it, am I? I know, I know. I was just like you, once.
String.Dest: やめるよう説得するのは無理そうかな？ 分かるよ。あたしも昔はあんたみたいだった

String.Source: It's your funeral.
String.Dest: あんたの問題なんだよ

String.Source: They're mystic entities that lord over the Soul Cairn, controlling every aspect from its fabric to its appearance.
String.Dest: 彼らはソウル・ケルンに君臨する神秘的な存在で、その素材から外見まですべての側面を支配している

String.Source: I know! Arkay told me of your success!
String.Dest: やっぱり、やってくれたな！ アーケイの言った通りだ！

String.Source: You are the Dovahkiin, the Dragonborn. You may not be one of us in body, but you have earned the right to bear this title.
String.Dest: そなたはドヴァーキン、すなわちドラゴンボーンなのだ。身体は我らの一員ではなくとも、この称号を名乗る資格を勝ち得ている

String.Source: Last I knew, she was out in the Reach, convinced she was about to find the biggest dwarven ruins yet.
String.Dest: 最後に消息を聞いた時は、彼女はリーチにいた。ドワーフの最大の遺跡を発見できると見込んでいたようだ

String.Source: No, and I'm not going to waste men looking. We're fighting a war against your kind, and I intend to win it.
String.Dest: ダメだ。そんな事に人員を割くのは無理だ。我々は君達の種族と戦ってるんだぞ。そして私はその戦いに勝つつもりでいる

String.Source: Now, what is our Lord's wish?
String.Dest: さあ、我らが主は何をお望みで？

String.Source: I wonder what we're up against here.
String.Dest: 一体、何と戦わなくちゃいけないのかしら

String.Source: Isran's done nothing but mock me. He's never given me the respect I deserve.
String.Dest: イスランにはバカにされてばかりだ。あるべき敬意が全く感じられない

String.Source: It was very sudden. It was almost like one day we were a normal family, and then the next I didn't know who they were.
String.Dest: 本当に突然でしたの。普通の家族が1日経つと赤の他人同士… そんな感じでしたわ

String.Source: I've got more leads on additional Dwemer plans.
String.Dest: 新しいドゥーマーの設計図の手がかりを掴んだの

String.Source: Ah! The free air of Vus at long last!
String.Dest: ああ、ヴスの自由な空気よ！ 待ちかねたぞ！

String.Source: You managed to destroy all three Keepers? Very impressive.
String.Dest: 三人の番人をすべて倒したの？ 本当に見事だわ

String.Source: One more word of warning. There's a dragon that calls itself Durnehviir roaming the Cairn. Be wary of him.
String.Dest: もう一つ警告するわ。ダーネヴィールと名乗るドラゴンがケルンをうろついている。用心して

String.Source: What do you mean? Why were the vampires after this woman?
String.Dest: どうして？ どうして吸血鬼たちは彼女を？

String.Source: I guess I'm expected.
String.Dest: わたしが来ると分かっていたようですわね

String.Source: Let's just say that my mother and father had a bit of a falling out.
String.Dest: わたしの父母がちょっとした仲違いをした、とだけ言っておきますわ

String.Source: If we're going to survive this, we're going to have to be as ruthless as our enemies.
String.Dest: この戦いを生き抜きたいなら、敵と同じぐらい非情に徹しなければならない

String.Source: She had an alchemy setup in her drawing room, but nothing that even comes close to what's here.
String.Dest: 客間に錬金術の道具を置いてはいましたけれど、ここにあるものとは比較になりませんのよ

String.Source: A single gyro would be enough, I think. Believe me, this is useful stuff.
String.Dest: ジャイロがたった1つあればいいはずよ。それで本当に役立つものができるの

String.Source: He wasn't always like that, though. There was... a turn. He stumbled onto this obscure prophecy and just kind of lost himself in it.
String.Dest: でも昔からそうではなかったのです。ある時、埋もれた予言を見つけて、没頭してしまってからですのよ

String.Source: An unattended attachment, such as found in your beloved husband creates... an opportunity for unnecessary agitation.
String.Dest: 君の愛する旦那さんも、しっかりつなぎとめておかないと… 余計な考えを起こす者が現れるかも知れない

String.Source: The skies of Keizaal are mine again!
String.Dest: ケイザールの空は再び我がものとなった！

String.Source: You care nothing for Serana or our plight.
String.Dest: セラーナや私達の苦境はお構いなしなのね

String.Source: And while I do not know its exact whereabouts, I do have information suggesting someone who does.
String.Dest: 正確な居場所は知らないが、知っているであろう人物の手がかりは得ている

String.Source: Yes. I've kept it safely secured here ever since I was imprisoned.
String.Dest: ええ。ここに幽閉されて以来ずっと、これを守ってきたの

String.Source: Keep yourself armed and protected as best you can.
String.Dest: 可能な限り、武器や防具を充実させておく事だ

String.Source: The letter left on the corpse shall have to suffice. It will no doubt be found.
String.Dest: まあ、死体に残した手紙が見つかるはずだから、それで十分だが

String.Source: The restoration of this wayshrine means that Vyrthur must be dead and the Betrayed no longer have control over him.
String.Dest: この祠が再建されたという事は、ヴィルスールは死に、裏切られし者に操られる事もなくなったわけだ

String.Source: Help!
String.Dest: 助けて！

String.Source: Why worry about who has the bigger chair at the table when there's more than enough to go around?
String.Dest: テーブルに椅子が十分に行き渡る以上にある時に、なぜ誰の椅子が大きいかを気にするの？

String.Source: I'd try to visit my mother in the garden, and she'd quickly shoo me away saying she was much too busy.
String.Dest: 庭園にいる母のところへ行こうとしましたの。すると彼女は忙しいと言ってわたしをすぐ追い払ったのですわ

String.Source: So this is it...
String.Dest: これだね…

String.Source: But she loved it. I don't know. I guess it's like having a piece of art, if you're into that sort of thing.
String.Dest: でも母は気に入っていましたわ。芸術品を持つようなものだったのかも知れませんわね。あなたにそういった趣味があるかは知りませんけれど

String.Source: She's... she's a vampire? Are you a complete fool? You can't trust them! She'll turn on you the first chance she gets!
String.Dest: 彼女も… 吸血鬼なのか？ お前は正気か？ 吸血鬼が信用できるものか！ 隙あらば寝首をかかれるぞ！

String.Source: Not... yet...
String.Dest: まだ… まだだ…

String.Source: This is all well and good, but do we actually know anything about what they're doing? What do we do now?
String.Dest: うまく行ったけど、彼らが何してるか分かる？ この後はどうすればいいの？

String.Source: I must head back to the Sanctuary before dawn. I will see you there, Listener.
String.Dest: 夜明け前に聖域へ戻らないと。そこで会いましょう、聞こえし者

String.Source: Is it really you? I can't believe it!
String.Dest: 本物ですの？ 信じられませんわ！

String.Source: The Chalice? Why?
String.Dest: 聖杯が？ なぜだ？

String.Source: He's holed up with a group of a bandits.
String.Dest: 山賊の一団と共に立てこもっている

String.Source: Neither do I.
String.Dest: わたしもですわ

String.Source: Take my advice, don't listen to that talk of the "face sculptor" down in the Ragged Flagon. "Face butcher" is more like it from what I've heard.
String.Dest: 忠告するわ、ラグド・フラゴンにいる“顔面改造医”の話は聞いちゃだめよ。聞いた限りでは、むしろ“顔面破壊屋”の方が近いわ

String.Source: You want to find him, try talking to anyone who'd meet a traveler. Innkeepers and carriage drivers in the big cities maybe. But you're on your own.
String.Dest: 彼を見つけたいなら、旅人を相手にする連中をあたればいい。大きな街の宿屋の主人とか、馬車の御者とか… 君自身の足でこなすんだ

String.Source: It's my family home. Not the most welcoming place, but depending on who's around, I'll be safe there.
String.Dest: わたしの家族の家です。そこまで歓迎されないかも知れませんが、誰がいるかによっては安全なはず

String.Source: Welcome to the politics of Lord Harkon's court.
String.Dest: ハルコン卿の宮廷の政略争いへようこそ、だな

String.Source: You must understand that he's no longer the man I married all that time ago.
String.Dest: 彼はもう、私がずっと昔に結婚した男ではない事を理解してちょうだい

String.Source: Once you've located a wayshrine, there will be a spectral Prelate tending to it.
String.Dest: 祠を見つけたら、そこを守っている形なき司教がいるはずだ

String.Source: You met Stalf and Salonia, I assume? Lord Harkon and I suspected they might follow you there.
String.Dest: スタルフとサロニアには会ったな？ ハルコン卿と自分は彼らがお前の後を追うと思っていた

String.Source: You could call it that. Didn't put up much of a fight but made for a tasty snack. A rich bouquet of flavors, I would definitely recommend it.
String.Dest: そうとも言えるわね。大して抵抗しなかったけど、おいしい間食にはぴったりよ。豊かな香り。ぜひともお薦めするわ

String.Source: I don't converse with my meals.
String.Dest: 自分の食べ物とは話さないわ

String.Source: Is this... some kind of a joke? Did Arkay put you up to this?
String.Dest: それは… 何かの冗談か？ アーケイにそうしろと言われたのか？

String.Source: I think we'll want Sorine Jurard. Breton girl, whip-smart and good with tinkering. Fascination with the Dwemer. Weapons in particular.
String.Dest: ソリーヌ・シュラルドを仲間にしよう。手先が器用でとても賢いブレトンの娘だ。ドゥーマーの文化に魅せられていて、特に彼らの武器への興味があるらしい

String.Source: Wonderful. Carry on, then.
String.Dest: 素晴らしい。ではその続きを

String.Source: I appreciate your concern for me, but Serana is all that I care about. You must keep her safe at all costs.
String.Dest: 心遣いに感謝するわ、でも私が心配なのはセラーナだけ。何としても彼女の安全を守ってちょうだい

String.Source: A noble cause. Arkay likes the idea very much, so I'm happy to help.
String.Dest: 高潔な動機があるんだな。アーケイも気に入るだろう。喜んで手を貸すよ

String.Source: Do you think mudcrabs might've taken it? I saw one the other day... Wouldn't be surprised if it followed me here.
String.Dest: マッドクラブに取られたのかしら？ この前、見かけたから… あの時、ここまでついて来たのかも知れないわ

String.Source: I rejoice in my freedom, if only for a moment.
String.Dest: 一瞬とはいえ、この自由を喜ぶとしよう

String.Source: Making sure you're not vampires. Can't be too careful.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼でない事の確認だよ。念には念を入れないとな

String.Source: Well, at least you're smart enough to want to learn more. I'll show you what I can.
String.Dest: うむ、君は少なくとも向学心があるという意味では賢いな。教えられる事は教えておこうか

String.Source: I suppose I'd rather be here than most other places in Skyrim. If Isran needs me, it must be pretty bad.
String.Dest: スカイリムにあるどんな宮殿よりも、ここの方がいいわ。イスランに呼ばれるなんて、最悪の状況って事だもの

String.Source: Is it really... it is! I was hoping we'd find this. It's a diagram for a dwemer crossbow. Much more sophisticated, and powerful, than the ones we use.
String.Dest: まさか… やっぱり！ これを探してたのよ。ドゥーマーのクロスボウの図面だわ。今使っているものの何倍も洗練されてて、しかも強力よ

String.Source: Many in the court don't bother with potions, but I keep things stocked just in case.
String.Dest: 宮廷の連中は薬にはあまり興味がないんだ。私はまさかの時に備えて保管しているが

String.Source: I had hoped you would have chosen a higher profile target. But the deed is done, and it's effect secured.
String.Dest: もっと人目につく標的を選べばよかったのに。でも済んだ事を言ってもしょうがない。それに成功は約束されてるしな

String.Source: Even with Vyrthur gone and the Inner Sanctum destroyed, my duty as a Knight-Paladin of Auri-El remains.
String.Dest: ヴィルスールまでもが連れ去られ、最奥聖域が破壊された今でも、アーリエルの騎士司祭としての使命は続いている

String.Source: Figures I'd be woken by a couple of know-nothings. So where are we off to, now?
String.Dest: つまり、何も知らない人達に起こされたわけですのね。それで、これからどこに行きますの？

String.Source: You give me freedom from the enslavement of the Ideal Masters. Thank you.
String.Dest: アイディール・マスターどもの束縛から自由を得る事ができた。ありがたい

String.Source: You need something? I am happy to help, if I can.
String.Dest: 何か必要なものでも？ 喜んで力になるよ

String.Source: What did you want?
String.Dest: 用件はなに？

String.Source: But be warned. The Jarl's guards are unaware of the threat, and will treat violence against this "advisor" as a crime.
String.Dest: だが注意しろよ。首長の衛兵達はその企みに気づいていない。もし“特別顧問”に危害を加えようとしたら、それは犯罪行為とみなされるだろう

String.Source: Idiot. You didn't really think I'd let you walk out of here either, did you? Vingalmo wants you both dead.
String.Dest: ばかね。ここから立ち去らせるはずがないでしょう？ ヴィンガルモは二人両方の死をお望みよ

String.Source: We need to put a damper on their efforts and give those trouble makers something to worry about other than harassing our interests.
String.Dest: 奴らの努力に水を差さねばならん。あの厄介者達に悩みの種を植えつけて、我々の利益を害するのをやめさせるんだ

String.Source: Put her mind to rest, allay her fear through vampiric seduction and when she is in a pliant condition, embrace her and bite her on the neck.
String.Dest: 彼女の心を落ち着かせて、吸血鬼の誘惑でその恐れを鎮める。そして彼女が従順になったら、抱きしめて首筋に噛みつけばいい

String.Source: There's only one thing left to do. We have to prove this actually works. That this is the real Aetherium Forge.
String.Dest: する事はあと一つだけ。これが実際に動く、真のエセリウムの鋳造器具だと証明しなくちゃならない

String.Source: Can't say I'm surprised.
String.Dest: 驚く事でもないがな

String.Source: Of course he did.
String.Dest: もちろんだ

String.Source: I discovered too late that the Ideal Masters favor deception over honor and had no intention of releasing me from my binding.
String.Dest: 気づいた時には手遅れだった。名誉よりも欺まんを好むアイディール・マスターどもは、我を解き放つつもりなどなかったのだ

String.Source: I don't know. Coming from a place like this, well... it's not really me. I hope you can believe that.
String.Dest: 分かりませんわ。こんな場所から出てきたとなると… 本当にわたしだと信じてもらえるといいのですが

String.Source: Minutes? Hours? Years? I can't even begin to guess. I suggest we don't wait around to find out.
String.Dest: 数分？ 数時間？ 数年？ 考えもつかないわ。それが分かるまで待つ事もないでしょうね

String.Source: We still have to find the Forge itself. I had a lead on that, too.
String.Dest: 鋳造器具自体を見つけないと。その手掛かりもつかんでいたんだ

String.Source: We'll stop these monsters. We have to; we're the only ones who can.
String.Dest: 奴らを止めてみせる。我々がやるしかない

String.Source: I'm sorry, I'm not about to do that without at least a single gyro to show for my efforts.
String.Dest: 悪いけど、見返りのジャイロが1つもないなら、引き受けるわけにはいかないわ

String.Source: Serana has sacrificed everything to prevent Harkon from completing the prophecy. I would have expected her to explain that to you.
String.Dest: セラーナはハルコンがお告げを実現するのを防ぐためにすべてを犠牲にしてきた。それを彼女からあなたに説明してくれると思った

String.Source: There are five in total, spread far apart across the Chantry.
String.Dest: 全部で5つある。広大な礼拝所のあちこちに散らばっているんだ

String.Source: I wasn't sure you'd come back for me. I'm still looking for a guide to get me home. What do you say?
String.Dest: 戻って来てくれるかは自信なかったけど、まだ家に案内してくれる誰かを探しているわ。お願いできないかしら？

String.Source: We can't give up. There's no one else to stand against these monsters.
String.Dest: あきらめるわけにはいかない。あの化け物達に抗えるのは我々だけだ

String.Source: If you believe that, then you're a bigger fool than I originally suspected. Don't you think I weighed that option before I enacted my plans?
String.Dest: それを信じるなら、私が当初にらんだよりも上を行く愚か者ね。私が計画を実行する前にその選択肢を考えなかったと思う？

String.Source: Isran? Wants me?
String.Dest: イスランが？ 私に？

String.Source: And then you get to the real danger. We can discuss that when the time comes. If it comes.
String.Dest: 真の危険はそこからだよ。その時が来たら話し合おうじゃないか。その時が来れば、だけどね

String.Source: I fear for what is to come.
String.Dest: 何が待ち受けているのか…

String.Source: It's... it's true. It's all true! Come on, let's check it out!
String.Dest: 本物だ… まさしく本物だよ！ さあ、確かめよう！

String.Source: It's good to see you again.
String.Dest: また会えて光栄だよ

String.Source: Arkay is so hard to understand when it comes to life and death. Is he still alive? There's always hope...
String.Dest: 生や死に関しては、アーケイの言葉は分かりにくい。彼は生きてるのか？ まだ希望はあるはずだ…

String.Source: I studied with the Faculty of Chirurgeons in Cloudrest. I walked with the Hollow-Faced Men of Nohotogrha for three years.
String.Dest: クラウドレストの外科教授陣に学んだわ。ノホトグラの穴あき顔男どもと三年間一緒に過ごしながら

String.Source: Let's see what you've got there.
String.Dest: 見せてちょうだい

String.Source: When it comes to vampires, if you're sloppy or careless, you're dead. And good people will die because of you.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼に対処する時の、軽率な行動は死を意味する。君のせいで無実の者が死ぬかも知れない

String.Source: I'll see you at Fort Dawnguard, then. Don't worry, Arkay will show me the way.
String.Dest: では、ドーンガード砦で会おう。問題ない。アーケイが導いてくれる

String.Source: Just be sure to keep your eyes open and your guard up.
String.Dest: 目を見張って、気を抜かないようにさえしてくれれば

String.Source: Hear now the second word of Soul Tearing: "Vaaz"- meaning to tear your enemy's soul from its living vessel.
String.Dest: ソウル・ティアリングの2つめの一語、“ヴァーズ”を聞くがいい。敵の魂をその生ける器から引き裂く事を意味する

String.Source: The wizards know about all kinds of things that people probably shouldn't know about.
String.Dest: ウィザードは普通の人達が知るべきではない事を色々とご存知ですものね

String.Source: Ronthil, where is the last batch of alchemy ingredients I asked you for?
String.Dest: ロンシル、頼んでいた最後の錬金術用の素材はどこにある？

String.Source: The air here... it feels different. Almost like...
String.Dest: ここの空気… 違う感じがするよ。まるで…

String.Source: Well, this isn't exactly a palace, is it? Still, it's sturdy, secure, and seems defensible.
String.Dest: まあ、宮殿には見えないわよね？ でも、頑丈で安全で、守りも固いわよ

String.Source: Are we ready then?
String.Dest: さあ、用意はよろしくて？

String.Source: And I suppose you're the one Tolan says is actually doing something about this mess.
String.Dest: 君がこの惨状を何とかしてくれるらしいな。トランから聞いたが

String.Source: I guess you'll never get to find out.
String.Dest: それは一生分からないかも知れませんわ

String.Source: In the meantime, don't make me regret my sudden outburst of tolerance and generosity, because if you do, your friend here is going to pay for it.
String.Dest: それと、私が突然寛容の念に駆られた事を後悔させないでくれ。後悔したら、迷惑を被るのはここにいる君の友達なんだぞ

String.Source: Our friend here has been ordered to fill the Chalice.
String.Dest: この友人が聖杯を満たすよう命じられた

String.Source: I warned them. I knew something like this would happen eventually. But they didn't listen, and look where it's gotten them.
String.Dest: 彼らには警告したんだ。今回のような事態がいつか起こる事は分かっていたからな。でも彼らは警告に耳を傾けなかった。そしてご覧の有り様だよ

String.Source: You're back, good! So, what happened?
String.Dest: 戻ったか、よかった！ それで、どうなったんだ？

String.Source: If we had the crests, we wouldn't have to keep hanging around this lovely place.
String.Dest: クレストさえあれば、この“素敵な”場所に長居する必要はありませんのに

String.Source: You never disappoint. What've you got there?
String.Dest: 期待を裏切らないわね。何を見つけたの？

String.Source: It is the greatest token we can bestow upon those we love and wish to see protected.
String.Dest: 我々が愛し守るべき者達に捧げられる最高の贈り物をね

String.Source: What are you still doing here?
String.Dest: まだここで何をしているの？

String.Source: But I'm not just going to abandon what I've been working on here. It's too useful. I need at least one intact dwarven gyro.
String.Dest: でもね、ここでの仕事を放り出す事はできないの。とても役立つはずだから。それには傷のないドゥーマーのジャイロが必要だわ

String.Source: If you want the Elder Scroll, it's yours.
String.Dest: 星霜の書が望みなら、あなたのものよ

String.Source: And what do you plan to do with it? Do you even know what you're asking about?
String.Dest: それで、どうするつもりなんだ？ 自分がしている質問の意味が分かってるのか？

String.Source: You're going to go kill a Dawnguard spy.
String.Dest: ドーンガードの密偵を殺すのよ

String.Source: Good. Maybe now they'll afford the vampire threat a tad bit more respect, eh?
String.Dest: よし。これで彼らも吸血鬼の脅威を少しは真剣に考えるだろう

String.Source: Arkay's been watching over me for years now. He says he's not too sure about you yet, though.
String.Dest: アーケイは何年も前から、俺を守ってくれている。あんたの事は、まだ分からんと言ってるがな

String.Source: Fine, fine! I can't afford to forget about this work, though. Some very interesting applications.
String.Dest: 分かった、分かったわよ！ 正直この仕事を放り出すわけにはいかないんだけどね。とても興味深い実験なのよ

String.Source: This is fine for now, but we can't stay holed up here forever.
String.Dest: 今はいいが、いつまでもここに立てこもってもいられない

String.Source: I assumed you were here to see me about your face. To have it sculpted into something more... artful than Nature has bestowed upon you.
String.Dest: 自分の顔の件で私に会いに来たんでしょう。何かもっと… 自然が授けたよりも技巧的な顔へ改造するために

String.Source: My life's work. Unraveling one of the great mysteries of the dwarves.
String.Dest: あたしの一生の仕事だよ。ドワーフの偉大な謎の一つを解明する事

String.Source: Excuse me, but I must address the court.
String.Dest: 後にしろ。臣下達に下達をせねばならんのでな

String.Source: Be careful, and keep my daughter safe.
String.Dest: 気をつけて、そして娘の安全を守ってね

String.Source: I keep the forge running day and night in case you need anything.
String.Dest: あなたが何か必要な時のために、鋳造器具は昼夜動かしておくわ

String.Source: If I'm reading this right, there's a formula here that should give us safe passage into the Soul Cairn.
String.Dest: 読み間違いでなければ、ソウル・ケルンへと無事に入るための手順が記されていますわ

String.Source: Now, this Chalice needs to be filled directly from the bloodspring that is the source of Redwater Den. But that's not enough.
String.Dest: さて、この聖杯はレッドウォーターの隠れ家の水源である血の泉から直接満たす必要がある。だがそれだけではない

String.Source: Heard they're reforming the Dawnguard. Vampire hunters or something, in the old fort near Riften. Might consider joining up myself.
String.Dest: ドーンガードを改編しているらしいね。吸血鬼ハンターか何か、リフテンの近くの古い砦で。入隊しようかな

String.Source: At first you may pity the thin-bloods. But after disposing of a few, you realize they aren't worth the worry.
String.Dest: 最初は血の薄い者達を哀れむかも知れない。でも数人殺した後には、彼らが心配に値しないと分かるわ

String.Source: It's... not as shiny as I was expecting.
String.Dest: ですわね… 思っていたよりもキラキラしておりませんわ

String.Source: Hmph... maybe so. Then again, I thought I could, too.
String.Dest: ふふん… そうかもね。でも、あたしもできると思ったんだよ

String.Source: It was expected of her, just as it was expected of me.
String.Dest: それが彼女に期待されていた、私と同じようにね

String.Source: The items it made were so powerful they went to war over it, and the Forge was lost. Or so the story goes.
String.Dest: それからできるアイテムがあまりに強力なために、彼らはそれを巡って争い、鋳造器具は失われたと言われているんだよ

String.Source: Well, as far as I'm aware it's the only one in existence.
String.Dest: わたしが知る限りは、この一つしか存在いたしませんわ

String.Source: Like the best of friends. I would never hesitate to share anything with her.
String.Dest: 親友みたいな存在でしたわ。母となら何でも話し合えた

String.Source: I'm afraid I won't be able to help you with the scrolls any longer, milord.
String.Dest: 旦那様、書の件に関してはもうお手伝いできそうにありません

String.Source: Beyond that... well, maybe one of our predecessors still has a clue.
String.Dest: その先は… そうだね、先に行った者達が手掛かりを残したかも知れない

String.Source: My traitor wife stole one of them away and then disappeared.
String.Dest: 妻が私を裏切り、その一つを盗み出して行方をくらました

String.Source: You have kept your side of the bargain, now let me fulfill mine.
String.Dest: そなたは約束を守ってくれた。今度は我の番だ

String.Source: Well, your loss...
String.Dest: まったく、残念だよ…

String.Source: Ah, yes, the Elder Scroll! I admit, I'm looking forward to this.
String.Dest: ああ、星霜の書ですね！ 正直言って、とても楽しみですよ

String.Source: I've scrounged up a few things. Here, please, take a look.
String.Dest: 苦労して仕入れた商品なんだ。ひと目だけでも見ていってもらえないかな

String.Source: You're here because we're abominations in your mind. Evil creatures that need to be destroyed.
String.Dest: ここにいるのは、内心では私達を嫌悪しているからだわ。破滅させられるべき邪悪な生物として

String.Source: My family's home is west of Solitude. If you help me get back there, they'll be grateful to you.
String.Dest: わたしの実家はソリチュードの西部にありますの。無事に送り届けてくれましたら、家族も喜びます

String.Source: By the divines! It's as if my eyes have been opened! I am blinded by the light of your majesty. I... I must obey you.
String.Dest: おお、神々よ！ 覚醒とはこの事です！ あなた様の威光の強さで目が見えない… ご用を何なりと

String.Source: Don't just stand there! Come on!
String.Dest: 突っ立っていないで！ さあ！

String.Source: For the first time in a long while, I think I - we - may actually be able to do this. And... and I owe it all to you. Thank you.
String.Dest: この長い間で初めて、あたしが… あたし達が… 本当に成し遂げられる気がする。あんたのおかげだね。ありがとう

String.Source: Present yourself to Lord Harkon at once.
String.Dest: 今すぐハルコン卿に会いに行け

String.Source: The Ideal Masters assured me that my powers would be unmatched, that I could raise legions of the undead.
String.Dest: アイディール・マスターどもは、我（われ）が無二の力を得て、不死の大軍を作り出せるだろうと念を押した

String.Source: Ugh, saying it out loud makes it sound so... common. "Little girl who doesn't get along with her father." Read that story a hundred times.
String.Dest: 言葉にするとあまりにもありがちですわね。「お父さんとぎくしゃくしている女の子」の話なら百回は読みましたわ

String.Source: You're already as good as I am. There's nothing you can learn from me.
String.Dest: もう同じくらいの腕前よ。教えられる事は何もないわ

String.Source: The scroll you found with Serana is one of those scrolls of prophecy. Now that it is back within my grasp, we can read the scroll and learn more.
String.Dest: セラーナがもっていた星霜の書は予言が書かれたものの一つだった。我が手中に戻ったので内容を確かめられる

String.Source: The only way I'd even consider returning to Tamriel was if Harkon were not only to fail, but to be destroyed.
String.Dest: タムリエルへの帰還を検討するとすれば、その唯一の道はハルコンが失脚するだけでなく、死ぬ事よ

String.Source: Alright. Now take note. He'll mind you and us Dawnguard, but there's no accounting for other folk.
String.Dest: さて、心得ておいてほしいのは、お前や我々ドーンガードには気を遣ってくれるが、それ以外に対しては分からないって事だ

String.Source: As well you should have.
String.Dest: お前もそうするべきだった

String.Source: Gaaahh...
String.Dest: ぐうう…

String.Source: Why, are you interested in my services? I warn you, my skills do not come cheaply.
String.Dest: あら、私の仕事に興味があるの？ 言っておくけど、私の技術は安くないわよ

String.Source: In his eyes, she'd be dying for the good of all vampires.
String.Dest: 彼の考えでは、彼女はすべての吸血鬼のために死ぬ事になる

String.Source: You give the Ideal Masters souls, they give you powers to summon the undead. It's all very business-like.
String.Dest: アイディール・マスター達に魂を捧げれば、アンデッドを呼び出す力を授けてくれる。まるで商取引のように

String.Source: So how has it come to pass that a vampire hunter is in the company of my daughter?
String.Dest: それで、吸血鬼ハンターがなぜ私の娘に同行する事になったの？

String.Source: When I entered the Soul Cairn, I had intended to strike a bargain with the Ideal Masters, the custodians of this place.
String.Dest: ソウル・ケルンへ入った時、この場所の管理者であるアイディール・マスターと取引を結ぶつもりだったわ

String.Source: You already know as much as I do. And that's a compliment.
String.Dest: 君の知識は私のそれと変わらない。これは褒め言葉だ

String.Source: Put her mind to rest, allay her fear through vampiric seduction and when she is in a pliant condition, embrace her and bite her on the neck.
String.Dest: 彼女の心を落ち着かせて、吸血鬼の誘惑でその恐れを鎮める。そして彼女が従順になったら、抱きしめて首筋に噛みつけばいい

String.Source: I see you have returned. Lord Harkon will be pleased.
String.Dest: 戻ったようだな。ハルコン卿はお喜びになるだろう

String.Source: Die!
String.Dest: 死ね！

String.Source: The prophecy tells of a time in which vampires will gain power over the sun, and will no longer fear its tyranny.
String.Dest: 予言には吸血鬼達が太陽をも制し、その横暴を恐れなくなる時代について書かれていた

String.Source: I have never understood the Nord fascination with weapons. Magic is so much more versatile, don't you think?
String.Dest: なぜノルドが武器に魅了されるのか理解できない。魔法の方がはるかに万能だとは思わんかね？

String.Source: Vampires?
String.Dest: 吸血鬼だと？

String.Source: Because he himself bestowed upon you a portion of his vitality when he infused you with his own blood the night you returned with Serana.
String.Dest: 彼自身が君に彼の力の一部を授けたからだよ。セラーナと一緒に戻ってきた夜に、彼の血を君はもらっただろう

String.Source: A bunch of feral vampires are running wild, upsetting the mortals.
String.Dest: 野生化した吸血鬼の群れがはびこり、定命の者達を混乱させている

String.Source: I think we both know... it's time to face my father.
String.Dest: わたし達二人とも分かっているはずでしてよ… 父と対決する時が来た事を

String.Source: Always good to have a backup plan, in case the claws and teeth aren't enough.
String.Dest: 爪と歯では足りない場合に備え、代替策を持つのはいい事よ

String.Source: My mother spent a lot of time trying to contact them directly, to travel to the Soul Cairn itself.
String.Dest: 母はそういった存在と接触をとれないか、つまりソウル・ケルン自体に行けないかという検討にかなりの時間を費やしましたわ

String.Source: It wasn't always like this. Best-preserved dwarven city I'd ever laid eyes on. And then... the earthquake hit.
String.Dest: ずっとこうだったわけじゃない。かつて見た中で最も保存状態のいいドワーフの都市だった。その後… 地震が起きたんだよ

String.Source: Ah, so that was a Moth Priest, then?
String.Dest: ああ、するとあれは聖蚕の僧侶だったってわけか？

String.Source: Half the people in your little crew would just as soon kill me as talk to me.
String.Dest: あなたのお仲間さん達の半数は、わたしと話すくらいなら殺そうとするでしょうね

String.Source: Listener! Fancy seeing you out here.
String.Dest: 聞こえし者！ ここで会うなんて奇遇ね

String.Source: It had to be one of us, and, well, she's so much more powerful than I am. It just made sense for her to be out here.
String.Dest: きっとわたし達の味方ですのよ。そして母はわたしよりずっと力がある。ここにいる事自体が彼女にとって意味があったのですわ

String.Source: Just look around, will you?
String.Dest: ちょっと、辺りを見てきてくれない？

String.Source: Of course I'm delighted to see you, my daughter. Must I really say the words aloud?
String.Dest: もちろん会えて嬉しいに決まっているだろう。言葉として口にしないと分からんのか？

String.Source: You could always go back and get my journal, you know.
String.Dest: 戻ってあたしの日記を取ってくる事はいつでもできるんだよ

String.Source: I must rest now. The reading has made me weary.
String.Dest: 休息が必要だな。書を読んだせいでクタクタだよ

String.Source: Hey! Journal?
String.Dest: ねえ！ 日記は？

String.Source: She persuaded an elven artisan to make some improvements. You can see the plates that show the phases of the moons, Masser and Secunda.
String.Dest: 母はエルフの職人を説得して日時計を改造させましたの。二つの月、マッサーとセクンダの満ち欠けを示すプレートが見えますかしら

String.Source: You know what this is? It's a lock. A 'Tonal Lock'. Simple, and very, very deadly.
String.Dest: これが何か分かる？ 鍵だよ。“色彩の鍵”。単純で、しかも極めて危険だ

String.Source: It's no Warmaiden's, but I've got a decent supply.
String.Dest: 戦乙女の炉にはかなわんが、そこそこの品ぞろえはある

String.Source: Be on your guard at all times. Avoid sleep if you can... Sleep is for the weak.
String.Dest: 警戒を常に怠るなよ。できれば眠らない方がいい… 眠るのは弱者だけだ

String.Source: I may not have potions to block the sun, but I do have nearly everything else.
String.Dest: 太陽の光を遮る薬はないかも知れないけど、それ以外ならほとんど何でもそろってるよ

String.Source: Hard to say. Maybe if we found the missing crests, we could figure it out.
String.Dest: それは何とも。なくなっているクレストを見つければ、解明できるかも知れませんわね

String.Source: Have I heard anything? It was the talk of the city for three days straight.
String.Dest: 何か聞いてないかって？ 街はその話題で持ちきりだよ、もう3日もね

String.Source: All right, look. I'll consider it, but I can't just leave this bear to prey on more innocent people.
String.Dest: よし、分かった。一考はする、だがあのクマにこれ以上無実の人々を襲わせるわけにもいかない

String.Source: As you can see from my bandages, it's not that I'm unwilling, it's that I'm physically unable.
String.Dest: この包帯を見ればお分かりだと思いますが、やりたくないのではなくできない体なんです

String.Source: Something has shifted in the moons, brother.
String.Dest: 月の中で何かが変わったわ、同志よ

String.Source: There are people I've met and worked with over the years. We need their skills, their talents, if we're going to survive this.
String.Dest: ここ何年かの間に私が知り合い協力し合った人々がいる。この状況を切り抜けるには、彼らの技術と才能が必要だ

String.Source: A Moth Priest? What in Oblivion do you need a Moth Priest for?
String.Dest: 聖蚕の僧侶だと？ 一体どうしてそんなものが必要になるんだ？

String.Source: Besides, I can't imagine a single place my father would avoid looking. And he's had all this time, too.
String.Dest: それに、父が探すのをためらう場所なんてありますかしら。探す時間だっていくらでもあるわけですし

String.Source: Now you're beginning to see why I wanted to protect Serana, and why I've kept the other Elder Scroll as far from her as possible.
String.Dest: これで、私がセラーナを守りたかった理由、そして星霜の書を彼女からできるだけ遠ざけてきた理由が分かり始めたでしょう

String.Source: Home? Well, where is that? Some dusty crypt or frigid cave?
String.Dest: 家とは？ ほこりだらけの墓穴か、凍りついた洞窟？

String.Source: You've nothing to fear from me. Please, we have much to discuss.
String.Dest: 恐れる必要は何もない。話したい事がたくさんある

String.Source: Forgive my astonishment, but I never thought I'd witness the death of that dragon.
String.Dest: 驚いてごめんなさい、でもあのドラゴンの死を見るとは思いもしなかったの

String.Source: A small measure of his blood now and forever flows through your veins.
String.Dest: 彼の血は少量でも、永遠に君の血管を流れ続けるんだ

String.Source: Got a pretty full stock of potions and alchemy reagents.
String.Dest: 薬や錬金術の材料を取り揃えてる

String.Source: That was the plan, yes. Assuming the rest of them can trust a vampire. Come on, I'll need you to help convince them.
String.Dest: そのつもりですわ。残りの者達が吸血鬼を信用できればですが。さあ、行きましょう。説得するのにあなたの助けが必要になりそうですわ

String.Source: Return to me when your part is done.
String.Dest: やるべき事が済んだら戻ってきてくれ

String.Source: He doesn't know we're here. I don't have time to explain.
String.Dest: わたし達がここにいるのをお父様は知りませんわ。説明している時間はありませんの

String.Source: Free? No. I have been here too long, Qahnaarin.
String.Dest: 自由だと？ 我はここに長居しすぎたのだ、クァーナーリン

String.Source: It is the greatest token we can bestow upon those we love and wish to see protected.
String.Dest: 我々が愛し守るべき者達に捧げられる最高の贈り物をね

String.Source: But we have to stop him. Before he goes too far. And to do that, we need the Elder Scroll.
String.Dest: それでも尚、お父様を止めなければなりませんわ。手遅れになる前に。そのためには星霜の書が必要ですのよ

String.Source: It's a long story.
String.Dest: 長い話だよ

String.Source: She was practically smirking as we left home. Almost like she was proud of herself.
String.Dest: わたし達が家を出る時、母はにやついているようにさえ見えた。勝ち誇ったかのようでしたわ

String.Source: An impressive display, but a wasted effort. You delay nothing but your own deaths!
String.Dest: いい態度だ。しかし、死ぬのが少し遅くなるだけだ！

String.Source: I knew it! I knew Arkay would save me. I asked for help, and he sent you!
String.Dest: やっぱり！ アーケイが救ってくれた。彼に助けを求めたから、あんたが来たんだ

String.Source: I like what Isran has done with the place. It's good to see someone else who's really prepared.
String.Dest: あそこでは、イスランはいい仕事をしたわね。自分の他にも有事に備えている人がいると分かって嬉しいわ

String.Source: And yet, I have fallen so low that I must justify myself to a wanderer in the sewers of this backwater of the world.
String.Dest: それでもこれほど落ちぶれたからには、世界の果ての下水道に住む放浪者を自称せざるを得ないわね

String.Source: No, I just... I thought perhaps...
String.Dest: いいえ。僕はただ… たぶんこうじゃないかと…

String.Source: There's only one thing worth remembering.
String.Dest: 覚えておく価値がある事はひとつだけだ

String.Source: It's important, so please just listen before your friend, here, loses his patience.
String.Dest: 大事な事ですから、そこのお友達がかんしゃくを起こす前に黙って聞いて下さいませ

String.Source: Here's where I fell. Feels like ages ago.
String.Dest: 落ちたのはここだよ。ずいぶん昔に感じるな

String.Source: Even in the Soul Cairn, the defeat of the World Eater has reached my ears, Dovahkiin.
String.Dest: ソウル・ケルン内にいても、世界を喰らう者を打ち破った事は耳にしているぞ、ドヴァーキン

String.Source: I find your choice of words quite interesting considering that Serana is in far more danger now than she was following my "foolish plan."
String.Dest: セラーナが私の“ばかげた計画”に従っていた頃よりも今の方がはるかに危険な事を考えると、あなたの言葉の選択は極めて興味深いわ

String.Source: That is... I don't think we'll actually trip over her there. But it's worth a look.
String.Dest: つまり… そこへ行っても母に会えるとは思わないのですけど、調べる価値はありそうですわ

String.Source: That something... was probably me.
String.Dest: その何かとは… おそらくわたし自身の事ですわね

String.Source: I fear that my time here has taken its toll upon me. I share a bond with this dreaded place.
String.Dest: ここには長居しすぎたようだ。我とこの地との繋がりはもはや断てぬ

String.Source: Vampires? Really?
String.Dest: 吸血鬼？ 本当なの？

String.Source: No! I will not allow that happen. The Elder Scrolls only tell of events that might be, not events that will be.
String.Dest: だめよ！ それは起こさせないわ。星霜の書は起こり得る出来事を示すだけ、起こる出来事そのものではないのよ

String.Source: The vampires will show us no mercy. They've proven that.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼達は容赦なしだぞ。歴史がそれを証明している

String.Source: Well, let's move then. I'm nothing if not persuasive.
String.Dest: さあ、先を急ぎましょう。わたしは説得力には自信がございますのよ

String.Source: I'm sorry, my friend. I can no longer be of use in this matter.
String.Dest: 悪いがこの件に関してはもうお役に立てないよ

String.Source: Take the scroll, then be on your way.
String.Dest: 書を受け取って、行きなさい

String.Source: As you know, vampires are powerful, but we have limits. Our great enemy is the sun, and until recently it's an enemy we've had no way to fight.
String.Dest: 知っての通り、吸血鬼は強大な力をもつが、限界もある。最大の敵は太陽であり、最近までは戦う術のない相手だった

String.Source: This is true, but my techniques only work on the living. You've chosen a different path to remake yourself.
String.Dest: これは本当よ、でも私の技術は生者にしか使えない。あなたは自分を作り変える別の道をすでに選んだ

String.Source: Knowing him, anything at all that reminded him of her was just destroyed.
String.Dest: 父の性分を考えると、母を思い出させるあらゆる要素が破壊されたでしょうね

String.Source: By forging something, of course!
String.Dest: もちろん、何かの鋳造によってね！

String.Source: What do you need? Blades, armor, smithing materials?
String.Dest: 何がほしい？ 剣か、鎧か、鍛造の材料か？

String.Source: I'm sorry, I had heard there were vampire hunters here. I thought they might want to know about a vampire plot to enslave the rest of the world.
String.Dest: ここには吸血鬼ハンターがいると聞きましたので。吸血鬼達が世界を隷属させる計画を練っているとなれば、知りたがるかと思ったのです

String.Source: Well, some necromancers believe they are the crystalline structures dotting the Soul Cairn.
String.Dest: まあ、実力のある死霊術師の中には、彼らはソウル・ケルンに点状に存在する結晶構造体だと信じている者もいるけど

String.Source: Hold it right there.
String.Dest: ちょっと待ってくれ

String.Source: I thought I'd be able to allay the after effects, but I was wrong. Now I'm paying for it.
String.Dest: 後遺症を和らげる事ができると思ったが、それは間違いだった。自業自得だよ

String.Source: I suppose you could call this the ultimate waiting game, each watching the other to see which will give in.
String.Dest: 究極の持久戦と呼べるかも知れないわ。どちらが先に降参するか、お互いに監視し合う

String.Source: You know where to find me if you need more.
String.Dest: 必要になったら来てくれ

String.Source: All I wanted is for us to be a family again... for things to return to the way they were before.
String.Dest: 私の望みは再び家族になる事だけ… 物事が以前と同じに戻る事だけなのよ

String.Source: Even with all my preparations, we can't be too careful. The monsters could strike at us at any moment.
String.Dest: できるだけ準備はしたが、念には念を入れないとな。バケモノがいつ襲ってくるか分かったものじゃない

String.Source: Just know that... whatever path you choose, I won't think any less of you. Sometimes things just have to be done.
String.Dest: 言っておきますが、どの道を選んでもあなたに対するわたしの考えは変わりませんの。時には止むを得ない状況もありましてよ

String.Source: Then you will be prey, like all mortals. I will spare your life this once, but you will be banished from this hall.
String.Dest: ならばお前は他の定命の者同様、獲物に過ぎん。今度だけは見逃してやるが、この殿堂からは追放とする

String.Source: Take good care of it for me.
String.Dest: 大事に扱ってね

String.Source: Incredible. Simply incredible.
String.Dest: すごい。ただただすごいですわ

String.Source: And from what I could tell, a thousand extra years of obsession haven't made him any better. We should have found him a hobby.
String.Dest: わたしに分かる限りでは、さらに千年ほど没頭した事で改善するはずもなかったようですわね。何か趣味でも見つけてあげるべきでしたわ

String.Source: She worried about me. About all of us. But she wanted to get me as far away from my father as possible before he really went over the edge.
String.Dest: 母はわたしの身を案じましたの。わたし達全員の身を。でも父が我慢の限界に達する前に、わたしを彼からなるべく遠くに離したがっていた

String.Source: Yes?
String.Dest: はい？

String.Source: You don't scare me.
String.Dest: 脅しには乗らない

String.Source: I'm sorry. I wish I knew a better way, something that would be easier for you.
String.Dest: あなたの負担が軽い、もっと冴えたやり方を知っていればよかったのですけど…

String.Source: As you wish.
String.Dest: かしこまりました

String.Source: You're lucky to be alive, then. I'm guessing you don't have a plan for where to go next, then?
String.Dest: でしたら、まだ生きてる事に感謝なさって。次にどこへ行くかも分からないのでしょう？

String.Source: Who sent you?
String.Dest: 誰に言われてここに？

String.Source: By the blood of my ancestors...
String.Dest: ああ、ご先祖様、なんて事ですの……

String.Source: What? No, no. Yes, I see. All right.
String.Dest: えっ？ いえ、いいえ、はい。分かりました

String.Source: I find it hard to believe he's changed his mind. He said some very hurtful things to me before I left.
String.Dest: 彼の気が変わったとは思えない。ひどく傷つくような事まで言われたのよ

String.Source: ...this is where I ended up. It was... quite the fall.
String.Dest: …あたしの最後の場所だ。すごい落ちっぷりだったな…

String.Source: Hsss
String.Dest: シャー！

String.Source: Falmer up ahead.
String.Dest: ファルメルがこの先にいるよ

String.Source: Gaan...
String.Dest: ガーン…

String.Source: What the... get back! Hurry!
String.Dest: あれは… 戻って！ 早く！

String.Source: Please, make use of my coffin whenever the need arises.
String.Dest: どうか私の棺を使ってほしい。必要なときにはいつでも

String.Source: Oh, very well. I don't know how you expect me to keep this place in order when I can't make a profit.
String.Dest: そうかい。利益を上げずに店を経営しろとか言うんじゃないだろうな？

String.Source: Gah...
String.Dest: ぐう…

String.Source: That's what he's after. He wants to control the sun, have vampires control the world.
String.Dest: 父の狙いはそこなのです。太陽を操り、吸血鬼に世界全体を支配させたいと考えています

String.Source: Something has shifted in the moons, sister.
String.Dest: 月の中で何かが変わったわ、同志よ

String.Source: The obvious answer is to go to the Imperial City. The Moth Priests make their home in the White Gold Tower.
String.Dest: 帝都に行け、というのが当然の答えだ。聖蚕の僧侶達は白金の塔に住んでいる

String.Source: Any other ideas?
String.Dest: 他にいい考えはありまして？

String.Source: Caves? Oh, no. The Chantry encompasses far more than a few caves, as you'll soon discover.
String.Dest: 洞窟？ いや、それは大きな勘違いだ。今に分かる。この礼拝所はただの洞窟の集まりなどではない

String.Source: Keep watch for Durnehviir. With the prison's barrier down, he's almost certain to investigate.
String.Dest: ダーネヴィールに警戒して。牢獄の障壁が壊れた今、調査しに来るのはほぼ確実よ

String.Source: And you'd do well to be more careful of whom you engage in witty banter.
String.Dest: 軽妙なおしゃべりの相手はもっと慎重に選んだ方がいいね

String.Source: Volumes written on Durnehviir allege that he can't be slain by normal means. It appears they were mistaken.
String.Dest: ダーネヴィールの記述がある巻では、通常の手段では殺せないと断言している。間違いだったようね

String.Source: A handful of soul gem shards, some finely-ground bone meal, a good bit of purified void salts...
String.Dest: 魂石の破片をいくつか、細かく引いた骨の粉、浄化された虚無の塩をかなりの量…

String.Source: My name is Serana. Were you... sent to wake me?
String.Dest: わたしはセラーナ。あなたは… わたしを目覚めさせにいらしたの？

String.Source: Oh, I'm sure I have something you'll find useful.
String.Dest: 君の役に立ちそうなものを持ってるよ

String.Source: He stopped in to do some research in the library, then left for Dragon Bridge. If you hurry, you might catch him there.
String.Dest: 図書館で調べ物をしに立ち寄った後に、ドラゴン・ブリッジに向かったようだ。急げば向こうで追いつけるかもな

String.Source: These vampires claimed they had some purpose in store for me, but they wouldn't say what. Probably hoping to ransom me, the fools.
String.Dest: この吸血鬼達は私に対して何か企んでると言ってたが、詳しくは語らなかった。おそらく身代金目当てだろう。愚か者どもめ

String.Source: Go ahead, give it a try.
String.Dest: さあ、試してみて

String.Source: I... I can't really tell.
String.Dest: わたしには… 何とも言えませんわ

String.Source: Don't worry, I'm not in any danger or anything like that. It'll just be more unpleasant to run into my father.
String.Dest: 別段、危険にさらされてるわけではございませんの。父に会うのがそれだけ不愉快な出来事になるだけで

String.Source: I... I feel... different. What happened?
String.Dest: 違う… 感じがする。何が起きた？

String.Source: I merely wish to respectfully ask a favor of you.
String.Dest: そなたに頼み事をさせてもらいたい

String.Source: Forgive me, my instinct was to grant you this title. I am uncertain why. Perhaps one day it will become clear to both of us.
String.Dest: 許せ、かようにもこの称号を与えねばならぬと思えたのだ。理由は我にも分からん。いつか明かされる日が来るのかも知れないが…

String.Source: So, it is real...
String.Dest: 本物なんだね…

String.Source: I feel terrible for the dead who end up here for eternity. Seems awful. Like they're still suffering.
String.Dest: こんな所で永遠に過ごさなければならないと思いますとお寒いですわね。死んだあとも苦しみが続いてるようなものですわよ

String.Source: Are you alright? That looked painful.
String.Dest: 大丈夫ですの？ 苦しそうでしたけど

String.Source: The sooner we get the scroll home, the sooner we deal with my father.
String.Dest: 早く書を持ち帰る事ができましたら、それだけ早く父と決着をつけられますのよ

String.Source: I knew it would come to this one day. I knew, and no one believed.
String.Dest: いつかこうなるのは分かっていた。でも誰もそれを信じようとはしなかったのだ

String.Source: For countless years I've roamed the Soul Cairn, in unintended service to the Ideal Masters.
String.Dest: 我は幾星霜もの間ソウル・ケルンをさまよい、意図せずしてアイディール・マスターどもに仕えていた

String.Source: Sorry, what?
String.Dest: ごめん、何？

String.Source: Arkay has some grave news, friend.
String.Dest: アーケイから悪い報せが届いたんだ

String.Source: I see. Where are you taking me, then? Is that much my business?
String.Dest: 分かりましたわ。それで、どこに連れて行く気かしら？ わたしに関係のある所ですの？

String.Source: My love! I knew you'd come for me! I just knew it!
String.Dest: 愛しの君よ！ やっぱり来てくれたな！ 思った通りだ！

String.Source: What I can't figure out is why she said it that way.
String.Dest: なぜあのような言い方をしたのかよく分かりませんわ

String.Source: His own little fortress. Well, I guess I'll get to see what he's been up to all this time.
String.Dest: 自分だけの要塞というわけだ。まあ、今まで何を企んでたのかを確かめる、いい機会になるな

String.Source: Surprised you weren't at the last meeting with our Lord, Vingalmo. Too busy plotting to overthrow him to show up?
String.Dest: 王との前回の会合にいなかったとは意外だな、ヴィンガルモ。謀反をくわだてるのに忙しくて、出られなかったのか？

String.Source: Well, well. Where've you been, Vingalmo? Nose stuck in a book all day?
String.Dest: おやおや、どこにいたんだ、ヴィンガルモ？ 一日中本にでも埋もれていたか？

String.Source: You see the Tyranny of the Sun as your chance at deification, and like Harkon you won't hesitate to destroy anything that stands in your path.
String.Dest: 太陽の専制を自分の神格化の好機と見なしているのね。そしてハルコンと同じく、邪魔するものすべての破壊もためらわない

String.Source: Well, back before I... you know. The College of Winterhold was the first place I'd think to go for any kind of magic or historical thing.
String.Dest: まあ以前は… 色々と。最初に行こうと考えたのはウィンターホールド大学でしたわ。魔法や歴史を学ぼうと思いましたの

String.Source: You haven't seen a sack full of dwarven gyros lying around, have you? I'd swear I left it right here.
String.Dest: この辺りに、ドゥーマーのジャイロが入った袋はなかった？ 確かにここに置いたんだけど

String.Source: Well, well. He wants the Chalice, then.
String.Dest: なるほど。彼の望みは聖杯か

String.Source: Hsss
String.Dest: シャー！

String.Source: In the unlikely event that I ever require you for some reason, I shall find you. Until then I see no reason for us to be speaking.
String.Dest: 万が一何かの用事ができた時は、こちらから君を見つけるよ。それまで君とおしゃべりする理由はないな

String.Source: Maybe.
String.Dest: そうですわね

String.Source: This "stranger" has done more for me in the brief time I've known him than you've done in centuries!
String.Dest: その“よそ者”の彼は、お母様が何世紀もの間にしてくれた以上の事を、わずかな間にしてくれましたのよ！

String.Source: Questions? I expected as much.
String.Dest: 質問はあるか？ 分からない事も多いだろう

String.Source: Once it's dealt with, then perhaps I'll see what Isran expects of me.
String.Dest: あれを退治できたら、イスランに耳を貸してやってもいい

String.Source: That was... not as useful as I would have liked. Even so, you did well.
String.Dest: どうもあれは… 期待していたほど有用ではなかったな。それでも上出来には変わらない

String.Source: I'll take this one back to the castle.
String.Dest: これは城に持って帰っておくわ

String.Source: Get the ingredients in the vessel and let me know when you're ready.
String.Dest: 材料を器に入れて、準備ができましたらお知らせになって

String.Source: Very good. Should you visit him again, I suspect you'll find our new sibling appreciates his transformation.
String.Dest: 素晴らしい。彼に次会った時、我々の新しい同胞として自分に起こった変化を感謝してる事が分かるだろう

String.Source: Destroying the head vampire is usually sufficient to scatter its minions, though it's best to destroy every last one of them.
String.Dest: 大抵は頭目格の吸血鬼を倒せば手下どもは四散するが、最後の1体まで根絶やしにするのが最善ではある

String.Source: This stranger aligns himself with those that would hunt you down and slay you like an animal, yet I should entrust you to him?
String.Dest: このよそ者はあなたを追いつめて動物のように殺す者達と手を組んでいるのよ。それなのにあなたを預けるべきだと？

String.Source: Indeed. She's off to Redwater Den.
String.Dest: いかにも。彼女はレッドウォーターの隠れ家へ向かった

String.Source: I've been asking myself the same thing since we came back to the castle.
String.Dest: お城に戻って以来、同じ事を自問してきましたわ

String.Source: May I strongly suggest that you make a visit to this spouse of yours and "invite" her to the family by offering her Harkon's Gift.
String.Dest: 君の伴侶を訪問して、彼女を家族に“招待”する事を強く勧めるよ。ハルコンの贈り物を彼女に捧げるんだ

String.Source: Focus on the dragon!
String.Dest: ドラゴンに集中して！

String.Source: Hmm, I suppose I can work with your face. After all, the sculptor cannot always choose the finest clay.
String.Dest: ふむ、あなたの顔を何とかできそうね。結局、彫刻家がいつも最高の土を選べるわけじゃないもの

String.Source: I've located the petrified remains of an elder vampire. Bring them to me, and I should be able to extend the effects granted by the Blood Chalice.
String.Dest: 太古の吸血鬼が石化した遺体の在処を見つけた。遺体を持ってきてくれたら、血の聖杯の効果を延長させる事ができるはずだ

String.Source: Oh, and I suppose now he remembers that I proposed no less than three different scenarios that involved vampires overrunning the population.
String.Dest: そういえば、吸血鬼が人口の大多数を占めるようになるまでのシナリオを何通りも提示した事があるけど、今は信じてくれてるんでしょうね

String.Source: Hsss...Hsss
String.Dest: シャー… シャー

String.Source: Though there's plenty more where he came from. Be ever watchful.
String.Dest: 仲間はまだ大勢いるはずだ。気を抜くなよ

String.Source: I guess so.
String.Dest: そうかも知れませんわね

String.Source: That was my theory, you know. My research. My life's work. All of it, lost! Stolen by my own damn apprentice!
String.Dest: あれはあたしの理論だったんだ。あたしの研究。一生の仕事。それをすべて失った！ 自分の見習いに盗まれたんだよ！

String.Source: Why, you would be distraught with emotion, perhaps even to the point of questioning your loyalty to this Court. And we ours to you.
String.Dest: 君は感情を抑えきれず取り乱すだろう。もしかしたらこの宮廷への忠誠が揺らぐかも知れない。そして我々は君の心変わりを疑うというわけだ

String.Source: And what's this thing?
String.Dest: それにしても、これはなんなのかしら？

String.Source: It's not a question of trust... he's just obsessed with the prophecy.
String.Dest: 信頼うんぬんの問題ではなくて… 父は予言一辺倒になってしまったの

String.Source: They didn't stop to visit, though. They rode through town heading south, and went across the big bridge.
String.Dest: ここには立ち寄らなかったけどね。南に向かって街を走り抜けて、大きな橋を渡って行ったんだ

String.Source: Very well. I'll hurry on my way there before more of those vampires turn up.
String.Dest: 分かった。吸血鬼達がぞろぞろ現れる前にすぐそこに向かおう

String.Source: Track him down and dispose of him.
String.Dest: その男を追い詰めて始末してくれ

String.Source: I'll set out at once, then.
String.Dest: 直ちに出発します

String.Source: Unless...
String.Dest: もしくは…

String.Source: For centuries I searched for an answer to this problem. I found an old prophecy written by a Moth Priest, those scholars who read the Elder Scrolls.
String.Dest: 私は何世紀もこの問題の解決方法を探してきた。そして星霜の書を読んだという学者達、聖蚕の僧侶の一人が記した古い予言を発見した

String.Source: A feral-blooded has holed up with a group of necromancers. Likely wants to create a nest of broodlings.
String.Dest: 野蛮な血の者が死霊術師の一団と一緒に潜伏したわ。おそらく同族の隠れ場所を作りたいのね

String.Source: I saw a drawing of this once. This shard... it's... it's part of a key. A key made of pure Aetherium! The key to the Forge!
String.Dest: これの絵を見た事があるよ。この破片は… 鍵の一部だよ。純粋なエセリウムからできた鍵！ 鋳造器具への鍵だ！

String.Source: You don't scare me. Let's go.
String.Dest: 脅しは必要ない。行こう

String.Source: That's the thing... what's the point of a moondial? I always wondered why she didn't just have the whole thing ripped out.
String.Dest: そこなのですが… 月の満ち欠けを知ってどうするのかしら？ なぜ丸ごと撤去しないのか、昔から不思議でしたの

String.Source: This one's mine!
String.Dest: これはあたしのものだよ！

String.Source: I've located the whereabouts of a vampire masquerading as a common citizen.
String.Dest: 一般市民になりすましている吸血鬼の居場所が判明した

String.Source: But for Serana's sake, I'll assist you in any way that I can.
String.Dest: でもセラーナのために、どんな手段を使っても支援するわよ

String.Source: It's really too bad, you know. The little accident you had here, completely unexpected...
String.Dest: 本当に残念ね。ここで起きた、完全に予想外のささいな出来事が…

String.Source: Put his mind to rest, allay his fear through vampiric seduction and when he is in a pliant condition, embrace him and bite him on the neck.
String.Dest: 彼の心を落ち着かせて、吸血鬼の誘惑でその恐れを鎮める。そして彼が従順になったら、抱きしめて首筋に噛みつけばいい

String.Source: Wait, what? That's not what we agreed. We take it back together.
String.Dest: ちょっと待った… 何だって？ 話が違うぞ。一緒にそれを取り戻すはずじゃないか

String.Source: Hsss...
String.Dest: シャー…

String.Source: Well of course they did.
String.Dest: 彼らは当然そうした

String.Source: Although I would gladly die by your hand, perhaps I could offer an alternative way to read the scrolls?
String.Dest: あなた様の手にかかって死ぬのは本望ですが、書を読む別の方法をできれば教えて差し上げたいです

String.Source: When you offer the embrace, do so away from prying eyes. Our new sibling will then likely require rest while her blood undergoes the change.
String.Dest: 抱きしめる時は人目を避けるように。おそらく我々の新しい同胞は、血が変化する間休息を必要とするだろう

String.Source: I can't guarantee you'd be free from harm. Becoming blind could be the least of your worries.
String.Dest: 君に危害が及ばない保証はない。何も見えなくなるのは、心配事の中でも一番ましな方かも知れないよ

String.Source: Your friend, kidnapped!
String.Dest: 友達が、さらわれた！

String.Source: She had a theory about soul gems. That the souls inside of them don't just vanish when they're used... they end up in the Soul Cairn.
String.Dest: 母は魂石に関する仮説を話してくれましたわ。中の魂が消費されてもただ消えるのではなく、ソウル・ケルンの中に送られるのかも知れないと

String.Source: I'm afraid in my haste to read the first scroll, I neglected the time I needed to prepare. The failure is purely mine to bear.
String.Dest: 最初の書を早く読みたくて、ちゃんとした準備を怠ったのです。自業自得ですよ

String.Source: It's not exactly the hospitality I'm used to, but your man Isran has seen to my needs well enough.
String.Dest: こういうおもてなしには不慣れだが、君の友達のイスランはとてもよくしてくれているよ

String.Source: Should your husband go missing, perhaps unable to bear the thought of living with a... a monster...
String.Dest: 夫がいなくなったらどうする？ 一緒に住むのが耐えられなくなって… その… バケモノとね

String.Source: Should your blushing bride go missing, perhaps unable to bear the thought of living with a... a monster...
String.Dest: 清らかな君の花嫁がいなくなったらどうする？ 一緒に住むのが耐えられなくなって… その… バケモノとね

String.Source: My sincerest pardons, I but look after your own peace of mind.
String.Dest: 悪いね、でも君の心の平穏って奴が気になったんだ

String.Source: The air, the ground... this is all wrong.
String.Dest: 空気も、地面も… 何もかも間違ってますわ

String.Source: In my language, the Qahnaarin is the Vanquisher, the one who has bested a fellow dovah in battle.
String.Dest: 我らの言葉でクァーナーリンは征服者を意味する。仲間のドヴァーを戦いで打ち破った者の事だ

String.Source: Now you decide to give up? Fine. I'll be here.
String.Dest: あきらめるわけ？ いいよ。あたしはここにいるから

String.Source: All right. Good luck.
String.Dest: 分かった。がんばってね

String.Source: I believe there's more to it than that.
String.Dest: 私はそれ以上の存在だと思うわ

String.Source: It's ruled by unseen beings known as the Ideal Masters.
String.Dest: そこはアイディール・マスターと呼ばれる不可視の存在達が支配する場所ですの

String.Source: Go cull the brutish beasts before the problem gets out of hand.
String.Dest: 問題が手に負えなくなる前に、野蛮な獣達を処分してきなさい

String.Source: Let me see it. ...Huh...
String.Dest: ちょっと見せて。…ふふん…

String.Source: Make it seem you are a member of the Dawnguard, thus sowing confusion among the herd. Wear this armor and plant this note on the victim.
String.Dest: ドーンガードのメンバーになりすまし、大衆を混乱させるんだ。この鎧を着て、それからこのメモを犠牲者の死体に仕込んでおけ

String.Source: What happened to this place?
String.Dest: ここで一体何がありましたの？

String.Source: If only such a miracle existed, I'd overcome the impossible in order to secure it if it meant pleasing you.
String.Dest: そんな奇跡が起こせるなら、不可能を可能にしてあなた様を喜ばせるのに…

String.Source: Isran? My help?
String.Dest: イスラン？ 手を貸せと？

String.Source: The dovah roamed the skies, vying for their small slices of territory that resulted in immense and ultimately fatal battles.
String.Dest: ドヴァーは大空を舞い、細切れとなった領土を奪い合って、やがてどちらかが命を落とすであろう決戦を繰り広げる事になった

String.Source: I saw more than enough political maneuvering in my time in House Dres. I was tired of it then, and I'm tired of it now.
String.Dest: ドレス家にいた頃、さんざん政治工作を見てきた。昔も今もうんざりだ

String.Source: Indeed. It is no small thing to submit yourself to the flesh sculptor's knife.
String.Dest: そうよね。肉体改造医のナイフに身を委ねるのは容易ではないわ

String.Source: Fine, fine. No need to get your breeches in a twist.
String.Dest: そうか、そうか。そんなにムキにならなくてもいいだろう

String.Source: I can't even begin to imagine how much time she spent in this room. Doesn't look too cozy.
String.Dest: この部屋で一体どれだけ長い時間を過ごしたのかしら。そんなに居心地が良さそうには見えないのに

String.Source: That doesn't exactly make me want to open up.
String.Dest: 信用したくはなりませんわね

String.Source: A Moth Priest? I'm sorry, but I don't know anything about that.
String.Dest: 聖蚕の僧侶？ 悪いけど、何も知らない

String.Source: The Elder Scroll is just a bit further.
String.Dest: 星霜の書はあとほんの少し先よ

String.Source: I am Harkon, lord of this court.
String.Dest: 私の名はハルコン、この一族の王である

String.Source: It's on an island near Solitude. Hopefully we can find a boat to take us there.
String.Dest: ソリチュードの近くの島にございますわ。渡るのに使える小船でもあるといいのですが

String.Source: Do I detect a hint of reproach? I am only looking out for your best interests. And perhaps, a small measure of my own.
String.Dest: もしかして気に食わないのかな？ 君のためを思っての事だが… まあ、ちょっとは私のためでもあるけど

String.Source: It's come to my inescapable attention that you, my dear friend, are married.
String.Dest: 友よ、君は結婚してるね。私の目はごまかせないよ

String.Source: And here we are.
String.Dest: さあ着いたぞ

String.Source: Really?
String.Dest: 本当か？

String.Source: Lord Harkon has never cared to use the Chalice, relying on his more than adequate powers until now.
String.Dest: ハルコン卿は自分のあり余る力を当てにして、今まで一度も聖杯を使おうとしなかった

String.Source: Lord Harkon. Remember your place.
String.Dest: ハルコン卿。立場をおわきまえに

String.Source: I hope I have something that interests you. I always wish to be of service.
String.Dest: 何かお気に召すものがあるといいけど。人様の役に立ってこその商売だからね

String.Source: Anyway, I'm quite happy in my current pursuits. So if you'll excuse me...
String.Dest: とにかく、私は今の仕事に満足してるから。じゃあ、失礼…

String.Source: Now, I believe that Lord Harkon wishes to speak with you.
String.Dest: さて、ハルコン卿がお前と話したがっている事だろう

String.Source: Have you been listening to me? Like Serana, I'm a pure-blooded vampire. My presence on Tamriel is as much of a danger as hers.
String.Dest: ちゃんと話を聞いていた？ セラーナと同様、私も純血の吸血鬼よ。タムリエルに私がいれば、彼女がいるのと同じぐらい危険よ

String.Source: Hmmm. Not bad. We'd better hope that's good enough. Mistakes with these kinds of portals can be... gruesome.
String.Dest: あらまあ、悪くないですわね。それで事足りると願いたいですわ。こういった転移門で手違いをしてしまうと… それはおぞましい結果になる事がございますのよ

String.Source: Well that's just fine. Orthjolf told me to finish off anyone who got in the way.
String.Dest: 大丈夫だ。オースユルフは邪魔する奴全員を始末しろと言っていた

String.Source: We're just lucky I was here to return the Chalice to Vingalmo, so he could make sure Harkon gets it back.
String.Dest: ハルコンが確実に聖杯を取り戻せるよう、私がヴィンガルモへ返しに来ていたのは単なる幸運よ

String.Source: Excellent. That's one less beast and nest of broodlings we needn't worry about any longer.
String.Dest: 素晴らしい。これで危険な化け物一家を一つ減らせたわけだな

String.Source: Change it? I can remake your face, if that's what you desire.
String.Dest: 変えるの？ お望みなら、あなたの顔を作り直せるわよ

String.Source: And instead you found me. So what's your next step, now that I'm here?
String.Dest: 代わりにわたしを見つけたわけですのね。それで、次はどうしますの？ わたしはここにおりますのよ？

String.Source: You came for me? How did you know? I thought I was going to die in here. Thank you!
String.Dest: 助けに来てくれたのか？ なぜ分かったんだ？ ここで死ぬと思ったよ。ありがとう！

String.Source: You'd think a vampire would be right at home in this place. You'd be wrong. Let's just find my mother and get out of here, quickly.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼にはかえって居心地がよさそうですって？ それは誤解ですわ。とにかく早いところ母を探し出してここからおさらばしましょう

String.Source: Very good. That should, for a time, direct the people's anger towards the Dawnguard and away from us.
String.Dest: よし。これでしばらく人々の怒りの目はこちらから離れてドーンガードに向けられるだろう

String.Source: I... I almost can't believe it. We did it! We actually did it!
String.Dest: ああ… 信じられないよ。やった！ 本当にやったんだ！

String.Source: Wonderful. I'll make the necessary preparations for infusion into the Chalice presently.
String.Dest: 素晴らしい。では聖杯に注ぐものをすぐ準備する事にしよう

String.Source: It's pointless and vague, like all prophecies. The part he latched onto said that vampires would no longer need to fear the sun.
String.Dest: 例にもれず、予言とは話があいまいで見えないもの。父がその中で注目したのは、吸血鬼が太陽を恐れずにすむようになるという一節でしたの

String.Source: What is your command?
String.Dest: ご命令は？

String.Source: What are you waiting for? Get out there and find a moth priest!
String.Dest: 何を待っている？ 出かけていって聖蚕の僧侶を探すのだ！

String.Source: Come now, and hear my proclamation.
String.Dest: さあ、我が宣言を聞くがいい

String.Source: Look at the device here - the gear in the center is just about the right size. Try putting the shards in and... we'll see what happens.
String.Dest: ここの機器を見て… 中心の歯車がちょうどいい大きさだね。破片をはめ込んでみて… どうなるか確かめてみよう

String.Source: Now that I have reclaimed one of my Elder Scrolls, we must find a Moth Priest to read it.
String.Dest: 今ここに星霜の書の一つを取り戻せた、ゆえに聖蚕の僧侶を見つけて読ませる必要がある

String.Source: Don't know how well I'd have managed by myself. You have my thanks.
String.Dest: 自力ではどうなるか分からなかった。ありがたい

String.Source: Oh, most certainly! Let's find out what secrets the scroll can tell.
String.Dest: もちろんだとも！ 書に隠された秘密を探ろうじゃないか

String.Source: Ah, my rescuer! It's good to see you again.
String.Dest: おや、私の救世主じゃないか！ また会えてうれしいよ

String.Source: Come on, old man. You should get some rest.
String.Dest: ご老体よ。少々休んだ方がいいぞ

String.Source: Those last ones helped me immensely. If you could collect this one for me, it's sure to result in extraordinary success!
String.Dest: 前に見つかった分は、すごく役に立ったわ。また見つけてきてくれたら、驚きの成果が挙げられると思うの！

String.Source: You have an Elder Scroll? Remarkable!
String.Dest: 星霜の書を持ってるのか？ すごいじゃないか！

String.Source: I don't recall addressing you, worm.
String.Dest: お前に話しかけた覚えはないぞ、虫ケラ

String.Source: I had no idea you felt that way about me, Serana. It was never my intention to push you aside.
String.Dest: そんなふうに感じていたとは知らなかったわ、セラーナ。のけ者にするつもりなどなかった

String.Source: I never knew the darkness held such colors, or the night air smelled so sweet. You have given me a great gift.
String.Dest: 暗闇がこんなにも色彩豊かで、夜の空気がこれほどまでかぐわしいとは。すばらしいプレゼントをありがとう

String.Source: I'll be here if you change your mind.
String.Dest: 気が変わったら、ここにおりますわ

String.Source: You think I'd have the audacity to place my own daughter in that tomb for the protection of her Elder Scroll alone?
String.Dest: 私が娘を、彼女の星霜の書を守るためだけにあの墓へ置くほど厚かましいと思う？

String.Source: The scrolls are merely a means to an end. The key to the Tyranny of the Sun is Serana herself.
String.Dest: 書は目的達成の手段にすぎない。太陽の専制への鍵はセラーナ自身よ

String.Source: We were once a wealthy and prosperous society that occupied a portion of Skyrim.
String.Dest: 我が同胞はかつて、スカイリムの一部を支配する豊かで高貴な種族だった

String.Source: Well, I certainly can't help any less than the Vigilants of Stendarr, now can I?
String.Dest: まあ、私もステンダールの番人とそれほど変わりはないがな。そうだろう？

String.Source: I can certainly try.
String.Dest: やってみるわ

String.Source: Agh!
String.Dest: ああ！

String.Source: Hold still, then.
String.Dest: では動かないで

String.Source: Got it into his head years back that his experience with animals would help. Trolls in particular, from what I hear.
String.Dest: 数年前から動物との触れ合いが大事だと信じるようになってな… 特にトロールとの交流が重要らしい

String.Source: Well... I trust you'll take care of this unwanted visitor. My guards will not interfere with you carrying out my justice.
String.Dest: なるほど… この招かれざる客を処理してくれるな。お前が私の正義を執行するのに衛兵は干渉しない

String.Source: This attack... it's unlike the vampires. Do we at least know what they were after, or is this completely a lost cause?
String.Dest: 今回の襲撃は… どうも吸血鬼らしくない。我々は少なくとも奴らの狙いが分かっているのか？ それともこれはまったく勝ち目のない戦いなのか？

String.Source: Oh, Serana. If you'd only open your eyes.
String.Dest: ああ、セラーナ。どうか目を覚まして

String.Source: If eternal night fell, there are many who wouldn't stand for it. They would raise armies in attempts to return things to normal.
String.Dest: 永遠の夜が訪れれば、それに我慢できない者達が大勢現れる。彼らは軍隊を召集し、事態を普通に戻そうとするでしょう

String.Source: Once the Initiate completed his mantras, he'd dip a ceremonial ewer in the basin at the wayshrine's center and proceed to the next wayshrine.
String.Dest: 新人は真言を得た後、祠の中央にある水瓶に水差しを浸し、次の祠へ向かうという儀式を行っていた

String.Source: A feral-blooded has holed up with a group of bandits. Likely wants to create a nest of broodlings.
String.Dest: 野蛮な血の者が山賊の一団と一緒に潜伏したわ。おそらく同族の隠れ場所を作りたいのね

String.Source: Very good. That's one less monster we need to worry about.
String.Dest: よし。悩みの種の化け物を1体減らせたな

String.Source: What is it now?
String.Dest: 今度は何？

String.Source: At their bases, the barrier's energy is being drawn from unfortunate souls that have been exiled here.
String.Dest: その根元では、ここに追放されてきた不運な魂から障壁のエネルギーを吸収しているの

String.Source: Before my father became obsessed with the prophecy, mother and I spent quite a bit of time together.
String.Dest: 父が予言にとりつかれる前は、わたしと母は一緒にいる事が多かった

String.Source: Life here is better than you could find anywhere in Skyrim.
String.Dest: ここでの暮らしはスカイリムで一番だよ

String.Source: Thank you for your kindness. I'll remember it the next time I'm feeling hungry.
String.Dest: ご親切にありがとう。次にお腹がすいた時には今のを思い出す事にいたしますわ

String.Source: Your lack of planning fills me with confidence.
String.Dest: その無計画ぶり、頼もしすぎましてよ

String.Source: They slaughtered everyone and stormed the Inner Sanctum where I believe they corrupted Vyrthur.
String.Dest: 皆を殺し、奴らは最奥聖域に攻め込んだ。ヴィルスールはそこで奴らの手に落ちたのだろう

String.Source: Supposedly, they had to build a special forge, the Aetherium Forge, to even work with it.
String.Dest: それを扱うために、彼らは特別にエセリウムの鋳造器具を作り上げる必要があったらしいんだ

String.Source: The Soul Cairn has become a part of what I am. I can never fully call Tamriel my home again, or I would surely perish.
String.Dest: ソウル・ケルンは我が存在の一部と化している。タムリエルに戻ろうとしても、この身は滅んでしまうだろう

String.Source: Your husband, kidnapped!
String.Dest: 旦那さんが、さらわれた！

String.Source: Hmm. Very well. Just tell me what you desire - beauty or hideous deformity, nothing is beyond my skill.
String.Dest: ふーん。結構よ。望みを教えて… 美か、恐ろしい変形か。私の技術で不可能な事はないわ

String.Source: I can hardly believe it. This is it. We've actually found the Forge! At last!
String.Dest: とても信じられない。これだよ。本当に鋳造器具を見つけたんだ！ ついに！

String.Source: Convince the Jarl of the threat and he'll let you destroy the creature. If not, then do your best not to get caught.
String.Dest: まずは吸血鬼の脅威を首長に知らせる事だ。そうすれば堂々と奴の首をとれる。それが無理なら、捕まらないよう最善を尽くせ

String.Source: Orthjolf, I'm surprised!
String.Dest: オースユルフ、驚いたよ！

String.Source: If you wish to learn more about the bow, or obtain Sunhallowed Arrows for it, I'd be more than happy to help. You've but to ask.
String.Dest: あの弓の事が知りたい時や、あの弓で使う太陽神の矢がほしい時は、いつでも言ってくれ。喜んで力になろう

String.Source: He's obsessed... insane. Everyone around him fears him as they would a rabid dog.
String.Dest: 彼は取りつかれて… 正気を失っているわ。周囲の皆が、狂犬を恐れるように彼を恐れている

String.Source: Remember that Harkon isn't to be trusted. No matter what he promises, he'll deceive you in order to get what he wants.
String.Dest: ハルコンは信頼できないという事を覚えておいて。彼が何を約束しようと、望むものを得るためにはあなたを欺くわ

String.Source: Tell me more about what's going on.
String.Dest: 何が起きているのか、聞かせてくれ

String.Source: Both of you were obsessed with your own paths. Your motivations might have been different, but in the end, I'm still just a pawn to you, too.
String.Dest: お父様もお母様も自分の道を譲らなかった。理由はたぶんそれぞれ違っていたのでしょうけど、結局は二人ともわたしをただの道具としか見ておりませんのよ

String.Source: I've tracked this damned bear for two weeks; I'll not let it have any more victims.
String.Dest: あのくそったれなクマをもう2週間も追い続けている。これ以上犠牲を出させてたまるものか

String.Source: In the meantime, we're going to get to the bottom of why a vampire showed up here looking for you.
String.Dest: さて、それでは吸血鬼がなぜ君達を探してここに姿を現したのか、その真相を探るとしようか

String.Source: All right. If nothing else, I suppose it wouldn't hurt to learn more about what's going on so I can better defend myself.
String.Dest: 分かった。どうしてもというなら、状況を詳しく知って自分を守るために、行ってみてもいいわよ

String.Source: Of course! It is my duty to serve, and I am happy to do it!
String.Dest: いいとも！ 人様のお役に立てるのは嬉しいね！

String.Source: Some Imperial scholar arrived in Skyrim a few days ago. I was staking out the road when I saw him pass by. Maybe that's your Moth Priest.
String.Dest: 数日前に帝国の学者がスカイリムにやってきた。路上で張り込みをしていたら、彼が通り過ぎるのが見えたんだ。多分あれは君の探している聖蚕の僧侶だろう

String.Source: Vingalmo and Orthjolf are Harkon's primary advisors. I'm sure they're quite surprised to learn that you're taking the Chalice.
String.Dest: ヴィンガルモとオースユルフはハルコンの第一の相談役だ。お前が聖杯を受けると聞けばさぞ驚くだろう

String.Source: Keep searching for her notes. She probably had a journal or something.
String.Dest: 彼女のノートを探しましょう。たぶん日記か何かをつけていたはずですわ

String.Source: No, you must be mistaken. He made it exceedingly clear the last time we spoke that he had no interest in my help.
String.Dest: きっと何かの間違いだわ。前に話した時、手助けは必要ないとはっきり言われたもの

String.Source: Safe? You call bringing her here safe? Has she explained nothing to you?
String.Dest: 安全？ 彼女をここへ連れてきて安全だと言うの？ 彼女は何も説明しなかった？

String.Source: I understand that, but I really can't leave here without at least one usable piece of dwarven equipment.
String.Dest: それは分かったけど、ドワーフの道具が1つでも作れなければ、ここを離れるわけにはいかないわ

String.Source: Maybe.
String.Dest: そうですわね

String.Source: Our compassion compels us to destroy it.
String.Dest: 我らの思いやりは、その化け物を退治してやる事だ

String.Source: Look, on the edge here. This has been cut, precisely cut. If you had another piece, about the same size, it would... it would snap right in.
String.Dest: ここの縁を見て。正確に切断されている。もし、ほぼ同じ大きさの破片がもう一つあれば… ぴったりはまるはずだよ

String.Source: As for the other, the last that I heard, it was lost in the bowels of a Dwemer ruin.
String.Dest: もう一方については、最後に聞いた話ではドゥーマーの廃墟で失われたとの事だ

String.Source: Master, I have done as you asked and traveled here.
String.Dest: 主様、ご命令を遂行してここに参りました

String.Source: He's been working on that place for years now. Never lets anyone in.
String.Dest: 奴はもう何年もあれに手を加え続けている。誰も中には入れようとしない

String.Source: For all of this to end, he must die.
String.Dest: このすべてを終えるには、彼が死ぬしかない

String.Source: I'll meet you there.
String.Dest: 現地で待ち合わせよう

String.Source: Watch yourself. This bear is vicious.
String.Dest: 用心しろ。実に凶暴なクマだ

String.Source: Oh, he just left a short while ago. He said he'd finished up his work and it was time to move on.
String.Dest: ああ、そいつなら少し前に出てったよ。仕事が済んだから引き払うと言ってね

String.Source: And they have an Elder Scroll.
String.Dest: そして奴らは星霜の書を持っている

String.Source: It's something all right.
String.Dest: これは何やらありそうですわね

String.Source: I often wonder where we'd be if the Dwemer were still around. Ah well. We'll have to manage with the scraps we find.
String.Dest: 今もドゥーマーがいたらどうなってただろうってよく考えるの。まあ、手に入るガラクタで何とかやっていくしかないわね

String.Source: You probably weren't expecting to see me again.
String.Dest: わたしとまた会うとは思っていなかったのでしょうね

String.Source: The Soul Cairn is home to very powerful beings. Necromancers send them souls, and receive powers of their own in return.
String.Dest: ソウル・ケルンには強大な力を持つ存在が複数いる。死霊術師はそれらに魂を送り、見返りとして力を得ている

String.Source: When you offer the embrace, do so away from prying eyes. Our new sibling will then likely require rest while his blood undergoes the change.
String.Dest: 抱きしめる時は人目を避けるように。おそらく我々の新しい同胞は、血が変化する間休息を必要とするだろう

String.Source: (grunt)
String.Dest: うう…

String.Source: Vingalmo and Orthjolf both long for our Lord's throne, but cannot make overt moves against him.
String.Dest: ヴィンガルモとオースユルフは我らの主の玉座を切望している。だが露骨な行動は取れない

String.Source: You know as much as I do. I can't teach you anything new.
String.Dest: 既に同じくらいの腕になってるだろう。これ以上、教えられる事はない

String.Source: Anything else?
String.Dest: 他に何の理由がありまして？

String.Source: Right to the point, aren't you. I like that. Not like those fools in the order.
String.Dest: 短刀直入だな。好ましい事だ。教団の能なしどもとは大違いだよ

String.Source: Sure, that's what they all say.
String.Dest: 当然だね、誰もがそう言うよ

String.Source: Hold it. If you're going downstairs, you keep your weapons to yourself or we'll be getting better acquainted.
String.Dest: 待て、下に下りるなら武器をしまえ。さもないと仲良くする事になるぞ

String.Source: It begins again.
String.Dest: また始まったか

String.Source: By ensuring the Chalice reaches our Lord, you have increased his power over them, and at the same time deprived them of their little pets.
String.Dest: お前は我らの主へ聖杯を確実に届ける事で、彼らに対する主の支配力を強め、同時に彼らの小さなペットを剥奪した

String.Source: For the thousands of years I've served as the Chantry's sentinel, there hasn't been a single visitor here for any other reason.
String.Dest: 礼拝所の守り人として何千年も過ごしてきたが、それ以外の理由で訪ねてきた者は誰もいない

String.Source: Good work. It's always best to deal with a problem by ripping it out at the root.
String.Dest: よくやったわ。問題は根源を引き裂く事で対処するに限るわね

String.Source: An ancient font, full of power. As much as it looks like blood, sadly it is not. Can you imagine if it were? We'd never need to hunt again.
String.Dest: 力に満ちた古代の瓶。血に見えるが、不幸にも違う。そうだった場合を想像できるか？ 二度と狩りの必要はなかっただろう

String.Source: Remember your place, and you'll be taken care of.
String.Dest: 自分の立場をわきまえれば、相手をしてもらえるだろう

String.Source: Son of a...
String.Dest: こんの…

String.Source: An unattended attachment, such as found in your beloved wife creates... an opportunity for unnecessary agitation.
String.Dest: 君の愛する奥さんもしっかりつなぎとめておかないと… 余計な考えを起こす者が現れるかも知れない

String.Source: I'd... rather not get into that with you. If that's all right.
String.Dest: それは… できれば触れたくありませんわ。お分かり頂けて？

String.Source: Indeed. He's off to Redwater Den.
String.Dest: いかにも。彼はレッドウォーターの隠れ家へ向かった

String.Source: She was so sure of what we did to my father, I couldn't help but go along with her. I never thought of the cost.
String.Dest: 父に対してわたし達がした事を、母があまりにも確信をもってやっていたから、ついていくという発想しかありませんでしたわ。代償なんて考えもしなかった

String.Source: What?
String.Dest: 何？

String.Source: My name is Serana. Who sent you here?
String.Dest: わたしはセラーナ。あなた、誰に言われていらっしゃったの？

String.Source: This is my savior, the one who freed me.
String.Dest: これはわたしの心のよりどころ。わたしを自由にしてくれたものですわ

String.Source: You need to locate the tallest of the rocky spires that surround these ruins.
String.Dest: この遺跡を囲む岩のような尖塔のうち一番高いものを探す必要があるわ

String.Source: What have you done to yourself? I can't work with you in this state, night-walker.
String.Dest: 自分に何をしたの？ この状態では取り扱えないわよ、ナイトウォーカー

String.Source: Here you are.
String.Dest: ほらよ

String.Source: We need to find my mother, Valerica.
String.Dest: わたしの母、ヴァレリカを見つけなくては

String.Source: I don't know yet. The Moth Priest died before finishing the transcription, but he did name the Elder Scrolls that contained the prophecy.
String.Dest: まだ分からん。聖蚕の僧侶は写本を終える前に死んでしまったが、予言が書かれた星霜の書の名は記されていた

String.Source: And heed also this. He's no pet. Mistreat the beast or leave him alone for too long, and he'll return to the wild forgetting you ever existed.
String.Dest: それからこれも忘れるな。ペットとは違う。扱いがひどく、長時間放ったらかしにしようものなら、野生に戻ってお前の存在自体を忘れるだろう

String.Source: We're also going to need a sample of her blood. Which... if we could get that, we wouldn't even be trying to do this in the first place.
String.Dest: 彼女の血も少し必要みたいですわ。それが手に入るくらいなら、こんな手順はそもそも必要ないというのに

String.Source: Ah, well, in that case I'll tell you what I know.
String.Dest: なるほど、そういう事なら特別に教えてやるよ

String.Source: I see... similar to the exploding bolt, only this one will cause damage with splintering shards of ice sharp as glass. Charming!
String.Dest: なるほどね… 爆発するボルトに似てるけど、こっちはガラスみたいに鋭い氷の破片をまき散らして敵を傷つけるのね。クールだわ！

String.Source: The previous owners of the castle had a sundial in the courtyard, and obviously that didn't appeal to my mother.
String.Dest: 城の前の住人達は中庭に日時計を作っていて、母はもちろん芳しく思っておりませんでしたわ

String.Source: I don't feel... right... I'm going to lay down... for awhile...
String.Dest: 何か… おかしい… 少しの間… 横になるよ…

String.Source: You are a very welcome addition to this dreary place, my friend. I owe both you and Arkay a great deal.
String.Dest: この退屈な場所にようこそ、友よ。アーケイとあんたには大きな借りがある

String.Source: I think my father wanted to see you. Have you talked to him yet?
String.Dest: 父があなたに会いたがっていたと思いますけれど、もう話はいたしましたの？

String.Source: Depends on who you ask. Some say Molag-Bal himself gave these rings to ancient powerful vampire lords. Some say that is just a myth.
String.Dest: 聞く相手によるね。モラグ・バルが大昔の有力な吸血鬼の王達に自らこの指輪を授けたという話もある。ただの神話にすぎないという人もいる

String.Source: Harkon himself disbelieved in their existence, though perhaps he felt slighted they were not already in his possession and only feigns indifference.
String.Dest: ハルコン自身はその存在を疑ってるよ。でも多分、彼は指輪が自分のものではない事が気に食わないんだ。だから無関心を装ってるのさ

String.Source: Even if I could, it would only serve to hinder your efforts.
String.Dest: たとえできたとしても、あなたの努力の妨げにしかならないわ

String.Source: Rrrraaaaahhhh!
String.Dest: イイィィヤァアー！

String.Source: Not... like... this...
String.Dest: こんな… ふうには…

String.Source: Hey, watch it!
String.Dest: ちょっと、気をつけて！
