String.Source: The last time I saw her, she said that she'd go somewhere safe... somewhere that my father would never search.
String.Dest: 母と最後に会った時は、どこか安全な場所へ行くと言っておりましたわ… 父が決して探さないような場所へ

String.Source: I see you've already taken it upon yourself to gather the information you seek.
String.Dest: 求める情報は自分で集める責任を引き受けたらしいね

String.Source: Come on!
String.Dest: かかっておいで！

String.Source: Got it!
String.Dest: やったね！

String.Source: None of the others ever made it this far.
String.Dest: ここまで来られた奴は他にいないよ

String.Source: Finally came to your senses, eh? Realized what you gave up?
String.Dest: ようやく目が覚めたか？ 自分が何を見過ごしたのかに気づいたか？

String.Source: When I fled Castle Volkihar, I fled with two Elder Scrolls.
String.Dest: ヴォルキハル城を脱出した時、二つの星霜の書を持ち出したわ

String.Source: As far as I've heard, no one's seen them and returned to Tamriel to tell about it.
String.Dest: 聞いた限りでは、それらを目にしてタムリエルに戻れた者はいないようですけれども

String.Source: Lord Harkon's orders, Orthjolf. Calm yourself.
String.Dest: ハルコン卿のご命令だ、オースユルフ。落ち着け

String.Source: It must have been important to the vampires as well, for them to risk an open attack on the Vigilants.
String.Dest: 番人達に堂々と攻撃を仕掛ける危険を冒したとなると、吸血鬼達にとっても重要なものだったようだ

String.Source: Then the rest is up to me.
String.Dest: あとはわたし次第というわけですのね

String.Source: And how exactly do you plan on completing the prophecy without the death of my daughter?
String.Dest: では、厳密には娘を死なせずにどうやってお告げを実現させるつもり？

String.Source: I promise to try and make this as painless as possible. Hold still.
String.Dest: なるべく痛くないようにいたしますわね。そのまま動かないで…

String.Source: So how has it come to pass that a vampire of mixed blood is in the company of my daughter?
String.Dest: それで、吸血鬼の血が入った者がなぜ私の娘に同行する事になったの？

String.Source: Our sense of what's right is what separates us from the vampires. Don't forget that.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼と我々の違いは何を正しいとするかだ。忘れるな

String.Source: Tell you what, I'll sell it back to you for 4,000 coins.
String.Dest: 4000ゴールドでまた売ってやってもいいけどな

String.Source: When did I say that?
String.Dest: そんな事をいつ言った？

String.Source: Like she didn't want to just stop my father... she wanted to stick it to him, too.
String.Dest: 父を止めるだけでは飽き足りず、思い知らせてやりたかったかのような…

String.Source: She always seemed happy, before we heard the prophecy. Then it all changed. She became a different person. They both did.
String.Dest: 予言を耳にするまではいつでも幸せそうだったのに、すべてが変わってしまった。母はまるで別人になった。両親とも変貌してしまったのです

String.Source: I trust your journey was successful?
String.Dest: 旅はうまくいったのかな？

String.Source: The secret of the bow's power is written elsewhere. I think there is more to the prophecy, recorded in other scrolls.
String.Dest: 弓の力の秘密はどこか別のところに書かれている。他の書に記録された予言の続きがあるようだ

String.Source: Beautiful. That crown... it's everything I could have hoped for.
String.Dest: 美しいね。あの王冠… 非の打ちどころがない

String.Source: Something's wrong with the moondial here. Some of the crests are missing and the dial is askew.
String.Dest: ここの月時計は何かおかしいですわ。クレストがいくつかなくなっていますし、時計自体も傾いてますのよ

String.Source: She had to be up to something in that garden. I'm hoping it's a clue that will tell us where she went.
String.Dest: 母はあの庭で何かをしていたはずですわ。それが母の居場所を見つける手掛かりになればいいですわね

String.Source: Oh please, milord. Please... forgive me!
String.Dest: 旦那様、お願いです… お許しを！

String.Source: Well, if you want to reach the summit, you're going to need some help. You... want a hand?
String.Dest: まあ、辿り着きたければ手助けが必要だよ。手を… 貸そうか？

String.Source: Otherwise, all I can do now is grant you my hopes for a safe journey.
String.Dest: 質問がないなら、旅の無事を祈って送り出すだけだ

String.Source: If you need anything else, I'll be here.
String.Dest: 他に何かいる時は、ここに来てくれ

String.Source: I had no idea that her laboratory even existed.
String.Dest: 研究所があったなんて存じませんでしたわ

String.Source: Well, once the Initiate's enlightenment was complete, he'd bring the ewer to the Chantry's Inner Sanctum.
String.Dest: 新人が完全に悟りを開くと、水差しを持って最奥聖域に向かう事になっていたのだ

String.Source: Since the Keepers weren't able to claim my soul, they had their minions construct a barrier that I'd never be able to breach.
String.Dest: 私の魂を手に入れられなかった番人は、手先に命じて私が決して破れない障壁を築いたの

String.Source: Yeah, too bad. Lord Harkon's new favorite, dead so soon after joining the family.
String.Dest: ああ、残念だね。ハルコン卿の新しいお気に入りが、家族の一員になってそんなにすぐ死んでしまったなんて

String.Source: If I had foreseen the value they placed on my own soul, I would never have come here.
String.Dest: もし彼らが私自身の魂に置いた価値を予見していたら、ここには決して来なかったわ

String.Source: We call such confluences the "Daughters of Coldharbour."
String.Dest: その状態になった者を“コールドハーバーの娘”と呼ぶの

String.Source: But no matter. The greatest artists are never recognized in their own time.
String.Dest: でも関係ないわ。最も偉大な芸術家は決して生前には認められないものよ

String.Source: My father and I don't really get along.
String.Dest: 父との折り合いがよくないのです

String.Source: Having trouble finding those ingredients?
String.Dest: 材料がなかなか見つかりませんの？

String.Source: Your intentions are still somewhat unclear to me.
String.Dest: あなたの意図はどこか不透明なままだわ

String.Source: Quickly now! The longer you delay, the more danger the Jarl is in.
String.Dest: 急ぐんだ！ ぐずぐずしてたらそれだけ首長の身の危険は大きくなるぞ

String.Source: I don't think so. She said she wanted to stay awake in case the situation was resolved.
String.Dest: そうかしら。状況が改善した時に備えて目は覚ましておきたいと母は言っておりましたわ

String.Source: I am more than happy to buy or sell whatever you might need.
String.Dest: 売り買いなら喜んで相談に乗るよ

String.Source: Wait... that almost makes sense!
String.Dest: お待ちになって… きっとそうですわ！

String.Source: Fortunately, you're in a position to breach the barrier that surrounds these ruins.
String.Dest: 幸い、あなたはこの遺跡を囲む障壁を破る事ができる

String.Source: Once that's done, the blood of a powerful vampire needs to be added to it.
String.Dest: それが済んだら、強力な吸血鬼の血をそこに加えなければならない

String.Source: Now, let me get the scroll's case opened.
String.Dest: さあ、書の封を解きましょうか

String.Source: Now tell me, who is this stranger you have brought into our hall?
String.Dest: して、我らの殿堂に見知らぬ者を連れて来たようだが、何者なのだ？

String.Source: A savior?
String.Dest: 救世主だって？

String.Source: After what I've put Serana through, I would understand if she never wished to see me again. I leave that decision in your hands.
String.Dest: セラーナに経験させた事を思えば、彼女が二度と私に会いたがらなくても理解できる。その決断はあなたに任せるわ

String.Source: That Moth Priest, Dexion. He said we needed two other Elder Scrolls. I think I know where we can start looking.
String.Dest: 聖蚕の僧侶デキソンは、星霜の書がもう二つ必要になると言っていましたけれど、どこにありそうかの見当ならつきますわよ

String.Source: Hey, if you don't like it, you could always shop for your Elder Scrolls elsewhere.
String.Dest: 嫌なら別の場所で星霜の書を探せばいいだけの話だ

String.Source: Pay a visit to the beast's last known contact. Do what you must to find where it's hiding now.
String.Dest: 奴が最後に会ったと分かっている人物を訪ね、どこに隠れているかをどうにかして聞き出すんだ

String.Source: You care nothing for Serana or our plight.
String.Dest: セラーナや私達の苦境はお構いなしなのね

String.Source: I can crush skulls with the best of them. Let me show you a few things.
String.Dest: 頭蓋骨を砕くのは誰よりも上手よ。ちょっと見せてあげましょうか

String.Source: If I ventured far from the Soul Cairn, my strength would begin to wane until I was no more.
String.Dest: ソウル・ケルンから離れれば力が衰え、やがてこの身も滅んでしまうだろう

String.Source: Before this, I roamed the skies above Tamriel. I desire to return there.
String.Dest: その前はタムリエルの空をさまよったものだった。戻れればと願っている

String.Source: I must have failed. Harkon's found a way to decipher the prophecy, hasn't he.
String.Dest: 失敗したに違いないわ。ハルコンはお告げの解読方法を見つけたのね

String.Source: You. Come forward. I would speak with you.
String.Dest: あなた。こちらへ来なさい。話しましょう…

String.Source: We'll get to that. For now, get acquainted with the space.
String.Dest: それはまた後程。ひとまず今は、この場所に慣れてくれ

String.Source: Certainly. Where can I find this castle?
String.Dest: もちろんです。その城はどこにあるのですか？

String.Source: Whatever it says, it will have something that can help us stop my father.
String.Dest: 何が書かれているにせよ、父を止めるのに利用できるはずですわ

String.Source: Despite my present low estate, I am no beggar. Begone until you have the coin to warrant my skills.
String.Dest: 今の地位が低くとも、物乞いではないわ。私の技術を受けられる現金ができるまで消えなさい

String.Source: I have ordered the court to assemble. I have a new task for us all to carry out, and that includes you.
String.Dest: 臣下の者達に集まるよう指示した。我々全員でなすべき事がある。お前を含めてな

String.Source: Hang on... could you pull that again?
String.Dest: お待ちになって… もう一度引けますかしら？

String.Source: I'll buy whatever you're looking to get rid of.
String.Dest: 捨てるものがあったら、何でも買い取るわよ

String.Source: I know that better than anybody.
String.Dest: 誰よりもその事を知っているつもりですわ

String.Source: We usually feed on our visitors, but perhaps we'll make an exception in your case.
String.Dest: 大抵の訪問者は糧とするのだが、お前の場合は例外としてやってもいいかも知れんな

String.Source: Unh... where is... who sent you here?
String.Dest: ああ… ここは… あなた、誰に言われていらっしゃったの？

String.Source: I didn't want you to think I was one of those... you know, the women who just sit in their castle all day?
String.Dest: よくいるあの… お城に一日中座っている部類の女だと思われたくなかったのです

String.Source: You'd do well to watch that tongue, elf.
String.Dest: 口の利き方に気をつけるんだな、エルフめが

String.Source: All right. Here goes.
String.Dest: では始めますわ

String.Source: We end this here and now!
String.Dest: 今、ここで決着をつけてやる！

String.Source: Refuse me, and I will banish you from this castle. I will spare your life this once, but after that, you are prey.
String.Dest: 断ればこの城からお前を追放する。今回ばかりは見逃してやるが、その後は獲物とみなす

String.Source: My lord! Everyone! Serana has returned!
String.Dest: 主様！ みんな！ セラーナが戻ったぞ！

String.Source: Ah, welcome, welcome! I don't believe we've seen you here before, have we? You can buy from me, then join any booth you'd like.
String.Dest: ああ、いらっしゃい！ ここは初めてでしょう？ まずは買い物をしてね。部屋に入りたいなら、その後よ

String.Source: No one ever escapes. There is no escape. Why would you even try?
String.Dest: 誰も逃げたりしないな。逃げ道なんかないからな。やるだけ無駄じゃないか？

String.Source: Make use of my coffin whenever you like. My home is your home.
String.Dest: 棺は自分のものだと思って、自由に使ってくれてかまわないからね

String.Source: I ought to cut you to pieces right where you stand...
String.Dest: そこから動くなよ。バラバラに切り刻んでやる…

String.Source: I wonder how many copies I'll sell? Hundreds? Thousands? I'll hire the finest bookbinder I can find.
String.Dest: 何冊売れるかな？ 百？ 千？ 最高の出版社を見つけなくては

String.Source: The Vigilants of Stendarr, in over their heads. What a surprise.
String.Dest: ステンダールの番人が手をこまねいている。これは驚きだな

String.Source: Not like this...
String.Dest: こんなはずでは…

String.Source: Look around you. There are some extremely powerful undead here.
String.Dest: 周りをご覧あそばせ。ここにいるのはとてつもなく強力なアンデッドですわよ

String.Source: Even in this weather, it's better than the cave.
String.Dest: こんな天気でも、洞窟の中よりはましですわ

String.Source: Hhyyaarrggh!
String.Dest: はああー！

String.Source: May mortals quake at your approach.
String.Dest: 君が近づけば定命の者達は震え上がるだろう

String.Source: Are you... Did you get infected?
String.Dest: まさか…感染したのか？

String.Source: I'm ready to go when you are.
String.Dest: わたくしはいつでもよくてよ

String.Source: Surrender and give us the bow!
String.Dest: 降伏して弓を渡しなさいな！

String.Source: Farewell, friend. May the light of Auri-El illuminate your darkest hours.
String.Dest: さようなら、友よ。苦難の時も、アーリエルの光が導いてくれるだろう

String.Source: A song? I, uh... I seem to have misplaced my lute. Another time perhaps?
String.Dest: 歌を？ えっと… リュートをどこかに忘れてきたようだ。また今度でいいか？

String.Source: All that just to end up dumping it out? Makes no sense to me.
String.Dest: それを処分するためだけにこんな大騒ぎを？ まるで理屈に合いませんわ

String.Source: Take a left up here. This is one of those weird double-barred security measures that my father put in when he got more paranoid.
String.Dest: 左に折れて。これは例の複式施錠装置の1つですわ。疑心暗鬼を募らせた父が設置したものですわね

String.Source: May Auri-El's glow shield you from your enemy.
String.Dest: アーリエルの光の盾がその身を守らん事を

String.Source: Leaving huh? Good. Maybe I can get some work done.
String.Dest: 行くのか？ そうか。これでやっと仕事に集中できるよ

String.Source: Watch out! He's pulling down the ceiling!
String.Dest: 気を付けて！ 天井を落とすつもりですわ！

String.Source: Not much. If you read any history, it shows up from time to time, but it's a hard thing to track.
String.Dest: そうでもありませんの。歴史の書物には時々出てきますけれど、その行方を追い続けるのが難しいのですわ

String.Source: Let's go.
String.Dest: 行きましょう

String.Source: Do we at least know what the vampires are after?
String.Dest: 我々に吸血鬼どもの狙いが少しでも分かっているのか？

String.Source: Arkay says bandits. Or, wait... no, he says bandits.
String.Dest: アーケイは山賊だと言っている。待てよ… いや、やっぱり山賊だ

String.Source: Well of course we do. I'm old, not stupid.
String.Dest: もちろんやっている。私は年寄りだが愚か者ではない

String.Source: We are blood bound, but we can never be too careful. Never know who might be watching, right?
String.Dest: 血の契りを結んでいるにしても、用心するに越した事はないよ。誰に見られてるか分からないからね

String.Source: Whatever they're doing with them, they've been harvesting for millennia. No telling how many souls are trapped here.
String.Dest: いずれにせよ、彼らは数千年もの間それを収穫し続けておりますの。ここにどれほどの魂が捕えられているのかは誰にも分かりませんわ

String.Source: Mind yourself in that form. Don't go damaging my thralls.
String.Dest: その姿で暴れて従徒達を傷つけたりするなよ？

String.Source: What I didn't know is someone had hired the Morag Tong to kill him as well.
String.Dest: 他の奴が、同じ高官を暗殺するためにモラグ・トングを雇ったとも知らずに

String.Source: All right...
String.Dest: 大丈夫よ…

String.Source: If remnants of our kind who escaped the betrayal at the hands of the dwarves exist out there, perhaps they will find this place one day.
String.Dest: もし、裏切られし者の手を逃れ、ドワーフに助けられた同胞がいたら、いつの日かここを見つけてくれるだろう

String.Source: Good luck.
String.Dest: 幸運を祈る

String.Source: But I think I turned out ok.
String.Dest: でも今は大丈夫ですわ

String.Source: If there's any way I can be of service, please let me know.
String.Dest: 何か役に立てる事があったら、是非教えてくれよ

String.Source: I believe we can prolong its salutary effects if we infuse it with potent vampiric blood.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼の上質な血を聖杯に注げば、その効用を延長させる事ができるはずだよ

String.Source: Are you alive? I must be imagining this.
String.Dest: 生きてる人？ きっと幻覚だな

String.Source: One of the feral brood has joined a group of bandits, presumably with aims to grant the gift to the entire lot of them.
String.Dest: 野蛮な血の者の一人が山賊の一団に加わった。おそらく彼ら全員に血の力を授けるのが目的だ

String.Source: In my heart, I know that it was my wife, Valerica, who took my beloved daughter away from me.
String.Dest: 私は内心、愛する娘を連れ去ったのは妻のヴァレリカだったと心得ている

String.Source: I'm... not sure. I've never heard of the Divines speaking directly to someone before.
String.Dest: 何とも言えない。神々が今まで直接誰かに話しかけた例は聞いてない

String.Source: Look, I'm just here to keep watch. What you're looking for is down inside.
String.Dest: なあ、俺はただの見張りなんだ。あんたの探してるものは中にある

String.Source: Apparently you had blood in your ears when I said not to draw attention to yourself. If I wanted a messy kill I would have said so.
String.Dest: 目立つなと言った時に、耳に血が詰まっていたようね。下手な殺し方をしてほしければ、最初からそう言ったわよ

String.Source: Nordic ruins. Even older than I am. I wonder if the draugr are as gullible as they were when I was a girl.
String.Dest: ノルドの遺跡ですわね。わたしの歳よりも古い場所。今でもドラウグルはわたしの子供の頃と同じくらいノロマなのかしら

String.Source: You really don't look well. Have you talked to Florentius? Maybe he can help you.
String.Dest: 相当具合が悪そうだけど、フロレンティウスに話してみた？ 彼なら力になってくれるわよ

String.Source: Were did you go?
String.Dest: どこへ行った？

String.Source: I've located additional petrified remains of an elder vampire. Bring them to me, and I'll extend the effects granted by the Blood Chalice.
String.Dest: 太古の吸血鬼が石化した遺体の手がかりをまた見つけたぞ。それを持ってきてくれたら、血の聖杯の効果を延長させる事ができるはずだ

String.Source: There's enough for us to fight out there. I don't need us having to defend ourselves within our own fort.
String.Dest: 外にも敵は十分すぎるほどいるのに、砦の中でも身を守るなんて事態は避けたい

String.Source: Want my advice? Never welch on a bargain with the Ideal Masters... they don't take it very well.
String.Dest: いいこと教えてやろうか？ アイディール・マスターとの約束は破らない方がいい… 彼らの機嫌を損ねることになる

String.Source: I took it upon myself to join the cause and fight the dremora, thinking this would simply be another feather in my cap.
String.Dest: それで、人々と共にドレモラと戦う事にした。また1つ手柄を増やせてしまうなあ、と思って

String.Source: So this is what it's like on the other side.
String.Dest: 世界の裏側って、こんな感じなのか

String.Source: You know, an important member of society. Someone attached to the Jarl's court, a merchant, a bard, a priest, someone with stature.
String.Dest: まあ、社会的に重要な人物だな。首長の宮廷の関係者とか、商人、吟遊詩人、司祭などの社会的地位のある者がいい

String.Source: A more "serious" group of the Vigilants of Stendarr. Sometimes when you skin a skeever, you find he has a more aggressive mate.
String.Dest: 攻撃的な、ステンダールの番人においてもより“危険な”集団よ。スキーヴァーの皮をはぐ時のあなたみたいに

String.Source: The sky is so dark. What does it mean?
String.Dest: 空がこんなに暗いわ。どういう意味なの？

String.Source: Go on downstairs. You're bothering me.
String.Dest: さっさと下の階に下りろ。目障りだ

String.Source: Auriel is one of the elven gods. He's with the rest of them in Aetherius.
String.Dest: アーリエルはエルフの神の一人ですわ。彼ら神々はエセリウスにおりますの

String.Source: Careful, here. If you fall down that thing I'm going to have to drag you out of... wherever it leads.
String.Dest: 用心なさって。もしあなたがあそこに落ちたら、どこにつながっているにせよ… わたしが引っぱり上げる事になりますのよ

String.Source: The boss said it's some sort of profaned spring. It looks like blood, but it's not the real thing.
String.Dest: ボスが言うには、不浄の泉のようなものだって。一見血に見えるけど、実は違うのよ

String.Source: Arkay bless you, friend.
String.Dest: アーケイの祝福があらん事を

String.Source: Well, that's usually the trick. It's possible to do it through a simple portal.
String.Dest: 普通はそれでうまくいきますわ。簡単な転移門を通れば十分可能ですの

String.Source: There are plenty of other adventures I've had over the years, but you'll just have to read my next work to find out.
String.Dest: 他にも多くの冒険を経験しているけど、その話が知りたければ次の作品を読むといいんじゃないかな

String.Source: If you're buying, go on in. Otherwise, shove off.
String.Dest: 買い物に来たなら入って。それ以外なら、さっさと消えて

String.Source: We're all that stands between Skyrim and disaster.
String.Dest: スカイリムを破滅から救うのは我々だけだ

String.Source: I will not be defeated!
String.Dest: 私は負けない！

String.Source: Let me go...
String.Dest: 放してくれ…

String.Source: What a horrible place.
String.Dest: なんてひどい場所だ

String.Source: See that thing? Dwarves called them 'Kinetic Resonators'. Don't see them very often, least not among the clans in Skyrim.
String.Dest: あれが見える？ ドワーフは“動力共鳴装置”と呼んでる。スカイリムの人々には殆ど知られちゃいない代物だよ

String.Source: You appear to have something on your mind. What is it?
String.Dest: 何か気になっているようね。何なの？

String.Source: That's easy to say, but I definitely didn't help things.
String.Dest: 口で言うのは簡単でしょうけれど、わたしにはどうする事もできませんでしたの

String.Source: Your crown... gods, it's made of Aetherium! Pure Aetherium!
String.Dest: お前の王冠は… 何てこった。エセリウム製じゃないか！ 正真正銘のエセリウムだ！

String.Source: Katria? No, no that's not possible!
String.Dest: カトリア？ 馬鹿な、そんな事があってなるものか！

String.Source: Give up while you can!
String.Dest: あきらめて引くがいい！

String.Source: Last I knew, he was headed to Ruunvald. But then, we hadn't heard from anyone there in a few weeks.
String.Dest: 最後に聞いた時はルーンヴァルドに向かっていたが、その時点で音信は数週間途絶えていた

String.Source: That's the last one, isn't it? It's... it's almost time. I'll meet you at the Forge!
String.Dest: それが最後の一つだね？ …いよいよだ。じゃあ鋳造器具の所で！

String.Source: I had always just assumed that the other tower was completely destroyed inside.
String.Dest: もうひとつの塔は内部がめちゃくちゃに壊されていると、ずっと思っておりましたの

String.Source: But bringing something from the Soul Cairn gives you something much more powerful.
String.Dest: けれどもソウル・ケルンから何かを持ってこられれば、もっと大きな力が手に入る

String.Source: If I ever see her again, she will pay most dearly for that betrayal.
String.Dest: もしまた会う事があれば、裏切りの代償を存分にとってやるとも

String.Source: Get yourself cured immediately. You're a threat to all of us otherwise.
String.Dest: 即刻に治療をすべきだ。さもなくば我々全員の脅威となってしまう

String.Source: No matter how long I've been here, I'll still never get used to this place.
String.Dest: どれだけ長くここにいようと、決してこの場所には慣れないわ

String.Source: It's also quite possible that there are some other isolated conclaves of snow elves nestled elsewhere on Nirn.
String.Dest: ニルンのどこかに他のスノーエルフの秘密教団がある可能性も残っている

String.Source: A magical shield that when blocked with, surrounds it's wielder with a holy aura that harms the undead.
String.Dest: 持つ者を聖なるオーラで覆い、それに触れたアンデッドにダメージを与える魔法の盾

String.Source: We're looking for some Vampires that have been reported in the area. Seen any?
String.Dest: この一帯にいるらしいという吸血鬼を探している。見かけなかったか？

String.Source: Auri-El forgives you.
String.Dest: アーリエルの許しを請え

String.Source: Others think they use them as payment to an even higher power... almost like a currency. A very strange currency.
String.Dest: より大きな力への代償として彼らはそれを使うという人もおりますし… まるでお金ですわね。お金にしては奇妙ですけれど

String.Source: By the Eight... look at the sky!
String.Dest: 八大神よ… 空を見ろ！

String.Source: Serana can make you one of us again.
String.Dest: セラーナがもう一度お前を我らの一員に変えてくれる

String.Source: Please... No more...
String.Dest: 頼む… これ以上…

String.Source: She wanted to get it as far away from my father as possible. I can't imagine a better place.
String.Dest: 母はそれを父からできるだけ遠ざけたかったのですから。他にもっといい場所なんて思いつきませんわよ

String.Source: Honestly, I don't think they care what a bunch of vampires would do with Auriel's Bow. They're pretty focused on the past.
String.Dest: 正直なところ、吸血鬼達がアーリエルの弓をどうしようが彼らは気にしないと思われますわ。彼らは過去に注目しておりますもの

String.Source: Hide if you wish. It's only a matter of time.
String.Dest: 好きなだけ隠れるがいい。すぐに見つけてやる

String.Source: Oh, you're off on your own for a while? All right.
String.Dest: 一人で行きますの？ 今だけならよろしくてよ

String.Source: The Dawnguard are apparently focused on exterminating vampires, noble and brute alike.
String.Dest: ドーンガードは吸血鬼の根絶に重点を置いている、貴族もけだものも一様にな

String.Source: I just wonder if that meant it was my job to be giving.
String.Dest: あれは、わたしの役割が担う事という意味でしたのかしら

String.Source: Mmm hmm.
String.Dest: はいはい

String.Source: Find Sorine and Gunmar, and maybe we can do something about this mess.
String.Dest: ソリーヌとガンマーを見つけてくれ。そうすればこのひどい状況も好転するだろう

String.Source: I am Jiub. Some call me Saint Jiub. Others call me Jiub the Eradicator. Perhaps you've heard of me?
String.Dest: ジウブだ。聖ジウブや、根絶者ジウブと呼ぶ者もいる。聞いた事あるよな？

String.Source: Are you prepared to honor the mantras of Auri-El and fill your vessel with His enlightenment?
String.Dest: アーリエルの真言を受ける光栄に浴し、その水差しを悟りの水で満たすか？

String.Source: You are to destroy the feral creature before this small problem becomes a larger one.
String.Dest: この小さな問題が大きくなるまでに、野蛮な生物を殺すのだ

String.Source: How could they trick me like this? I was one of Reman's court wizards!
String.Dest: あんな奴らに騙されるとは思わなかった。レマンの王宮魔術師である、この私が！

String.Source: And now the feeding begins.
String.Dest: さあ、食事の始まりよ

String.Source: Next time I say to please not go over the waterfall, maybe you'll listen to me.
String.Dest: だから滝の向こうには行かないでと頼みましたのに。少しは耳を貸す気になりまして？

String.Source: The sun is gone! We're all doomed!
String.Dest: 太陽が消えた！ 皆破滅だ！

String.Source: Oh, good. Well then... let's head over to the portal vessel and I'll do the rest.
String.Dest: それはよかったですわ。…それなら、転移門の器の所まで行きましょう。後はわたしが

String.Source: Forgive me... Auri-El...
String.Dest: ご慈悲を… アーリエル…

String.Source: I can't say that I'm surprised by your answer. Until I get my second volume published, no one will ever know of my achievements.
String.Dest: 驚くような事じゃないぞ。手記の第二巻を出版するまで、我が偉業は誰も知らなかったのであるからして

String.Source: This weather is incredible.
String.Dest: この天気、信じられませんわ

String.Source: I cast you out!
String.Dest: 消し去ってやる！

String.Source: It might take decades to restore the castle to its former glory... but I appear to have plenty of time.
String.Dest: 城の壮観を取り戻すには何十年もかかりそうよ… でも私には時間がたっぷりあるわ

String.Source: Correct. We only numbered perhaps a hundred at the time, so our presence remained a secret to the dwarves and the Nords.
String.Dest: その通り。常時100人足らずしかいない我々は、ドワーフやノルドにとって謎に包まれた存在だった

String.Source: Fellow hunter, we're looking for some Vampires that have been reported in the area. Have you seen any?
String.Dest: お仲間か。この一帯にいるらしいという吸血鬼を探している。見かけなかったか？

String.Source: Thank you. I'll be going.
String.Dest: ありがとう。もう行くよ

String.Source: Gah!
String.Dest: ぐああ！

String.Source: I'll fight anything that can be fought. Beyond that... I don't want your death on my conscience.
String.Dest: 戦えるものとは何であろうと戦う。その先は… あんたを決して死なせたくはないよ

String.Source: Go to Lord Harkon at once, beg him to turn you back. You're dead if you don't.
String.Dest: すぐにハルコン卿のもとへ行って、戻してもらうよう頼んできなさい。さもなければ死ぬわよ

String.Source: Dexion said something about that scroll. What was it... something to do with dragons I think?
String.Dest: デキソンがあの書の事を何か言っておりましたわ。あれは一体… ドラゴンに関係するものかしら？

String.Source: I can't afford to make any assumptions. That's how people wind up dead.
String.Dest: 仮定の話をする余裕はない。そんな事をしてたら死ぬのがオチだ

String.Source: Well met, sister.
String.Dest: こんにちは

String.Source: The reason I had it... and why I was down there.
String.Dest: 星霜の書を持っていて、あそこにいた理由…

String.Source: Excellent. I trust he'll find his situation more accommodating, now that he is a member of the family.
String.Dest: 素晴らしい。彼は今や家族の一員だから、肩の荷も少しはおりるだろう

String.Source: I commanded every vampire in the court to look for them, but after centuries of searching without success, I lost hope.
String.Dest: 配下の吸血鬼総出で行方を探したが、何百年かけて探っても手応えが得られず、私は絶望した

String.Source: That will make them all more upset to have one of their citizens slain, and under such flimsy pretense.
String.Dest: そうすれば仲間を殺された事に対する市民の怒りは倍増する。見え透いた手だがうまくいくだろう

String.Source: I can take you to any port on the coast.
String.Dest: 沿岸の港ならどこにでもいくよ

String.Source: All I heard is that without a Septim sitting on the throne of the Empire, the Dragonfires in a place called the Temple of the One were no longer lit.
String.Dest: よくは知らんが、セプティムが玉座にいなければ、最高神の神殿という場所にあるドラゴンファイアが消えるとかいう話を聞いた

String.Source: But a kill is a kill, and it'll send a message to the Dawnguard, if not exactly the one we wanted.
String.Dest: でも殺しは殺し、そしてドーンガードに意図は伝わる。正確に望み通りではないとしても

String.Source: That's the last of them. Poor sods can't resist after they get a taste of your dosed Skooma.
String.Dest: こいつで最後よ。マヌケどもには、薬入りのスクゥーマを飲ませたからもう抵抗できないわ

String.Source: Are you infected? Keep your distance from me.
String.Dest: 感染してるのか？ だったら近づくな

String.Source: They used to criss-cross the skies over Morrowind like vermin. Nasty flying creatures with a habit of sneaking up on the unwary.
String.Dest: 奴らは害虫のようにモロウウィンドの空を飛びまわり、不用心な人を襲う事で忌み嫌われていた

String.Source: Back to visit Jiub the Magnificent, eh?
String.Dest: またもやこの偉大なるジウブを訪ねて来たりしたのかな？

String.Source: What? Are you certain?
String.Dest: 何ですって？ 確かなの？

String.Source: Don't make a big scene. Don't get caught.
String.Dest: 派手な事はしないで。捕まらないように

String.Source: Arkay, we're going to need your help more than ever.
String.Dest: アーケイ、これまでにないほど、あなたの力が必要になりそう

String.Source: Turns out my mother was sneakier than I thought. I wonder what she's hiding?
String.Dest: 母は思ったよりも隠し事をなさる人でしたのね。一体何をしまいこんでいたのかしら？

String.Source: One of the feral brood has joined a group of nercromancers, presumably with aims to grant the gift to the entire lot of them.
String.Dest: 野蛮な血の者の一人が死霊術師の一団に加わった。おそらく彼ら全員に血の力を授けるのが目的だ

String.Source: Look at you, wandering around causing trouble. Precious.
String.Dest: すごいじゃないか。あちこちで面倒を起こしてるんだな。素晴らしい

String.Source: Unnff!
String.Dest: ウゥッ！

String.Source: I wonder if the fires are still burning in the Imperial City...
String.Dest: 帝都の火はまだ燃えてるのかしら？

String.Source: I'll be with the Dawnguard if you need me.
String.Dest: わたしに用がありましたら、ドーンガードの所におりますわ

String.Source: Probably to avoid whatever my father would do to her if he could get his hands on her.
String.Dest: 父が母を捕まえたらどうするつもりかは分からないのですけど、とにかくそうなる事態を避けるためかしら

String.Source: Normally, I'd send you to the Imperial City in Cyrodiil to seek answers at the Imperial Library, but that avenue no longer exists.
String.Dest: 本来ならシロディールの帝都にある帝国図書館で答えを探す事をお勧めしたいが、あそこの通りはなくなってしまったんだ

String.Source: But to finalize the deal, you have to travel here yourself... and most of them never come back.
String.Dest: でも契約を仕上げるには、あなた自身の足でここを旅しなければ… そして旅した者はほとんど帰ってまいりませんわ

String.Source: How dare you profane this place!
String.Dest: この場所を穢す事は許さん！

String.Source: Let's just say I sold something to a guy who turned out to work for a whole coven of necromancers.
String.Dest: 死霊術師の集団の御用人に何かを売った… とでも言っておこうか

String.Source: Excellent. I knew I could count on you. That's one less trouble maker to keep an eye on.
String.Dest: 素晴らしい。やはりお前は頼りになるな。これで監視する厄介者が一人減った

String.Source: Wait... Serana? Is that truly you? I cannot believe my eyes!
String.Dest: ちょっと待った… セラーナ？ 本当に君なのか？ 信じられない！

String.Source: I'll feed your corpse to the Betrayed.
String.Dest: 死体は裏切られし者の餌にしてやる

String.Source: I will find you...
String.Dest: 見つけてやる…

String.Source: Death first!
String.Dest: さっさと死ね！

String.Source: My sister in darkness. While it's good to see you, we'll keep up appearances, yes?
String.Dest: 闇の姉妹よ。会えてうれしいけれど、平静を装いましょう。いいわね？

String.Source: I must return to the frontline Alessian headquarters at once... lives are hanging in the balance!
String.Dest: すぐに前線のアレッシア司令部に戻らないと… 人々の命が危ないんだ！

String.Source: Maybe I can't leave, but my writings can.
String.Dest: 原稿だけなら、何とかなるともさ

String.Source: None of this feels right. We need to know more.
String.Dest: 話がどうもしっくりこない。もっと情報が必要だな

String.Source: Is... everything all right here?
String.Dest: その… ここは大丈夫ですの？

String.Source: I didn't say that. I wondered if perhaps he did it for the attention, but every now and then he'll say something that makes me reconsider.
String.Dest: そうは言ってない。かまってほしくてやったのかと思ったが、時々考え直させられるような事を言ってくるんだ

String.Source: I'll scatter your ashes myself!
String.Dest: 風に舞う塵となれ！

String.Source: I hope you find life in the castle to be to your liking.
String.Dest: 城での生活が性に合うといいな

String.Source: You've arrived at the Wayshrine of Resolution.
String.Dest: ここは意思の祠だ

String.Source: Madness. It was madness to attack that coven of witches! Why didn't they listen to me?
String.Dest: イカれてる。魔女の集団に攻撃をかけるなんて！ どうして注意を聞かないんだ？

String.Source: Just get all of the ingredients into the vessel.
String.Dest: 材料をぜんぶ器に入れて下さいまし

String.Source: Stay vigilant, friend.
String.Dest: ステンダールの加護あれ

String.Source: Not at this rate, no.
String.Dest: この調子ではだめかも知れませんわね

String.Source: I will send you back to the shadows!
String.Dest: 闇へ還してやる！

String.Source: Not... over... yet...
String.Dest: いや… まだだ…

String.Source: Don't speak to me, meat.
String.Dest: 気安く話しかけないでくれ

String.Source: Keep quiet! We're hunting vampires spotted in the area.
String.Dest: 静かに！ 近くで目撃された吸血鬼を探してる

String.Source: May Auri-El's brilliance illuminate your path.
String.Dest: アーリエルの光が行く手を照らさん事を

String.Source: If there's anything at all I can help you with, please ask.
String.Dest: 何かできる事があれば言ってくれ

String.Source: So why don't you just drink the blood from the spring? I mean, that seems easier than running a skooma den...
String.Dest: じゃあその泉から血を汲んで飲めばいいじゃないか。スクゥーマ部屋を経営するより簡単だ…

String.Source: My father's never been much for building things, so it just stayed like this.
String.Dest: 父は建築まわりに詳しくなかったから、そのままになっておりましたわ

String.Source: So, you think he's just crazy?
String.Dest: 彼はイカれてると思う？

String.Source: You've given up the powers granted to you? Get away from me. I don't want to be seen talking to you.
String.Dest: 授かった力を放棄したのか？ あっちへ行ってくれないか。お前なんかと話をしているのを見られたくない

String.Source: Farewell, friend. May the warmth of Auri-El provide you strength.
String.Dest: お別れだ、友よ。アーリエルの火がその身に力を与えるだろう

String.Source: We don't need competition for blood, and we don't want the mortals getting up in arms making things difficult for us.
String.Dest: 血の獲得競争は必要ない、そして定命の者達がいきり立って状況を困難にする事も望ましくない

String.Source: If I hadn't lost all of the pages, I wouldn't be in this predicament and we wouldn't be having this conversation.
String.Dest: 原稿を丸ごと失ったりしなければ、そもそも困っちゃいないし、こんな話もしなくて済んだんだ

String.Source: Want my advice? Avoid getting wrapped up in Vingalmo's schemes. He's after the throne, and he'll kill anyone that gets in his way.
String.Dest: 一つ言っておくと、ヴィンガルモの企てに関わらない方がいい。玉座を狙っていて、邪魔者は誰であろうと殺すような奴だ

String.Source: Your life ends here, Vyrthur!
String.Dest: お前の命はここで尽きますのよ、ヴィルスール！

String.Source: I can only assume the gates have been closed by now.
String.Dest: とうに門は閉じているとは思うけどね

String.Source: Die, monster!
String.Dest: 死ね、化物！

String.Source: Good riddance.
String.Dest: 寂しいなんて思っちゃいないんだからな

String.Source: The poor thing living here probably just fell out of favor upstairs.
String.Dest: ここにいるお気の毒な方は、上の階で機嫌を損ねたのでしょうね

String.Source: Who are you?...
String.Dest: あなたは誰… ？

String.Source: Which, I'm sorry to say, means your usefulness is at an end!
String.Dest: つまり、お前はもう用済みだという事だ！

String.Source: I've learned the whereabouts of a troublesome Dawnguard member. You will track him down and dispose of him.
String.Dest: 煩わしいドーンガード構成員の居場所が分かった。彼を追いつめて始末しろ

String.Source: Couldn't hurt to gather more I suppose.
String.Dest: もっと集めても多分大丈夫ですわ

String.Source: Dexion didn't really give us a lot to go on, did he?
String.Dest: デキソンは大してやる事を示してくれなかったのではなくて？

String.Source: I can't believe it. You're one of them... Talk to Isran. Maybe he can help you. Please, I don't want to have to kill you.
String.Dest: 信じられない。奴らの仲間じゃないか… とにかくイスランと話すんだ。たぶん力になってくれる。早くしろ、あんたを殺したくない

String.Source: A pathetic creature in her present condition, but the gift will embolden her. And her lowly state suits her to being our eyes and ears in Markarth.
String.Dest: 今はただの惨めな生き物だが、贈り物を与えれば彼女も元気になるだろう。それに彼女の卑しい身分は、マルカルスで我々の目や耳になるのには適任だ

String.Source: Have you talked to Isran?
String.Dest: イスランとは話した？

String.Source: I hope this is important, I have an experiment I'm working on.
String.Dest: 重要な事だといいけれど。取り組み中の実験があるのよ

String.Source: Otherwise, I don't have the faintest idea.
String.Dest: もし間違いでもしていたら、これからどうするのかお手上げでしたわ

String.Source: Time was I could barely hold my own in the Companions. Now I could slaughter them all without a second thought.
String.Dest: 同胞団にいた頃は自制するのがやっとだった。今なら何のためらいもなく彼ら全員を殺せそうよ

String.Source: Not a serious threat, but we can't leave them completely unchecked or they may become one.
String.Dest: 深刻な脅威ではないが、完全に放置していればそうなるかも知れない

String.Source: The prophecy's end approaches!
String.Dest: 予言された終末は近いぞ！

String.Source: One thousand steps and a thousand more...
String.Dest: 千歩進んで、そこからまた千歩…

String.Source: Enough of these games.
String.Dest: 遊びは終わりだ

String.Source: Indeed! One moment I was writing diligently, and the next, my door bursts open.
String.Dest: そうなんだよ！ 書き物に集中できると思ったら、次の瞬間には扉を叩く奴がいやがってだね

String.Source: I've failed you... my lord...
String.Dest: 神よ… 御心に応えられませんでした…

String.Source: I wonder what happened here.
String.Dest: 何が起こったのかしら、ここで…

String.Source: That sky... it feels like I'm being watched. Can't stand it anymore!
String.Dest: あの空… なんだか、ずっと見張られてるみたいだ。もう耐えられない！

String.Source: Why hide? Face Auri-El. Face your end!
String.Dest: なぜ隠れる？ 出てきてアーリエルの裁きを受けろ！

String.Source: Time to gather some bark.
String.Dest: 樹皮を集める頃合ですわ

String.Source: Why me...
String.Dest: なぜ私が…

String.Source: What are you doing that's so dangerous?
String.Dest: そんなに危険な事とは？

String.Source: Her blood will be mine!
String.Dest: その娘の血は私のものだ！

String.Source: Justice will prevail!
String.Dest: 正義は勝つ！

String.Source: I hear you're doing a lot of the work in tracking down these vampires. If there's anything I can do to help, let me know.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼達の追跡にずいぶん活躍しているらしいわね。何か手伝える事があれば知らせてちょうだい

String.Source: When I was tossed in here I felt myself falling... and I dropped the pages I had been holding.
String.Dest: ここに送られた時、すっ転んだような気がする。その時、持っていた原稿を手放してしまったんだ

String.Source: Well, if I were a betting woman, I'd say it's a scraper of some sort.
String.Dest: 憶測でもよければ、多分それはヘラか何かみたいなものね

String.Source: There's no one around to disturb me and distract me from my writing. Present company excepted of course.
String.Dest: 書き物をしていても邪魔される事がない。ああっと、お前の事を言ってるわけじゃないぞ

String.Source: Show yourself!
String.Dest: 姿を見せろ！

String.Source: Its craftsmanship has no equal anywhere within Tamriel and possibly beyond.
String.Dest: タムリエルどころか、どこの世界にも比類するものがない技術で造られたものだ

String.Source: Hunters! Take his heart!
String.Dest: みんな！ 奴の心臓を狙え！

String.Source: What is it?
String.Dest: 何？

String.Source: I think that might have been what we were waiting for.
String.Dest: まるでわたし達が訪れるのを待っていたように思えますわね

String.Source: Good luck.
String.Dest: 幸運を祈るわ

String.Source: Go with the Light.
String.Dest: 光と共に行け

String.Source: Arrggh!
String.Dest: ああああ！

String.Source: This must be the place.
String.Dest: ここに違いありませんわ

String.Source: Where are you headed?
String.Dest: どこへ向かう？

String.Source: I keep an eye on their comings and goings. No one suspects poor Cairine. Poor, poor Cairine. Ha!
String.Dest: 彼らの行動は見張っているわ。哀れなカイリーンを疑う者はいない。哀れな、哀れなカイリーンを。アハ！

String.Source: More spiders? I liked the ones back home better.
String.Dest: またスパイダーですの？ 故郷ではそんなに苦手ではありませんでしたけど

String.Source: Your time will come.
String.Dest: 終わりは近いぞ

String.Source: Gunmar and I agree that we're going to need Florentius to help.
String.Dest: フロレンティウスの助けが必要という事で、ガンマーとも意見が一致したわ

String.Source: This time, to the death!
String.Dest: 今こそ死ぬがいい！

String.Source: Ugh. I told you!
String.Dest: きゃっ。もう、言いましたわよね！

String.Source: I ain't in the mood to talk. Ohhhh...
String.Dest: 今は話をする気分じゃない。ああ…

String.Source: Yes, I can smell it on you.
String.Dest: そうだな、臭いで分かる

String.Source: Unh!
String.Dest: あああ！

String.Source: I was.
String.Dest: 以前はそうでしたわね

String.Source: What trickery is this?
String.Dest: 何の茶番だこれは？

String.Source: Blood of the sick. Blood of the weak. Blood of the unsuspecting noble lord. Savor each flavor. Unsuspecting, delicious prey.
String.Dest: 病人の血。弱者の血。無防備な貴族の血。それぞれの味を楽しむわ。疑う事を知らない、美味な獲物

String.Source: Lots of theories. Some say they feed on them like I feed on blood.
String.Dest: 仮説は色々ありますわね。わたしが血をほっするように彼らはそれをほっすると言う人もおりますわ

String.Source: I wish I could help. The scrolls have changed hands so many times, it's impossible to keep track.
String.Dest: 力になれなくて残念だよ。書はその持ち主が何度も変わるうちに、ついに行方が分からなくなってしまった

String.Source: I've often asked myself that very same question. The blinding of my race was supposedly accomplished with a toxin.
String.Dest: ずっと、同じ事を疑問に思っていた。種族の皆は、毒を使って光を奪われたはずなのだ

String.Source: I absolve you of your sins!
String.Dest: 罪深き命を消し去ってやる！

String.Source: I can actually assist you in that regard.
String.Dest: それに関しては、任せてくれ

String.Source: I cast you to Oblivion!
String.Dest: オブリビオンに送ってやる！

String.Source: Spiders!
String.Dest: スパイダーめ！

String.Source: Follow me. I'll take you to it.
String.Dest: ついて来い。案内しよう

String.Source: It's our time now.
String.Dest: 我々の時代が来た

String.Source: Maybe we don't deserve that kind of happiness. Maybe it isn't for us.
String.Dest: もしかしたら、わたし達には分不相応な幸せなのかも知れませんわね。高望みと言ってもいい

String.Source: Not again!
String.Dest: 勘弁してよね！

String.Source: Let Auri-El smite you with his wrath!
String.Dest: アーリエルの怒りを受けろ！

String.Source: Remember, I'm not leaving until Harkon's no longer a threat.
String.Dest: 覚えておいて、ハルコンが脅威でなくなるまでは行かないわ

String.Source: Perfect. This should do it.
String.Dest: 完璧よ。これで十分でしょう

String.Source: Isran is the only one trying to do something about these vampires.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼をどうにかしようとしているのはイスランだけよ

String.Source: Unh!
String.Dest: あああ！

String.Source: Is there no end to this nightmare?
String.Dest: この悪夢に終わりはあるのか？

String.Source: I settled in the city of Kvatch to write my memoirs and to find some peace and quiet.
String.Dest: おれはクヴァッチの街に住んで、手記を書きながら静かに暮らそうと思っていた

String.Source: Florentius? Really? I assumed Isran would want nothing to do with him.
String.Dest: フロレンティウスだと？ イスランが関わりたがるとは思えないが

String.Source: We'll stop them, whatever it is they're up to...
String.Dest: 奴らの企みが何であれ、止めてみせるわ…

String.Source: Haran manages the inn in Winterhold. A forsaken place under the shadow of the mages guild. She will help us keep an eye on the mages.
String.Dest: ハランはウィンターホールドで宿屋を営んでいる。魔術師ギルドの近くにある廃れたところだ。彼女が魔術師達を監視するのを手伝ってくれるだろう

String.Source: Brought some soul husks or are you wasting my time?
String.Dest: 魂のハスクを持ってきたのか？ それとも私の時間を無駄にしたいのか？

String.Source: While you're looking for the vampires, I'll try to get us some help. Come find me at Dead Drop Falls when you've learned more.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼達を探してくれればその間に協力者を募ってみる。何か分かったらデッドドロップ・フォールズで落ち合おう

String.Source: In a manner of speaking.
String.Dest: そういう言い方もできる

String.Source: Auri-El, give me strength to smite my foe!
String.Dest: アーリエルよ、この敵を倒す力を私に！

String.Source: Walked right into a trap, and didn't even realize it until I was captured.
String.Dest: 罠のど真ん中に飛び込んだわけだよ。捕まるまでちっとも気づかなかった

String.Source: Well. After you.
String.Dest: さあ。先にどうぞ

String.Source: Run, coward! Run and never return!
String.Dest: 行け、腰抜けめ！ 二度と来るな！

String.Source: I don't know. I honestly don't know. After all these years, it's a miracle even this much survived.
String.Dest: 分からないよ、全然全く。これほどの歳月を経て、これだけでも残っていたのが奇跡だ

String.Source: You really ought to become one of us again. Bad for your health, otherwise.
String.Dest: 再び我々の仲間になるべきだ。君の体のためにもね

String.Source: What was that?
String.Dest: 今のは何だ？

String.Source: Fair enough.
String.Dest: なるほど

String.Source: The power of my blood will purge that filth and make you whole again.
String.Dest: 私の血の力で汚れが浄化され、再び万全な状態に戻れるだろう

String.Source: Aye, I was. Didn't progress very far. Never did care for their attitude, acting like they're better than everyone else.
String.Dest: ええ、そうよ。大して進歩しなかった。彼らの優越感に満ちた態度がずっと嫌だったわ

String.Source: Then he found that prophecy, and... that was it.
String.Dest: そんな時に父があの予言を見つけて… それが終わりの始まりでしたの

String.Source: Wagh!
String.Dest: うわああ！

String.Source: One moment I'm raising a sword against that necromancer, the next moment I found myself here. What happened?
String.Dest: あの死霊術師に向かって剣を振り上げた、次の瞬間にはここにいた。一体どうなってるんだ？

String.Source: Your death will be my gift to Auri-El!
String.Dest: 貴様の命をアーリエルに捧げてやろう！

String.Source: Maybe I could have seen this coming. We could all be better off now.
String.Dest: おそらくこうなるのは予測できたはず。そうしたら今こんな目に遭わずに済んだというのに…

String.Source: Gave me a lot of time to think, that's for sure.
String.Dest: ありあまる時間の中で、色々と考えるなどしてみた

String.Source: Centuries of preparation will not fall to ruin because of you!
String.Dest: 何世紀もかけたこの計画を、貴様ごときに潰させはしない！

String.Source: This has gone on long enough.
String.Dest: 今まで長かった

String.Source: Good. I prefer to nip budding problems before they reach full bloom. I trust it wasn't too much of an effort on your part.
String.Dest: よろしい。問題は早めに摘み取っておきたい。お前にとってはさほどの手間ではないだろう

String.Source: Well, I assume so. It cast a spell at me from some kind of strange black crystal.
String.Dest: 多分な。不気味な黒い水晶みたいなもので呪文をかけられたんだ

String.Source: What day is it? What year? What era even?
String.Dest: 今日は何日？ 何年？ というか第何紀なんだ？

String.Source: Between you and me, there's too many of them. Can't trust the lot of them; never could.
String.Dest: ここだけの話、エルフは数が多すぎる。どいつも信用できないし、した事もない

String.Source: "Saviour of Morrowind." Hm, that's good but it sounds too narrow of scope...
String.Dest: “モロウウィンドの生存者”。うーん、響きは悪くないが、少し範囲が狭すぎやしないかね…

String.Source: But... it's hopeless. I died here, just like all the others. Turn back. Turn back before you become the next victim.
String.Dest: でも… 絶望的だよ。他の皆と同様、あたしもここで死んだ。さあ帰りな。次の犠牲者になる前に引き返すんだ

String.Source: We both realized that if Isran's even allowed us in here, he must be really concerned.
String.Dest: 私達がここにいる事をイスランが許すだけでも、かなり悩んでる証拠だわ

String.Source: Arrggh!
String.Dest: ああああ！

String.Source: Woah!
String.Dest: きゃあ！

String.Source: That part, I don't know. Once we have it, hopefully it'll be obvious.
String.Dest: その部分はよく分かりませんわね。手に入れたら明らかになるかと思いますわ

String.Source: Why in the world did you ever try putting armor on trolls?
String.Dest: トロールに防具をつけさせて、一体どうするつもりなの？

String.Source: You will not leave this valley alive!
String.Dest: 生きてこの峡谷を出られると思うな！

String.Source: Go ahead. After everything you've done, you should do the honors.
String.Dest: さあ。これだけの事をしてくれたのだから、あんたがやるべきだよ

String.Source: Guards! Kill her!
String.Dest: 傭兵ども！ 奴の頭をねじ切れ！

String.Source: Look, I loved my father, but when he found that prophecy... that became his life. Everything else, even me and my mother... we just became clutter.
String.Dest: そう、わたしは父を愛していたけど、予言を見つけてから… 彼にとってそれがすべてになってしまった。他の事はみんな、わたしや母でさえも、どうでもよくなってしまったのです

String.Source: I beg your pardon, sir. I don't know what you're getting at, but whatever it is, it's not appreciated.
String.Dest: どういうことだ？ 何が言いたいのか分からないが、とにかく不愉快だ

String.Source: I believe the secret to unraveling that prophecy is written in Serana's Elder Scroll.
String.Dest: その予言の真実を突き止める鍵となる秘密が、セラーナの星霜の書に書かれているようなのだ

String.Source: You'll think you're best of friends, until you find his fangs in your neck.
String.Dest: 親友かと思い込んでいたら首筋に牙を突き立てられている、といったところだ

String.Source: The sky shouldn't look like that...
String.Dest: 空の様子がおかしい…

String.Source: You're a fool to have become mortal again. I want nothing to do with you.
String.Dest: 再び定命の者に戻るとは愚かな。あなたとかかわる気はない

String.Source: The sky is all wrong. What's happening?
String.Dest: 空がおかしいわ。何が起きているの？

String.Source: Ancestors guide you.
String.Dest: 先人の導きあれ

String.Source: If you want to find the remaining scroll, you'll have to consult with someone versed in magical knowledge. Perhaps at the College of Winterhold?
String.Dest: 残りの書を見つけたいなら、魔法の知識を持つ者に相談すべきだ。ウィンターホールド大学に行ってみてはどうかな？

String.Source: With a sky like that, something bad is coming.
String.Dest: あの空の様子では、何か悪い事が訪れるな

String.Source: I'm afraid I'll need elven arrows if you want me to produce the Sunhallowed Arrows, and it seems you're all out of them at the moment.
String.Dest: 太陽神の矢を作るには、エルフの矢が必要だ。残念ながら、見たところ手持ちがないようだな

String.Source: You've no chance against a true vampire!
String.Dest: 真の吸血鬼に勝ち目はないわ！

String.Source: Then behold Auri-El's gift, my child. May it light your path as you seek tranquility within the Inner Sanctum.
String.Dest: では、アーリエルの祝福を受けるがいい。最奥聖域へ導く光が、汝と共にあるように

String.Source: Lead on.
String.Dest: 案内して

String.Source: Castle looks so big from down here. I mean, it is big, but, well, even bigger.
String.Dest: 下から見上げると随分大きく見えますわね。いえ、実際大きいのですけれど、それ以上に大きく見えるという事ですわ

String.Source: I trust you're keeping my daughter safe.
String.Dest: 娘の安全を守っていると信じているわ

String.Source: You've got plenty of moths. What's our next move?
String.Dest: 蚕はたっぷり集まりましたわ。次はどうしますの？

String.Source: It's disrespectful and dangerous to walk around here mortal. What were you thinking?
String.Dest: 定命の者がここを歩き回るのは無礼で危険な事よ。何を考えていたの？

String.Source: Bleed Skyrim dry.
String.Dest: スカイリムの血を吸いつくすのよ

String.Source: How is the work coming along?
String.Dest: 進み具合はどうだ？

String.Source: Craven fool. This isn't over.
String.Dest: 愚かな臆病者め。これで終わりだと思うな

String.Source: I'll be seeing you.
String.Dest: また会いましょう

String.Source: Your time is at an end!
String.Dest: これで終わりだ！

String.Source: One less monster in the world.
String.Dest: これでこの世から化物が1匹消えた

String.Source: I think...
String.Dest: わたしは…

String.Source: You need anything, talk to Master Dreth.
String.Dest: 至高のマスター・ドレスに聞け

String.Source: Let me guess. You're here for the treasure, aren't you? Just like all the others.
String.Dest: 当てて見せようか。宝が目的だね？ 他の皆と同じように

String.Source: In order to write the second volume of my opus, I need the notes from my first volume. Otherwise I need to do all of this from memory.
String.Dest: 手記の第二巻を執筆するには、第一巻のメモが必要だ。あれがなければ、すべてを記憶から書き起こさねばならない

String.Source: Arrrggghh...
String.Dest: ああああ…

String.Source: Hmph. I tell you what's crazy.
String.Dest: ふんだ。本当にイカれた話を教えてやろう

String.Source: Find Lord Harkon at once and ask him to please... "correct" the situation.
String.Dest: すぐにハルコン卿を見つけ、彼に… 状況を“正して”くれるよう頼め

String.Source: That was close...
String.Dest: 危なかった…

String.Source: Why is it so dark?
String.Dest: なぜこんなに暗いんだ？

String.Source: Don't. Get. Caught.
String.Dest: 捕まるなという事だ

String.Source: They tried me for murder, threw me on a prison ship and sent me to the jail in Vivec City.
String.Dest: 殺人容疑で裁判にかけられ、護送船でヴィベク・シティにある監獄に送られたよ

String.Source: Hrargh!
String.Dest: ハァーッ！

String.Source: Good. I knew I was sending the right woman for the job.
String.Dest: いいぞ。仕事の人選は間違ってなかったようだな

String.Source: The old water cistern. On some days, this would smell just... be glad you weren't here then.
String.Dest: 古い貯水池ですわ。ここの臭いときたら日によっては… 言わぬが花というものですわね

String.Source: Until next time.
String.Dest: ではまた

String.Source: Perhaps. Do you have a way out of here?
String.Dest: かもな。ここから出る方法を知ってるか？

String.Source: I yearn to see the great dunes of Hammerfell once again.
String.Dest: ハンマーフェルの砂丘を、もう一度この目で見てみたいな

String.Source: Really? Well, now, that make things easier...
String.Dest: 本当に？ まあ、これで少し楽になるかな…

String.Source: Show yourself.
String.Dest: 出てこい

String.Source: I've found another beast hiding from the light of day.
String.Dest: 日の光から隠れている化け物をまたしても見つけた

String.Source: For Auri-El!
String.Dest: アーリエルのために！

String.Source: I'm on my way to Markarth to confer with my colleague, Calcelmo. I've no time to stop and chat.
String.Dest: 同僚のカルセルモと会うためにマルカルスに行くところだ。立ち止まっておしゃべりする暇はない

String.Source: An axe imbued with magic fueled by the destruction of the unholy. With every victorious blow against an undead creature, its power grows.
String.Dest: この斧にかけられた魔法は、邪悪なものを破壊する事でその強さを増す。アンデッドに打撃を加えるたびに、斧は強くなっていく

String.Source: You've reached the Wayshrine of Learning, Initiate.
String.Dest: この学びの祠へようこそ、新人よ

String.Source: Turns out you don't learn much from just sleeping with something.
String.Dest: 何かと一緒に寝るだけでは、大した事は学べないみたいですわね

String.Source: Coming from one who murders vampires as a trade, I find it hard to believe your intentions are noble.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼殺しを職業とする者から出る言葉として聞けば、あなたの意図が高潔だとは信じがたいわ

String.Source: You got it. Horse, wagon and all. Plopped here without so much as a word.
String.Dest: 馬でも馬車でも何でもありさ。何も言わなくてもここにドサっと集まるんだ

String.Source: Then I'll take it from your corpse! Kill her!
String.Dest: ならお前の死体から奪ってやる！ 奴の望みを絶て！

String.Source: But if this miracle were to somehow happen, I would gladly return to Tamriel.
String.Dest: でも、もしこの奇跡が何らかの形で起こるなら、喜んでタムリエルへ戻るでしょうね

String.Source: After I was freed from prison, I decided to turn my life around. Give something back to the people of Morrowind.
String.Dest: 牢屋を出てから、人生を変えようと思い立ったんだ。モロウウィンドの人々のためになる事がしたくてね

String.Source: Well, that's a ridiculous question. Everyone traveling through here has said that the Oblivion Gates have been opening all over Tamriel.
String.Dest: 愚かな質問だ。ここを通る旅人達は皆、タムリエルのあちこちでオブリビオンの門が開いていると言ってるぞ

String.Source: Nuhn!
String.Dest: うぬ！

String.Source: I don't much like him, but I can't allow the people of Skyrim to be preyed upon by those monsters.
String.Dest: 彼の事はあまり好きじゃないけど、スカイリムの仲間が怪物達の餌食にされるのを黙って見てるわけにはいかないわ

String.Source: Sorry, but that Moth Priest's comings and goings are none of my business, and none of yours either.
String.Dest: 悪いがその聖蚕の僧侶がどこから来てどこに行こうが、こっちには関係のない話さ。あんたにもな

String.Source: None of this makes any sense. What does she have to do with this?
String.Dest: どうも話が分からないな。彼女はこの件とどう関係しているんだ？

String.Source: You test my patience with these questions.
String.Dest: いつまで質問を続ける気なのだ？

String.Source: Any moment now, I'll find you...
String.Dest: すぐに見つけてやる…

String.Source: Are you prepared to honor the mantras of Auri-El and fill your vessel with His enlightenment?
String.Dest: アーリエルの真言を受ける光栄に浴し、その水差しを悟りの水で満たすか？

String.Source: This accursed place is nothing but a prison without walls.
String.Dest: この呪われた場所は、まるで壁のない牢獄だ

String.Source: Hunh!
String.Dest: ふん！

String.Source: I'll find you soon.
String.Dest: すぐに見つけてやる

String.Source: You've given me a great gift friend. The night air hums and the shadows are full of color.
String.Dest: 素晴らしいよ。こんなにも夜の空気が新鮮で、暗がりには色彩があふれているなんて

String.Source: But we'll put a swift end to that.
String.Dest: だがそれもすぐに終わりにしてやる

String.Source: Are you mad, woman? After the trouble I've gone through?
String.Dest: 正気か、お嬢さん？ これだけやった挙句にか？

String.Source: That's why I always try to be ready for anything.
String.Dest: こういう事があるから、備えが大切なのよね

String.Source: I've never even seen this part of the castle before. Be careful. I don't know what might be around.
String.Dest: お城のこの部分には来た事がありませんの。用心なさって。何があるか分かりませんわ

String.Source: Follow your instincts.
String.Dest: 本能に従うんだ

String.Source: Heh... wait, you're serious? This is the Redwater Den, purveyors of the best Skooma outside of Balmora.
String.Dest: え… ちょっと、冗談よね？ このレッドウォーターの隠れ家は、バルモラ以外では最高のスクゥーマが手に入る場所よ

String.Source: He's a little eccentric, but we can trust him and we could definitely use his skills.
String.Dest: ちょっと変人だけど、信用できるし、彼の能力は必ず役に立つわ

String.Source: Finally! I never thought I'd see these again.
String.Dest: やっとか！ もう戻らないかと思ってた

String.Source: Then go forth, child. May the enrichment of Auri-El strengthen your resolve as you undertake your journey to the Inner Sanctum.
String.Dest: さあ、行くがいい。アーリエルの力が汝の意思をさらに強くし、最奥聖域への道のりを助けるだろう

String.Source: I live in a dark world, where no light shines through. I carry this burden with every step I take.
String.Dest: ここは光の差さない、暗闇の世界だ。一歩一歩が、この苦しみと共にある

String.Source: We had always maintained an uneasy alliance with the underground-dwelling dwarves, and when faced with extinction we turned to them for help.
String.Dest: 我々は地下に住むドワーフとの間に不安定な協定を結び、維持する努力をしてきた。そして滅亡の危機に瀕して、彼らに助けを求めた

String.Source: Out of our way.
String.Dest: 邪魔だ

String.Source: Are you seeing this? It's fantastic!
String.Dest: ご覧になって？ 素敵ですわよ！

String.Source: That's, what, your third? All right, only one left to go. I'll meet you there.
String.Dest: それは、三つめかな？ いいね、残りは一つだけだよ。そこで会おう

String.Source: I feed when I'm hungry, I sleep when I'm tired, and I kill whenever I'm in the mood. Those are the things that are important to me.
String.Dest: 空腹な時に食べ、疲れれば眠り、殺したい気分の時にはいつでも殺す。それが私にとって重要な事

String.Source: Farewell.
String.Dest: それでは

String.Source: Was it "Between the forces of good and evil."? No, no... that's not it...
String.Dest: 「善と悪のはざま」？ 違う、違うぞ… 何だったっけかな…

String.Source: If it'll get him closer to being in charge, he'll slit your throat without a moment's thought.
String.Dest: 自分が上に立つためには、一瞬のためらいもなくお前の寝首をかきにくるぞ

String.Source: Politics bore me terribly, but they're a fact of life here.
String.Dest: 政治は退屈極まりないが、ここでは日常の一部だよ

String.Source: I'll return to Castle Volkihar as soon as I'm finished gathering my things.
String.Dest: 荷物をまとめ終わったらすぐに、ヴォルキハル城へ戻るわ

String.Source: Taron Dreth. The world's foremost expert on Dwemer forging techniques. Now answer my question!
String.Dest: タロンだ！ タロン・ドレス。ドゥーマーの鋳造技術に関しては世界最高の権威だ。さあ、質問に答えろ！

String.Source: Excuse me? I told you we should go to my family's home.
String.Dest: もし？ わたしの家族の住処を目指すべきだとお伝えしましたわよね？

String.Source: I think so. And thanks for asking.
String.Dest: そうですわね。聞いて下さってありがとう

String.Source: Take care.
String.Dest: 気を付けて

String.Source: This weather seems all wrong to me.
String.Dest: この天気はまったくおかしいな

String.Source: I could see it in your eyes. You looked about a thousand leagues away.
String.Dest: 目を見れば分かりますわ。あなたはずっと遠くにいるように見えましてよ

String.Source: A book? I'd hardly call a twenty-six volume epic simply a "book."
String.Dest: 本だあ？ 26巻もある大作を、単なる“本”などと呼ぶのはよしてくれないか

String.Source: Gods, don't let Isran see you like that. Look, I hear Falion in Morthal deals with this kind of thing. Go see him immediately.
String.Dest: イスランにその姿を見られるなよ。モーサルにいるファリオンが処置の仕方を知っていると聞いた。今すぐ訪ねるべきだ

String.Source: Let's head back up there and see if we can read the scrolls.
String.Dest: あそこに戻って、書が読めるかどうか確かめましょう

String.Source: Arkay and I think it could be a great advantage for us. You should look into retrieving it.
String.Dest: アーケイも言っているが、我々の戦力として利用できそうだ。それを手に入れるべきだ

String.Source: Welcome, Initiate. This is the Wayshrine of Illumination.
String.Dest: ようこそ、新人よ。ここは光の祠だ

String.Source: This feels like the right way. I was starting to worry.
String.Dest: こちらで正解ですわね。一時はどうなる事かと思いましたわ

String.Source: Well done! I said you'd return victorious, Arkay wasn't so sure. Wield it bravely.
String.Dest: お見事！ あんたなら勝てると言ったが、アーケイは信じてなかったよ。勇敢な奴だ

String.Source: Might come in handy.
String.Dest: 役立ちそうだ

String.Source: Where did the sun go?
String.Dest: 太陽はどこへ行ったの？

String.Source: Almost...
String.Dest: あと少しだよ…

String.Source: Precisely! The people will put pressure on the Dawnguard who are apparently murdering their fellows without provocation.
String.Dest: そのとおり！ 理由もなく市民を殺す事に対して、ドーンガードに対する風向きは強くなるはずだ

String.Source: After 400 years, you think you'll be the one to take me down?
String.Dest: この400年間で初めて、私を倒す者になれると思うのか？

String.Source: Wait... I hear something!
String.Dest: 待って… 何か聞こえましてよ！

String.Source: Then let's get going. I want to get there before my father has a chance to track us down.
String.Dest: では急ぎましょう。父に見つかる前にそこへ行かなければ

String.Source: But I got used to it.
String.Dest: でももう慣れましたわ

String.Source: Yiiee!
String.Dest: イェエー！

String.Source: Can I cound on you to handle whatever smithing work we need done? Repairs, new armor, weapons...
String.Dest: 鍛冶仕事なら何でも君に任せていいだろうか？ 修理とか、新しい防具や武器の製造とか…

String.Source: I liked to explore. My parents almost never let me off the island, so yeah, I poked around down here a lot.
String.Dest: 探検するのが好きでしたの。両親がほとんど島の外に出してくれませんでしたから、ここをずいぶん見て回りましたわ

String.Source: Well, look what we have here... someone with flesh on their bones.
String.Dest: おや、誰かと思えば… 肉づきのいい人じゃないか

String.Source: You'll be a welcome addition to the court, I'm sure.
String.Dest: 君はきっと喜んで宮廷に迎え入れられるだろう

String.Source: All I said to Potema was I thought she looked a little portly in that gown. How was I supposed to know?
String.Dest: ポテマには、そのドレスだと少し太って見えると言っただけさ。だって知らなかったからね

String.Source: Look at this place. Do you think anything would want to live here?
String.Dest: ご覧になって。こんなところに住みたい生き物がいると思いまして？

String.Source: Auri-El... save me...
String.Dest: アーリエルよ… ご加護を…

String.Source: Life here has many advantages, don't you agree?
String.Dest: ここでの暮らしはいい事ずくめだよ。そうだろう？

String.Source: Rrargh!
String.Dest: ワァーッ！

String.Source: Are you prepared to honor the mantras of Auri-El and fill your vessel with His enlightenment?
String.Dest: アーリエルの真言を受ける光栄に浴し、その水差しを悟りの水で満たすか？

String.Source: I wanted to thank you for getting me this far. But after we get in there, I'm going to go my own way for a while.
String.Dest: ここまで連れて来てくれてありがとう。でも中に入ったら、わたしはしばらく自分の道を進む事にいたしますわ

String.Source: Needless to say, we can't abide that, as it would raise general alarm amongst the herd, to say nothing of the increased feeding competition.
String.Dest: かの者が広く民衆に不安を引き起こしているのをこれ以上看過はできない。このままでは捕食の競争も激化する事になる

String.Source: May the light of Auri-El cleanse your soul!
String.Dest: アーリエルの光で罪を洗い流すがいい！

String.Source: Ha ha. They seem quite taken to you now that you're carrying some of the tree bark.
String.Dest: ふふっ。あなたが木の皮を持っているから、蚕達があなたに頬を染めてますわ

String.Source: No, and if you're smart you won't either. I know he's one of your kind and all, but he's only looking out for himself.
String.Dest: いいや。お前も同族だからと言って、信用しない方がいい。奴は自分の事しか考えていないからな

String.Source: You only delay the inevitable.
String.Dest: 逃げ回っても、どうせ死ぬのだぞ

String.Source: Hurrnhh...
String.Dest: はああ…

String.Source: Your staff... gods, it's made of Aetherium! Pure Aetherium!
String.Dest: お前の装備品は… 何てこった。エセリウム製じゃないか！ 正真正銘のエセリウムだ！

String.Source: No... all these wasted months, or has it been years? I don't even remember how much time has passed.
String.Dest: そんな… 何か月、いや何年、いや、思い出せないほどの時間は無駄だったってのか？

String.Source: Well, we've got that knife. There has to be a use for it.
String.Dest: さあ、ナイフは手に入りましたわ。あとはその使い道ですわね

String.Source: Need... to sleep...
String.Dest: 眠らなくては…

String.Source: It may seem cruel that we hold our thin-blooded kin in low esteem. But our needs must come before theirs.
String.Dest: 血の薄い同族を蔑むのは残酷に思えるかも知れん。だが彼らより我らの需要が優先されるべきだ

String.Source: Come, infidel, meet your end!
String.Dest: 異端者め、死を受け入れるがいい！

String.Source: So let's hear it.
String.Dest: では聞かせてもらおうか

String.Source: He has neglected using it for ages. If he wants it filled now, then grander things are afoot. This is good.
String.Dest: 彼は長い間それを放置している。もし彼が今それを満たしたいとすれば、面白い事が起きる。見ものだよ

String.Source: The law will require proof that we can't present. And Jarls disapprove of bloodshed they haven't called for themselves.
String.Dest: 法は我々では提示できない証拠を求めるだろうし、各首長は自ら命じたもの以外の流血に眉をひそめるものだ

String.Source: Okay. Hope this helps.
String.Dest: いいわよ。これが役立つ事を願うわ

String.Source: I once paid 3000 gold for this fungus that grows in giants armpits. Couldn't stand up for days, but no where as good as this stuff.
String.Dest: 前に、巨人の脇の下に生えるというキノコに3000ゴールド払いましたよ。何日も立ち上がれなくなった上に、味もこれの足元には及びませんでした

String.Source: Only thirty more pages and my next volume will be complete.
String.Dest: あと30ページで、次の巻が完成するぞ

String.Source: Who's there?
String.Dest: 誰だ？

String.Source: No... I won't let you ruin centuries of preparations...
String.Dest: やめろ… 何世紀もかけた計画を台なしにする気か…

String.Source: You seem to have lost the gift that has been given to you. Perhaps Serana will grant it to you again.
String.Dest: せっかくもらった贈り物を失くしたみたいだね。多分セラーナがまたくれるんじゃないかな

String.Source: Fight well.
String.Dest: 奮闘に期待する

String.Source: It is time to cull the weak.
String.Dest: 弱者を処分する時だ

String.Source: Something bad happens, word spreads. More bad things happen, people worry.
String.Dest: 悪い事が起きると、うわさが広まる。さらに悪い事が起きると、人々は不安になる

String.Source: Door's shut tight. I bet those Resonators would open it, though.
String.Dest: 扉は密閉されている。でもあの共鳴装置で開くはずだよ

String.Source: Hunh!
String.Dest: ふん！

String.Source: It's only a matter of time!
String.Dest: 逃げられると思うな！

String.Source: Let twilight fall and blood spill!
String.Dest: 世界を闇で包み、血で染めろ！

String.Source: Good.
String.Dest: いい返事ね

String.Source: I never trusted those damn scrolls. Who knows what those things could have done to you... just look at Dexion.
String.Dest: あの下らない書を信じた事などございませんわ。あんなものに関わるとろくな目に遭わないですわよ… デキソンがいい例ですわ

String.Source: Oh no! What have I done?
String.Dest: ああ、とんでもない事を！

String.Source: I suggest you have Serana change you back. At once.
String.Dest: セラーナに頼んで元に戻してもらうといい。直ちにな

String.Source: Oh yes. They were an important part of the process here.
String.Dest: ああ。ここでの大切な儀式の一部だった

String.Source: Look at this place. No one's been here in centuries.
String.Dest: ご覧になって。何世紀というもの、誰一人訪れなかった場所ですわよ

String.Source: Nnnnyyaarrggh!
String.Dest: ぬあー！

String.Source: My time... has come...
String.Dest: これで… 最後か…

String.Source: I wonder if my family misses me? I wonder if they're still alive. How much time has passed?
String.Dest: 家族は心配してるかな？ それ以前に、生きてるのかな。一体どれほどの時間が経ったんだ？

String.Source: There you are!
String.Dest: そこだ！

String.Source: This meant that we were vulnerable to the forces of Oblivion.
String.Dest: そうなりゃ、オブリビオンからの攻撃を防ぐ手段はないわな

String.Source: Whatever is required! I am happy to do whatever is asked of me. I only wish to be useful.
String.Dest: どんな事でも喜んで！ とにかく役に立ちたいんだ

String.Source: Be careful who you trust. Not all of us have the court's best interests at heart.
String.Dest: 信頼する相手は慎重に選んだ方がいいよ。宮廷の利益を優先しない者も中にはいるからね

String.Source: W...Where's the sun?
String.Dest: 太陽は… どこ？

String.Source: Umm... this is the part where we usually get in the boat. You with me?
String.Dest: うーん… 普通ならボートに乗るところですわね。ついて来ますの？

String.Source: Return to me when your part is done. And may you enjoy your second nuptials.
String.Dest: やるべき事が済んだら戻ってきてくれ。素敵な2度目の結婚式になりますよう

String.Source: Thanks again for all your help.
String.Dest: 手助けに本当感謝するよ

String.Source: I don't think anyone's ever met the Ideal Masters. I'm not even sure anyone knows what they look like.
String.Dest: アイディール・マスターに会った人なんていないと思いますわ。彼らがどんな姿なのかさえ定かではありませんのに

String.Source: I mean, why would that idea even cross your mind?
String.Dest: つまり、どうしてそんな事考えつくわけ？

String.Source: Not sure what you're waiting for... step into the light.
String.Dest: 何を待っているのか存じませんけど… 光の中へお入りになって

String.Source: You can't stop the inevitable!
String.Dest: 死を避ける事はできないぞ！

String.Source: I'm going to rend you limb from limb!
String.Dest: バラバラに引き裂いてやる！

String.Source: May Auri-El's warmth imbue your body with strength.
String.Dest: その身がアーリエルの力で満たされん事を

String.Source: Oh, gods...
String.Dest: ああ、神よ…

String.Source: I can see that.
String.Dest: なるほどな

String.Source: What's that basin in the center signify?
String.Dest: 真ん中にあるあの水盤は何を意味しているのかしら？

String.Source: Child, my life ended long before you were born!
String.Dest: ガキめ、貴様が生まれるはるか前に、命など捨てたのだ！

String.Source: Exactly. It's a lost art. Most necromancers just raise up whatever bodies are nearby. A simple trick, really. Child's play.
String.Dest: そのとおりですわ。まさしく失われた技術。ほとんどの死霊術師は、近くにある死体を何でも甦らせているだけですの。簡単な子供だましです

String.Source: Well, unless my vision's playing tricks, there seems to be some sort of magical effect around you. Seems like we're on the right track.
String.Dest: 幻惑でも見ていない限り、あなたの周りに魔法の効果のようなものが見えますわ。やり方は間違っていなかったようですわね

String.Source: With Sunhallowed Arrows, you would be able to produce a much more spectacular effect... causing bursts of sunlight to envelop your foes.
String.Dest: 太陽神の矢を使えば、さらに絶大な効果を発揮するのだ。敵は太陽の炎で焼き尽くされるだろう

String.Source: Yiiee!
String.Dest: イェエー！

String.Source: That'll teach you.
String.Dest: いい教訓になるな

String.Source: A strange race, these Falmer.
String.Dest: 変わった種族ですわ、このファルメルというのは

String.Source: What am I doing here? I don't belong in a place like this!
String.Dest: なぜここにいるんだ？ こんな所、私にはふさわしくない！

String.Source: Considering the state I'm in, I'd say that option vanished a long time ago.
String.Dest: 今のこの姿では、そんな望みはとうの昔に消えちまったさ

String.Source: Feran is so good to me, allowing me to be his assistant.
String.Dest: フェランはとても親切にしてくれる。助手に取り立てられたんだ

String.Source: Yeeeaarrggh!
String.Dest: イィーヤァー！

String.Source: Enjoy yourself.
String.Dest: 楽しんでこい

String.Source: Parading around in that form won't do you any good here.
String.Dest: ここをその姿で練り歩くのは何の得にもならないわよ

String.Source: Aggh!
String.Dest: ああ！

String.Source: Wha- who... you're that one from Helgen. Barely made it out of there myself. I hurt my back and I- I just need something for the pain.
String.Dest: あんたは… ヘルゲンから来た例の人だな。あそこから何とか抜け出せたけど、背中を痛めてね… 痛み止めがほしいんだよ

String.Source: What a wonderful place you've brought me.
String.Dest: 何て素敵な場所なのでしょう

String.Source: I will erase you from existence!
String.Dest: この世から消し去ってやる！

String.Source: I don't care about politics. You want to fight over the throne with the rest of them, go right ahead.
String.Dest: 政治には関心がないの。他の者達と玉座を争いたければ、ご自由にどうぞ

String.Source: Only those who have suffered long can find the light within the shadows.
String.Dest: 長く苦しんだ者だけが、暗闇の中で光を見つけることができる

String.Source: I can smell your blood!
String.Dest: お前の血の匂いがするわ！

String.Source: But of course, those days are gone now.
String.Dest: だがそれも、今や過去の事となってしまった

String.Source: No, no more!
String.Dest: もう嫌だ！

String.Source: Huh? What do you want?
String.Dest: ん？ 何しに来たんだ？

String.Source: If anything happens to Serana, I'll have you answer for it.
String.Dest: もしセラーナに何か起これば、責任を取ってもらうわ

String.Source: Arrggh!
String.Dest: ああああ！

String.Source: Filthy vampire!
String.Dest: 邪悪な吸血鬼め！

String.Source: By the time the compact had been completed, it was too late for us to even attempt to intervene.
String.Dest: 盟約が成立した頃には、すでに我々が手出しできない状況だったのだ

String.Source: None can deny your power now.
String.Dest: あなたの力を否定できるものはもうないわ

String.Source: Knowing that Serana shares that blessing with me, I'm already terrified that Harkon will get his hands on her.
String.Dest: セラーナがその祝福を共有している事を知った今、ハルコンが彼女に手を出す事が恐ろしいの

String.Source: So close...
String.Dest: もうすぐだ…

String.Source: Aggh!
String.Dest: ああ！

String.Source: It was.
String.Dest: 昔はそうでしたわね

String.Source: I hope you're not trying to lord your abilities over me.
String.Dest: あんたが威張りん坊じゃないといいけど

String.Source: Ah, yes. Saint Jiub, Jiub the Eradicator, Jiub the Magnificent... I've earned a lot of those titles thanks to my campaign against the Winged Menace.
String.Dest: そうだ。聖ジウブ、根絶者ジウブ、偉大なるジウブ… この種の名をほしいままにしたものだ。羽根のある敵との戦いで活躍したおかげでな

String.Source: This is pointless.
String.Dest: こんな事は無駄だ

String.Source: Speak with Sorine. She has something for you.
String.Dest: ソリーヌに聞けば、何かあるだろう

String.Source: Valindor of Riften has his ears in places that we'd love to listening in. Joining our family should increase our possibilities in the south.
String.Dest: リフテンのヴァリンドルは我々のいい耳になってくれるぞ。仲間に加えれば南での活動の可能性が広がる

String.Source: Have to put a stop to this menace...
String.Dest: 奴らの脅威を食い止めねば…

String.Source: I knew it!
String.Dest: やっぱり！

String.Source: Go destroy the feral beast before this becomes a problem.
String.Dest: これが問題になる前に、野蛮な獣達を殺してきなさい

String.Source: Shhh. They're watching us. Always watching.
String.Dest: シー。彼らが見てる。いつも見張ってるんだ

String.Source: Here we are, in view of seeing the prophecy fulfilled. These are truly great times.
String.Dest: 予言の実現を目の当たりにするとは。本当に素晴らしい時代だな

String.Source: Surely you've heard of "The Rise and Fall of Saint Jiub the Eradicator: Hero of Morrowind and Savior of the Dunmer."
String.Dest: 「モロウウィンドの英雄にしてダンマーの救世主、根絶者・聖ジウブの興亡」というありがたい書物だ。聞いた事、あるだろ？

String.Source: Hide if you wish, it matters little to me.
String.Dest: 好きなだけ隠れるがいい。何も変わらない

String.Source: The sunbursts would certainly hurt anything, but is especially devastating to the undead.
String.Dest: 太陽の炎はどんな相手も傷つける事ができるが、特にアンデッドには効果的だ

String.Source: While it would fill me with joy to see the Chantry back to its former glory, that time has long since passed.
String.Dest: 礼拝所にかつての栄光が戻ったのは喜ばしい事だが、あまりにも長い時間が経ってしまった

String.Source: Without a Septim on the throne of the Empire, Dagon was able to leave Oblivion through the gates and attack.
String.Dest: 帝国の玉座にセプティムが不在となった事で、デイゴンは門を通ってオブリビオンから攻撃を仕掛ける事が可能になった

String.Source: And from the bottom of my heart, I thank you.
String.Dest: そして心の底から、感謝するわ

String.Source: I will herald the fall of eternal night!
String.Dest: 我こそは、永遠の闇の始まりを告げる者だ！

String.Source: Another cave. I've spent enough time underground, myself, but if you want to go in, I'm right behind you.
String.Dest: また洞窟ですの？ 地下にはもう飽き飽きしていますけど、あなたがどうしてもと言うなら仕方がありませんわね、お供いたしますわ

String.Source: Where is this "Darkfall Cave?"
String.Dest: その“ダークフォール洞窟”はどこにありますの？

String.Source: I thought death was a release, not an eternity of torment.
String.Dest: 死は解放だと思ってたのに、実際は永遠の苦しみだった

String.Source: Spiders? All right, we can handle this. Come on!
String.Dest: スパイダー？ 相手にはできるね。行くよ！

String.Source: Without the royal blood flowing through you, you're one step away from the rest of the thralls.
String.Dest: 体に流れる王族の血がなければ、従徒どもとお前の違いは微々たるものだ

String.Source: I've found the infidel!
String.Dest: ここにいたか、異端者め！

String.Source: Everything eventually tumbles down to you.
String.Dest: 何もかも結局は他人事ですものね

String.Source: I suppose we're all a little crazy to be here, right?
String.Dest: ここに来てる時点で、頭おかしいと思わない？

String.Source: They shouldn't be that hard to find. Shelves, tables... should be easy to find. She wouldn't have hidden them.
String.Dest: そんなに苦労するはずはありませんわ。棚やテーブルを探せば簡単に見つかると思いますの。母は隠さなかったでしょうから

String.Source: I was. Honestly, it took me up until now to figure out that my mother was really just as bad as he was.
String.Dest: 以前はそうでしたわ。正直に言いますけど、母が父と同じぐらい悪者だというのは今になってようやく分かった事ですのよ

String.Source: "What do I mean," indeed!
String.Dest: はいはいまったくごもっとも！

String.Source: By the Divines, what happened to the sky?
String.Dest: ああ、神々よ、空はどうなってしまったんだ？

String.Source: Hrargh!
String.Dest: ハァーッ！

String.Source: Where are you!
String.Dest: どこにいる！

String.Source: Very clever, mother. Very clever.
String.Dest: 賢明ですわね、お母様。とても賢明ですわ

String.Source: If you're here for business, go ahead. Otherwise, get lost.
String.Dest: 仕事があるなら構わないが、そうじゃなきゃ消えな

String.Source: Simple. He says 'kill', I kill.
String.Dest: 単純よ。彼が“殺せ”と言い、私が殺す

String.Source: While that's one less trouble maker to keep an eye on, you could have been more discreet in your approach to the problem.
String.Dest: 監視するべき厄介者が一人減ったとはいえ、もっと用心深く問題へ取り組むべきだったな

String.Source: Surprisingly, they agreed to protect us but demanded a terrible price... the blinding of our race.
String.Dest: 彼らは意外にも我々を守る事に同意したが、法外な対価を要求してきた。種族の目から光を奪うというのだ

String.Source: But the way she said it... "someplace he would never search." It was cryptic, yet she called attention to it.
String.Dest: でもあの「父が決して探さない場所」という言い方は… やたらと強調的で、どこか謎めいておりますわね

String.Source: Uhhhhh.
String.Dest: ううっ

String.Source: Show yourself!
String.Dest: 姿を見せろ！

String.Source: What's going on? Where did the sun go?
String.Dest: どうなってる？ 太陽はどこだ？

String.Source: You watch yourself around him.
String.Dest: 奴には気をつけた方がいい

String.Source: The darkness hums and we sing its praises. Sweet melodies. Sweet like the water that flows through their veins.
String.Dest: 闇がハミングし、私達はその称賛を歌う。甘い旋律。彼らの血管を流れる水のように甘い

String.Source: The Elder Scrolls vanished from the Imperial City around 175 of this era and have been scattered across Tamriel by forces unknown.
String.Dest: 星霜の書は今世紀の175年頃に帝都から紛失し、未知の力によってタムリエルのあちこちにばらまかれた

String.Source: Step from the shadows, defiler.
String.Dest: 陰に隠れず出てこい、冒涜者め！

String.Source: Maybe you should leave the writing to an expert and stop making foolish suggestions.
String.Dest: 文章の事は専門家に任せて、下らない提案はやめたらどうかね

String.Source: Therefore, when an arrow is loosed from the bow, it produces a magical effect very similar to being burned by fire.
String.Dest: 放たれる矢には魔力が宿り、当ったものは炎に包まれたようになる

String.Source: Unnff!
String.Dest: ウゥッ！

String.Source: Watch yourself. The sky is a bad omen.
String.Dest: 気をつけて。空が不吉だ

String.Source: Are you prepared to honor the mantras of Auri-El and fill your vessel with His enlightenment?
String.Dest: アーリエルの真言を受ける光栄に浴し、その水差しを悟りの水で満たすか？

String.Source: Farewell.
String.Dest: さらばだ

String.Source: At least the pain is gone...
String.Dest: 少なくとも、苦痛はもう感じない…

String.Source: Fine. If it will get you to leave me alone. Lead the way.
String.Dest: 分かったよ。それで放っておいてくれるならな。先導してくれ

String.Source: Nervous?
String.Dest: 落ち着きませんの？

String.Source: How about sitting in your home, minding your own business and then suddenly getting attacked by a dremora and his cronies.
String.Dest: 自分の家で用事に集中している時に、ドレモラとその仲間に突然襲われる話だ

String.Source: Yeah, just around this bend.
String.Dest: そうですわ、あそこを曲がったところ

String.Source: I hope you've read the first volume of my epic by now.
String.Dest: 手記の第一巻、もう読んでくれただろうな

String.Source: The Dawnguard apparently like killing vampires.
String.Dest: ドーンガードは吸血鬼を殺すのが好きなようね

String.Source: The tyranny of the sun is over!
String.Dest: 太陽の専制は終わりだ！

String.Source: Alas, the vampire can cloud the minds of those he preys upon. It won't be easy to convince anyone he's other than he appears.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼は獲物の精神をくもらせる力をもつ。奴の正体を人に信じさせるのは容易な事ではない

String.Source: I used to be one of the best traders in High Rock, you know. People would track me down just to see what I had for sale.
String.Dest: 昔はハイロックで最高の商人の一人だった。うちの商品が見たくてみんな俺を追いかけたもんだ

String.Source: I... fell. When the earthquake hit. The ground just... opened up.
String.Dest: …落ちたんだよ。地震が起きた時。地面が自然に… 開いたんだ

String.Source: Good to see you again. It's becoming quite lonely out here.
String.Dest: また会えてうれしいわ。ここはずいぶん寂しくなってきたものね

String.Source: No.
String.Dest: いいや

String.Source: You think I do this for my health? Come back when you've got the coin.
String.Dest: 健康のためにやってるとでも？ 金をこしらえてから来な

String.Source: I can't remember how long I've been here. Has it been a day or a century?
String.Dest: いつからここにいるのか思い出せない。もう1日経った？ それとも1世紀？

String.Source: I know you're here somewhere.
String.Dest: ここにいるのは分かっていますの

String.Source: This "stranger" has done more for me in the brief time I've known her than you've done in centuries!
String.Dest: その“よそ者”の彼女は、お母様が何世紀もの間にしてくれた以上の事を、わずかな間にしてくれましたのよ！

String.Source: You can use my coffin whenever you like.
String.Dest: 私の棺はいつでも使ってちょうだい

String.Source: Then we find out where she hid it. If she's still alive... well, as alive as she was before. Or is now. Or... you know what I mean.
String.Dest: それから母が書を隠した場所を見つけましょう。もし母がまだ生きていましたら… 以前と同じように生きていましたら、あるいはとにかく今生きていましたら、それとも… お分かりになって？

String.Source: Hyargh!
String.Dest: ハイヤァー！

String.Source: Speak with Orthjolf. He has something for you.
String.Dest: オースユルフと話すといい。何かあるはずだ

String.Source: Even a necromancer as seasoned as my mother would be willing to spend years trying to gain access to them.
String.Dest: わたしの母と同じぐらい経験を積んだ死霊術師でも、彼らとお近づきになれるなら喜んで数年間を費やすのでしょう

String.Source: Now, where was I...
String.Dest: さて、続きはどこからだったか…

String.Source: Mother had something similar back home when she was tending the courtyard gardens to scrape moss and fungus off of the trees.
String.Dest: うちに似たようなものがありましたわね。母が中庭の庭園でコケやキノコを木からはがすのに使っておりましたの

String.Source: Well I need to do some testing on this new weapon, and I was thinking a live target would be helpful.
String.Dest: この新しい武器の性能を確かめたいんだけど、生き物を的にして試すのがいいと思うの

String.Source: Accept my gift and I promise that you will learn the difference.
String.Dest: 我が贈り物を受け取れば、その差が分かると保証しよう

String.Source: If you're putting yourself in harm's way, you'd best be prepared. Take these.
String.Dest: 身を危険にさらすなら、準備は入念にすべきだ。これを使うといい

String.Source: The herd is becoming distressed, which makes it more difficult for us to slip in and out undetected.
String.Dest: 民衆の動揺がこれ以上続けば、我らが気づかれずに出入りするのがより困難になるだろう

String.Source: Dragons weren't enough. Now we've lost the sun too?
String.Dest: ドラゴンだけでは飽き足らず、今度は太陽まで失うと？

String.Source: I no longer hunger, grow weary or feel anything but loneliness.
String.Dest: お腹も減らないし、疲れもしないし、何も感じない。孤独以外はな

String.Source: I can't believe I'm trading this for some dried up plants. Oh well, a sale's a sale.
String.Dest: こいつをしなびた植物と交換するなんて信じられないよ。まあ、商売は商売だ

String.Source: Oof!
String.Dest: うわあ！

String.Source: Stay away from the Oblivion Gate I told them. Did they listen? Of course not.
String.Dest: オブリビオンの門に近づいてはいけないと言ったけど、彼らが聞くわけないだろ？

String.Source: For the time being I will remain here, on the overlook and continue trying to keep the Sanctum free of the Betrayed.
String.Dest: しばらくはこの見張り台に残って、裏切られし者から聖域を守る仕事を続けるつもりだ

String.Source: Okay, let's head into the portal.
String.Dest: いいですわ、それでは転移門に入りましょう

String.Source: That's the last time I argue with a dremora.
String.Dest: ドレモラと言い争いになったのは、あれが最後だな

String.Source: I'm putting a lot of faith in you. Don't let me down.
String.Dest: とても信頼しているのよ。失望させないで

String.Source: Leave this place.
String.Dest: ここから立ち去れ

String.Source: Get back here!
String.Dest: 戻ってこい！

String.Source: While I ready things here, you find out what this woman means to the vampires. She must be important somehow.
String.Dest: 私がここで準備している間に、君はその女性が吸血鬼達にとってどういう存在なのかを探ってくれ。彼女には何か重要な意味が隠されているはずだ

String.Source: Stay away from the crystals or you may find yourself becoming one of us.
String.Dest: 水晶に近づいてはダメだ。こんな姿になりたくないならね

String.Source: Living here, I have access to magic I couldn't possibly imagine before.
String.Dest: ここに住んでると、以前は想像もできなかった魔法にお目にかかれるよ

String.Source: You're... you're mortal! What are you doing here like that?
String.Dest: あなたは… 定命の者！ そんな状態でここで何をしているの？

String.Source: Death to those who defile the Chantry!
String.Dest: 礼拝所を穢す者に死を！

String.Source: For the time being, they will remain open.
String.Dest: しばらくの間は、閉ざされる事はない

String.Source: Monster? What monster? Don't know what you're game is, but I'll humor for a moment.
String.Dest: 怪物？ 怪物って？ 何の話か知らないけど、今は付き合ってやるよ

String.Source: Get out of here, monster.
String.Dest: バケモノめ、ここから去れ

String.Source: Arkay says you'll be facing warlocks.
String.Dest: アーケイによれば、敵はウォーロックだ

String.Source: Do you know where he's staying now?
String.Dest: 彼が今どこにいるか知っておりますの？

String.Source: I've been pouring over some of the tomes left here in the keep. Interesting stories, indeed.
String.Dest: この書庫に残されていた書物をひっくり返して調べてみた。非常に興味深い話だったよ

String.Source: Speak with Florentius. He has something for you.
String.Dest: フロレンティウスに聞けば、何かあるだろう

String.Source: We meet again. That was quite the trek.
String.Dest: またね。すごい旅だったよ

String.Source: The Chantry was constructed near the beginning of the First Era to provide a retreat for those that wished to become enlightened.
String.Dest: 悟りを開こうとする者達が集まる場所としてこの礼拝所が造られたのは、第一紀の始めの事だ

String.Source: We don't have many other options, do we?
String.Dest: 他に選択肢はあまりないようだな

String.Source: See those things in the alcoves up there? 'Kinetic Resonators', the dwarves called them. Strike them in the right order, and the doors should open.
String.Dest: あそこのくぼみにあるものが見える？ ドワーフは“動力共鳴装置”と呼んでいるんだ。正しい順番で叩けば、扉は開くはずだよ

String.Source: No, no, you must get away! If I'm seen talking to you, they'll blame me!
String.Dest: ちょっと、近づかないでくれよ！ こんなところを誰かに見られたら目も当てられない！

String.Source: Come on!
String.Dest: かかってこい！

String.Source: Darkness shroud you.
String.Dest: 闇に包まれん事を

String.Source: I see. You're simply here to stop the Tyranny of the Sun, despite the cost to Serana. Nothing else matters.
String.Dest: なるほど。太陽の専制を阻止するためだけに来たのね。セラーナが犠牲になろうと。他の何も重要ではない

String.Source: I've fought worse than you!
String.Dest: 何のこれしき！

String.Source: Yeeeaarrggh!
String.Dest: イィーヤァー！

String.Source: I got enough troubles on my mind just tryin' to scrape by out here.
String.Dest: ここで何とか暮らしていく事で頭が一杯なんだ

String.Source: Right. Well, you can relax. I have it under control.
String.Dest: そうか、なら安心しろ。こちらで何とかする

String.Source: If you'll excuse me.
String.Dest: では失礼する

String.Source: I wish I could say how many we numbered, but only a privileged few knew that, and they're dead now.
String.Dest: 我々が総勢何名ほどだったのか分かればいいんだが、それを知っていたのは要職の数名だけで、いずれも死んでしまっている

String.Source: Wait! ...Yes, yes there is. The shards we collected... they're pure Aetherium, remember? It's not much, but it'll do.
String.Dest: 待って！ …うん、あるよ。集めた破片は… 純粋なエセリウムだよ、覚えてる？ 多くはないけど、使えるね

String.Source: Keep an eye out and let us know if you see any vampires.
String.Dest: 警戒して、吸血鬼がもしいたら知らせてくれ

String.Source: The light be with you.
String.Dest: 光のご加護あれ
