String.Source: But when it was all said and done, those elves were either slaughtered, vanished or gave up and took the dwarves' bargain.
String.Dest: だが、彼らも結局は殺されたり、追放されたり、考えを曲げてドワーフの要求に従わされたのだ

String.Source: Hyargh!
String.Dest: ハイヤァー！

String.Source: The clouds, the sky... it's all wrong. Everything's wrong.
String.Dest: あの雲も、空も… 何もかも、全部がおかしい

String.Source: See that thing?
String.Dest: あれが見える？

String.Source: What's that, Lord? Well, should I tell him?
String.Dest: 何ですって？ それは彼に話しても？

String.Source: Arvak! Where are you, boy?
String.Dest: アルヴァク！ どこにいるんだい？

String.Source: You've found the Wayshrine of Radiance, Initiate.
String.Dest: ここは輝きの祠だ、新人よ

String.Source: I can't see the sun. Where did it go?
String.Dest: 太陽が見えない。どこへ行った？

String.Source: That one's far nicer though... almost ceremonial.
String.Dest: あれはもっと素敵だったけど… 何かの儀式とかにも使えそうだったわね

String.Source: He said he was heading for Dragon Bridge next. I hope that helps you.
String.Dest: 次はドラゴン・ブリッジに向かうと言ってたよ。お役に立てたならいいが

String.Source: Look around for the missing crests. Even in this mess, they should stick out.
String.Dest: なくなっているクレストを探しますのよ。これだけ散らかっていても、あれは目立つはずですわ

String.Source: I'm ready when you are.
String.Dest: 準備はできておりますわ

String.Source: Do you have a moment? Gunmar and I have been talking and, well, we're slightly worried.
String.Dest: ちょっといい？ ガンマーと話してたんだけど、ちょっと心配になってきたの

String.Source: Speak with Gunmar. He has something for you.
String.Dest: ガンマーに聞けば、何かあるだろう

String.Source: You're new here, so I'll explain this once. You feed from the thralls as much as you like. You kill them, and I'll split you in half.
String.Dest: ここは不慣れだろうから、一度だけ説明する。従徒どもの血は好きなだけ飲んでくれていいが、殺したりしたらお前を引き裂いてやるからな

String.Source: I mentioned that there was one more danger. Here it is.
String.Dest: もう一つ危険があると言ったよね。これだよ

String.Source: Could you get this for me? I don't exactly have a lockpick...
String.Dest: これをどうにかしてくれる？ 開錠は得意じゃなくてね…

String.Source: But I'm warning you, do anything funny, and you'll regret it.
String.Dest: ただし、警告しておく。変な真似をしたら、後悔することになるぞ

String.Source: I have. There was a time, years ago, when we were both members of the Vigilants, and both equally dissatisfied with them.
String.Dest: あるとも。以前は二人とも番人のメンバーだったからな。途中で嫌気がさしたのも一緒さ

String.Source: Enjoy your hunt.
String.Dest: 良い狩りを

String.Source: Never much cared for folks who can't mind their own business.
String.Dest: 他人の事をあれこれ詮索する連中は虫が好かないんだが

String.Source: Just hit them, and they'll... do whatever it is they're supposed to do.
String.Dest: 叩いてみて、そうすれば… 必要な仕掛けを担ってくれるはず

String.Source: Here's everything I have. Sorry there isn't more.
String.Dest: ここにある物で全部よ。少なくてごめんね

String.Source: You'll be meeting my friend Arkay very, very soon!
String.Dest: あの世でアーケイに会うがいい！

String.Source: It's daytime... Why is it so dark outside?
String.Dest: まだ昼間なのに… どうして外が暗い？

String.Source: Might be that I have, but I can't say for sure.
String.Dest: そうかも知れないが、確かな事は言えないね

String.Source: I felt I had two choices. I could either live in fear of the night, or I could do something to help protect my people.
String.Dest: 選択肢は2つあると感じたんだ。夜に怯えて生きるか、それとも同胞を守るために立ちあがるか

String.Source: Your shield... gods, it's made of Aetherium! Pure Aetherium!
String.Dest: お前の盾は… 何てこった。エセリウム製じゃないか！ 正真正銘のエセリウムだ！

String.Source: Oof!
String.Dest: うわあ！

String.Source: Do you... hear something?
String.Dest: 何か… 聞こえる？

String.Source: Assuming you have the smithing skills, you should be able to make this yourself at Gunmar's forge. Either way, I'll have some for sale soon.
String.Dest: 鍛冶の技術を持ってるなら、ガンマーの鍛冶場で自分で造れるはずよ。近いうちに、商品としても売り出すつもりだけど

String.Source: Well, if you do just let us know. We'll be in this area until we find them.
String.Dest: もし見つけたら教えてほしい。見つけるまではこの周辺にいる

String.Source: He wanted me to take him out to Dragon Bridge, but I told him it ain't one of my stops.
String.Dest: ドラゴン・ブリッジに行きたいって言われたけど、そこはコース外だから断ったんだ

String.Source: "A powerful warhammer imbued with magic that places warding runes on the ground to obliterate it's wielder's foes."
String.Dest: 「魔法で満たされた強力な戦鎚。地面に防御のルーンを描く事により、持つ者の敵を撃破する」

String.Source: Come forward. You have nothing to fear here.
String.Dest: 近くへ来い。恐れる事はない

String.Source: Let me take a look at it.
String.Dest: わたしに読ませて

String.Source: Well... so long as you don't tell anyone. Here take it and slip into a booth before someone notices.
String.Dest: いいけど… 内緒だからね。ほら、これを持って、他の人に見られないうちに部屋に入って

String.Source: I was paid to assassinate some high-ranking official from House Redoran.
String.Dest: おれはレドラン家の高官を暗殺する仕事を引き受けた

String.Source: Why? What do you want?
String.Dest: なぜ？ 何が目的なんだ？

String.Source: I'll darken the skies with her blood!
String.Dest: その娘の血で空を黒く染めてやろう！

String.Source: Florentius still worked with the Order from time to time.
String.Dest: フロレンティウスはその後も時々教団と仕事をしていた

String.Source: I was simply an addict who needed money for skooma. The stuff wasn't cheap, and murder always seemed to be in demand.
String.Dest: 単にスクゥーマをキメてて、そのための金がほしかっただけ。安いものではなかったし、殺し屋はいつの時代も食いっぱぐれないもんだ

String.Source: He tried to hire me for a trip to Dragon Bridge, but I told him that ain't one of my stops.
String.Dest: ドラゴン・ブリッジに行きたいって言われたけど、そこはコース外だから断ったんだ

String.Source: I was in the midst of writing the second volume and they just threw me into this prison. It's unfair!
String.Dest: 第二巻の執筆中だというのに、この牢屋に入れられちまったんだ。ひどい話だよな！

String.Source: My best beloved! I never knew the night held such vibrant color, or that the air vibrated so. And at times, it's as if the very shadows whisper.
String.Dest: 最愛の人よ！ 夜がこれほどまでに鮮やかな色を秘め、大気がこうも活き活きとしているなんて！ そして時には、影そのものがささやきかけてくるかのよう…

String.Source: If my friends could try this Redwater Skooma they might finally understand why I like slumming it with you commoners.
String.Dest: 友人連中にこのレッドウォーター・スクゥーマを味見させられれば、私があなた達と共にこうして遊ぶ理由を分かってもらえるのですが…

String.Source: It feels... old, doesn't it? Even by dwarven standards. No one has been here in thousands of years.
String.Dest: 古い感じだね… そうじゃない？ ドワーフの基準をもってしても。数千年間、誰もここに来ていない

String.Source: Really? You had to take the armor? Come on, leave me with a little dignity...
String.Dest: 本気？ 鎧を取る必要があったの？ 参ったよ、幻滅しちゃうね…

String.Source: Let's finish this!
String.Dest: 終わらせてやる！

String.Source: When something is trapped in a soul gem, and then the energy is used for powering an enchantment, the remnants are sent here.
String.Dest: 何かが魂石の中に閉じ込められて、そのエネルギーが魔法の強化に使われたら、残り物がここに送られてくるのですわ

String.Source: Please... end this misery.
String.Dest: 頼む… ひと思いに楽にして

String.Source: Come and face your destruction!
String.Dest: さあ来い、死を受け入れろ！

String.Source: What's wrong with the sky?
String.Dest: 空はどうしてしまったんだ？

String.Source: An' maybe it won't.
String.Dest: 多分ダメだね

String.Source: Unnff!
String.Dest: ウゥッ！

String.Source: I told you, I've prepared for this. It's going to work.
String.Dest: 言っただろ、準備はしてある。うまくいくさ

String.Source: I was glad to find out not only the bad rumors were true.
String.Dest: 悪いうわさだけが真実ではないと分かってうれしかったわ

String.Source: If I may, let me offer you a piece of advice.
String.Dest: ちょっと忠告したいんだけど、いいかな？

String.Source: Even so, I almost made it... another foot or two to the side, and the water would have broken my fall. But... nothing I could do.
String.Dest: それでも、あと少しだった… 横にあと一歩か二歩で、水が落下を受けとめてくれたはず。でも… 仕方ないね

String.Source: Look at you. Mortal. Weak.
String.Dest: ぜい弱な定命の体とは、情けない姿だ

String.Source: Not that I ever saw.
String.Dest: 見た事はございませんの

String.Source: Yiiee!
String.Dest: イェエー！

String.Source: Damn it, not again!
String.Dest: もう、またか！

String.Source: Her name was Valerica. She has been gone for so long now, I can only assume she has left this world, one way or another.
String.Dest: 名はヴァレリカだ。最後に見てからかなりの時間が経ったが、何らかの形でこの世を離れたのだろうな

String.Source: Well, that's the thing. We don't know where he is. Haven't seen him in years.
String.Dest: それが問題なの。彼の居場所は分からないわ。もう何年も、姿を見てないの

String.Source: So I'm thinking that wasn't the right way.
String.Dest: ですから、道を間違えたのではないかと思っておりますの

String.Source: You seem to have lost the gift that Lord Harkon gave you. I suggest you tell him at once.
String.Dest: ハルコン卿からの贈り物を失くしたみたいじゃないか。その事をすぐ彼に言った方がいいよ

String.Source: Why can't I just die? I fear I'm cursed to walk this desolate land forever.
String.Dest: どうして死ねないんだ？ この何もない場所をさまよい続ける呪いなんて嫌だ

String.Source: You can't beat us!
String.Dest: 貴様らには負けないぞ！

String.Source: I hope you find Lord Harkon's court to your liking.
String.Dest: ハルコン卿の宮廷を気に入ってもらえるといいね

String.Source: My ship... what happened to my ship? Where am I?
String.Dest: 船は… 私の船はどこ？ ここは一体どこなんだ？

String.Source: Come to visit this lost soul again?
String.Dest: この迷える魂に、まだ何か用か？

String.Source: Yes. I'm speaking of the Cliff Racer of course. Wretched things.
String.Dest: そう。言うまでもなく、クリフ・レーサーの事だ。忌々しい連中だったな

String.Source: Supposedly, the bow draws its energy from the sun itself, which it why it shows up in that prophecy.
String.Dest: おそらく弓はその力を太陽自身から得ておりますのよ。だからあの予言に登場するのですわね

String.Source: That's it...
String.Dest: それでいい…

String.Source: Your husband is such a soul, and the stars appear cooperative. Now is your chance.
String.Dest: 君の旦那さんは大した人だ。それに星の巡りも味方している。今がチャンスだな
そんな…

String.Source: Why do you think I was asking?
String.Dest: あなたに尋ねたと思ったの？

String.Source: Hhyyaarrgghh!
String.Dest: ハイヤァアア！

String.Source: Hm. Did I call it "The Great Hunt" or was it just "The Hunt?" Bah, I can't remember!
String.Dest: あーむ、「グレートハント」と書いたかな？ 単に「ハント」だったか？ ブァー、思い出せんじゃないか！

String.Source: Arkay warns it's baneful charge abates with each dawn. Something to keep in mind, I suppose.
String.Dest: アーケイからの注意だが、高まった攻撃力は夜明けと共に元に戻る。これは覚えておいた方がいいな

String.Source: Where... am I...
String.Dest: ここは… どこ…

String.Source: He'll tell you what a monster I am, that I can't be trusted... You mark my words, it's him you need to worry about.
String.Dest: 我（われ）がいかに人でなしで、信用に値しないか… とか言ってくるだろうが、警戒すべきなのは奴の方だからな！

String.Source: Rrargh!
String.Dest: ワァーッ！

String.Source: There isn't any Aetherium here, is there? Damn it!
String.Dest: ここにエセリウムはないんだね？ ああもう！

String.Source: Was it "Having the adoration of thousands..." No, wait. I could make it "the adoration of tens of thousands."
String.Dest: 「数千人の歓呼を受けて」… いや、待った。「数万人」と書いたかも知れない

String.Source: Lead the way. Take me to this "monster" of yours.
String.Dest: 案内してちょうだい。その“怪物”のところへ

String.Source: If you're so worried about the trolls, why agree to let me go ahead with it?
String.Dest: トロールの事がそこまで心配なら、何故止めなかったんだ？

String.Source: A swift death is all you deserve!
String.Dest: 今すぐ死んで罪を償え！

String.Source: Bleed!
String.Dest: 血を流しなさいな！

String.Source: I am above the petty squabbles here. I have lived for far too long to be bothered with them.
String.Dest: ささいないさかいは超越している。そんな事で頭を悩ますには、あまりに長く生きてきた

String.Source: Suits me just fine.
String.Dest: せいせいしたよ

String.Source: Oh, I see. You've decided to cease pursuing your busy schedule and wish to talk now. How kind.
String.Dest: ああ、忙しい中、予定を後回しにして話をしてくれるのか。そりゃどうもね

String.Source: Have you made up your mind?
String.Dest: 決心はつきまして？

String.Source: I hope you comprehend killing better than you comprehend speech.
String.Dest: おしゃべりより殺しの方を理解してほしいものだな

String.Source: Do you... know what you're doing?
String.Dest: あなた… 目算はありまして？

String.Source: We'll speak again soon.
String.Dest: また会おう

String.Source: You've done exactly as I predicted and brought your fetching companion to me.
String.Dest: 確かにお前は言った通りの仕事を終え、魅力的な人物を連れ帰ってきた

String.Source: Unnnnhhh...
String.Dest: ううううう…

String.Source: It's good to speak to you again.
String.Dest: また会えて嬉しいぞ

String.Source: Hunh!
String.Dest: ふん！

String.Source: Don't leave, you'd have better dreams here...
String.Dest: 帰る前に、いい夢見ていきなさいよ…

String.Source: May not look like much, but my boat can get you there faster than walking.
String.Dest: 大した船には見えないだろうが、歩いていくよりは早いぜ

String.Source: Wagh!
String.Dest: うわああ！

String.Source: See you.
String.Dest: またね

String.Source: Well, using an arrow with the bow that's been dipped in blood may cause it to function differently... corrupting its purpose.
String.Dest: 血に浸した矢を使うと、また別の効果がある… 当たった者を腐敗させるのだ

String.Source: I can't wait to see the courtyard again.
String.Dest: 中庭をもう一度見る時が待ちきれませんわ

String.Source: And you think I do? Humph.
String.Dest: そうだと思うのか？ ふんだ

String.Source: Maybe that's why I worked so hard to redeem myself once I was freed.
String.Dest: 脱獄した後、あれほど熱心に働いたのはその償いのためだろうな

String.Source: Ohhh... that's good stuff. Believe me friend, I've tried it all and this is the best.
String.Dest: ふむう… 上物ですね。冗談抜きであらゆる種類を試しましたが、これが最高です

String.Source: Keep your neck covered!
String.Dest: 喉笛をさらさないように！

String.Source: Gah!
String.Dest: ぐああ！

String.Source: Any luck finding my pages yet?
String.Dest: 原稿は見つかったか？

String.Source: It is good to know that I will not have to do it alone. I am glad this Dawnguard exists.
String.Dest: 独りでやらなくていいのはありがたい。ドーンガードがいてよかった

String.Source: All over Skyrim. It's my job to collect them. I try and keep something for everyone. For every taste, I mean.
String.Dest: スカイリム全土だ。あいつらを集めるのが仕事だ。幅広い趣味をまかなえるよう、配慮している

String.Source: Nnnnyyaarrgghh!
String.Dest: ぬおおおお！

String.Source: I find it tiring to converse with someone in that form. Too much effort.
String.Dest: そんな姿をした者と話をするのは疲れるよ。多大な労力を必要とするからね

String.Source: You're always welcome to return here at any time, of course.
String.Dest: 用があればいつでもここに来てくれ

String.Source: Otherwise, you're a threat to all of us.
String.Dest: さもないと、我々全員の脅威となる

String.Source: I assume that the Arch-Curate was corrupted by them when they found a way to breach the Inner Sanctum.
String.Dest: 奴らは何らかの方法で最奥聖域に侵入した。おそらく最高司祭はその時に奴らの手に落ちたのだろう

String.Source: Besides this isn't so bad when you think about it.
String.Dest: これはこれで、まあ悪くはないがな

String.Source: Well, go on! What are you waiting for?
String.Dest: さあ、ほら！ 何を待っているの？

String.Source: Your suffering will be legendary!
String.Dest: その苦しみは伝説として残るだろう！

String.Source: Let's check that out.
String.Dest: 調べてみましょう

String.Source: If he's moved on, perhaps the Vigilants there can tell you where he's gone.
String.Dest: もしそこからさらに移動したなら、現地にいる番人達が行き先を知ってるかもな

String.Source: I'll hang back for a bit, but you're not leaving me behind. This is too important.
String.Dest: ちょっと離れますけれど、置いて行ったりなさらないで。絶対ですわよ

String.Source: He got to my target first and called the guard to cover his tracks. By the time I got there, the place was on alert.
String.Dest: あいつはターゲットを殺すと、衛兵を呼んで自分の痕跡を消そうとした。到着した時には、現場は厳戒態勢だった

String.Source: Indeed I was. I hunted down and killed every last one of them. Took years.
String.Dest: その通り。奴らを最後の1匹まで追い詰め、皆殺しにしたのである。何年もかけてな

String.Source: Gunmar, do you think I could borrow a troll?
String.Dest: ガンマー、トロールを借りてもいい？

String.Source: Must stay away from the Keepers... must stay away from the Keepers.
String.Dest: 番人に近づいてはダメだ… 番人に近づいてはダメだ

String.Source: Skyrim is ours!
String.Dest: スカイリムは我らのものだ！

String.Source: Ah yes, I remember your Moth Priest now.
String.Dest: ああそうだ。あんたの探してる聖蚕の僧侶の事を思い出したよ

String.Source: Help yourself to anything you need in my laboratory.
String.Dest: 私の研究所で必要なものがあればご自由にどうぞ

String.Source: What foul magic could put the sun out?
String.Dest: どんな卑劣な魔法を使えば太陽を消せるんだ？

String.Source: Wait, please! Don't leave me for the wolves to find!
String.Dest: 待ってくれ！ このままじゃ狼の餌食だ！

String.Source: Aggh!
String.Dest: ああ！

String.Source: That is a personal matter, and one I will not discuss.
String.Dest: それは個人的な問題だ。話すつもりはない

String.Source: You're not welcome here as long as you're one of those... monsters.
String.Dest: ここにいてはいけないわ。今のあなたは… 怪物なのよ

String.Source: The sun... it's gone!
String.Dest: 太陽が… 消えてる！

String.Source: The more they worry, the more they talk about it. I've been hearing rumors for a bit now.
String.Dest: 不安が高まれば、人々はもっとその事を口々にする。そして、すでに少しうわさを耳にした

String.Source: Arrrgh...
String.Dest: ああ…

String.Source: Bring the Dawnguard honor.
String.Dest: ドーンガードに名誉を

String.Source: They could be underground, flying above us... They might be the ground. I have no idea.
String.Dest: 彼らは地下にいるのか、空を飛んでいるのか… 地上にいるのか。何もかも不明ですわ

String.Source: Hrargh!
String.Dest: ハァーッ！

String.Source: I miss my homeland, but I can't say that I miss all the noise!
String.Dest: 故郷は懐かしいが、あの騒音の中に戻る気はこれっぽっちもないぞ！

String.Source: Well, that's certainly a line of thinking I can relate to.
String.Dest: その事については、考えてる事があるの

String.Source: What... have I done... Auri-Eil forgive me...
String.Dest: 私は… 一体何を… アーリエルよ、ご慈悲を…

String.Source: I finally bit off more than I could chew.
String.Dest: 調子にのって、とうとうやりすぎちまったわけだ

String.Source: If you wanted to bring some to me, I'd be happy to provide you some of the extract. It should help resist the draining aura of the crystals.
String.Dest: いくつか持ってきてくれれば、喜んでエキスを渡すわ。水晶からオーラが流出するのを抑えられるはずよ

String.Source: We have not finished speaking yet. Come back at once.
String.Dest: 話は終わっていない。今すぐ戻れ！

String.Source: I'll also assume Vyrthur didn't exactly give you the option to stay your hand.
String.Dest: それに、ヴィルスールの状態を見れば、倒す事をためらう余地などなかっただろう

String.Source: Hunnnhh...
String.Dest: うううう…

String.Source: There you are. Looks like this place has been cleaned out. At least the shard is still here...
String.Dest: そこにいたんだね。この場所は空っぽみたいだけど、少なくともまだとっかかりはある…

String.Source: So maybe you could ask Isran if he knows anything? Just keep in mind that he... well, he might not like the idea.
String.Dest: だから、イスランに聞いてみるといいんじゃない？ ただし… 彼はこの考えが気に入らないかも知れないから注意して

String.Source: I know your friends would probably want to kill everything in here. I'm hoping you can show some more control than that.
String.Dest: あなたのお仲間はここの住人を皆殺しにしたがるのでしょうね。あなたにはもう少し話が通じると思いたいですわ

String.Source: At this rate, my first volume will be complete. Don't give up.
String.Dest: この調子でいけば、第一巻が復元される日も近い。諦めるなよ

String.Source: May you always prevail.
String.Dest: 幸運を祈る

String.Source: You're no match for me!
String.Dest: 貴様などには負けん！

String.Source: You seem tense. Join a booth and relax a bit. Or did you need another fix?
String.Dest: 緊張してるみたいね。部屋に入ってリラックスしたら。それとも、もう一本イっとく？

String.Source: No, no. You must speak with Lord Harkon, not me!
String.Dest: 違う違う。話す相手はハルコン卿だ、僕じゃない！

String.Source: Well, go on, take it!
String.Dest: さあ、どうぞ。ほら！

String.Source: It is a rather well-kept secret.
String.Dest: かなり厳重に守られた秘密だ

String.Source: Gods curse you!
String.Dest: 神罰を受けろ！

String.Source: I lost two wives to vampires. I will avenge them.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼には妻を二人も奪われた。仇はとる

String.Source: Come on, I think it's over here.
String.Dest: ついて来て、こっちだと思うよ

String.Source: See you around... if you live long enough.
String.Dest: また会おう… 君が長生きできたら

String.Source: You don't know what it's like, coming from a family like that.
String.Dest: そんな家庭で育つのがどんな事か、あなたには分かりませんわ

String.Source: Now what was it I said to that prisoner? "Stand up, there you go. You were dreaming..." Yes, that was it.
String.Dest: あの囚人に何と言ったんだっけ？ 「ほら立って、行った行った。寝れば… 夢だって見るだろう」うん、そうだ

String.Source: I'll admit, I don't know that I can trust you, but I know I can't rely on the Vigilants for anything. So we'll have to work together for now.
String.Dest: 正直言って、君を信頼していいのかどうかは分からん。だが番人達が役立たずとあっては、我々は協力せざるを得ない

String.Source: Not the most solid construction here. About what I'd expect from... creatures like this.
String.Dest: ここの造りは微妙ですけれど、このあたりに関しては例外ですわね…

String.Source: This is a waste of time.
String.Dest: 時間の無駄だ

String.Source: Don't try and impress me. It only leaves you looking foolish.
String.Dest: いいところを見せようとするな。愚かに見えるだけだ

String.Source: That damn dremora and his minions. They didn't even give me a chance to explain who I was.
String.Dest: 忌々しいドレモラとその手下うんぬんの仕業だ。名乗る暇さえ与えられなかった

String.Source: The Chalice has been in Lord Harkon's possession for quite some time now. It is, when used properly, able to increase the potency of our powers.
String.Dest: 聖杯はかなり以前からハルコン卿の手元にある。適切に使えば、我らの潜在能力を増幅できるものだ

String.Source: Your pathetic powers are no match for mine!
String.Dest: その程度の力で、勝てると思うな！

String.Source: These Vigilants never know when to give up. I thought we'd taught them enough of a lesson at their hall.
String.Dest: 番人どももあきらめが悪いな。番人の間で思い知らせてやったつもりが

String.Source: Allow me to gather some of my things and I'll head back to Castle Volkihar.
String.Dest: 荷物をまとめさせて。それからヴォルキハル城へ向かいましょう

String.Source: Their hearts are in the right place, of course. But Isran and I were never comfortable.
String.Dest: もちろん連中は至ってまともなんだが、イスランと俺には水が合わなくてね

String.Source: We'll need to watch our steps inside.
String.Dest: 中では慎重に進まないと

String.Source: But please, do be discreet. Our aim isn't to stir the nest, just to skin a rat, reminding them that they are the prey.
String.Dest: だが、慎重に進めろ。目的は騒ぎを起こす事ではない。ちょっとネズミの皮をはいで、奴らに自身が獲物だと自覚させる事だ

String.Source: This vampire showed up while you were away.
String.Dest: 君の留守中に吸血鬼が現れた

String.Source: The Hall was a place of respite, learning and comradeship, where a road-weary brother or sister could rest for a time in peace and comfort.
String.Dest: 番人の間は憩いと研さんと親交の場で、旅に疲れた仲間達がしばらく快適に、静かに休める所だった

String.Source: Of course there are. Most of us spend our lives as nomads, traveling from place to place in our endless war against evil.
String.Dest: もちろんだ。我々の大半は流浪の暮らしを選び、悪との終わりなき戦いで各地を転々としている

String.Source: Maybe we should try asking at the College of Winterhold. Sounds like something they'd know about.
String.Dest: ウィンターホールド大学に行って聞いた方がいいですわね。彼らなら何か知ってそうですし

String.Source: How about you pay for your habit like everybody else. We're not running a charity here.
String.Dest: 他の人と同じように、お金を払って楽しんだらどう？ 慈善事業じゃないのよ

String.Source: Looks like they're better at making traps than they are at making bridges.
String.Dest: 彼らは橋を造るよりも罠をこしらえる方が得意だったようですわね

String.Source: Poor thing. I know it would have tried to kill us, but still...
String.Dest: 哀れなものですわ。わたし達を殺そうとしたかも知れない相手ですけど、それでも…

String.Source: This is incredible. It's like a whole other world.
String.Dest: 信じられませんわ。まるで別世界ですわよ

String.Source: Emptiness consumes me.
String.Dest: 虚無感に押しつぶされそうだ

String.Source: Does this ice feel a little... thin to you?
String.Dest: この氷、少しばかり… 薄くありませんこと？

String.Source: That... has to be the place. I've never seen a building like that before.
String.Dest: きっと… あれがそうですわ。あんな建物は見た事がありませんもの

String.Source: Death is but a door, time is but a window. I'll be back.
String.Dest: 死は扉にすぎず、時は窓にすぎない。また来るよ

String.Source: This is a statue of Auriel, but it's using the older signs of his power. This temple must be ancient.
String.Dest: これはアーリエルの像ですわね。ですが彼の力を示す比較的古い印が使われているところを見るに、この聖堂は相当古いに違いありませんわ

String.Source: You know I'm more than capable. Why are you bringing this up?
String.Dest: 腕前は知ってるだろう？ 何でそんな話をするんだ？

String.Source: I don't relax. Ever.
String.Dest: 気が休まる時などないよ。一瞬たりとも

String.Source: Why her? What significance does she have? We don't have enough information.
String.Dest: なぜ彼女が？ 彼女に何の意味があるんだ？ 情報が足りないようだ

String.Source: Well, it seems the Dawnguard really is needed again.
String.Dest: どうやらドーンガードの復活が急務のようだ

String.Source: As far as I know, though, it's never been held by a vampire. That would be a new one.
String.Dest: でもわたしの知る限り、吸血鬼の手に落ちた事はありませんわ。それは新しい個体かも知れませんわね

String.Source: How dare you set foot in here, after being infected by those foul beasts?
String.Dest: あの忌々しい獣どもに汚（けが）されたあとで、よくもここに足を踏み入れる事ができたな

String.Source: I am at your service, as always.
String.Dest: いつもどおり、ご用があれば何なりと

String.Source: Die, heathen!
String.Dest: 死ね、異端の者め！

String.Source: That's of course if you're foolish enough to try it.
String.Dest: 知恵があれば、試そうとは思わないだろうがな

String.Source: Good thing the boss heard that old farmer running his mouth off in the tavern about finding this place.
String.Dest: 親分が酒場で老いた農民からこの場所について聞き出せたのは幸運だった

String.Source: Anyway, enough of that. Let's get started.
String.Dest: とにかく、そろそろ始めましょう

String.Source: It was a little... quieter... back then. Guess a little vampire girl was enough to scare off the rats.
String.Dest: 当時はもう少し… 静かなところでしたわね。吸血鬼の少女でもネズミを十分追い払えましたわよ

String.Source: This leads out to the courtyard. Just head for the door.
String.Dest: ここを行けば中庭に出ますわ。まっすぐ扉に向かって

String.Source: Who knows? It was in shambles when we first got here.
String.Dest: 分かりませんわ。最初に来た時点で荒廃しておりましたの

String.Source: My mother kept this a secret, even from me. She must have been up to something she thought was dangerous.
String.Dest: 母はこの事をわたしにさえ秘密にしていましたわ。きっと何か危ない事をやっていたのですわね

String.Source: My mother had a bit of a thing for magical constructs. Not... not what you're thinking. She just found them fascinating.
String.Dest: 母や魔術で作られたものに興味を持ってはいましたけれど… あなたが思っている意味ではなく、神秘的に感じていた程度の事ですわ

String.Source: May Auri-El's radiance fill your heart with joy.
String.Dest: アーリエルの光がその心を喜びで満たさん事を

String.Source: I'll stain the ground with your blood!
String.Dest: 血の海でもがき苦しめ！

String.Source: Like I said, we were never very close. Not a lot of father-daughter bonding if you know what I mean.
String.Dest: 承知の通り、わたし達の仲がいい事なんて一度もございませんでしたわ。父と娘の間に絆なんて存在しませんでしたの。お分かりになって？

String.Source: Sorry, I know you're trying to help. Thanks.
String.Dest: ごめんなさい。あなたの善意は分かっておりますのよ。ありがとう

String.Source: I murdered others for money. And before you think I belonged to some romantic or secretive guild, think again.
String.Dest: 金のために人も殺った。何かロマンチックな秘密結社の類に属していたと思うなら、それは大間違い

String.Source: I know that in my head. But I just can't help feeling bad about... the way things are.
String.Dest: 頭ではその事が分かっておりますわ。ですが心はとめどなくて… 現状を嘆いてしまいますのよ

String.Source: Anyway, we should keep moving.
String.Dest: とにかく、先を急ぎましょう

String.Source: Die, damn it... die!
String.Dest: 死ね、クズめが… 死ね！

String.Source: If you think of any juicy details to add to my work, let me know!
String.Dest: 何か面白い物語のネタがあったら、おれに教えてくれよな！

String.Source: Oh, they definitely were.
String.Dest: ええ、間違いなくそうでしたわ

String.Source: Oh, definitely. Mother would have plenty of those materials in her laboratory, you just need to find them.
String.Dest: ええ、あるはずですわ。母はそういった素材を研究室にたっぷり蓄えていたから。探せば見つかるかと

String.Source: Enough of these games. Fight me!
String.Dest: 遊びは終わりだ、堂々と戦え！

String.Source: Leave me be.
String.Dest: 放っといてくれ

String.Source: So this is where your Vigilants came from? No wonder you look so lost all the time.
String.Dest: となると、ここがあなた達番人の本拠ですの？ あなたがいつも途方に暮れたような顔してるのも無理ありませんわね

String.Source: I await your answer.
String.Dest: 答えはまだか

String.Source: Serana can change that. I suggest you ask her to.
String.Dest: セラーナに変えてもらうよう頼むがいい

String.Source: You are worth very little if you're not one of us.
String.Dest: 我らの仲間でなければ、お前はほぼ無価値だ

String.Source: Mortals aren't allowed to freely roam the castle. Not even you.
String.Dest: たとえお前でも、定命の者が自由に城をうろつく事は許されない

String.Source: Oh, wait a moment. Here, I want you to have these before you go.
String.Dest: ああっと、待ってくれ。これを持っていってくれないか

String.Source: Damn it. How could I be so foolish?
String.Dest: クソったれが。おれの大馬鹿野郎が

String.Source: You're mortal? What are you doing here like that?
String.Dest: あんた定命の者かい？ こんな所で何をやってるんだ？

String.Source: Then it's almost over. We can finally rewrite the prophecy as we see fit.
String.Dest: となれば、ほぼ終わったようなものですわ。予言をいい方向に書き変える事がようやくできますのね

String.Source: My wares? I, uh... Oh so sorry, I'm all sold out.
String.Dest: 商品を？ あの… 悪いけど、全部売れちゃったんだ

String.Source: It is a cherished gift you have given me. To see the world this way, through your eyes. It will only bring us closer.
String.Dest: この恩恵は実に大切なもので、こうして愛する人と同じ目で世界を見つめられることで、我々の距離はさらに縮まることでしょう…

String.Source: Feed well.
String.Dest: よく食べなさい

String.Source: Without the royal blood flowing through you, you're one step away from the rest of the thralls.
String.Dest: 体に流れる王族の血がなければ、従徒どもとお前の違いは微々たるものだ

String.Source: You disrespect Lord Harkon by walking around here like that. Go see him at once, else you might find yourself in a cage.
String.Dest: そのように歩きまわるのはハルコン卿に対する非礼だ。直ちに拝謁しに行け、さもないと檻にぶち込むぞ

String.Source: May your blades stay sharp.
String.Dest: 刃が鋭くあらん事を

String.Source: You'd best beg Lord Harkon to turn you at once. Although, you do smell delicious...
String.Dest: 今すぐハルコン卿に頼んで自分を変えてもらうべきよ。実においしそうな匂いだけどね…

String.Source: Ask Serana to make you one of us again, before someone makes a meal out of you.
String.Dest: 誰かがあなたを食べてしまう前に、セラーナに頼んでまた私達の仲間にしてもらいなさい

String.Source: You can't walk around here like some common mortal!
String.Dest: 平凡な定命の者みたいにここを歩き回ってはだめよ！

String.Source: You'd best find him soon. Ask him to change you back.
String.Dest: すぐに会って、元に戻してもらうようお願いするんだな

String.Source: Relieved... I think.
String.Dest: 安心いたしましたわ… 多分

String.Source: You would dare show up here after becoming mortal, abandoning all that Lord Harkon has granted you?
String.Dest: ハルコン卿に与えられたものをすべて捨て去り、定命の体になった上でここに姿を現すとはな

String.Source: Hopefully he'll be gracious enough to make you one of us again.
String.Dest: 彼が寛大にも君をまた仲間にしてくれるといいね

String.Source: Best not to damage our reputation. Let your actions be as discrete as possible.
String.Dest: 評判を落とさないよう注意が必要だ。なるべく目立たずに行動するといい

String.Source: There you are. Give me a hand with this door, would you?
String.Dest: そこにいたんだね。この扉を手伝ってくれないかな？

String.Source: I had thought better of you.
String.Dest: お前を認めていたんだが

String.Source: And what exactly are you going to pay me with? Take a look around. Gold doesn't exactly win you any friends around here.
String.Dest: 支払いはどうやって？ 周りを見ろよ。この辺じゃあゴールドを持っててもそんなに意味はないぞ

String.Source: With any luck he'll bleed to death before anyone notices. A cold corpse will say what we want better than a warm one.
String.Dest: うまくいけば誰かが気づく前に彼は出血多量で死ぬ。温かい死体より冷たい死体の方が私達の言いたい事が伝わるわ

String.Source: Die!
String.Dest: 死ね！

String.Source: So these Initiates had to lug around a heavy pitcher of water. Marvelous.
String.Dest: それであの新入り達は重たい水差しを抱えて歩き回らなければならなかったというわけですのね。素晴らしいですわ

String.Source: Great gift of blood you've given me. Blood that boils in my veins. Gives me strength.
String.Dest: 偉大な血の贈り物だわ。血管の中で沸き立つ血。力を与えてくれる

String.Source: A wondrous blade... ahhh, never mind. Just take the darn thing.
String.Dest: これぞ伝説の剣… あああ、気にしないでくれ。持っていきな

String.Source: Well, I hate to see it go, but what am I gonna do with it here anyway?
String.Dest: 本当は手放したくないけど、ここでそんなもの持っててもしょうがないしな

String.Source: I know this isn't an easy choice. Take your time.
String.Dest: おいそれと決められる話ではありませんわね。じっくり考えるのがよろしくてよ

String.Source: Well, it started with the followers of Mehrunes Dagon having Emperor Uriel Septim VII assassinated.
String.Dest: 事の起こりは、メエルーンズ・デイゴンの信者が皇帝ユリエル・セプティム7世を暗殺した事件だ

String.Source: It's not working! Try something else!
String.Dest: 効果がないよ！ 別の方法を試して！

String.Source: Almost as much as we like killing them.
String.Dest: 私達が彼らを殺すのが好きなのと同じくらいに

String.Source: There's no escape.
String.Dest: 逃げ道なんてないぞ

String.Source: This won't stop your soul from getting ripped out, but at least you'll look good when your corpse hits the ground.
String.Dest: こいつを着てても死ぬ時は死ぬけど、立派な格好で死ねるだけましだよ

String.Source: Oh sure, keep pestering me then, by all means.
String.Dest: いいよ、好きなだけ商売の邪魔でもしてくれ

String.Source: They're a splinter group of the "Vigilants of Stendarr." A bit more ambitious, it seems.
String.Dest: 彼らは“ステンダールの番人”の分派よ。もう少し野心が強いようだけど

String.Source: Their focus will be shifted from us, giving us one less nuisance to deal with.
String.Dest: 人々の注目は我々からそれる。面倒がひとつ減るというわけだ

String.Source: All right.
String.Dest: いいだろう

String.Source: Isran has a problem with most people, if you haven't yet noticed.
String.Dest: イスランは大抵の相手と対立してしまうからな、気づいているとは思うが

String.Source: Arkay and I will stand triumphant!
String.Dest: アーケイと俺に敗北はない！

String.Source: The one with the ruined castle? Don't you know that place is cursed? Even seasoned sailors steer far around that place.
String.Dest: 城の廃墟がある所かい？ あの島は呪われてるのを知らないのか？ ベテランの船乗りだって避けて通る場所だぞ？

String.Source: It is good to have powerful allies, is it not?
String.Dest: 頼もしい味方がいるってのはいいもんだね

String.Source: Yeah, all right. I'll take you as far as I can.
String.Dest: ああ、いいとも。超特急で連れてってやるさ

String.Source: Speak with Isran. He has something for you.
String.Dest: イスランに聞けば、何かあるだろう

String.Source: You just enjoy the fresh air and leave the rowing to me.
String.Dest: こぐのは任せて、新鮮な空気を存分に味わってくれ

String.Source: The people of Morrowind were so grateful to have the roads safer again, they took to calling me "Saint Jiub" and then the other names followed.
String.Dest: モロウウィンドの人々は、安全に街道を歩けるようになって喜んでくれた。その功績を讃えられ、“聖ジウブ”などと呼ばれるようになったってわけだ

String.Source: Looking to hire a boat?
String.Dest: 船を雇いたいのかい？

String.Source: Stay alert.
String.Dest: 注意を怠るな

String.Source: Don't get in my way, and I won't tear your arms off. Simple, isn't it?
String.Dest: 邪魔をしなければ両腕を引き千切らないでやる。簡単だろう？

String.Source: Sometimes he doesn't even have to say it.
String.Dest: 言う必要さえない時もあるわ

String.Source: Absolutely. I can only do twenty at a time, so if you want the rest of your arrows blessed, let me know.
String.Dest: いいとも。一度に作れるのは12本だけだから、残りの矢にも祝福がほしいならまた言ってくれ

String.Source: I was sure I heard something.
String.Dest: 何か聞こえたぞ

String.Source: Definitely. You must think my life has been so strange. It sounds like your family wasn't nearly as fractured as mine.
String.Dest: そのとおりですわ。わたしの人生がすごく変わってるとあなたは思うのかしらね。わたしと違って、あなたの家族は全然壊れてなかったのでしょうから

String.Source: Back to the darkness with you!
String.Dest: 闇へ帰るがいい！

String.Source: Where is this "Darkfall Cave?"
String.Dest: その“ダークフォール洞窟”はどこにあるの？

String.Source: Back, godless beast!
String.Dest: 立ち去れ、神の冒涜者め！

String.Source: I think he had regular contact with the Vigilants, and I know Isran kept track of them...
String.Dest: 番人とは定期的に会ってるはずだし、イスランは足取りを掴んでると思うけど…

String.Source: Can you feel it? You're now so much more than you were before.
String.Dest: 感じる？ 以前よりはるかに大きな存在になった事を

String.Source: Speak with Vingalmo. He has something for you.
String.Dest: ヴィンガルモと話すといい。何かあるようだ

String.Source: Be sure to enjoy some of our Redwater Skooma before you leave.
String.Dest: レッドウォーターのスクゥーマを試していかなきゃ損するわよ

String.Source: All I remember is that damn dremora and his minions bursting into my home and sending me to their prison.
String.Dest: 覚えているのは、家に押し入ってきた忌々しいドレモラとその手下によってこの牢屋に送り込まれた事だけだ

String.Source: The potency of the Blood Chalice is beginning to wane. We must infuse it with more power if we are to keep it's fullest effects.
String.Dest: 血の聖杯の効果が薄れ始めている。効果を最大限にするには、もっと力の源を注がなければ

String.Source: You're welcome here, as long as you don't overfeed on the thralls.
String.Dest: 従徒達の血を吸いすぎさえしなければ、歓迎する

String.Source: You must be clever. Find a way not to be caught or accused of murder.
String.Dest: うまくやらないとな。捕まったり、殺人の罪を負わされたりしない手を考えるんだ

String.Source: Which, I'm sorry to say, means your usefulness is at an end!
String.Dest: つまり、お前はもう用済みだという事だ！

String.Source: Very well. I suppose a moment or two of my time couldn't hurt.
String.Dest: そうだな。時間はいくらでもある事だし

String.Source: I'm still hard at work on the second volume of my epic.
String.Dest: 我が冒険物語の第二巻の執筆で忙しいんだ

String.Source: You contracted a disease, perhaps, but you are no true vampire.
String.Dest: 疾病にはかかったかも知れんが、真の吸血鬼ではないな

String.Source: Those twisted creatures you call Falmer, I call the Betrayed.
String.Dest: お前達がファルメルと呼ぶ邪悪な生き物の事は、裏切られし者と呼んでいる

String.Source: This is the most peace and quiet I've had in a lifetime.
String.Dest: 生まれてから今まで得る事のできなかった平穏がある

String.Source: I will say only that we did not part on good terms.
String.Dest: 別れが温かなものではなかったとだけ言っておこう

String.Source: They were both drunk with power, and pulling in different directions.
String.Dest: 二人とも力に酔いしれていた。そして別々の道を歩み始めた

String.Source: The only things that can survive here are the Ideal Masters, the undead and the souls themselves. Well, if you want to call that "living."
String.Dest: ここで生きていけるのはアイディール・マスターとアンデッド。そして魂だけですから。あら、“生きる”という言い方はちょっと変ですわね

String.Source: Keep going...
String.Dest: 続けて…

String.Source: I immediately realized things must be pretty bad. Looks like I was right.
String.Dest: 相当ヤバい事になってるのはすぐに察しがついたが、どうやら図星だったらしいな

String.Source: These pages meant the world to me. Thank you!
String.Dest: この原稿はおれの全てなんだ。ありがとう！

String.Source: Still, those of us here have as much of an obligation to protect Skyrim as any other, wouldn't you agree?
String.Dest: でも、ここのみんなと同じようにスカイリムを守る義務があるわ。そうでしょ？

String.Source: The reason I'm standing in front of you as only a whisper of my former self should tell you that.
String.Dest: こうして声だけでお前に語りかけているのを見りゃ分かるだろ

String.Source: A cadre of lesser beasts has become a nuisance, taking too bold an approach to their feeding.
String.Dest: 劣等なけだものの一味が厄介になってきた。獲物への接近があまりに大胆すぎる

String.Source: I miss the warm sunshine. Green grass. Blue skies. I miss being alive.
String.Dest: 暖かい陽の光や、緑の草原や、青い空が恋しいな。生きてた頃に戻りたい

String.Source: Skyrim will be purged of your filth!
String.Dest: スカイリムは不浄なお前達から解放されるのだ！

String.Source: Half the pages, eh? You're getting there.
String.Dest: 原稿の半分、とな？ その調子で頑張ってくれ

String.Source: You again? I thought it was clear I was busy.
String.Dest: また来たのか？ こう見えておれは忙しいんだぞ

String.Source: That's over half of the pages found. Keep it up!
String.Dest: もう半分以上見つけたのか。いいぞいいぞ！

String.Source: I can't believe I lost those pages.
String.Dest: あの原稿を失くすなんて、おれは一体何だってどうして

String.Source: Hey, where are you going. I need those pages!
String.Dest: おい、どこへ行くんだ。その原稿が必要なんだ！

String.Source: Climb on in and let's get this over with.
String.Dest: 乗ってくれ。さっさと済ましてしまおう

String.Source: You did it! You have all of my pages!
String.Dest: やってくれたか！ 原稿を見つけたんだな！

String.Source: Hello there.
String.Dest: やあ、こんにちは

String.Source: How dare they cast me from the Battlespire! I will make them pay dearly.
String.Dest: バトルスパイアーからこんな所に飛ばすなんて！ 必ず復讐してやる

String.Source: Speak with Feran Sadri. He has something for you.
String.Dest: フェラン・サドリと話すといい。何かあるはずだ

String.Source: "Just step into the painting" he said. Yeah, sure... like it's that simple.
String.Dest: 彼の言う通り、「絵の中に入っただけ」。そうよ… 簡単で素敵だと思ったのよ

String.Source: I'm guessing it's the one you found in Dimhollow Crypt. Says it's got something really important to say to you.
String.Dest: おそらく君がディムホロウ墓地で見つけた奴だろう。そいついわく、君に重要な話があるそうだ

String.Source: Damn Akaviri Shaman... how could I know it would trap my soul?
String.Dest: 忌々しいアカヴィリの呪術師… まさか、魂を捕らえられるなんて！

String.Source: They mentioned some place called Dimhollow Crypt, but I don't know where that is.
String.Dest: ディムホロウ墓地とかいう場所の話をしていたが、どこなのかは分からない

String.Source: I doubt very much that they'll hasten to exact revenge for freeing me from the ruins.
String.Dest: 私を遺跡から解放した事に対して、急いで報復を求めるとはとても思えないわ

String.Source: Now, where was I...
String.Dest: さて、続きはどこからだったか…

String.Source: I can't decide which parts of you I'd like to keep for a while...
String.Dest: お前のどの部分をしばらくとっておこうか迷っている…

String.Source: Slay any vampires lately have we?
String.Dest: 最近は吸血鬼を殺してる？

String.Source: I remember she use to keep a small journal. See if you can dig it up.
String.Dest: そういえば母は小さな日記をつけておりましたわ。見つかりますかしら

String.Source: When I rewrite those pages... they'll see what they missed.
String.Dest: すべてを書き直したら… 誰もが知らなかった事が明らかになるぞ

String.Source: That was a dark time in my life. I did a lot of things I ended up regretting.
String.Dest: 人生最悪の時期だった。後悔しか残らない事をいくつもしでかしたもんだよ

String.Source: An old jetty where boats would bring supplies to the castle. Once we moved in, it never got used, along with the rest of the undercroft.
String.Dest: 城に物資を運ぶ船がつけていた古い桟橋ですわね。わたし達が住みついてからは、地下の設備共々、一度も使いませんでしたわ

String.Source: Hmph. Beat me to it, this time.
String.Dest: ふふん。今度は出し抜いてみなよ

String.Source: Feast on life, friend.
String.Dest: 人生を楽しみなさい

String.Source: Sounds useful.
String.Dest: 役に立ちそうだな

String.Source: Farewell, friend. May the radiance of Auri-El fill your heart with joy.
String.Dest: お別れだ、友よ。アーリエルの光がその心を喜びで満たすよう祈ろう

String.Source: Once I get it done, first I'll publish a regular edition, then the folio. I'll be rich!
String.Dest: それが完成したら、まずは通常版を発表し、拡大版も制作する！ 大金持ちになれちゃうな！

String.Source: Perhaps it was nothing after all.
String.Dest: 大した事じゃないだろう

String.Source: The water from the spring makes the skooma so much more potent, we'll have all the thralls we'll ever need.
String.Dest: 泉の水によってスクゥーマの中毒性が格段に強くなる。使っても使いきれないほどの従徒を確保できそうだ

String.Source: Something's not right here. Be careful. I think we may be in for some trouble.
String.Dest: ここはどうも変ですわね。気を付けて。面倒な事になったようですわ

String.Source: Absolutely. I've spent a great deal of time perfecting an extract that increases the potency of soul husks.
String.Dest: その通り。魂のハスクの能力を増加するエキスを完成させるのに膨大な時間を費やしたわ

String.Source: What's happening...
String.Dest: 何が起きている…

String.Source: Speak with Gunmar. He has something for you.
String.Dest: ガンマーに聞けば、何かあるだろう

String.Source: You've heard of the Bloodstone Chalice?
String.Dest: ブラッドストーンの聖杯を知っているか？

String.Source: That bark's pretty fragrant, no wonder the moths are attracted to it.
String.Dest: あの樹皮はすごく良い“香り”がしますもの。蚕が引き寄せられるのも無理ありませんわ

String.Source: Fine, don't worry about it. When we get in, you won't have to babysit about me any more.
String.Dest: いいですわ、気にしないで。いったん中に入れば、わたしの事を手取り足取り気にかけなくてもよろしいですから

String.Source: What's that, Lord? Well, should I tell her?
String.Dest: 何ですって？ それは彼女に話しても？

String.Source: May the blessings of Auri-El protect you as you climb the road to the Inner Sanctum and final enlightenment.
String.Dest: アーリエルの祝福が、汝とともにあらん事を。最奥聖域での悟りへの旅路に幸多からん事を

String.Source: Why?
String.Dest: どうしてだ？

String.Source: I trust you're faring well?
String.Dest: うまくいっているのだろうな？

String.Source: The sun's gone dark. What could be happening now?
String.Dest: 太陽が暗くなった。一体何が起こっている？

String.Source: As I've told you before I'm a Daughter of Coldharbour... offspring to Molag Bal.
String.Dest: 以前言ったように、私はコールドハーバーの娘… モラグ・バルの子孫よ

String.Source: If I can remain useful, those above me will see fit to keep me here.
String.Dest: 役に立つところを見せれば、ずっと置いてくれるだろうからね

String.Source: Unfortunately, we were constantly at war with the Nords who claimed the land as their ancestral home.
String.Dest: しかし悲しい事に、ここが祖先の土地だと主張するノルドとの間で戦争が絶えなかった

String.Source: Look at the sky... the Divines must be angry with us!
String.Dest: 空を見て… 神々が私達に怒っているに違いないわ！

String.Source: Take care of yourself.
String.Dest: 気をつけて行け

String.Source: Careful now... this area's not stable.
String.Dest: 用心して… この場所は不安定だ

String.Source: Every last drop of your blood is mine!
String.Dest: お前の血は一滴残らず私のものよ！

String.Source: These Vigilants are nothing but talk.
String.Dest: ここの番人達は口先だけなんだ

String.Source: Ah, it's so good to breathe again!
String.Dest: ああ、また息ができるなんて素晴らしいですわ！

String.Source: We left together, but that partnership didn't last very long. I didn't agree with some of his methods.
String.Dest: で、一緒に脱退したものの、コンビは長続きしなかった。方向性の違いって奴だよ

String.Source: Climb on in the boat and get comfortable.
String.Dest: 船に乗ってくつろいでくれ

String.Source: My what? Wait. That means...
String.Dest: 何だって？ という事は、つまり…

String.Source: Give Harkon my regards... and a dagger to his heart.
String.Dest: ハルコンによろしく伝えて… 胸にはダガーを刺してきてちょうだい

String.Source: Where'd you come from?!
String.Dest: どこから来たんだ？

String.Source: Oh. Well, I'm not sure. I guess it came from fighting them, thinking "what could be worse?"
String.Dest: そうだな…奴らと戦いつつ、「これ以上最悪な事があるか」と思った事か？

String.Source: Speak with Fura Bloodmouth. She has something for you.
String.Dest: フーラ・ブラッドマウスと話すといい。何かあるはずだ

String.Source: Rargh!
String.Dest: ラァーッ！

String.Source: Or maybe her plan was to come back, but she was stuck here. We won't know until we find her.
String.Dest: それか、母は戻ってくる予定だったけれど、ここで足止めさせられたのかも… 見つけるまでは分かりませんわね

String.Source: Your deception is useless. I'll find you.
String.Dest: 惑わされないぞ。すぐ捕えてやる

String.Source: Well Arkay isn't going to intervene... not here, not now. Best point yourself towards Morthal, find a man named Falion.
String.Dest: アーケイは手を出すつもりはない… 今、ここではな。モーサルへ向かって、そこでファリオンという男を探すといい

String.Source: Not even the gods will show you mercy!
String.Dest: 神でさえお前らには慈悲の心を持つまい！

String.Source: Nnnnyyaarrggh!
String.Dest: ぬあー！

String.Source: It's difficult to have a conversation with you like that. Would you mind changing back?
String.Dest: その様子では話しづらいわ。元に戻ってくれない？

String.Source: Come now, you think you stand a chance against me?
String.Dest: さあ、お前に勝ち目があると思うか？

String.Source: He can help you. Go now, please, before you lose control of yourself.
String.Dest: 彼が力になってくれるはずだ。早く行ってくれ。理性が残ってるうちに

String.Source: Keep that in mind, will you?
String.Dest: 今言った事を覚えておいてくれ

String.Source: Is this a dwarven city? I can't believe they'd let it get so run down.
String.Dest: これがドワーフの都市？ こんなに荒れ放題なんて信じられませんわ…

String.Source: You have done well.
String.Dest: よくやってくれた

String.Source: Huhn!
String.Dest: うぐっ！

String.Source: Speak with Garan Marethi. He has something for you.
String.Dest: ガラン・マレシと話すといい。何かあるだろう

String.Source: Well, that's the second one - we're halfway there. I'll keep looking. See you soon!
String.Dest: ああ、あれが二つめだよ… これで半分だね。あたしは探し続けるよ。また後でね！

String.Source: Thanks again for searching. I don't know what I'd do without my pages.
String.Dest: 探してくれてありがとう。原稿がなかったら、どうなっていた事か

String.Source: New blood, eh? Let's get something very clear.
String.Dest: 新顔ね？ はっきりさせておきましょう

String.Source: Well, I think it's specifically the black ones. I don't know if the Soul Cairn takes just any leftovers.
String.Dest: ええ、特に黒い方に関しては。ソウル・ケルンが残り物なら何でも受け入れるかどうかは分かりませんわね

String.Source: No. I try to avoid it. Always seems to end in an argument. You?
String.Dest: いや、避けるようにしている。口げんかが関の山だからだ。そちらは？

String.Source: Testing this will require some extra precautions, I think.
String.Dest: これを試すには、かなり注意が必要ね

String.Source: So, this is snow elf magic. Incredible.
String.Dest: するとこれはスノーエルフの魔法ですのね。すごいですわ

String.Source: Yes. They swarmed the Chantry in vast numbers until we were completely overrun. We never really stood a chance.
String.Dest: そうだ。奴らは大群で礼拝所に攻め込み、すべてを破壊し尽くした。我々は為す術もなかった

String.Source: Seems the previous incarnation of the Dawnguard had, at one time, some interesting toys.
String.Dest: かつてのドーンガードの死霊術では、面白いオモチャが作り出されたようだ

String.Source: That's enough!
String.Dest: もうたくさんだ！

String.Source: Arkay says you'll be facing forsworn.
String.Dest: アーケイによれば、相手はフォースウォーンだ

String.Source: As long as we can get this "Vyrthur" out of the Sanctum, I think they'll be happy to just hand it over.
String.Dest: その“ヴィルスール”という輩を聖域の外に出す事ができれば、彼らはきっと喜んでそれを渡してくれるはずですわ

String.Source: The effect around you looks an awful lot like that huge column of light shining on the dais.
String.Dest: あなたの周りに見える魔法の効果は、まぶしい大きな光の柱のようですわね

String.Source: Are you okay? Almost thought I lost you there... you went white as the snow.
String.Dest: 大丈夫ですの？ あそこであなたが死んでしまうのかと思いましてよ… 雪みたいに白くなってしまったものですから

String.Source: You've mistaken me for someone who cares about you and your problems. Find someone else.
String.Dest: どうしてそんな事を気にかけなきゃいけないんだ。他を当たるんだな

String.Source: By the Divines... you're infected. What are you doing here?
String.Dest: 大変だわ… 感染してるじゃない。ここで何してるの？

String.Source: Was there something else?
String.Dest: 他に何かあった？

String.Source: Hunh!
String.Dest: ふん！

String.Source: They probably would have tried to kill her, and that has a way of souring relationships.
String.Dest: 彼らはきっと母を殺そうとしたでしょうね。でしたら関係は最悪ですわよ

String.Source: Hunh!
String.Dest: ふん！

String.Source: He'll cozy up to you, use his honeyed words to get you to lower your guard, then use you and throw you away when he's done with you.
String.Dest: 近づいてきて甘い言葉で油断させ、利用した上で用が済んだら捨て去るつもりだ

String.Source: If we follow that path around, we can find the other switch.
String.Dest: 向こうの道をたどれば、別のスイッチが見つかるはずですわ

String.Source: Quite bold, to return here as a mortal. Some will take offense.
String.Dest: 定命の者としてここに戻ってくるなんて、ずいぶん大胆だね。よく思わない者も中にはいるのに

String.Source: If you're not one of us, you're just another piece of meat.
String.Dest: 私達の仲間でないなら、あなたはただの肉片と同じよ

String.Source: Gah!
String.Dest: ぐああ！

String.Source: And then realizing a troll with armor is even more intimidating.
String.Dest: でもって、鎧を着たトロールはさらに厄介だ、と

String.Source: You can't hide from us!
String.Dest: 隠れても無駄ですわ！

String.Source: Must be gone now.
String.Dest: 行ったか

String.Source: Huhn!
String.Dest: うぐっ！

String.Source: Can't help you, friend. I might remember better if my pockets weren't so light.
String.Dest: 悪いが力になれないね。懐が温かくなったらもうちょっと思い出せるんだが

String.Source: This is no place for you.
String.Dest: ここはあなたの来る場所じゃない

String.Source: Terrible, simply terrible.
String.Dest: 本当、全く最悪だった

String.Source: Wagh!
String.Dest: うわああ！

String.Source: Hmmm, I'd say five of them would be enough.
String.Dest: ふむ、5つあれば十分だと思うわ

String.Source: Maybe you're finally ready to list to me.
String.Dest: ようやく耳を貸す気になったのかしら

String.Source: Oh, look at you. What've you done? You've gone and gotten yourself turned into one of them.
String.Dest: なんてザマだ。何をやったんだ？ 吸血鬼殺しが吸血鬼になったわけか

String.Source: Most of our learning could be found there. We always studied our enemies, so we might better learn how to defeat them.
String.Dest: 我々の知恵のほとんどがそこに集められていた。我らは敵と有利に戦えるよう、常に研究を続けていた

String.Source: It's like I said, I'm not going to talk about it.
String.Dest: 言っただろう？ その話はしないって

String.Source: You've found her journal!
String.Dest: 日記が見つかったのですね！

String.Source: I never knew what became of Kvatch. I wonder if they were triumphant without me.
String.Dest: クヴァッチがどうなったのかも知らない。残った人々は勝てたのかな

String.Source: Damn! What the...
String.Dest: しまった！ こんな…

String.Source: You have no dominion here!
String.Dest: ここでは貴様など、何の力もない！

String.Source: Nature will take care of the rest.
String.Dest: その後は自然の成り行きに任せるんだ

String.Source: This stranger aligns herself with those that would hunt you down and slay you like an animal, yet I should entrust you to her?
String.Dest: このよそ者はあなたを追いつめて動物のように殺す者達と手を組んでいるのよ。それなのにあなたを預けるべきだと？

String.Source: Good to see a new face here. Especially one that isn't attached to an elf.
String.Dest: 新顔が訪ねてくるのは嬉しい事だ。エルフの顔じゃないとなれば、なおさらの事

String.Source: I had just moved from my ancestral home in Morrowind to the continent of Cyrodiil.
String.Dest: 祖先から受け継いだモロウウィンドの土地を離れ、シロディール大陸に渡ってきたばかりの時だ

String.Source: A pristine copy of my first volume. Only one in print, actually.
String.Dest: これぞ第一巻の初版本。印さつされたものは、なんとこの1冊だけ

String.Source: Another time, perhaps.
String.Dest: また次がある

String.Source: If you need anything, say the word. I can still forge a decent blade.
String.Dest: 何か必要なら言ってね。まだまだ立派な刀剣を鍛えるわよ

String.Source: Still, it's my duty to help protect Skyrim as much as any Nord's, don't you think?
String.Dest: それでも他のノルド達と同じように、私にもスカイリムの防衛に協力する義務があるわ。そう思わない？

String.Source: Fine, suit yourself.
String.Dest: そう、ご自由に

String.Source: You here for the Skooma? Head around inside, there's a trap door that'll lead you in.
String.Dest: スクゥーマがほしいのか？ じゃあ横手に回って中に入れ。落とし戸の奥に部屋がある

String.Source: Not a lot of our kind here, I see. Suppose I shouldn't be surprised.
String.Dest: 同族はあまりいないわね。驚く事でもないけど

String.Source: Well, I don't know. Everything seemed fine until that dremora attacked me. I only heard later about the gates from the other souls.
String.Dest: さあてね。あのドレモラに襲われるまでは、何の問題もなかったんだ。あとになって、他の連中から門の話を聞いただけだ

String.Source: I'll tell you, the only thing more surprising than hearing from Isran after all these years was hearing that he wanted my help.
String.Dest: イスランが今さら連絡を寄こしたのも驚きだが、奴が俺の助けを求めてるってのはもっと驚きだ

String.Source: The steam! Quick, shut it off!
String.Dest: 蒸気だ！ 早く、止めて！

String.Source: Watch yourself.
String.Dest: 気をつけて

String.Source: Nothing. Well, not on purpose. But you never know. The strangest accidents can happen at any time.
String.Dest: 何も。少なくとも、故意ではないわ。まあ、何が起こるかは、誰にも分からないものよね

String.Source: Another elf, I see. I'm sure Vingalmo will be sizing you up as we speak, trying to figure if you're friend or foe.
String.Dest: またエルフか。こうして話している間にもヴィンガルモが品定めをして、敵か味方かを見極めている事だろうな

String.Source: Orthjolf, for example. He'll tell you he means well, but believe me, he can't be trusted at all.
String.Dest: 例えばオースユルフがそうだ。善人ぶってるけど、実はまったく信用できない。本当だよ

String.Source: This place tears at me as though I'm still alive and being drawn and quartered. I... can't stand it anymore.
String.Dest: この場所は苦しみばかり。まるでまだ生きていて、体を引き裂かれるような… これ以上は耐えられない

String.Source: What about Auriel's Bow? Do you know where we can find it?
String.Dest: アーリエルの弓は？ どこに行けば見つかるのかしら？

String.Source: I used to hide down here and look out at the sea. Usually when my father was in a bad mood.
String.Dest: よくここに隠れて海を眺めたものでしたわ。大抵は父の機嫌が悪い時でしたのよ

String.Source: The way I've heard it, the sun represents the connection from our world to theirs.
String.Dest: わたしが聞いた話によると、太陽は我々の世界と彼らの世界のつながりを表していますわ

String.Source: Did you know I visited Elswyr once? What a strange and wondrous place.
String.Dest: エルスウィーアに行ったことがあるって話したか？ 奇妙で驚くほど凄い所だったな

String.Source: Rrargh!
String.Dest: ワァーッ！

String.Source: Your existence is meaningless!
String.Dest: 貴様の存在など、何の意味もない！

String.Source: Begone, foul creature!
String.Dest: 邪悪な種族め、消え去るがいい！

String.Source: I heard what's going on. The vampires, the Dawnguard, all of it. I wanted to help, so here I am.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼やドーンガードの事を聞いてね。矢も盾もたまらなくなって押し掛けたんだ。それでここにいるってわけさ

String.Source: Vampires, perhaps?
String.Dest: 吸血鬼とかかな？

String.Source: Now that the first volume's complete, there's no much left to do but begin work on the second.
String.Dest: 第一巻が完成した今、次にする事は第二巻の執筆しかないだろうが

String.Source: But none of that matters now.
String.Dest: でもそんな事はもう関係ない

String.Source: Exactly.
String.Dest: その通りでございます、ってね

String.Source: Get out while you can.
String.Dest: 逃げられるうちに、ここを離れるんだな

String.Source: His ambition will justify any actions. Put your faith in him, and you will regret it, I promise you.
String.Dest: 彼の野望はどんな行動でも正当化するだろう。信頼したら後悔するよ。本当さ

String.Source: I've waited so long for this moment. We found it. At last.
String.Dest: この瞬間を本当に長い間待っていた。見つけたんだね。ついに

String.Source: Then it's almost over. We can finally put an end to this ridiculous prophecy.
String.Dest: となれば、もうほとんど終わりですわね。このバカげた予言にようやくピリオドを打てるのかしら

String.Source: Then I'll take it from your corpse! Kill him!
String.Dest: ならお前の死体から奪ってやる！ 奴の望みを絶て！

String.Source: Guards! Kill him!
String.Dest: 傭兵ども！ 奴の頭をねじ切れ！

String.Source: You... you know too much. I can't afford to let you live.
String.Dest: お前は… 知りすぎている。生かしてはおけん

String.Source: Still over half the pages are missing. Keep trying.
String.Dest: まだ原稿は半分残ってる。頑張って探してくれ

String.Source: If you were to bring me some good quality elven arrows, I could imbue them with the proper incantations and rituals.
String.Dest: 質のいいエルフの矢を持ってきてくれたら、正式な呪文と儀式で魔法をかけてやろう

String.Source: Yes. These vampires are a new threat, and a truly deadly one.
String.Dest: ええ。吸血鬼は新たな脅威であり、その影響力は致命的よ

String.Source: Of course not. He's an elf, isn't he?
String.Dest: そんなはずないだろう。奴はエルフだぞ？

String.Source: What?
String.Dest: 何？

String.Source: They represented the steps the Initiates took on the path to total enlightenment.
String.Dest: 新人達がたどる、完全なる悟りへの道程を象徴していたのだ

String.Source: Rargh!
String.Dest: ラァーッ！

String.Source: Sometimes you get one who comes willingly, but most have to be convinced to join us here.
String.Dest: 時々好き好んで来るのもいるが、大半は説得しないとここには来たがらない

String.Source: I see you, heathen!
String.Dest: 見つけたぞ、野蛮人め！

String.Source: The reason I was down there... and why I had the Elder Scroll.
String.Dest: わたしがあそこにいて、星霜の書を持っていた理由…

String.Source: And I'm not half the vampire Lord Harkon is. Truth is I'm better with a forge than I am with claws or fangs.
String.Dest: それでも吸血鬼としてはハルコン卿の足元にも及ばない。実際、爪と牙を使うよりも鍛冶の方が得意なの

String.Source: Vampires enjoy stalking their prey. Passing among us undetected emboldens them. Makes them feel powerful, untouchable.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼は獲物をゆっくり追い詰めるのを楽しんでいる。奴らは気づかれず我々に紛れ込む事で自信をつけ、無敵の力を得たつもりになっているんだ

String.Source: For the Dawn!
String.Dest: 暁のために！

String.Source: Have to say, I'm glad that's over.
String.Dest: 認めるよ、終わってほっとしたって

String.Source: You've gone from a between-meal snack to the darling of the court. Impressive.
String.Dest: 間食用のつまみから、宮廷の寵愛を集める立場にまでなったか。大したものだ

String.Source: Next thing I knew, I arrived here.
String.Dest: 次に気がついた時には、ここにいた

String.Source: Nature will do the rest.
String.Dest: その後は自然の成り行きに任せるんだ

String.Source: Then I see nothing preventing my return to Tamriel.
String.Dest: では私のタムリエルへの帰還を妨げるものはないわ

String.Source: Try... taking it out?
String.Dest: 試しに… 取ってみる？

String.Source: Auri-El bless you, child. For you are a step closer to the Inner Sanctum and everlasting wisdom.
String.Dest: アーリエルの祝福は汝と共にある。最奥聖域の深淵なる英知に、また一歩近づいたのだ

String.Source: So you found the Moth Priest. Let's see you find the rest of the Elder Scrolls all on your own.
String.Dest: 聖蚕の僧侶を見つけたか。残りの星霜の書も自力で集められるのか？

String.Source: All those things had been building for a while. You have no idea how long I wanted to say that to her.
String.Dest: すべてがしばらくの間ずっと積もって大きくなっていきましたの。どれほど長く母にその事を伝えたかったか、あなたには想像もつかないでしょうね

String.Source: Hey there, friend. If you're looking for a fix, you're at the right place. Just head on down the trap door.
String.Dest: あら、こんにちは。一服していくならここよ。落とし戸から入ってちょうだい

String.Source: An old escape tunnel from the castle exits there. I think that's our way in.
String.Dest: 昔の脱出用トンネルが城からそこまでつながっていますわ。あそこから入れるはずですわよ

String.Source: Don't get yourself killed!
String.Dest: 殺されるのを待ってちゃダメ！

String.Source: Do you think Florentius really talks to Arkay?
String.Dest: フロレンティウスは本当にアーケイと話してると思う？

String.Source: Certainly not enough to devolve them into the sad and twisted beings they've become.
String.Dest: だがそれだけで、あれほどまでに卑しく邪悪な生き物に変わってしまうはずがない

String.Source: Maker... it can't be. Serana?!
String.Dest: 神よ… まさか。セラーナ！？

String.Source: It's Durnehviir... he's here! Defend yourselves!
String.Dest: ダーネヴィール… 来たわ！ 身を守って！

String.Source: Ran off, I suppose.
String.Dest: 逃げたのかな

String.Source: He claims to serve loyally, but he really covets the throne. He sees himself in charge someday.
String.Dest: 彼は忠実に仕えてると言い張るけど、本当は玉座をほしがってるのさ。あわよくばって思ってるんだ

String.Source: You know you can't win, so all you can do is hide...
String.Dest: 勝ち目がない以上、隠れるしかないのだろう…？

String.Source: I can't imagine that opinion has changed.
String.Dest: その考えが変わったとは思いにくい

String.Source: I was close with my mother, but she just kept feeding me her opinions of him, and eventually I started believing them.
String.Dest: わたしは母と仲がよかったけれど、母は父の事をどう思っているのかをわたしにすり込み続けましたわ。やがてわたしは母の意見を信じるようになったのです

String.Source: I guess we should have seen this coming... Moth Priest, moths... they're apparently related in some way.
String.Dest: この事は予測しておくべきでしたわね… 聖蚕の僧侶、蚕… 明らかに何らかの関係がありますわよ

String.Source: I'll take you as far as I can, but I'm not hanging around and it's gonna cost you extra.
String.Dest: 遠いのは構わないが、向こうで待ってるのはごめんだよ。どうしてもって言うなら別料金をもらう

String.Source: No, but there's no way she would have left it in Tamriel.
String.Dest: いいえ。でも母がそれをタムリエルに置いていったなんてありえませんわ

String.Source: I'm not backing down!
String.Dest: 決して退かん！

String.Source: Nooo!
String.Dest: 嫌だぁー！

String.Source: I try and meet the needs of everyone here. No reason for any of us to go hungry.
String.Dest: ここにいる全員分は確保しているつもりだ。わざわざ腹を空かせる事もないからな

String.Source: Wow.
String.Dest: わあぁ…

String.Source: Oof!
String.Dest: うわあ！

String.Source: Excellent, here you are.
String.Dest: 素晴らしいわ、さあどうぞ

String.Source: Yeargh!
String.Dest: イイヤァ！

String.Source: Yeeeaarrggh!
String.Dest: イィーヤァー！

String.Source: He was obsessed with power. She was obsessed with seeing him fail. It was just so... toxic.
String.Dest: 父は力にとりつかれていた。母は父が失敗するのをどうしても見たかった。それは… 中毒みたいなものですわね

String.Source: Pitiful sorcery. You'll not stay hidden long.
String.Dest: 下らん魔法だ。すぐに姿を現す事になる

String.Source: Now that my brother's dead, it's quite possible I'm the last of our kind.
String.Dest: 兄弟が死んだ今、種族の生き残りは私1人かも知れない

String.Source: Rargh!
String.Dest: ラァーッ！

String.Source: I've heard the rumors around Skyrim. I know something's going on. And I've seen the vampires.
String.Dest: 噂はスカイリム中を駆けめぐってる。何かが起きてる事は分かってるんだ。吸血鬼の姿だって何度も見てるし

String.Source: You there, bring me another bottle of skooma... wait, who are you? You look like fun. Pull up a seat friend.
String.Dest: そこのあなた、スクゥーマのビンをもう1本… 待った、あなたは誰です？ 面白そうですね。一緒に座りませんか

String.Source: Hunh!
String.Dest: ふん！

String.Source: Oh, this is simply getting infuriating!
String.Dest: おう、これ以上は腹に据えかねるな！

String.Source: Often I take on tasks that Garan or Feran find distasteful, or... beneath them.
String.Dest: ガランやフェランの仕事を肩代わりする事も少なくないよ。二人がその… やりたがらない時にね

String.Source: Nothing you can't handle.
String.Dest: 楽勝だろ

String.Source: You never asked me if hiding me in that tomb was the best course of action, you just expected me to follow you blindly.
String.Dest: あのお墓にわたしを隠す事が最善の方法と、何一つ教えもしないで、ただ黙って言う通りにすればいいとでも思っていたのではなくて？

String.Source: Serana and her mother disappeared long ago.
String.Dest: セラーナとその母親はだいぶ前にいなくなった

String.Source: The corpse is to be the message, not the attack.
String.Dest: 死体は攻撃ではなく伝達のために使うのよ

String.Source: There's no need for that kind of talk. I said it was possible.
String.Dest: そのような話に意味はない。可能性があると言っただけだ

String.Source: Speak with Isran. He has something for you.
String.Dest: イスランに聞けば、何かあるだろう

String.Source: Keep your guard up.
String.Dest: 気を抜かない事ね

String.Source: Ironically, our undoing came at the hands of our own people.
String.Dest: そして皮肉な事に、我々に滅亡をもたらしたのは我々自身に他ならなかったのだ

String.Source: Revel in your power.
String.Dest: 自分の力を満喫したまえ

String.Source: I got nothing on me. If you're looking for Skooma, head on downstairs.
String.Dest: 私は何も持ってないわ。スクゥーマがほしいなら、下へ行ってよ

String.Source: There were splinter groups that resisted the agreement, and even some that sought alternate alliances.
String.Dest: この協定に反対する派閥もあったし、また別の派閥は他の勢力との協定も考えていた

String.Source: It's symbolic. I don't expect you to understand.
String.Dest: 象徴を理解できなくても無理はない

String.Source: How long would they have to do that?
String.Dest: 彼らはいつまであんな事を続けなければなりませんの？

String.Source: Taron Dreth, the world's foremost expert in Dwemer metallurgy. Not that you would know anything about that.
String.Dest: タロンだ。このタロン・ドレスはドゥーマーの鋳造技術に関しては世界最高の権威なのだよ。君にこんな事を言ってもしょうがないが

String.Source: Look out!
String.Dest: 気をつけて！

String.Source: Gunmar and I have a lot of work to do here, so we were hoping that maybe you could track him down.
String.Dest: ガンマーも私もここでやる事がたくさんあるから、あなたに彼を探してもらいたいの

String.Source: Good.
String.Dest: いい返事だ

String.Source: Did I start with my ride on the prison ship, or was it before that?
String.Dest: 冒頭は護送船に乗るところからだったか、その前だったかな？

String.Source: That's one of them Imperial scholars, right? Old man with a gray robe?
String.Dest: 帝国の学者さんかい？ 灰色のローブを着たじいさんか？

String.Source: Do you need something?
String.Dest: 何か必要なものでも？

String.Source: The secret is our mystic Redwater Spring. The magic in the waters opens the mind to experience Skooma in a way like never before.
String.Dest: 秘密は、秘伝のレッドウォーター・スプリングよ。水に込められた魔法で精神が解放されて、これまでにないスクゥーマが体験できるの

String.Source: You're dead!
String.Dest: お前は終わりだ！

String.Source: Sadly, the magic used to construct these wonders were lost long before I arrived here.
String.Dest: 残念ながら、そうした奇跡の力を持つ建造物は私がここに来るずっと前に失われていたが

String.Source: What are you talking about? I don't know anything about any monsters.
String.Dest: 何の話だ？ 怪物なんて知らない

String.Source: But those temples paled in comparison to the glory of the Chantry and its wayshrines.
String.Dest: だが、それらの聖堂もこの礼拝所と祠に比べれば色あせて見える

String.Source: He's up there, on the balcony. Come on!
String.Dest: 彼はバルコニーにいますわ。行きますわよ！

String.Source: If you think you can accomplish that feat, knowing hundreds before you have tried and failed, then I wish you the best of luck.
String.Dest: 数百の者達が挑戦し失敗した事を知った上で、その偉業を達成できると思うのなら、成功を祈るわ

String.Source: No answer? Then I'll take it from your corpse!
String.Dest: 答えないのか？ ならお前の死体から奪ってやる！

String.Source: How dare you trespass here!
String.Dest: よくここに足を踏み入れる事ができたな！

String.Source: Settle down. No need for threats. Lead the way. But I'm warning you, I'm not afraid to fight you if I have to.
String.Dest: 落ち着け。脅す必要なんてない。先に行け。ただし、警告しておく。必要があればいつでも戦うぞ

String.Source: My brother in darkness. While it's good to see you, we'll keep up appearances, yes?
String.Dest: 闇の兄弟よ。会えてうれしいけれど、平静を装いましょう。いいわね？

String.Source: He's a priest of Arkay. Well, he was. It's... it's complicated.
String.Dest: 彼はアーケイの僧侶なの。今は違うけど… 複雑な事情でね

String.Source: Good hunting.
String.Dest: 良い狩りを

String.Source: I beg your pardon, ma'am. I don't know what you're getting at, but whatever it is, it's not appreciated.
String.Dest: どういうことだ？ 何が言いたいのか分からないが、とにかく不愉快だ

String.Source: I'll find you yet, coward.
String.Dest: すぐ見つけてやるぞ、卑怯者め

String.Source: Hmm...
String.Dest: ふむ…

String.Source: And if he's that concerned, the situation must be pretty bad. Make sense?
String.Dest: それほど悩んでるって事は、状況はかなり悪いに違いない。そうでしょ？

String.Source: Hey, so... before we go in there...
String.Dest: 中に入る前に言っておきたい事があるのですが…

String.Source: Ah, it's good to be home again.
String.Dest: ああ、故郷に戻るのはいいものね

String.Source: "And without any regard for my safety, I fearless charged the enemy!" No, much too dramatic...
String.Dest: 「そして、身の危険も顧みず、恐れる事なく敵に立ち向かう！」 いや、ドラマチックすぎるかな…

String.Source: Fairly well, I'd say. I've managed to get this far without blowing myself up, I still have all my limbs...
String.Dest: かなりいいと思う。ここまでの開発で、爆発もしてないし、手足もちゃんと無事だし…

String.Source: The day is dark as night! What's happening?
String.Dest: 昼が夜みたいに暗い！ 何が起きているんだ？

String.Source: I will banish you from this castle. I will spare your life this once, but after that, you are prey.
String.Dest: この城からお前を追放する。今回ばかりは見逃してやるが、その後は獲物とみなす

String.Source: Did you really come here expecting to claim Auriel's Bow?
String.Dest: ここに来ればアーリエルの弓が手に入ると、本気で思ったのか？

String.Source: But once we threw our lot in with Molag Bal... people just don't think about their families anymore. "Power takes precedence," he always said.
String.Dest: けれどモラグ・バルに運命をゆだねると… 家族の事なんてどうでもよくなってしまいますの。父はいつも「力の前に力なし」と言っていましたわ

String.Source: I would gladly accept my fate at their hands if it robs Harkon of victory.
String.Dest: ハルコンから勝利を奪えるなら、喜んで運命を彼らの手に委ねるわ

String.Source: Time is almost irrelevant to the Ideal Masters.
String.Dest: アイディール・マスターにとって、時間はほぼ無意味よ

String.Source: What is it now?
String.Dest: 今度は何？

String.Source: That make you feel any better?
String.Dest: それで気休めになる？

String.Source: Farewell, friend. May the glow of Auri-El shield you from your enemies.
String.Dest: さようなら、友よ。アーリエルの光の盾がその身を守るだろう

String.Source: Look at the sky!
String.Dest: 空を見て！

String.Source: Well, we're definitely not going to find our way out from here.
String.Dest: もし、これではいつまでたってもここから出る道は見つかりませんわよ

String.Source: Certainly. I can only do twenty at a time, but I see that won't be a problem in this case.
String.Dest: もちろん。一度に作れるのは12本だけだが、その本数なら問題ないな

String.Source: We're not going to have a problem with your little... project, are we?
String.Dest: 君のちょっとした… 計画とやらはうまくいくんだろうな？

String.Source: Has it been that long? Oh my.
String.Dest: そんなに長く？ そりゃあ大変だねえ

String.Source: The bow draws its power from Aetherius itself, channeling it through the sun.
String.Dest: この弓は太陽を通じてエセリウスの力そのものを取り出し、矢に込める

String.Source: I've planted some new herbs in the courtyard garden. I hope they'll grow.
String.Dest: 新しいハーブをいくつか中庭の庭園に植えたの。育つといいわね

String.Source: The bow was said to be carried by Auri-El himself into battle against the forces of Lorkhan in ancient and mythic times.
String.Dest: この弓は、神話時代にアーリエルがロルカーンとの戦いで使ったものだと伝えられている

String.Source: Any other ideas?
String.Dest: 他にいい考えは？

String.Source: Leave me be!
String.Dest: 放っといてくれ！

String.Source: Since it's your first time... sure. Find a booth and enjoy.
String.Dest: まあ、ここは初めてみたいだし… いいわ。空いてる部屋を見つけて楽しんで

String.Source: Now my work will never see the light of day. My name will be forgotten.
String.Dest: あの作品は永遠に日の目を見ない、と。この名も忘れられてしまうってのか

String.Source: All right, so obviously not this way, either.
String.Dest: いいですわ。この道でもない事は明らかですわね

String.Source: It's not about you! You've been so great in getting me back here.
String.Dest: あなたのせいではございませんのよ！ ここに連れ戻してもらって大いに感謝していますわ

String.Source: Why does the sky look like that?
String.Dest: なぜ空があんな風に？

String.Source: That's it, out there to the north. We used to keep a boat around here to get there and back.
String.Dest: そうですわ、北に行ったところですの。そこまで行って戻ってくるためのボートを、わたし達はこの辺りに確保しておきましたのよ

String.Source: Just what my mother told me. I've also studied a little bit on my own, but there's not much.
String.Dest: 母から教わった事ですわ。自分でも少しばかり勉強しましたけれど、大した知識はございませんの

String.Source: Please, turn back... before it's too late...
String.Dest: お願い、引き返して… 手遅れになる前に…

String.Source: What do you think I mean?
String.Dest: どういう意味だと思う？

String.Source: Your guess is as good as mine. This place looks pretty different from when I was locked away.
String.Dest: わたしにもよく分かりませんわ。幽閉されていた頃からずいぶんと印象が変わっていますのよ

String.Source: There were ten of them in all. Find them for me, please, I beg you!
String.Dest: 原稿は全部で10枚。探してきてくれ、頼む、お願い！

String.Source: Speak with Florentius. He has something for you.
String.Dest: フロレンティウスに聞けば、何かあるだろう

String.Source: Watch your back.
String.Dest: 背後に気をつけろ

String.Source: Keep your eyes open.
String.Dest: 気を抜くなよ

String.Source: Fight bravely, friend.
String.Dest: 戦いは勇敢であれ

String.Source: Fine. You could've just said 'no'.
String.Dest: 分かったわ。一言「ダメ」って言えばいいのよ

String.Source: Hhyyaarrggh!
String.Dest: はああー！

String.Source: Over here!
String.Dest: こっちだよ！

String.Source: Divines guide you.
String.Dest: 神々の導きがあらん事を

String.Source: Our empire had temples to some of the other deities: Trinimac, Syrabane, Jephre and Phynaster rounded out the rest.
String.Dest: 我々の帝国には、他の信仰も根づいていた。トリニマック、シラベイン、イェフレ、フィナスタール、挙げればきりがない

String.Source: All right, here we go.
String.Dest: いいですわ、行きましょう

String.Source: You dare walk away from me? In my own hall, before my own court, you dare insult me?
String.Dest: 私に背を向けるのか？ 我が城で、我が臣下の前で、私を愚弄するというのか？

String.Source: I look forward to our next meeting.
String.Dest: 次に会うのを楽しみにしてるよ

String.Source: Well, if I were a betting woman, I'd say it's a scraper of some sort.
String.Dest: 憶測でも構わないのでしたら、多分それはヘラか何かのようなものでしたわ

String.Source: A soul gem... that's what it was. Then... I must be... Oh, no.
String.Dest: 魂石… あれがそうだとしたら、じゃあ… 私は… ああ、どうしよう

String.Source: You'll figure something out. We must be vigilant and self sufficient if we are to defeat these monsters.
String.Dest: 何か手があるはずだ。あの化け物どもに勝つには用心深く行動し、我々だけでどうにかする必要がある

String.Source: Now, volume two begins! What else?
String.Dest: さあ第二巻だ！ 始めるっきゃないだろ？

String.Source: You need to get cured, friend. You're a danger to the Dawnguard otherwise.
String.Dest: 治療を受けるべきだ。そのままじゃ、ドーンガードにとっても危険だ

String.Source: That's actually only a fraction of its potential.
String.Dest: 実はそれも、弓の持つ力の一部に過ぎない

String.Source: Get it wrong, and... well. You've seen what happened when I tried it.
String.Dest: 間違えれば… ええと。あたしが試した時の結果は知ってるよね

String.Source: Yes, yes. Aren't you lovely looking like that. Do you mind?
String.Dest: ああ、そうとも。お前は素晴らしいよ。もういいかね？

String.Source: That one's far nicer though... almost ceremonial.
String.Dest: あれはもっと素敵でしたけど… 何かの儀式とかにも使えそうでしたわ

String.Source: I doubt there's any other place like it in Skyrim. It's beautiful.
String.Dest: スカイリムに二つとない場所だわ。なんて美しいのかしら

String.Source: You get yourself to Morthal at once. Speak with Falion. He'll help you. But go do it now.
String.Dest: すぐにモーサルに向かって、ファリオンと話しなさい。助けてくれるわ。でも急いでね

String.Source: No, this was different. He never trusted Florentius, always thought him to be trying to get attention.
String.Dest: いや、違うな。フロレンティウスは目立ちたがっていると言って、まるで信用していなかった

String.Source: I'll give you a chance to redeem yourself. Go to Morthal and speak to Falion. He can help you. Otherwise you're dead to me.
String.Dest: だがお前にチャンスをやろう。モーサルに行ってファリオンに会え。彼なら力を貸してくれるだろう。さもなければお前は死人も同然だ

String.Source: All right. Here's the extract.
String.Dest: いいでしょう。これがエキスよ

String.Source: You've done exactly as I predicted and brought your fetching companion to me.
String.Dest: 確かにお前は言った通りの仕事を終え、魅力的な人物を連れ帰ってきた

String.Source: Soul what? What in the name of Vivec are you talking about?
String.Dest: 魂が何だって？ ヴィベクの名にかけて聞くが、一体何の話だ？

String.Source: Where did you find it? Tell me!
String.Dest: それをどこで見つけた？ 言え！

String.Source: Aggh...
String.Dest: あああ…

String.Source: Falmer, if I understand Arkay correctly.
String.Dest: アーケイによれば、ファルメルらしい

String.Source: Yes, but when I was here it wasn't so... crumbly. This used to be a city.
String.Dest: ええ、でもわたしがいた頃はここまで… 崩れかかっていませんでしたわ。大きな街でしたのよ

String.Source: I've been performing a little research on the Blood Chalice.
String.Dest: 血の聖杯に関してちょっとした研究を続けてきたんだ

String.Source: Let's keep looking around.
String.Dest: 周りをよく見て用心なさって

String.Source: Don't worry, we'll find the glade.
String.Dest: 心配しないで。“先人の湿地”はきっと見つかるわ

String.Source: I hope we reach Ancestor Glade soon.
String.Dest: “先人の湿地”が近いといいのですけれど

String.Source: Mother had something similar back home when she was tending the courtyard gardens to scrape moss and fungus off of the trees.
String.Dest: うちに似たようなやつがあったわ。母が中庭の庭園でコケやキノコを木からはがすのに使ってたの

String.Source: There's no hiding from me...
String.Dest: 私から隠れられると思うな…

String.Source: Stand aside.
String.Dest: どけ

String.Source: Beware the dragon Durnehviir, destroyer of souls and harbinger of the fallen.
String.Dest: ドラゴンに気をつけて。魂を破壊し、滅びをもたらすわ

String.Source: When you get back to Tamriel, let them know I still exist.
String.Dest: タムリエルに戻ったら、ジウブはまだここにいると伝えてくれ

String.Source: The screams... they pierce my mind. I can't stand it!
String.Dest: あの叫び声… 心を引き裂くようだ。耐えられない！

String.Source: Seems that I'm the only of my kind here. Suppose I shouldn't be surprised.
String.Dest: 種族うちでここにいるのは私だけみたいね。別に驚く事でもないけど

String.Source: Talk to Serana, and decide which you want to be.
String.Dest: セラーナと話して、どちらになりたいか決めなさい

String.Source: The moment we gave ourselves to Molag Bal, things got really icy between them.
String.Dest: わたし達がモラグ・バルに身を捧げた瞬間、両親の関係は冷えきってしまったのですわ

String.Source: What? You... you found the Forge? The Aetherium Forge?
String.Dest: 何？ お前が… 見つけただと？ エセリウムの鋳造器具を？

String.Source: I doubt my mother would waste her time with those fools.
String.Dest: 母があの愚か者達の相手をするかしら。おそらくありえませんわ

String.Source: No one is going to stand in my way!
String.Dest: 誰にも邪魔はさせない！

String.Source: There you are!
String.Dest: そこだ！

String.Source: After everything we've been through, it had damn well better work.
String.Dest: ずいぶん大変な思いをしたのですから、うまくいってもらわないと困りますわ

String.Source: Good...
String.Dest: よし…

String.Source: Which shrine? Well, I... I'm going to them all. Yes. One at a time. Until I've visited all the shrines to all the gods in Skyrim.
String.Dest: 祠？ えーと… 全部回るつもりさ。そう。巡礼なんだ。スカイリムの全ての神の、全ての祠を巡る旅だ

String.Source: Hyargh!
String.Dest: ハイヤァー！

String.Source: Glad you're finally listening. Come on, let's move.
String.Dest: お分かり頂けたようですわね。さあ、急ぎましょう

String.Source: I won't let you defile this place, foul being!
String.Dest: この場所を穢す者は許さん！

String.Source: Now that I think on it, I did see your priest.
String.Dest: よく考えたら、確かにその司祭を見たよ

String.Source: How does anyone expect me to write my opus with all of these rude interruptions?
String.Dest: 失敬な連中に邪魔されてばかりで、どうやって作品を仕上げればいいんだ？

String.Source: My Lord.
String.Dest: ご主人様

String.Source: Otherwise, you're a threat to all of us.
String.Dest: さもないと、我々全員の脅威になる

String.Source: It became quickly apparent that the best way I could help would be by wiping out the cliff racers.
String.Dest: どうすりゃいいかはすぐに分かった。クリフ・レーサーを壊滅させるのが一番だって

String.Source: What is it?
String.Dest: 何？

String.Source: This stranger may call herself vampire, but she knows nothing of our struggle. Why should I entrust you to her?
String.Dest: このよそ者が吸血鬼を名乗ったとしても、私達の苦悩を何一つ知らないのよ。どうしてあなたを任せられる？

String.Source: Good. I knew I was sending the right man for the job.
String.Dest: いいぞ。仕事の人選は間違ってなかったようだな

String.Source: Your wife is such a soul, and the stars appear cooperative. Now is your chance.
String.Dest: 君の奥さんは大した人だ。それに星の巡りも味方している。今がチャンスだな

String.Source: So, this was my old stomping grounds. Not the most normal childhood.
String.Dest: 昔はここでよく遊びましたわ。ごく普通の子供時代とは言えませんわね

String.Source: Praise Arkay!
String.Dest: アーケイばんざい！

String.Source: How in the name of Zenithar was I to know the ingredients were phony? Do I look like someone that would double-cross a necromancer?
String.Dest: ゼニタールに誓って言うが、商品が偽物だなんて知りようがなかったよ。俺が死霊術師をあざむくような奴に見えるかい？

String.Source: After so many centuries, I feared the Elder Scroll and my daughter were lost to me.
String.Dest: 何百年もの時が過ぎ、私は星霜の書と娘は二度と戻って来ないのではないかと恐れた

String.Source: The prey is here!
String.Dest: 獲物はここだ！

String.Source: So, any luck? Was Tolan right about the vampires being interested in Dimhollow Crypt?
String.Dest: 偶然の一致か？ 吸血鬼がディムホロウ墓地に興味を持っているというトランの話は本当だったのか？

String.Source: And unless I'm seeing things, you're starting to... glimmer.
String.Dest: それに、わたしが幻を見ているのでもない限り、あなた… 発光してますわよ

String.Source: Precisely.
String.Dest: 全くその通りですのよ

String.Source: That's a fine looking animal you've got there. I had a dog once. Kept getting fur in my mead.
String.Dest: 素敵な動物を飼っているね。私にも以前犬がいて、いつもハチミツ酒に毛が入ったよ

String.Source: Auriel's power is ours!
String.Dest: アーリエルの力が我々のものに！

String.Source: Exactly!
String.Dest: その通りですわよ！

String.Source: I will be. Just give me a little time.
String.Dest: もちろん。必要なのは時間だけですわ

String.Source: Your obedience pleases me.
String.Dest: お前の忠誠には満足している

String.Source: You arrived just in time. I think those vampires were getting hungry.
String.Dest: ちょうどいい時に来てくれた。あの吸血鬼どもも腹を空かせてたところだよ

String.Source: Oof!
String.Dest: うわあ！

String.Source: Isn't it obvious? They're soft, the lot of them.
String.Dest: 明白な事実だろう？ 彼らは例外なく考えが甘いんだ

String.Source: I'll be here.
String.Dest: ここで待っておりますわ

String.Source: You blood will not protect you from me.
String.Dest: その血は私から身を守るのには役立たない

String.Source: I'll see you at Fort Dawnguard.
String.Dest: ドーンガード砦で会おう

String.Source: Thought you'd never ask.
String.Dest: 誘って下さるとは思いませんでしたわ

String.Source: Sometimes we venture out into the world in search of more scrolls for our library at the White-Gold Tower.
String.Dest: 白金の塔の書庫に加える巻物を探して、時に我々は世界中を旅する事もある

String.Source: Our power is a blessing from him. It is he who first bestowed the gift of the ancient blood upon me.
String.Dest: この力はそのモラグ・バルからの祝福なのだ。私が最初に古き血を授かった時も、ご本人からだった

String.Source: Weergh!
String.Dest: うわっ！

String.Source: Dawnstar doesn't have much of a port, but the miners say its got rich ore veins.
String.Dest: ドーンスターには大した港はないが、鉱山労働者が言うには、とにかくいくらでも掘れるらしいんだと

String.Source: By having the Ancestor Moths close to the Moth Priest, they can utilize the conduit and share the moth's augury.
String.Dest: 聖蚕会は聖蚕の僧侶の身近に置かれて初めて架け橋となり、その予言の力を共有できるんだよ

String.Source: Fortune smile upon you, milady!
String.Dest: 奥様、ご幸運を！

String.Source: The bow... you have Auriel's Bow!
String.Dest: その弓は… アーリエルの弓じゃないか！

String.Source: To judge us.
String.Dest: ひいてはわたしの家族の事も

String.Source: Very well then, you leave me no choice!
String.Dest: そうか、ならば仕方あるまい！

String.Source: Good. That should slow them down.
String.Dest: 上出来よ。これで彼らは失速するはず

String.Source: I knew it was only a matter of time before she'd return with hatred in her heart.
String.Dest: 娘がその心に憎しみを宿して戻るのも、時間の問題だとは分かっていた

String.Source: Isran, of all people. We're reduced to asking him for help.
String.Dest: あのイスランに助けを求めるしかないなんてな

String.Source: I think that's another wayshrine up there. Here we go.
String.Dest: あそこにあるのは旅の祠かしら。行ってみましょう

String.Source: What else would you like to know?
String.Dest: 他に何が知りたいのですか？

String.Source: I owe you a debt for the timely rescue.
String.Dest: タイミングよく助けてくれてありがとう。君には借りができたな

String.Source: I do not fear death.
String.Dest: 死なんかちっとも怖くない

String.Source: I've no love for living out of a tent, but I'll take that over being ripped apart.
String.Dest: テント暮らしが好きとは言わないが、八つ裂きにされるよりマシだ

String.Source: If this ends up being a wasted trip, your friend Dexion and I are going to have some words when we get back.
String.Dest: もしこれが無駄骨に終わるようでしたら、戻ってからお友達のデキソンと話をしなければなりませんわね

String.Source: I see. Interesting that you can set aside your morals when it suits you.
String.Dest: なるほど。必要に応じて道徳心を捨て去れるとは…

String.Source: "The Tale of the Great Moth Priest Hunt." Not something I'd want to read.
String.Dest: 「聖蚕僧侶戦記」。わたしの趣味とは違いますわね

String.Source: I can't believe we found my mother alive... well, you know what I mean.
String.Dest: 生きている母に会えたなんて信じられませんわ… この気持ち、お分かりいただけて？

String.Source: After my bite, you collapsed and fell into a slumber. Now your flesh has acclimated to the new blood that courses through your veins.
String.Dest: 噛まれたお前は倒れ、昏睡状態となった。そして今や、肉体が身体を巡る新たな血に順応したのだ

String.Source: But I guess I don't really factor in at this point.
String.Dest: けれども今となってはわたしの事など、どうでもよくなっているみたいですわね

String.Source: Where are you?
String.Dest: どこにいる！

String.Source: The lower floors are home to the Imperial Council, and the Order of Moth Priests occupies the middle floors.
String.Dest: その下層部は帝国議会の本拠地で、中層部は聖蚕会が占有している

String.Source: The power is growing within you, and now you must learn to wield it.
String.Dest: 体の中で育ちつつある力の、使い方をおぼえる必要がある

String.Source: I don't converse with my prey.
String.Dest: 獲物と話をする気はない

String.Source: The moment you hand over the bow your usefulness ends. He'll kill you and then he'll take my blood for the damn prophecy.
String.Dest: 弓を渡した瞬間あなたは用済みになりますわよ。父はあなたを殺して、それからあの下らない予言のためにわたしの血を抜き取るのでしょう

String.Source: You have the bow...
String.Dest: 君は弓を持ってる…

String.Source: Grrargh!
String.Dest: がるるる！

String.Source: When will you fools learn? The night is ours!
String.Dest: 何度言えば分かる？ 夜は我々のものだ！

String.Source: Must have run off.
String.Dest: 逃がしたみたいだな
