String.Source: Please, take the bow... it's yours.
String.Dest: この弓はお前のものだ… 持っていってくれ

String.Source: Ha ha ha. Here you are.
String.Dest: あははは。見つけたぞ

String.Source: (Bark)
String.Dest: ワン！

String.Source: Don't keep our master waiting. Take him the bow immediately.
String.Dest: 主様を待たせるな。今すぐ弓をお届けしろ

String.Source: The night belongs to us.
String.Dest: 夜は私たちのものだ

String.Source: Very well.
String.Dest: よろしい

String.Source: Count yourself fortunate that I'm a forgiving man. Now, be still while I give you the ancient blood once more.
String.Dest: 私が寛大な心の持ち主でよかったな。古き血をもう一度与えてやる。じっとしていろ…

String.Source: I've heard it described in tales, but I could never have imagined its beauty.
String.Dest: 話には聞いていたが、それほど美しいものとは想像だにしなかった

String.Source: Even if he won't help the Vigilants, he could at least offer us shelter for the moment.
String.Dest: 番人の手助けはしないとしても、少しの間、安全な場所に入れてくれたっていいのに

String.Source: I don't even know who that is...
String.Dest: それが誰なのかも分かりませんのに…

String.Source: I knew it was only a matter of time before your ambition outgrew your loyalty.
String.Dest: お前の野心が忠誠心を追い落とすのも、時間の問題だとは分かっていた

String.Source: Do you need something?
String.Dest: 何か必要なものでも？

String.Source: The first vampire came from Molag Bal. She... was not a willing subject. But she was still the first.
String.Dest: 最初の吸血鬼はモラグ・バルから生まれましたの。その彼女は… 自ら望んだのではなかった。けれども彼女は真祖となった

String.Source: Odds and ends I've gathered over the years. Well, used to gather before all of this nonsense happened to me.
String.Dest: 長年かけて集めたガラクタだよ。このバカげた境遇に陥る前は、物を集めるのが好きだったんだ

String.Source: The true power of the ancient blood is found in the form of the Vampire Lord.
String.Dest: 古き血の真の力は、吸血鬼の王の姿となった時に発揮される

String.Source: Thanks again for saving my life.
String.Dest: 命を助けてもらって、改めてありがとう

String.Source: Molag Bal is a powerful daedric lord, and his will is made reality.
String.Dest: モラグ・バルは強大な力を持つデイドラの王で、すべては彼の意のままなのですわ

String.Source: The ceremony was... degrading.
String.Dest: 目を… 背けたくなるような儀式でしたわ

String.Source: Oh, the moths don't literally read the scrolls... but they maintain a connection to ancient magic that allows the Moth Priests to decipher them.
String.Dest: 蚕が本当に書を読むわけじゃなくて… 蚕は古代魔法への架け橋となって、聖蚕の僧侶が書を解読するのを可能にするんだ

String.Source: All quiet now.
String.Dest: 物音がしないな

String.Source: Revel in your new powers, but do not forget who gave them to you.
String.Dest: 新たな力を堪能するがいい。だが、誰にもらったものかを忘れるな

String.Source: Oh please, milady. Please... forgive me!
String.Dest: 奥様、お願いです… お許しを！

String.Source: I'm afraid there's not much more to tell. Even today, the Elder Scrolls remain a great enigma.
String.Dest: これ以上話せる事はないよ。今日においても尚、星霜の書は大きな謎に包まれているからね

String.Source: Of course I do. What do you want?
String.Dest: もちろんさ。何がほしいんだ？

String.Source: Here you go.
String.Dest: ほらよ

String.Source: Well, considering no one else in Skyrim would buy something they couldn't possibly read, I'd say you don't have much of a choice.
String.Dest: スカイリムで読めすらしない書物を買ってくれる奴が他にいるとも思えないから、選択肢があるわけでもないな

String.Source: (Whine)
String.Dest: クゥーン…

String.Source: Threaten me all you like, it won't matter.
String.Dest: 好きなだけ脅すがいい。痛くもかゆくもないぞ

String.Source: There will be time to honor the fallen later. For now, we've got to put a stop to these vampires.
String.Dest: 倒れた者達を弔う時間はいずれとりたい。だが今は吸血鬼どもを止めないと

String.Source: Will you be a hunter, or will you be prey?
String.Dest: お前は狩人になるのか、獲物になるのか？

String.Source: Don't...
String.Dest: 嫌ですわ…

String.Source: Oh, what is it?
String.Dest: あら、何ですの？

String.Source: Very well, master.
String.Dest: 主様、それでは

String.Source: My trip to Skyrim has become quite the adventure!
String.Dest: スカイリムへの旅がちょっとした冒険になったよ！

String.Source: Looks like you know your daedra.
String.Dest: デイドラの事をよく知っていらっしゃるようですわね

String.Source: We have to keep my mother alive!
String.Dest: お母様を守りますのよ！

String.Source: In an age long forgotten to history, I ruled as a mighty king. My domain was vast, my riches endless and my power infinite.
String.Dest: 歴史上忘れられてしまった遥か昔、私は強大な王として君臨していた。領土は広く、富は際限なく、権力は無限とすら言えた

String.Source: I'm wondering what my mother got up to, here. She definitely wasn't trying to keep the place clean.
String.Dest: 母はここで何をしていたのかしら。掃除をしていたわけではない事は確かですわね

String.Source: A small price to pay for the betterment of our kind.
String.Dest: 我が一族の発展のための、微々たる犠牲だ

String.Source: That is the very purpose that first brought me to Skyrim.
String.Dest: 私がスカイリムに来たそもそもの理由がそれなんだよ

String.Source: Lord Harkon's a great man. Best show him the proper respect.
String.Dest: ハルコン卿は偉大な御方だ。相応の敬意を払うように

String.Source: That's right. I used to be a Vigilant, but we had a difference of opinion.
String.Dest: そうだ、かつては番人の一員だったが、意見の食い違いがあってな

String.Source: Die!
String.Dest: 死ね！

String.Source: At least Barknar and I are here together.
String.Dest: 少なくともバークナールと私はここで一緒よ

String.Source: Oh. All right. Goodbye, then.
String.Dest: ああ、そうですの。それでは失礼いたしますわ

String.Source: Hmmm. Pull chains and traps. Be careful here. Whatever's on the other side of this, the Falmer wanted to keep there.
String.Dest: ええと。引き鎖と罠ですわね。用心なさって。向こう側にあるのが何にせよ、ファルメルが持ち出されたくなかったものですから

String.Source: Of course. Why did I suppose differently. Fine, tell me what you know.
String.Dest: もちろんだ。考えてる事は同じだな。いいだろう、君が知ってる事を教えてくれ

String.Source: Ssssss!
String.Dest: しゅーっ！

String.Source: Unfortunately, yes.
String.Dest: 残念な事に、そうよ

String.Source: Lord Harkon has searched for his daughter for so long. He must be very grateful.
String.Dest: ハルコン卿はずっと長い間娘さんを捜してきた。本当に感謝しているでしょうね

String.Source: Let's just find my mother and get out of here.
String.Dest: すぐに母を見つけてここから出ましょう

String.Source: Serana, my darling. I see you still favor keeping a pet.
String.Dest: 愛しいセラーナよ。今でもペットを連れ歩くのを好むのだな

String.Source: Use the power of the ancient blood to transform into a Vampire Lord.
String.Dest: 古き血の力を使って吸血鬼の王に変身するのだ
…うーん？

String.Source: It can take months or even years to complete a single scroll and even then, months to recover.
String.Dest: 書を1冊読み終えるのに数ヶ月、時には数年かかるんだよ。しかもその後の回復にさらに数ヶ月を要する

String.Source: Well, we got the knife... now all we need to do is track down one of those Canticle Trees.
String.Dest: とにかくナイフが手に入りましたわ。お次はカンティクルの木を探し当てる番ですわね

String.Source: I was hoping to feed.
String.Dest: 食事にありつけると思ったのに

String.Source: Sure. Here you go. Can't understand a word of it, maybe it will do you some good.
String.Dest: いいよ。ほらどうぞ。何が書いてあるのかさっぱり分からんが、君には価値があるんだろうね

String.Source: Ah, I see you've been speaking to Valerica and she's convinced you that eternal night will plunge us into war with daytime dwellers.
String.Dest: なるほど、ヴァレリカと話して、永遠の夜が来れば我々が日なたに住む者達と開戦してしまうと信じさせられたのか

String.Source: I could feed again.
String.Dest: また食事にありつけるな

String.Source: It's time we take the fight to their door.
String.Dest: そろそろ連中に戦いを仕掛ける時だ

String.Source: Yes, milord? What can I help you with?
String.Dest: はい、旦那様。ご用は何ですか？

String.Source: Auriel's Bow. Well done, indeed.
String.Dest: アーリエルの弓か。実によくやった

String.Source: We earned this.
String.Dest: 苦労して手に入れたものですのよ

String.Source: Because unlike her, I'm not afraid of you. Not anymore.
String.Dest: わたしはお母様とは違う。もうお父様など恐れませんわ

String.Source: Death is nothing to me...
String.Dest: 死ぬなんてなんでもないね…

String.Source: Give him a crossbow bolt between the eyes for me!
String.Dest: クロスボウのボルトを、眉間に叩き込んでやるのよ！

String.Source: Go find Lord Harkon. Tell him of your success.
String.Dest: ハルコン卿の所に行き、成功を報告するといい

String.Source: Whenever you're ready.
String.Dest: いつでもよしなに

String.Source: Hmm?
String.Dest: ふふん？

String.Source: And you...
String.Dest: お前は…

String.Source: Why can't they just let us in? We won't get in the way!
String.Dest: どうして入れてくれないんだ？ 邪魔などしないのに！

String.Source: We were hoping Isran would be of help. That now seems unlikely.
String.Dest: イスランが助けてくれるかも知れないと思ったんだけど。今となっては、望みは薄いわ

String.Source: Only the most resilient of priests can do it this way... it takes years of practice to interpret the harmony.
String.Dest: これを実行できるのは、僧侶の中でも回復力が最も高い者のみだ… それに調和の解釈には何年もの鍛錬が必要になる

String.Source: We should strike them first before they can muster a larger force.
String.Dest: 彼らが大軍を召集できるようになる前に、先に攻撃するべきよ

String.Source: It's the Dawnguard! Let none escape!
String.Dest: ドーンガードだ！ 1人も逃がすな！

String.Source: As a king is to his subjects, so you are to other vampires.
String.Dest: 王に臣下がいるように、お前には他の吸血鬼がいるのだ

String.Source: No...
String.Dest: 嫌でしてよ…

String.Source: Good. You are weaker while on the ground, because you cannot access the blood magic.
String.Dest: 地上では血の魔法が使えないため、力が弱くなる

String.Source: You are a guest in this castle at my pleasure. I'll permit you to stay for now, but you're of no use to me like this.
String.Dest: この城には私の客人として滞在してもらう。今は置いてやるが、そのままでは何の役にも立たん

String.Source: Hope the moths like that bark as much as Dexion said they would.
String.Dest: あの蚕がデキソンの言っていた通りに樹皮が大好きだといいのですけど

String.Source: What kind of beast is that? No law against it, but if that thing starts attacking people, it's getting a sword in the gullet.
String.Dest: 一体何の獣だ？ 違法ではないが、もし人を襲い始めたら喉に剣を突っ込まれるぞ

String.Source: Well, I've been so busy, I dunno. What are you, kidding me?
String.Dest: さあね、ずっと忙しかったんだ。何のつもりだ？ からかってるのか？

String.Source: Here we are. Ready to go in?
String.Dest: 着きましてよ。中に入る用意はよろしくて？

String.Source: What you might not know is that for the most devoted and impressive followers, Molag Bal will give the gift anew, in its pure form.
String.Dest: ですが、モラグ・バルが忠誠心と能力の高い部下には、純粋な力を新たに与える事ができるのは、まだ知らないのではなくて？

String.Source: And so we've delivered her right to them. I should've kept her here until we were certain...
String.Dest: 我々は彼女を連中のもとに送り込んだというわけだ。確信が持てるまで彼女をここに置いておくべきだったな…

String.Source: It involves carefully removing the bark from a Canticle Tree which will in turn attract Ancestor Moths to you.
String.Dest: それにはカンティクルの木から樹皮を慎重にはがす作業が含まれる。そうする事によって聖蚕が集まってくるんだ

String.Source: Do as I command, and you will reap the rewards. Defy me, and I can offer you only pain and suffering.
String.Dest: 命じた通りにやればほうびをとらそう。抗うならば、やれるのは苦痛と苦悶だけだ

String.Source: Killing their leaders should discourage them from an out and out war with us.
String.Dest: 奴らのリーダー達を殺せば、我らとの全面戦争は思いとどまるはずだ

String.Source: Fortune smile upon you, milord!
String.Dest: 旦那様、ご幸運を！

String.Source: Don't speak to me, meat.
String.Dest: 気安く話しかけないで

String.Source: Nnyyyaarrgghh!
String.Dest: んにゃあああるぐぐ！

String.Source: I pledged myself to Molag Bal, and in his name I sacrificed a thousand innocents.
String.Dest: 私はモラグ・バルに忠誠を誓い、その名のもとに無実の者を千人、生贄として捧げた

String.Source: Ah, hello there!
String.Dest: やあ！

String.Source: Yes. Please, follow me.
String.Dest: ええ。お願い、ついてきて

String.Source: (Bark)
String.Dest: ワン！

String.Source: Whether or not you've become one of us in order to survive the Soul Cairn, you're still a vampire hunter at heart.
String.Dest: ソウル・ケルンを生き延びるために私達の仲間になってもならなくても、心は今でも吸血鬼ハンターなんだわ

String.Source: The night eternal awaits.
String.Dest: 夜は永遠に待ってくれる

String.Source: Assume the mantle of the Vampire Lord, and we will continue.
String.Dest: 次に進む前に、吸血鬼の王の衣を身にまとうがいい

String.Source: But I can't worry about that now. We need the scroll, and she's our only lead.
String.Dest: でも今はそんな事を心配している場合ではありませんわ。書を手に入れなくては。彼女が唯一の手掛かりなのですから

String.Source: Death to the vampires!
String.Dest: 吸血鬼どもに死を！

String.Source: Oh, come now... spare me your notions of kinship.
String.Dest: これはこれは、我々の間柄を誤解してはいまいか？

String.Source: Originally owned by the Jarl of Riften back in the Second Era, it was a bit of a black mark on the Hold's history.
String.Dest: 元は第二紀の頃にリフテンの首長が所有していたものだった。要塞の歴史におけるちょっとした汚点だがな

String.Source: You dare defy me?
String.Dest: 私に歯向かうつもりか？

String.Source: Is that your best, mortal?
String.Dest: それが精一杯ってわけか？

String.Source: I don't suppose you have some good news for me.
String.Dest: いい知らせは多分ないんだろうな

String.Source: A small price to pay for the betterment of our kind.
String.Dest: 我が一族の発展のための、微々たる犠牲だ

String.Source: Everyone! Gather 'round!
String.Dest: みんな！ 集合だ！

String.Source: (Growl)
String.Dest: ウゥーッ…

String.Source: It appears I have you to thank for turning my daughter against me.
String.Dest: 娘を心変わりさせたのはお前の仕業のようだな

String.Source: I'm sure your reward will be great for ensuring our Lord's success.
String.Dest: 我らが王の成功を確かなものにしてくれたのだから、君へのほうびはすごいものになるはずだ

String.Source: If you want to waste your time, that's fine. But I've got my own destination in mind. Maybe you could help me get there when you're done?
String.Dest: 時間を無駄にしたいなら、それでも構いませんわ。ですが、わたしはわたしで行きたい所がありますの。あなたの用事が終わったら、連れて行って頂けません事？

String.Source: They say anyone who steps foot on that island will meet an early death... hope you know what you're doing.
String.Dest: あの島に上陸すると早死にするって言われてるんだが… 後悔しなさんなよ

String.Source: The scent has gone cold.
String.Dest: 匂いがしないな

String.Source: Look at them... they've definitely taken a liking to you.
String.Dest: ご覧になって… すっかりあなたの味をしめたみたいですわ

String.Source: This is the time of the Dawnguard!
String.Dest: ドーンガードの時代は来たれり！

String.Source: But, we haven't gotten rid of them completely. A body can rattle around confused long after it's head's been severed.
String.Dest: でも、彼らを完全に始末してはいない。死体は首を切られた後も長い間混乱を引き延ばせるものよ

String.Source: That doesn't make much sense. Where is this woman? Who is she?
String.Dest: 話がよく分からないな。その女性はどこにいる？ 彼女は誰なんだ？

String.Source: Here you go.
String.Dest: ほらよ

String.Source: I'll tell you what. I appreciate what you're trying to do, so I'll play along.
String.Dest: こうしよう。あんたのやろうとしてる事は気に入ったから、協力してやるよ

String.Source: You're not welcome here.
String.Dest: 歓迎はできないな

String.Source: All right. I'll hear out Isran, see if there's anything I can do to help.
String.Dest: 分かった。イスランの言い分を聞いて、力になれるかどうか考えよう

String.Source: I have to admit, I'm impressed. I didn't think you had the spirit for it.
String.Dest: 正直なところ、感心いたしましたわ。そんな度胸はないと思っておりましたもの

String.Source: Can you feel the power of the ancient blood coursing through your veins?
String.Dest: 古き血が体を駆けめぐるのを感じるか？

String.Source: Send them to Oblivion!
String.Dest: オブリビオン送りだ！

String.Source: Because of this, I strongly believe you were meant to hear the ancestral chorus. Only one way to find out.
String.Dest: つまり君は先人のコーラスを聞く運命にあるというわけだ。それが真理を得る唯一の方法だよ

String.Source: They've holed up in an abandoned fort in the Reach.
String.Dest: 彼らはリーチにある廃墟と化した砦に潜伏したわ

String.Source: What now?
String.Dest: 今度は何？

String.Source: Ugh...
String.Dest: うぐっ…

String.Source: Rii...
String.Dest: リィ…

String.Source: Running is your only chance to live.
String.Dest: 逃げられなきゃ終わりだ

String.Source: For me? I've done what I set out to do.
String.Dest: あたし？ 目的はもう果たしたよ

String.Source: Have you been paying attention to everything that's happened? He'll betray us the second our backs are turned.
String.Dest: 何があったのかちゃんと見ていまして？ 背中を向けたらすぐ父はわたし達を裏切りますわよ

String.Source: Let me show you how mortal you still are, vampire.
String.Dest: 定命の名残を見せてもらうぞ

String.Source: I sense the power of the ancient blood in your veins. It has made you strong.
String.Dest: 古き血の力が体をめぐっているのが分かる。力を得ているようだな

String.Source: No, you've got it all wrong. We're here to complete the prophecy our way, not his.
String.Dest: それは誤解ですわ。お父様のやり方ではなく、わたし達なりのやり方で予言を成就させるために来ましたのよ

String.Source: Cease your flight and we will move on to the next lesson.
String.Dest: 飛行をやめれば次の話をしてやろう

String.Source: Little patience for talk? Good. Let's end this!
String.Dest: 言葉を交わすのも面倒か？ ならば決着をつけてやろう！

String.Source: Auriel's Bow is ours. Deliver it to Lord Harkon at once, so we can reap the benefits of this prophecy.
String.Dest: アーリエルの弓は私達のものよ。このお告げの恩恵を受けられるよう、すぐにハルコン卿へ届けて

String.Source: And yet, as my mortal life neared an end, I faced a seemingly invincible enemy -- my own mortality.
String.Dest: しかし、寿命の終わりが近づくと共に、私は打倒不可能と思える敵、自らの命のぜい弱性と向き合う事になったのだよ

String.Source: I'll find you, don't worry.
String.Dest: きっと見つけてあげるから

String.Source: The voice of the Ancestor Moth has always been an integral part of reading the Elder Scrolls.
String.Dest: 星霜の書を読む時は、聖蚕の声に耳を傾ける事が常に重要だ

String.Source: Mother?
String.Dest: お母様？

String.Source: Hmm. Nothing.
String.Dest: うーん。何も匂わない

String.Source: You have earned my trust, so I will share what I can.
String.Dest: 信頼に足ると判断して、話せる事は話そう

String.Source: Drinking it gives you strength, but it also gets you pretty messed up... That's why we thought of putting it in the skooma.
String.Dest: 飲むと力が湧くんだけど、何しろ副作用が酷くてね… だからスクゥーマに混ぜようと考えたってわけ

String.Source: That... wasn't as unpleasant as I thought it would be.
String.Dest: あれは… 思っていたほど悪くありませんでしたわね

String.Source: Just a taste...
String.Dest: ちょいと味見を…

String.Source: ...blood... so hungry all the time now... need to hunt again soon...
String.Dest: …血がほしい… 今じゃそう思わない時はない… 早く狩りを再開しないと

String.Source: This is Fort Dawnguard.
String.Dest: ドーンガード砦だ

String.Source: Damn. Well what do you know?
String.Dest: まったく… 君は何を知ってるんだ？

String.Source: For two weeks I've tracked that bear, and now find that you've killed it on your own.
String.Dest: あのクマを2週間も追っていたんだが、1人で仕留めてしまったのか

String.Source: ...first kill is always the best... the blood has never tasted as sweet since...
String.Dest: …最初の獲物が最高とはよく言ったもんだ… あれ以上の味にいまだ出会えない…

String.Source: I wish I could say it was courage, or skill at arms that saved me. But that would be a lie.
String.Dest: 勇気か武器の腕前で助かったと言いたいが、それでは嘘になってしまう

String.Source: Barknar insisted we come here, said we'd be safe. He also said we'd be inside the walls.
String.Dest: バークナールが、安全だし壁の内側にいられると言ってここへ来させたの

String.Source: But we all took part in it. Not really wholesome family activity, but I guess it's something you do when you give yourselves to a daedric lord.
String.Dest: ですが、確かにその場にはおりましたわ。家族でやるような事ではございませんけれど、デイドラの王に仕える者としては普通の事ですのよ

String.Source: I love it when dinner walks right into my arms.
String.Dest: 自分から夕食になりに来るがいい

String.Source: Look at this place. I can't imagine choosing to come here. My mother must have been terrified.
String.Dest: ご覧になって。好きこのんでこんな所に来る人なんておりますかしら？ 母は無理強いされたに違いありませんわ

String.Source: What we do know is that some are born with the special gift to read the Elder Scrolls.
String.Dest: 分かっているのは、星霜の書を読む才能を持って生まれてくる者達がいるという事

String.Source: But their time has come to an end. And you will be the one that ends it.
String.Dest: でも彼らの時代は終わり。そして終わらせるのはあなたよ

String.Source: Look at the size of that fort. They must have room for a few more in there.
String.Dest: あの砦の大きさを見て。中にあと数人分の広さはあるはずよ

String.Source: It'll be good to get outside and breathe again. I haven't missed the sunlight, but I do miss fresh air.
String.Dest: また外に出て深呼吸できたらいいでしょうね。陽の光は恋しくなくとも、新鮮な空気は恋しいですわ

String.Source: I know, I know, but just... anyway. Molag Bal is the original source of vampirism, and still grants it to his more worthy followers.
String.Dest: はいはい、そうですわね、ですが… とにかく、吸血鬼を最初に造ったのはモラグ・バルで、高位の手下には今も吸血鬼の力を与えていますわ

String.Source: The Dawnguard will, no doubt, soon become even more of a nuisance now that Auriel's Bow has been recovered.
String.Dest: アーリエルの弓を取り戻した今、ドーンガードがもうじきさらに邪魔な存在になるのは間違いない

String.Source: You dare to interfere with me?
String.Dest: 私の邪魔立てをするつもりか？

String.Source: If I'd known Skyrim was so dangerous, I'd have brought more guards.
String.Dest: スカイリムが危険な場所だと知ってたら、もっと守りを固めて来たのに

String.Source: However, the night powers are still yours to command, and your claws are still formidable weapons.
String.Dest: だが夜の力はまだ使えるうえに、爪の驚異的な威力は変わらない

String.Source: Your blood will not protect you!
String.Dest: お前の血はお前を守ってはくれない！

String.Source: I will avenge you, brother.
String.Dest: 仇は討ってやる

String.Source: If you listen closely when you find the glade, you should be able to hear their song... a soft, harmonious trilling.
String.Dest: 先人の湿地を見つけたら、耳を澄ませる。すると彼らの歌が聞こえるだろう… 優しくて調和のとれた歌声が

String.Source: I can't think of any reason I'd want to lose this gift. Especially after what I did to get it.
String.Dest: この力を捨てる理由なんて、どこにもございませんわ。あれだけ苦労して手に入れたのに

String.Source: Shouldn't we keep moving? I really want to get back home.
String.Dest: 先に進むべきではなくて？ 早く家に帰りたいですわ

String.Source: Victory to the Dawnguard!
String.Dest: ドーンガードに勝利を！

String.Source: It's... it's not easy. But I don't think we have much of a choice.
String.Dest: それは… 簡単な事ではありませんわね。けれども、そうするしかないとも思っておりますのよ

String.Source: How hard would it be to feed a few extra mouths? I'm sure they can manage, and not leave us sitting out here like cattle.
String.Dest: 人数がちょっとくらい増えても大差ないだろう。放牧中の牛のように出したままにせずに、入れてくれてもばちは当たらないと思うが

String.Source: Whoever did this is mine.
String.Dest: 誰がやったにせよ、この手で報いを受けさせてやる

String.Source: It generally doesn't occur until a Moth Priest is in his latter years, but in my case I simply wasn't preparing myself properly.
String.Dest: それが聖蚕の僧侶の身に起こるのは通常晩年だが、私の場合は準備を怠ってしまったんだよ

String.Source: Amazing...
String.Dest: すごいな…

String.Source: We own the night, fool.
String.Dest: 夜は私たちのものだ

String.Source: This is it!
String.Dest: いよいよだな！

String.Source: I know, and I'm sorry that happened. But now...
String.Dest: ああ、残念な事だった。だが今は…

String.Source: If only it were so. With the world in shadow, we would never tire, never weaken... more than a match for their pitiful armies.
String.Dest: そうでもあるが。世が影に覆われれば、我々は疲れも衰えもしなくなる… 奴らのぜい弱な軍勢などとるに足らんよ

String.Source: Let's just... move on from here, ok?
String.Dest: 今はとにかく… 先へ進みますわよ。よろしくて？

String.Source: Kill the abominations!
String.Dest: 化け物どもを殺せ！

String.Source: If you say so.
String.Dest: 分かりましたわ

String.Source: That's always a possibility. She was almost as obsessed as my father by the time she shut me in.
String.Dest: その可能性は常にありますわね。母がわたしを閉じ込めた頃は、父とほとんど同じぐらい何かにとりつかれておりましたから

String.Source: ...I won't hide down here forever... gather a few of the brethren, we'll strike out on our own...
String.Dest: …ずっとここに隠れているつもりはない… 仲間を集め、打って出てやる…

String.Source: Hmph... not very impressive, is it?
String.Dest: ふうん… 大した事ないじゃない

String.Source: Aren't the Dawnguard here to help, to make it safe for us? Can't see why they wouldn't let us in.
String.Dest: ドーンガードは我々を守り、助けてくれるためにここにいるのでは？ 中に入れてくれない理由が分からない

String.Source: The Empire will send someone to find me. You'll see!
String.Dest: 帝国は私を探しに誰かを送り込む。そのうち分かるぞ！

String.Source: If you're holding out for more gold, it's never going to happen.
String.Dest: 値を釣り上げるつもりなら、あきらめるんだな

String.Source: The barrier should be gone now. Let's head back.
String.Dest: これで障壁は消えたはずですわ。戻りましょう

String.Source: For those willing to subjugate themselves, he will still bestow the gift, but they must be powerful in their own right before earning his trust.
String.Dest: 彼は、自分に忠誠を誓った者には力を与えるけれど、彼の信用を得るには元々の能力も強くないと無理なのです

String.Source: I miss the flowers.
String.Dest: 花が恋しいですわ

String.Source: We read these ancient scrolls of prophecy in order to divine the future, and we use that knowledge to aid the Emperor.
String.Dest: 予言が書かれたいにしえの巻物から、我々は未来を読み取る。そしてその知識を皇帝のために使うんだよ

String.Source: The short version is that my parents and I... we were followers of Molag Bal.
String.Dest: 簡単に言いますと、わたしと両親は皆、モラグ・バルの信徒だったのです

String.Source: Have you been paying attention? It's obvious my father's well beyond reason.
String.Dest: ちゃんとその目は見開いていて？ わたしの父は理屈を超えた存在ですのよ

String.Source: If you think I'll help you, you're mistaken.
String.Dest: 手を貸してもらえると思ってるならそれは間違いだ

String.Source: Yes, he definitely sounds like he knows what to do.
String.Dest: ええ。何をすればいいのかを、彼は完璧に知っているようですわね

String.Source: I will await your return.
String.Dest: お帰りをお待ちしております

String.Source: Go away! We don't suffer trespassers!
String.Dest: 立ち去れ！ 侵入は許さんぞ！

String.Source: A shrine to Molag Bal, the mighty Daedra Prince who is father to all our kind.
String.Dest: 我々の同朋すべての父であるデイドラの王子、モラグ・バルをまつった祠だ

String.Source: It looks like this is as close as we're going to get being safe from the vampires.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼ら相手に安全を確保するのも、ここらが限界みたいだ

String.Source: It was a cadre of dremora. The city was under attack.
String.Dest: ドレモラの集団だよ。奴らが街を襲撃したんだ

String.Source: Divines keep you safe, my friend.
String.Dest: 神々のご加護を、友よ

String.Source: Now let's finish this.
String.Dest: さあ、ケリをつけましょう

String.Source: Go, then, and do not forget who is your master.
String.Dest: さあ行くがいい。くれぐれも誰が主君であるのかを忘れるなよ

String.Source: Sadly, yes. It's the inevitable fate we agree to pursue when reading the Elder Scrolls.
String.Dest: 残念ながらそうだ。星霜の書を読むならば、目にした運命そのものをたどる事を覚悟しなければならない

String.Source: It's through this ancestral chorus that the moths tap into a form of primal augur and become a conduit for deciphering the scrolls.
String.Dest: この先人のコーラスを通じて蚕は原始の予言者となり、書の解読における架け橋としての役割を果たす

String.Source: I've helped you all that I can. The rest is up to you.
String.Dest: できるだけ手は貸したつもりだ。あとは君次第だよ

String.Source: Whether you believe it or not, the scrolls have a mind of their own. If they didn't want you to find them, they wouldn't allow it.
String.Dest: 信じられないかも知れないが、書には意思があるんだよ。君が発見者になれたのは、書がそれを望んだからだ

String.Source: You're here because we're abominations in your mind. Evil creatures that need to be destroyed.
String.Dest: ここにいるのは、内心では私達を嫌悪しているからだわ。破滅させられるべき邪悪な生物として

String.Source: Behold the power of Night!
String.Dest: 夜の力を見るがいい！

String.Source: Hmm. Cowards.
String.Dest: なんて臆病だ

String.Source: You know why we're here.
String.Dest: わたし達がここにいる理由はお分かりですわね

String.Source: Something's not right.
String.Dest: 何かおかしいな

String.Source: Vaaz...Zol!
String.Dest: ヴァーズ…ゾル！

String.Source: It was no mere chance that brought you to me. It was destiny.
String.Dest: お前がここに現れたのは偶然ではない、運命だ

String.Source: I'm telling you, there's something strange with the moondial.
String.Dest: あのですね、この月時計はどこかおかしいですわ

String.Source: Let's head back to Isran and let him see what we've got first. I'm betting he'll lend us a sword or two.
String.Dest: イスランのところへ戻って、わたし達が手に入れたものをまず見せましょう。剣の1本や2本はきっと貸してくれますわよ

String.Source: Though they are a rebellious and determined lot. While you've severed the snake's head, the body will likely writhe a while longer.
String.Dest: ただし彼らは反抗的で決意の固い集団だ。ヘビの頭を切り離しても、体はしばらくの間のたうちまわるかも知れない

String.Source: I will share that knowledge with you gladly, master. What do you wish to know?
String.Dest: 主様、その知識を喜んであなたと共有します。何が知りたいのですか？

String.Source: I knew you would be victorious.
String.Dest: あんたなら勝つと分かってたよ

String.Source: And go where? You can't just leave me alone whenever you feel like it. I'm coming with you, like it or not.
String.Dest: それで、いずこへと？ いつでもわたしを置いていけると思わないで。何と言おうと、ついて行きますわよ

String.Source: I'm glad you're here. I don't think I could be doing this alone.
String.Dest: あなたがいてくれてよかった。独りでは無理だったと思いますの

String.Source: You disappoint me, Serana. You've taken everything I provided for you and thrown it all away for this... pathetic being.
String.Dest: 失望したぞ、セラーナ。私がお前に与えたもののすべてを投げ捨てたというのか、この情けない存在のために

String.Source: Every Moth Priest is taught this ritual, but few ever get the chance to perform it... you should consider yourself fortunate if it works for you.
String.Dest: 聖蚕の僧侶はみんなこの儀式について教わるが、実行する者はほとんどいない… うまくいったら幸いだよ

String.Source: Then my daughter is truly lost. She died the moment she accepted a mortal into her life.
String.Dest: ならば我が娘はもういない。自らの生に定命の者を迎え入れた瞬間に死んだのだ

String.Source: With my guidance you will become a deadly instrument, striking terror in the hearts of mortals wherever you tread.
String.Dest: 私の導きのもとでお前は驚異的な存在となり、行く先々で定命の者達の心を恐怖に陥れる事だろう

String.Source: No husks, no sale. Guess you have some scavenging to do.
String.Dest: ハスクがなけりゃ売れないね。探してきなよ

String.Source: I'll bet my parents didn't know the half of this part of the castle.
String.Dest: 父も母も、お城のこの部分に関しては半分も知らなかったと断言できますわ

String.Source: I will avenge you, sister.
String.Dest: 仇は討ってやる

String.Source: You will not touch him.
String.Dest: 彼には指一本触れさせませんわ

String.Source: No, I am alive only because the vampires spared me.
String.Dest: 自分が生きているのは吸血鬼達に見逃してもらったからだ

String.Source: Where are you?
String.Dest: どこにいる！

String.Source: ...the clans think they're better than us... putting on airs... pah, they'll be the first to burn when the mortals get organized...
String.Dest: …一族の奴らは私達より優れているつもりでいるけど… はっ、思いあがりも甚だしいわ。定命の者どもが足並みを揃えたら、真っ先に焼き殺されるのは彼らでしょうね…

String.Source: You know, I've asked myself the same thing.
String.Dest: 同じ内容の自問をした事がありますわよ

String.Source: You should have kept running.
String.Dest: 足をとめるべきじゃなかったな

String.Source: And with that... it's done. No one could possibly deny what we've found now.
String.Dest: そしてこれで… 完了だ。もうあたし達が見つけたものを否定できる奴なんていない

String.Source: Good.
String.Dest: いい返事ね

String.Source: Someone will bleed for this.
String.Dest: このままでは済まさん

String.Source: That's... a long story.
String.Dest: それは… 長い話になりますわ

String.Source: Mortal fool, you can't stop us.
String.Dest: 愚かな定命め。我々はとめられないぞ

String.Source: Ah, Solitude. Best port in Skyrim. You should try the Spiced Mead while you're there.
String.Dest: ソリチュードか。スカイリム一の港がある街さ。あそこのピリ辛ハチミツ酒はお勧めだ

String.Source: ... what's that?
String.Dest: …あれは何だ？

String.Source: Ha ha ha! I knew I'd find you.
String.Dest: あはははは！ 思った通りだ

String.Source: I'm not sure it's really your place to judge me.
String.Dest: あなたにはお分かりにならないでしょう。わたしの事も

String.Source: There is one last thing you must know. Slaying mortal men with your life drain grants you new night powers and blood magic.
String.Dest: 最後にもう一つ知っておくといい。定命の人間達の生命力を吸い取って殺せば、新たな夜の力と血の魔法が得られる

String.Source: If Isran hadn't left the Order, this could've been our home.
String.Dest: イスランが教団から抜けていなければ、ここが家になっていたかも知れない

String.Source: Fortunately, you seem to have already killed the Keepers maintaining the barrier around these ruins.
String.Dest: 幸い、この遺跡を囲む障壁を守る番人をすでに始末してくれたようね

String.Source: Why fight me? Your blood is already mine.
String.Dest: なぜ歯向かう？ お前の血はもう俺のものなのに

String.Source: Of course I do.
String.Dest: もちろんだとも

String.Source: You have brought my daughter back safely, and for that I am grateful.
String.Dest: 娘を無事に連れ戻してくれた事には感謝している

String.Source: Hhyyaarargghhhh!
String.Dest: はいやあああ！

String.Source: If you find any more Elder Scrolls lying about, be sure to let me know!
String.Dest: また星霜の書を見つけたら、必ず教えてくれよ！

String.Source: Gaan...
String.Dest: ガーン…

String.Source: Aaaayyyaarrrrgghh!
String.Dest: あやあああるぐ！

String.Source: Kind of soothing, actually. I feel a little warmer, now.
String.Dest: むしろ癒されたくらいですわ。前よりも体が暖かく感じますもの

String.Source: Well, you've met most of us. My father's not exactly the most stable, and eventually he drove my mother crazy with him.
String.Dest: 会った事がおありでしょう。父があまりに頑固で、そのせいで母をひどく怒らせたのですわ

String.Source: I offer you my blood. Take it, and you will walk as a lion among sheep. Men will tremble at your approach, and you will never fear death again.
String.Dest: 私自身の血だ。これを得れば羊達の間を狼として歩め、近づけば人々がふるえ上がる事だろう。死を恐れる必要もなくなる

String.Source: Is that another one of those wayshrines up there? I wonder where this one goes...
String.Dest: あそこにあるのは旅の祠ではなくて？ あれはどこと繋がっているのかしら…

String.Source: You should not have come here, vampire.
String.Dest: ここはお前の来るところじゃない

String.Source: Look, I'm happy to help you run any errands you need to, but I've got my own destination. Could you help me get there whenever we're done?
String.Dest: あなたのお使いに協力するのは構いませんけど、わたしはわたしで行きたい所がありますわ。あなたの用事が終わったら、連れて行って頂けないかしら？

String.Source: If they're bold enough to attack us here, then this may be bigger than I thought. I have good men here, but...
String.Dest: 奴らが大胆にもここを襲撃するなら、状況は思ってたより悲観的だな。ここにも優れた人材はそろっているが…

String.Source: Something tells me the divines favor you, my friend.
String.Dest: 見ていると、神々に気に入られているように思えてくるよ

String.Source: ...too much hiding... the mortals are weak... he's a coward to fear them, we should feed when we like... can't stand this hunger gnawing at me...
String.Dest: …隠れてばかりいるのにはもううんざり… 非力な定命の者どもを恐れるなんて、彼は腰抜けだわ。食べたい時に食べて何が悪いの？ この空腹感には耐えられない…

String.Source: Gather your things and rest well, my friend. We meet outside Castle Volkihar.
String.Dest: 荷物をまとめて十分休んでおけよ。ヴォルキハル城の外で落ち合おう

String.Source: The moondial definitely wasn't like this the last time I saw it.
String.Dest: この月時計は絶対こんなふうではありませんでしたわ、わたくしが最後に見た時には

String.Source: I watch the gate. Ain't much else to tell.
String.Dest: 門を見張ってる。それだけの事だ

String.Source: Never... not yet...
String.Dest: ちっとも… 怖くなんか…

String.Source: Nobody's ever asked me that before. I... I don't know.
String.Dest: そんな事、聞かれた事がございませんの… 分かりかねますわ

String.Source: I can't imagine living here. Or... being dead here. Or... whatever they'd call it. Ugh.
String.Dest: ここで生活を送るなんて想像できませんわ。私は生きていませんけれども… 誰がなんと言おうとお断りですわ… うぅっ

String.Source: Lady Serana's back! Open the gate!
String.Dest: セラーナ様がお戻りだ！ 門を開けろ！

String.Source: Pah, your blood is foul.
String.Dest: うっ、お前の血ときたら酷い味だ

String.Source: It's true for most of my brothers in the order as well. We don't really know where the scrolls came from or who wrote them.
String.Dest: 聖蚕会の仲間達も同様だ。書がどこの誰によって書かれたのか、我々の中で知っている者はいないよ

String.Source: Looks like these Falmer are here to stay.
String.Dest: このファルメル達はここに住んでいたようですわね

String.Source: Looks like we're on the right track.
String.Dest: どうやらこの方向で正しいようですわね

String.Source: Remember, you are no mere vampire. You are something far greater.
String.Dest: 自分がただの吸血鬼ではなく、はるかに上位の存在である事を忘れるな

String.Source: The quicker we find the Keepers, the quicker we can leave.
String.Dest: 番人達が早く見つかれば、それだけ早くここを出ていけますわ

String.Source: It seems they wanted to send a message to the other Vigilants still walking the roads of Skyrim.
String.Dest: スカイリムの道を歩んでいる他の番人達に警告を発したかったようだな

String.Source: Please, don't be angry with me.
String.Dest: お怒りにならないで下さい

String.Source: Vampires are worse than Daedra. I wish we Vigilants had taken them more seriously while we we had the chance.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼はデイドラ以上に厄介だ。手遅れにならないうちに我ら番人がその危険に気づけていればよかったんだが…

String.Source: They must be who that priest was calling "the Betrayed."
String.Dest: あの司祭が“裏切られし者達”と呼んでいたのは彼らの事に違いありませんわ

String.Source: What else do you want to know?
String.Dest: 他に知りたい事はあるか？

String.Source: Your blood calls me...
String.Dest: お前の血が呼んでいる…

String.Source: I won't lie - if this were any other situation, I'd put her down just on the chance she might be a vampire.
String.Dest: 嘘は言わない。もしこんな状況でなければ、彼女を殺しておくところだ。吸血鬼かも知れないからな

String.Source: Come on, she's leading us to the scroll.
String.Dest: 行きましょう。母が書の在りかまで案内して下さいますわ

String.Source: Now the whole world will fall at our feet.
String.Dest: 全世界が今私達の足元にひれ伏すでしょう

String.Source: No. He has to die. We have no choice.
String.Dest: ありませんわね。彼は死ぬべきですわ。他に道はなくてよ

String.Source: Now, you might already know that Molag Bal is the original source of vampirism.
String.Dest: さて、モラグ・バルが最初の吸血鬼を造った事は、もうご存知ですわね

String.Source: This is all more excitement than I'm used to.
String.Dest: こんなに心みなぎるのは初めてだよ

String.Source: You've destroyed our family. You've killed other vampires. All over some prophecy that we barely understand.
String.Dest: お父様はわたし達の家庭を壊してしまいましたのよ。それに他の吸血鬼も大勢殺しましたわ。あやふやな予言なんかのために

String.Source: Qoth...Zaam!
String.Dest: クォス…ザーム！

String.Source: The time has come to finally put an end to Harkon and his unholy prophecy!
String.Dest: ハルコンと奴の不浄な予言を終わらせる時が訪れたのだ！

String.Source: If the Moth Priest has guards, show them no mercy.
String.Dest: 聖蚕の僧侶が護衛を連れている場合、護衛には容赦するな

String.Source: It is our sacred duty to study the Elder Scrolls.
String.Dest: 星霜の書の研究は、我々に課せられた神聖な任務だ

String.Source: You have forsaken my gift. The ancient blood no longer flows through your veins. Don't deny it!
String.Dest: 我が恩恵を捨て去ったのか。古き血はもうお前の体に流れてはいない。否定しても無駄だ！

String.Source: Yeagh!
String.Dest: いたたっ！

String.Source: You can't get rid of me that easily.
String.Dest: そう簡単に、わたしはいなくなりませんわよ

String.Source: Where have you been?
String.Dest: どこにおりましたの？

String.Source: One thing about living in Skyrim I could never stomach... all the damn vampires!
String.Dest: スカイリムに生きる種族の中でも奴らには我慢ならない… いまいましい吸血鬼どもめ！

String.Source: Running will warm your blood nicely.
String.Dest: 逃げれば血が温まって飲みごろになる

String.Source: Sure, got plenty. What am I gonna' do with it?
String.Dest: もちろんたくさん持ってるよ。何に使うとするかな？

String.Source: So, I see this dragon has fangs.
String.Dest: なるほど、このドラゴンには牙があるのだな

String.Source: Perhaps you still need convincing? Behold the power!
String.Dest: まだ納得できないか？ 我が力を見るがいい！

String.Source: These people were... why would anyone want to set up camp here?
String.Dest: この人達は… どうしてここでキャンプを張ろうとしたのかしら…

String.Source: Begone! You're not welcome here!
String.Dest: 立ち去れ！ お前の来る所じゃない！

String.Source: Yyyaaaarrgghh!
String.Dest: いやあああるぐぐぐ！

String.Source: In reward, he gave everlasting life to myself, my wife and my daughter. And so I have defeated mortality itself.
String.Dest: 見返りとして私と、妻と娘の三人は無限の命を授かった。そうして私は寿命にさえも打ち勝ったのだ

String.Source: Who'll need thralls when the very sun is at our mercy?
String.Dest: 太陽そのものが我々の意のままになれば、従徒など必要なくなる

String.Source: We will march on their lair and destroy those wretched abominations so they can no longer corrupt our world!
String.Dest: 奴らの根城に進軍して、あの忌々しいバケモノどもを破滅させてやれ。奴らがこの世界を汚すのをこれ以上許すな！

String.Source: Good. Do not offend me by losing it again.
String.Dest: よし。再び失くすなどという無礼のないようにな

String.Source: No more. I'm done with you.
String.Dest: もうたくさんですわ。家族の絆もこれまで

String.Source: And what happens when you've slain me? Is Valerica next? Is Serana?
String.Dest: 私を倒したらどうするのだ？ 次はヴァレリカか？ セラーナか？

String.Source: Beautiful. That shield... it's everything I could have hoped for.
String.Dest: 美しいね。あの盾… 非の打ちどころがない

String.Source: For too long we've allowed these vampires to poison the night and kill our people! Now, we finally have the means to strike back!
String.Dest: 吸血鬼どもが夜を汚し同胞達を殺すのを、我々はあまりにも長い間許してきた！ しかし今、我々はついに反撃の手段を手に入れたのだ！

String.Source: You can also call upon the powers of night to turn into a swarm of bats and reappear some distance away.
String.Dest: また、夜の力によってコウモリの一群に姿を変え、少し離れた場所に移る事もできる

String.Source: Is that... the Forge?
String.Dest: あれは… 鋳造器具？

String.Source: Now it's my turn.
String.Dest: 今度はこっちの番だ

String.Source: I might be just a soul now, but I'm still not going to give my stuff away. Bring me at least twenty-five husks and then we'll talk.
String.Dest: どれほど落ちぶれても自分のものをただで手放すわけにはいかないよ。最低でもハスクを25個持ってきてくれたら話を聞こう

String.Source: This isn't really a good time.
String.Dest: あまりいいタイミングではありませんわね

String.Source: Sorry, I'm not that easy to get rid of. If you want to run ahead, I won't stop you, but I'll be following.
String.Dest: お生憎様、そう簡単には離れませんわ。一人で先に行きたいならご自由に、しっかりついて行きますわよ

String.Source: Finally, a trace of honesty in our little conversation.
String.Dest: ようやく会話に誠実さの片鱗が見えたな

String.Source: We knew Isran was working on something, but we had no idea he'd found this place.
String.Dest: イスランが何かを推し進めているのは分かっていたが、あんな場所を見つけたとは初耳だった

String.Source: What do you want now?
String.Dest: 望みは何だ？

String.Source: If we open that one, we'll be able to move around this valley a lot faster.
String.Dest: あれを開けば、この谷をずっと速くまわれるようになりますわ

String.Source: What if the vampires come here, after the Dawnguard? We'll be stuck right in the middle.
String.Dest: もしドーンガードの後に吸血鬼がここへ来たら？ ちょうど真ん中に挟まれてしまう

String.Source: I keep thinking that there's got to be another way, but he'll turn on us both the moment he gets the chance.
String.Dest: 他の道があるはずだとずっと考えておりますけど、父は機会があればすぐにでもわたし達二人を襲ってきますわよ

String.Source: Nothing like a goose chase around the whole damned province.
String.Dest: 1つの地域をあてもなく探しまわるほど素敵な事はございませんわね

String.Source: ...maybe the clans have it right... hunting's so chancy... why not keep a few thralls... blood whenever you want it...
String.Dest: …一族の言う事は正しいんだろう… 確かに狩りは当てにならない… それなら従徒を何人か抱えた方がいい… ほしい時に血が手に入るからな…

String.Source: You're mine!
String.Dest: お前は私のだ！

String.Source: Very well.
String.Dest: よろしい

String.Source: Go now, and prove that my faith in you was not misplaced.
String.Dest: 行くがいい、お前を信じた私の判断が間違っていなかった事を証明して見せるのだ

String.Source: You had your chance to escape, vampire.
String.Dest: 逃げるチャンスがあったのに

String.Source: It's probably best for you if we're not seen together right now.
String.Dest: 今は一緒にいるところを見られない方があなたのためかも知れませんわ

String.Source: Stop struggling. I'll give you a swift and beautiful death.
String.Dest: 悪あがきはやめなさい。そうすればひと思いに死なせてあげる

String.Source: Farewell.
String.Dest: それでは

String.Source: Of course I do.
String.Dest: もちろんだとも

String.Source: There you are.
String.Dest: そこにいたのか

String.Source: I knew I smelled mortal blood!
String.Dest: 定命の者の血の匂いがすると思ったよ！

String.Source: My offer is still a thousand. Did you want to sell?
String.Dest: 買い値は1000ゴールド、変わらないぞ。売ってくれるのか？

String.Source: Send the troll after them!
String.Dest: トロールに追わせるのよ！

String.Source: The Ideal Masters have charged him with overseeing the Keepers, and will undoubtedly investigate the fact that the barrier has fallen.
String.Dest: アイディール・マスターに、番人を監視する任務を負わされているの。きっと障壁が破れた事実を調査するはずよ

String.Source: Not many people understand the appeal. You keep surprising me.
String.Dest: この魅力が分かる方は少ないのですよ。あなたには驚かされますわ

String.Source: Never expected so blatant an attack by vampires, of all creatures.
String.Dest: まさか、よりによって吸血鬼が、こんなに派手に襲ってくるとは思わなかった

String.Source: (Bark)
String.Dest: ワン！

String.Source: (Bark)
String.Dest: ワン！

String.Source: With your left hand, you can wield the power of blood magic to raise the dead.
String.Dest: 左手では血の魔法の力を使って死者をよみがえらせる事が可能だ

String.Source: You've come this far, and you've found several Elder Scrolls.
String.Dest: 君はここまでたどり着いて、星霜の書をいくつか発見した

String.Source: The Dawnguard will want the Bow, and they will fight us, hard, to get it.
String.Dest: ドーンガードは弓をほしがる。手に入れるためには必死で戦うでしょうね

String.Source: One more word of warning. There's a dragon that calls itself Durnehviir roaming the Cairn.
String.Dest: もう一つ警告するわ。ダーネヴィールと名乗るドラゴンがケルンをうろついている

String.Source: It's gone now.
String.Dest: 消えたよ

String.Source: Wait... that almost makes sense!
String.Dest: ちょっと待って… きっとそうだわ！

String.Source: If was a foolish mistake, and I intend to make sure they learn that the hard way.
String.Dest: それが愚かな判断だった事を、奴らへ存分に思い知らせてやりたい

String.Source: I hope one day to see it restored to its former glory.
String.Dest: いつか修復されて過去の勇姿をまた見せてくれるといいね

String.Source: ...I'll find you...
String.Dest: …隠れても無駄だ…

String.Source: No. This has to end here and now.
String.Dest: いいえ、これは今ここで終わらせるべきですわ

String.Source: Well, as I'm sure you've figured out by now, it's no mere coincidence that we're named "Moth Priests."
String.Dest: もうお分かりだと思うが、我々が“聖蚕の僧侶”と呼ばれてるのにはちゃんとした理由がある

String.Source: It is the great spire at the heart of the Imperial City, among the tallest towers in all of Tamriel.
String.Dest: 帝都の中心部にある巨大な塔だ。タムリエルで最も高い塔のひとつだよ

String.Source: These chosen few can divine events of the past and future within the scrolls, though in time, it drives us to blindness.
String.Dest: 選ばれしそのわずかな者達は、書に記された過去と未来の出来事を読み取る事ができる。ただしそれと引き換えに、何も見えなくなる運命が待ち受けているが

String.Source: I promise you, it didn't always look like this.
String.Dest: 誓って言いますわ、昔はこんな風ではありませんでしたのよ

String.Source: I was hoping it wouldn't smell this bad.
String.Dest: 思っていた以上に酷い臭いですわ

String.Source: Excellent. That should prevent the problem from escalating.
String.Dest: 素晴らしい。これで問題の悪化を防げるだろう

String.Source: With them, and the materials in this room, we should have everything we need.
String.Dest: それと、この部屋の材料があれば、必要なものはすべて揃うはず

String.Source: I worry it'll never be safe to go home.
String.Dest: 二度と安全に家へ帰れないのかしら

String.Source: You've simply used Serana in an attempt to take away what should rightfully be mine.
String.Dest: 私が手にすべきものを、セラーナを利用してお前が横取りしようとしただけだろうが

String.Source: Someday, we'll rebuild the Hall of the Vigilant. Mark my words, I'll see it done before they put me in the ground.
String.Dest: いつの日か、番人の間を再建してみせる。自分が死ぬ前に実現させると誓おう

String.Source: I've spent years cleaning the place up and making repairs. You can be damn sure the vampires won't be burning this place down.
String.Dest: 何年もかけて改修や修理を施してきたのだ。吸血鬼どもに焼かれてたまるものか

String.Source: Now, listen to my words and do as I instruct.
String.Dest: さあ、私の言葉を聞き、言う通りにするがいい

String.Source: You've done well. I won't forget that.
String.Dest: よくやった。今回の功績は忘れん

String.Source: The only thing I see around here in abundance are soul husks. You know, those ugly fungus-looking things growing out of the ground.
String.Dest: この辺で山ほどあるものと言えば魂のハスクだけだ。あの地面から生えてる変てこりんなキノコみたいな奴だよ

String.Source: The prophecy is no more!
String.Dest: 予言は潰えた！

String.Source: Yes, milady? What can I help you with?
String.Dest: はい、奥様。ご用は何ですか？

String.Source: I'll give you a single chance to turn over the bow to me. There will not be a second.
String.Dest: 今すぐ弓を引き渡せ。二度目はないぞ

String.Source: And you didn't stop them? You didn't secure the scroll?
String.Dest: そして君は奴らを止めなかったと？ 書を確保しなかったのか？

String.Source: I assure you, no harm was done. In truth, your strength surprises me. Not all mortals can withstand my embrace.
String.Dest: 心配せずとも、害はない。正直なところ、お前の強靭さには驚いた。我が抱擁に耐えきれぬ定命の者もいる

String.Source: You care nothing for Serana or our plight.
String.Dest: セラーナや私達の苦境はお構いなしなのね

String.Source: Just leave me alone for a bit.
String.Dest: しばらく一人にしてちょうだい

String.Source: Yearrgh!
String.Dest: ええい！

String.Source: I wonder what happened to them.
String.Dest: 彼らに一体何があったのかしら

String.Source: Three's a crowd. Get rid of your other friend, and I'm yours.
String.Dest: 三人は多すぎますわね。お仲間と別れてきましたら、お供いたしますわ

String.Source: I'm surprised you think you can manage without me, but it's your choice.
String.Dest: わたしがいなくても大丈夫だなんて、大した自信ですのね。好きにしてよろしくてよ

String.Source: Bleed and die!
String.Dest: 血を流して死ぬんだ！

String.Source: You will not touch her.
String.Dest: 彼女には指一本触れさせませんわ

String.Source: I'm not afraid of you!
String.Dest: お前なんか怖くないぞ！

String.Source: Your voice drips with the venom of your mother's influence. How alike you've become.
String.Dest: 母親の影響が毒となってお前の声から滴っている。実によく似てきたものだ

String.Source: In keeping with tradition, you must use a specific tool in the Ancestor Glade, an implement known as a Draw Knife.
String.Dest: 伝統に従って、ドローナイフと呼ばれる特別な道具を先人の湿地で使用するんだ

String.Source: Find that Moth Priest! I will suffer no delays!
String.Dest: 聖蚕の僧侶を探せ！ 遅れは許さん！

String.Source: This is our fight and this is our fate!
String.Dest: これは我々の戦いだ。そして我々の使命だ！

String.Source: Let's kill those... Keeper things and get back to the prison.
String.Dest: さあ… 番人どもを片づけて、牢屋へと戻りましょう

String.Source: Agh!
String.Dest: ああ！

String.Source: Yes, quite. I'm growing weary of speaking to you and my traitorous daughter.
String.Dest: そうだな。お前と、私を裏切った娘とこうして口をきくのも疲れてきた

String.Source: But after everything with her... I don't think we can trust him.
String.Dest: けれども母と会って… 父の事が信用できなくなりましたわ

String.Source: Beautiful. That staff... it's everything I could have hoped for.
String.Dest: 美しいね。あの杖… 非の打ちどころがない

String.Source: And might I add, this is a remarkable fortress. I have colleagues back home that would love to study this place in detail.
String.Dest: それにしても、ここは素晴らしい砦だね。故郷の仲間にも是非ともじっくり見せてやりたいよ

String.Source: Stendarr watch over you.
String.Dest: ステンダールのご加護を

String.Source: Kill their leaders. That should put a stop to a full out war.
String.Dest: 彼らのリーダー達を殺して。それで全面戦争は阻止できるはずよ

String.Source: If the Dawnguard can't stop these vampires, who can?
String.Dest: ドーンガードがこの吸血鬼達を防げなければ、誰ができるの？

String.Source: Where do you expect me to go?
String.Dest: どこに行けばいいのだ？

String.Source: And it all ended with me being locked underground for who knows how long.
String.Dest: そのせいでわたしは、誰も覚えていないほど長く地下に閉じ込められていたわけですし

String.Source: Your kind are a blight upon Tamriel, monster!
String.Dest: お前らはタムリエルの破滅の元凶だ。バケモノめ！

String.Source: Bring me say... twenty-five of them, and you can rummage through what was left on my cart.
String.Dest: あれをそうだな… 25個集めてくれ。そしたら荷馬車に残ってたものをあさってもいいぞ

String.Source: Once enough of the moths are following, they'll provide you with the second sight needed to decipher the scrolls.
String.Dest: 聖蚕が十分集まれば、書の解読に必要な第二の視覚を身につける事ができる

String.Source: Oh thank you, milady. Thank you!
String.Dest: 奥様… ありがとうございます！

String.Source: "Too extreme", they called me. Well, that doesn't seem to have worked out in their favor, now has it?
String.Dest: 彼らは私の事を“考えすぎ”だと言っていたが、バカを見たのはどっちだったろうな

String.Source: The sooner we get out of this place, the better.
String.Dest: できるだけ早くここから出た方がよろしくてよ

String.Source: You still got it, Morven... a salesman even beyond the end.
String.Dest: モルベン、お前はまだ大丈夫だ… 最後の最後まで商売人さ

String.Source: Good luck. I hope you find the answers you seek.
String.Dest: 幸運を祈るよ。答えが見つかるといいな

String.Source: Provided for me? Are you insane?
String.Dest: わたしのため？ 気は確かですの？

String.Source: Soon... soon your blood will be mine...
String.Dest: すぐに… すぐにお前の血は私のものになる…

String.Source: Hyargh!
String.Dest: ハイヤァー！

String.Source: Diil...
String.Dest: ディール…

String.Source: It's not too far, now. At least, I don't think it is. I thought you knew the way?
String.Dest: もうそんなに遠くありませんわ。少なくともわたしの見立てでは。道は分かっておりますわよね？

String.Source: The tower suffered damage in the recent war with the Aldmeri Dominion, and is not what it once was.
String.Dest: 最近のアルドメリ自治領との戦争で損傷を受けたせいで、塔は以前の姿を失ってしまったが

String.Source: Rrrraaaaarrggghhhh!
String.Dest: らああああぐ！

String.Source: Hunh...
String.Dest: うう…

String.Source: Aggghh!
String.Dest: やあああ！

String.Source: Very well, then.
String.Dest: それでは

String.Source: Argh!
String.Dest: あ痛っ！

String.Source: No... my blood is strong...
String.Dest: そんな… 私の血は強いはず…

String.Source: Come on, let's go home.
String.Dest: さあ、帰りましょう

String.Source: Gah...
String.Dest: ぐう…

String.Source: Please, don't be angry with me.
String.Dest: お怒りにならないで下さい

String.Source: Not as much as I would like. Even after spending decades of my life in study of the Elder Scrolls, they remain a great mystery to me.
String.Dest: 望みどおりというわけではないがね。生涯の数十年を星霜の書の研究に費やしたが、まだ分からない事が多すぎる

String.Source: Agh...
String.Dest: ああ…

String.Source: There's no blood here for you.
String.Dest: ここにはお前のぶんの血はないぞ

String.Source: Does the air feel... heavy down here? I'm a little woozy, but it might just be from waking up.
String.Dest: ここの空気… 重く感じませんこと？ 少し頭がぼんやりいたしますわ、寝起きだからかも知れませんけれど

String.Source: Yes. I've kept it safely secured here ever since I was imprisoned.
String.Dest: ええ。ここに幽閉されて以来ずっと、これを守ってきたの

String.Source: I'm trying to put it to good use.
String.Dest: 私は砦を有効に利用しようとしてるんだ

String.Source: Now, make your choice!
String.Dest: さあ、選ぶがいい！

String.Source: You are welcome here... for now.
String.Dest: 歓迎しよう… 今のところはな

String.Source: Lah...Haas!
String.Dest: ラー…ハース！

String.Source: You're damn right I'm interested. Question is, are you selling?
String.Dest: 興味は大ありだとも。問題は、売ってくれるかどうかで

String.Source: Tell you what, you bring me books like this, and I'll pay a thousand gold each. I'll even throw in a translated edition I have for free. Interested?
String.Dest: こんなのはどうだ。この類の本を持って来てくれれば、一冊につき1000ゴールド出そう。しかも翻訳された版をただで差し上げる。どうだ？

String.Source: We may feed again today.
String.Dest: 今日はまた食事にありつける

String.Source: All of the ingredients for our potions came from there. She used to say that my father couldn't stand the place. Too... peaceful.
String.Dest: うちの薬の材料はみんなそこで採ってたの。彼女いわく、父はその場所が大嫌いだったみたい。ちょっと… 和やかすぎるから

String.Source: (Growl)
String.Dest: ウゥーッ…

String.Source: And so you learn the power of the night.
String.Dest: そして夜の力を思い知るがいい

String.Source: You don't think you can escape me, do you?
String.Dest: まさか私から逃げきれると思ってるのか？

String.Source: ...just fed but still hungry... blood... all I can think about these days... last kill was so good... just the right amount of struggle...
String.Dest: …食事を終えたばかりなのに、まだひもじいわ… 近頃は血の事ばかり考えてる… この前の獲物は最高だった… 存分に抵抗してくれたもの…

String.Source: Ambushed by vampires... I certainly wasn't expecting that.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼達に待ち伏せを喰らって… 完全に予測外だったよ

String.Source: Windhelm eh? City of kings, they say. Hope you packed warm though.
String.Dest: ウィンドヘルムかい？ “王の都”と呼ばれる街さ。暖かくしていきなよ

String.Source: I'm glad we found the scroll, but I... I wish she could come with us.
String.Dest: 書が見つかったのは嬉しいですわ、でも… 母にも一緒に来てほしかった

String.Source: Is your... pet keeping you entertained?
String.Dest: お前は… そのペットで満足しているのか？

String.Source: I keep a stable of thralls in the castle should you need to feed like the baser vampires to stave off the sun.
String.Dest: 下々の吸血鬼のように血を吸う事で日の光から身を守りたいのであれば、城に従徒を数名待機させてある

String.Source: Let's move faster. The sun is... it's not great for my skin, if you know what I mean.
String.Dest: 急ぎましょう。太陽は… お肌の大敵ですのよ。分かっているとは思いますけれど

String.Source: Deciphering one of the Elder Scrolls is nothing like reading a simple book. There's quite a bit of ritual and concentration required.
String.Dest: 星霜の書の解読は単なる本読みとは大違いだ。非常に儀式的なものだし、集中力も必要とする

String.Source: Well, looks like some other guests have taken over since my mother left.
String.Dest: なるほど、母がいなくなったあとは、他のお客さんが引き継いだようですのね

String.Source: This isn't that watered down child's power that you simply contract from another vampire. We're pureblood creations of original vampires.
String.Dest: 他の吸血鬼が出せる、子供だましな力とは別物ですの。最初に造られた、純粋な吸血鬼なのですから

String.Source: Nuh...
String.Dest: ぬう…

String.Source: So... this is the place.
String.Dest: すると… ここがそうですのね

String.Source: Awake at last, good.
String.Dest: ようやく目覚めたか

String.Source: Indeed. The day hasn't been won while Harkon still walks Tamriel.
String.Dest: 確かにな。ハルコンがタムリエルの地を歩いている以上、勝利の日は訪れない

String.Source: I'm not sure whether that makes you brave or foolish. What brings you here?
String.Dest: 勇敢なのか向こう見ずなのか分からんな。ここにはどうして？

String.Source: Do so now and we will continue.
String.Dest: 次に進む前に、試してみるといい

String.Source: Without the Hall, the Vigilants need a new rallying point.
String.Dest: 番人の間を失った番人達には、新たな拠点が必要だ

String.Source: If you have a better lead than this, I'm all ears.
String.Dest: もっといい手掛かりを持っているなら、聞いてさしあげてもよくてよ

String.Source: There's nowhere to run. And I'm certainly not moving in with my mother, if that's what your implying.
String.Dest: 逃げる場所などありませんわ。それに母と一緒に引っ越してこいと言いたいのでしたら、それは無理な話ですわね

String.Source: I thought... I hoped that if he saw me, he might feel something again.
String.Dest: わたしの姿を目にすれば、もう一度何かを感じてくれるかも知れないと

String.Source: In this form, you can drain the life from your foes with your right hand.
String.Dest: この姿では右手で敵の生命力を吸い取る事ができる

String.Source: Ever since he decided to make that prophecy his calling, we kind of drifted apart.
String.Dest: あの予言を天命と見なして以来、疎遠になっていきましたわ

String.Source: ...Dawnguard getting to be more than a nuisance... gather some of the hunters... teach them a lesson...
String.Dest: …ドーンガードの奴ら、目障りじゃ済まなくなってきてる… ハンターを集めてるとか… 思い知らせてやらないと…

String.Source: Do not forget the price of your new power. I expect your complete obedience.
String.Dest: この新たな力の代償を忘れるなよ。お前の完全なる忠誠を要求する

String.Source: My family has its problems, but they're our problems.
String.Dest: わたしの家族は問題を抱えておりますけど、あくまで家族の問題ですわ

String.Source: Should you run out of magicka, you can descend to the ground and fight as the beasts do.
String.Dest: マジカが尽きてしまった場合、地面に下りてけだものどもと同様に戦う事もできる

String.Source: I think... mostly I hate what it's done to my family.
String.Dest: 多分… 家族にされた事が、我慢できなかった

String.Source: I was always taught to avoid these types of ruins. I think I see why, now.
String.Dest: こういう廃墟は避けるようにと教わりましたけれど、ようやく理由が分かりましたわ

String.Source: What you probably don't know is that he still grants it to his more impressive followers.
String.Dest: ですが、彼が今でも高位の部下にその力を与えている事は、知らなかったのではなくて？

String.Source: ...still always hungry... there's no prey down in this hole... need to hunt more... all this hiding and skulking around, pah...
String.Dest: …相変わらずいつも腹が減ってる… この穴蔵には獲物がいない… もっと狩らなければ… こそこそ逃げ隠れするのはもううんざりだ…

String.Source: Present the bow to Lord Harkon at once!
String.Dest: すぐにハルコン卿に弓を捧げて！

String.Source: Yes?
String.Dest: はい？

String.Source: We now have Auriel's Bow. The gods themselves have favored us and we must answer with action!
String.Dest: 今や我々はアーリエルの弓を手に入れた。神は我々を選んだのだ。その期待に行動で応えようではないか！

String.Source: ...she said I'd forget, and usually I do, but sometimes... still remember their faces, their pleading...
String.Dest: …どうせ忘れると彼女は言ったわ。大抵はそうだけど… 忘れられない時もある。命乞いをする彼らの顔がね…

String.Source: Fool. You should have run.
String.Dest: 馬鹿だな。逃げればよかったのに

String.Source: I will find you.
String.Dest: 逃がさないぞ

String.Source: We need to strike a crippling blow against them before they muster more men against us.
String.Dest: 奴らが我らに対してより多くの人数を集める前に、大打撃を与えねばならん

String.Source: My blood is potent. At first, the body is overwhelmed by it.
String.Dest: 私の血は強い力を宿している。最初は相手の体を圧倒してしまう

String.Source: Is that all of them?
String.Dest: それで全部？

String.Source: That ends it.
String.Dest: それで終わりだ

String.Source: I have nothing more to say to you.
String.Dest: もう話す事はないよ

String.Source: Aha... and now you die.
String.Dest: そこにいたのか… さあ、覚悟しろ

String.Source: Make it count. This may be the only chance we ever get to use the Forge.
String.Dest: 有効に使って。鋳造器具を使える唯一の機会かも知れない

String.Source: There's something out there.
String.Dest: あそこに何かある

String.Source: But you... take that out into the world. And if anyone asks, tell them what we discovered. Together.
String.Dest: でもあんたは… それを世界へ持ち帰って。そして誰かに聞かれたら、あたし達の発見を伝えてよ

String.Source: There's no use hiding from me.
String.Dest: 隠れても無駄だ

String.Source: Now your blood is mine!
String.Dest: お前の血は私がいただく！
…ふうん…

String.Source: Your kind are finished.
String.Dest: お前たちの種族は終わりよ

String.Source: The Tyranny of the Sun has been broken!
String.Dest: 太陽の専制は打ち破られた！

String.Source: Kill that beast!
String.Dest: あいつを殺して！

String.Source: Go on, get out of here!
String.Dest: さあ、行った行った！

String.Source: This is my hunting ground.
String.Dest: ここは私の狩り場だ

String.Source: And now for the feast.
String.Dest: ここからは宴だ

String.Source: It's not safe out there. Horrible creatures attacking towns in the night... If they won't let me in, at least I can stay here.
String.Dest: 外は安全じゃないわ。恐ろしい生物が夜に街を襲撃する… 中に入れてもらえなくても、ここにはいられるわ

String.Source: To know the complete prophecy, we must have the other two scrolls.
String.Dest: 予言をすべて知るには、残りの2巻の書が必要だな

String.Source: Suit yourself. I'm not going anywhere.
String.Dest: 好きにしてくれ。どこにも行きやしないさ

String.Source: They threw me out, Tolan!
String.Dest: トラン、奴らは私を追い出したんだ！

String.Source: Burn them all!
String.Dest: 焼き尽くせ！

String.Source: I guess... we kind of have to go way back. To the very beginning. Do you know where vampirism came from?
String.Dest: おそらくは… これまでの事を逆向きに、始まりまで辿って行かねばなりませんわね。吸血鬼がどこから来たかご存知？

String.Source: Nargh!
String.Dest: ぬああ！

String.Source: Yes, yes. Always the noble vampire hunter.
String.Dest: ほう、ほう。誇り高き吸血鬼ハンターだな

String.Source: After all these years, Lady Serana's back. Now that's something.
String.Dest: 長年行方不明になっていたセラーナ様が戻ってくるとは。驚いたよ

String.Source: It's the price we pay for openly recruiting. We'll have to step up our defenses.
String.Dest: 誰でも彼でも雇うからこういう事になるんだ。守りを固めないとまずい

String.Source: I won't beg for protection, but I'm not even sure that would work with this Isran.
String.Dest: 守ってもらおうと懇願するつもりはないが、したとしてもイスランとやらには通用するだろうか？

String.Source: Rrarggh!
String.Dest: うらああ！

String.Source: Let's not revisit that.
String.Dest: 思い出したくもありませんの

String.Source: Good luck out there. Hopefully I'll see you again soon.
String.Dest: 幸運をお祈りしますわ。またお会いできますよう

String.Source: They didn't think Skyrim has a vampire problem, and I did.
String.Dest: 私はスカイリムが吸血鬼の脅威にさらされていると考えた。連中は違った

String.Source: Kind of fitting that the Vigilants would be wiped out by vampires.
String.Dest: 番人らが吸血鬼によって壊滅させられたのは、然るべき皮肉に思えてしまう

String.Source: You've been given a great gift. Do not squander it.
String.Dest: 大いなる恩恵を受けた以上、有意義に使うのだぞ

String.Source: I'm sure Lord Harkon will be most pleased with your efforts. Find him at once.
String.Dest: 君の働きぶりをハルコン卿もきっと喜ぶだろう。今すぐ彼に会うといい

String.Source: You're no match for me, fledgling.
String.Dest: お前みたいなひよっこ、敵じゃない

String.Source: I hope Alvide doesn't think less of me, but I can't protect her on my own. We're safer here.
String.Dest: アルヴァイドに見くびられたくはないが、自分一人じゃ彼女を守りきれない。ここにいる方が安全だ

String.Source: What can I do for you?
String.Dest: ご用は何だい？

String.Source: These things are everywhere, aren't they?
String.Dest: これってどこにでもありますのね

String.Source: You disappoint me, Serana. You've taken everything I provided for you and thrown it all away for this... pathetic half-breed vampire.
String.Dest: 失望したぞ、セラーナ。私がお前に与えたもののすべてを投げ捨てたというのか、この情けない半吸血鬼のために

String.Source: Totally unprepared for any real threat. And yet I was the one ridiculed for trying to be ready for anything.
String.Dest: 本物の脅威という奴にまったく備えがなかった。そして私は何かに備えようとして、周りから笑われたんだよ

String.Source: I hope we can go home soon. I don't like it here.
String.Dest: 早く家に帰れるといいけど。ここは嫌いよ

String.Source: I don't think he even sees me as his daughter anymore. I'm just... a means to an end.
String.Dest: 父はもうわたしの事を娘とは思っておりませんわ。わたしはただの… 道具にすぎませんのよ

String.Source: Thought I'd come here to be safe. Now they won't so much as let us in.
String.Dest: 安全を求めてここに来たというのに、入れてすらもらえないなんて

String.Source: Very funny.
String.Dest: 面白いね

String.Source: I have kept my end of the bargain, now I expect you to keep yours.
String.Dest: 私は約束を果たした、今度はお前の番だ

String.Source: I'll drink you dry, mortal!
String.Dest: 一滴残らず血を吸ってやる！

String.Source: You've seen your last dawn. I bring the night.
String.Dest: 二度と日の出を見ることはないぞ。私が夜をもたらすからな

String.Source: Good.
String.Dest: いい返事だ

String.Source: Well, well. I haven't seen one of these beauties in a long time. A rare find in the original falmer language.
String.Dest: これはこれは。目にするのはずいぶん久しぶりだな、この種の掘り出し物は。ファルメルの原語で書かれた、珍しい一品だ

String.Source: So far this hasn't been too bad. Gets lonely exploring by myself, though.
String.Dest: これまでのところ、そんなに悪くありませんわね。独りで探索してると寂しくなりますけれど

String.Source: Maybe he knows what's going on.
String.Dest: 彼なら、この状況を理解しているかも知れませんわ

String.Source: But what of Serana? Can she be trusted to lift a blade against her own kind? Her own family?
String.Dest: だがセラーナは？ 本当に彼女は自分と同じ種族に、ひいては自分の家族に剣を向ける事ができるのか？

String.Source: If you think I'm going to let you have all the fun, you're crazy. I'll let you lead ahead, but I'll be keeping an eye on you.
String.Dest: 楽しみを独り占めできると思っておいでなら、酔狂にもほどがありますわ。先に行かせてさしあげますけど、ちゃんと見ておりますわよ

String.Source: How does it feel to hold the fate of the vampire in your grasp. Exhilarating, isn't it?
String.Dest: 吸血鬼の命運をその手に握った今、さぞかし気分がいいだろう？

String.Source: Aren't we there yet?
String.Dest: まだ着きませんの？

String.Source: Ah, of course. The prophecy. You've come here to stop me from taking Auriel's Bow and shrouding the world in darkness.
String.Dest: ああなるほど、予言か。私がアーリエルの弓を手にし、この世を闇で覆ってしまうのを止めに来たのだな？

String.Source: If we head back to the castle and kick the front door in, we're going to be knee-deep in his friends.
String.Dest: 城に戻ってドアを蹴破って中に入りましたら、彼の友達が大勢でお出迎えして下さるのでしょうね

String.Source: I disagree.
String.Dest: 賛成できかねますわ

String.Source: Land on the ground, and I will have more to teach you.
String.Dest: 地面に下りろ。さらに説明してやる

String.Source: Tell me what you're looking for and maybe we can make a deal... if you have the husks.
String.Dest: ほしいものがあるなら取引しよう… ハスクとね

String.Source: So, you've returned.
String.Dest: ほう、戻ったのか

String.Source: Transform into the Vampire Lord, and I will teach you more.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼の王の姿になれ。さらに説明しよう

String.Source: It's definitely been a bad thing, on the whole.
String.Dest: すべてが最悪でしたわ

String.Source: I'm afraid I won't be able to help you with the scrolls any longer, milady.
String.Dest: 奥様、書の件に関してはもうお手伝いできそうにありません

String.Source: Come on then, we haven't got all day!
String.Dest: 早くしろ、ぐずぐずするな！

String.Source: The vampire is eternal, and with immortality comes the revelation that these bonds never endure... it's fleeting, momentary at best.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼とは永遠の存在であり、不死の身にはそのような絆が決して永続しないという悟りが伴うものだ。よくて束の間の、一瞬の事

String.Source: Thank you. Somehow I knew you'd understand.
String.Dest: ありがとう。あなたなら分かってくれるとなんとなく思っておりましたわ

String.Source: A cure? Why even think of it that way?
String.Dest: 治療法？ どうしてそのような事を？

String.Source: Are you out of your mind?
String.Dest: 酔狂にもほどがありましてよ？

String.Source: By the Eight...
String.Dest: なんて事だ、八大神よ…

String.Source: Ah, if only your traitor mother were here, I would let her watch this reunion before putting her head on a spike.
String.Dest: 私を裏切ったお前の母親がこの場にいれば、この再会を見せてやったうえで頭から串刺しにしてやるのだが…

String.Source: The sun cannot protect you any more!
String.Dest: 太陽はもうお前たちを守れない！

String.Source: They've holed up in an abandoned fort in the Reach.
String.Dest: 彼らはリーチにある廃墟と化した砦に潜伏した

String.Source: I'm a little nervous about all of this.
String.Dest: こういう事に、ちょっと神経質になっておりますの

String.Source: Find Lord Harkon. Let him know the time of the prophecy is at hand.
String.Dest: ハルコン卿を見つけろ。予言の時が間近だと知らせるのだ

String.Source: Our Lord will be most pleased, I'm sure. I knew you could do it.
String.Dest: 我らが王もきっとお喜びになるに違いない。あんたならやってくれると思ってたよ

String.Source: All of Skyrim will tremble before us.
String.Dest: スカイリム全土が我らに恐怖するだろう

String.Source: You're mine, mortal!
String.Dest: お前は私のものだ！

String.Source: Gah... let's clear out this steam so we can take a look.
String.Dest: ゴホ… この蒸気を払って、見てみようか

String.Source: What's that? I can feel some kind of power from it...
String.Dest: あれは何ですの？ ある種の力を感じますわ…

String.Source: That took longer than usual. How deep are we?
String.Dest: 普通より長くかかったね。どれだけ深いのかな？

String.Source: I've been thinking about this for a long time.
String.Dest: この事はずっと考えておりましたわ

String.Source: You'll have shown yourself to be strong, which means you can't be allowed to just stick around.
String.Dest: あなたは自分の強さを証明したから、そばに置いておくには危険になった

String.Source: Not until we have the bow. But... you're right.
String.Dest: 弓を手に入れた後の話ですわ。でも… そうですわね

String.Source: May Auri-El light your path.
String.Dest: アーリエルの導きを

String.Source: "The Winking Skeever." Charming name.
String.Dest: “ウィンキング・スキーヴァー”。チャーミングな名前ですわね

String.Source: The world is alive, and so am I, for once.
String.Dest: 世界もわたしも、今は生命に溢れているみたい

String.Source: You wouldn't like it.
String.Dest: …これでも冗談のつもりでしたのよ

String.Source: Suit yourself.
String.Dest: どうぞよしなに

String.Source: Good. You deserve that much.
String.Dest: よかった。あなたのためなら喜んで

String.Source: How are your friends?
String.Dest: やあ、ごきげんいかがかな？

String.Source: That's it. That's the last scroll.
String.Dest: それですわ。それが最後の書ですのよ

String.Source: Welcome, Initiate. This is the Wayshrine of Sight.
String.Dest: ようこそ、入信者よ。ここは物見の祠だ

String.Source: I figured it would be more of an issue for you.
String.Dest: むしろ、あなたの方が問題だと思っておりましたわ

String.Source: What trickery is this?
String.Dest: 何の茶番だこれは？

String.Source: I should have killed you and your mother long ago!
String.Dest: 母親共々、はるか昔に殺すべきだった！

String.Source: Another one of those things. Let's keep our distance.
String.Dest: また同じのですわ。距離を保って

String.Source: I'm getting there. Making my peace with it.
String.Dest: もう少しですのよ。そうなれば、悩まなくて済むようになりますわ

String.Source: That makes sense.
String.Dest: それなら分かりますわ

String.Source: That many fewer vampires to worry about. Good work.
String.Dest: これで吸血鬼どもがだいぶ減ったな。よくやった

String.Source: Really?
String.Dest: 本当？

String.Source: We'd be honored to have you join us.
String.Dest: 君が協力してくれたら光栄だよ

String.Source: Do you get lonely?
String.Dest: 孤独を感じる事はありまして？

String.Source: They won't respond to you in any way other than believing that you're an Initiate and you're undertaking the journey to the Inner Sanctum.
String.Dest: 彼らは最奥聖域を目指す新人の巡礼以外には、何の反応も示さない

String.Source: Through the grace of Auri-El, they were restored to their spectral form to enable them to continue their duties.
String.Dest: アーリエルの栄光によって精霊として蘇り、今も使命を果たしている

String.Source: Of course. You're here for Auriel's Bow. Why else would you be here?
String.Dest: 分かっている。アーリエルの弓が目当てだとな。でなければ、こんな所まで来ないだろう

String.Source: Of course he will.
String.Dest: もちろん、そうですわね

String.Source: You're a good daughter.
String.Dest: あなたはいい娘ですわ

String.Source: I've... never heard of him. Is he well supported?
String.Dest: その名は… 初耳ですわね。人望があるのかしら？

String.Source: First you die, then Serana suffers!
String.Dest: お前を殺し、セラーナには苦しみを味わわせてやる！

String.Source: It's not like anything else in Skyrim, I can tell you that much. From now or... before.
String.Dest: スカイリムのどんなものとも趣が異なりますわ。それだけは確かですわね。今も… 昔も

String.Source: I'd also like to not have to smell troll all the time.
String.Dest: それに、ずっとトロールの悪臭をかぐのも嫌だし

String.Source: You'll pay for your insolence!
String.Dest: 思い知らせてやる！

String.Source: It is.
String.Dest: そうですわ

String.Source: The story they'd like you to believe is that they were such a noble bunch, doing the honorable thing and saving lives.
String.Dest: 彼らは自分達が高貴で、誇りに満ちた行いをし、人々の命を救う者達だと信じさせようとする

String.Source: They increase the abilities of your vampiric powers.
String.Dest: 君の吸血鬼としての力を高めてくれるんだ

String.Source: So, the beast is destroyed.
String.Dest: そうか、バケモノは始末したか

String.Source: Farewell, and good journey milord.
String.Dest: では旦那様、よい旅を

String.Source: Cyrodiil is the seat of an empire?
String.Dest: シロディールに帝国が？

String.Source: Once there was a group dedicated to a similar cause. They called themselves the Dawnguard.
String.Dest: 以前はそのような大義で活動する集団が存在していた。彼らは自分達をドーンガードと呼んでいた

String.Source: Why the trolls, of course! You seem to have quite a way with them.
String.Dest: だいたい、なんでまたトロールなんだ！ どうやら、連中の扱いを心得てるらしいが

String.Source: Find their leader and kill him!
String.Dest: 首謀者を探し出して殺すのよ！

String.Source: I know you do, but this is something I need to do alone.
String.Dest: 分かっておりますのよ、けれどもこれは一人でやらなくてはいけない事なのです

String.Source: Vampires need to be dealt with. Hunted, rooted out, destroyed.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼とは対決すべきだ。見つけ出して、根絶しなければならない

String.Source: Yeah.
String.Dest: ですわね

String.Source: Want to head out there and collect some more?
String.Dest: 他の図面も探してきてくれる気はない？

String.Source: I'll probably stay here, for as long as they'll let me.
String.Dest: 追い出されない限りは、ずっとここにいると思いますわ

String.Source: No, they didn't. But that's why I like being out here with you.
String.Dest: それはございませんわ。あなたと一緒に出掛けるのは好きですもの

String.Source: You can't stop the prophecy!
String.Dest: 予言を止められると思うな！

String.Source: I understand what you did for Serana and for me, but the prophecy never sat well for me, and I don't want to be a part of it. I'm sorry.
String.Dest: セラーナと私のためにしてくれた事は承知よ。でもお告げには決して納得いかないし、かかわりたくもない。ごめんなさいね

String.Source: Run, coward! Run back to the filthy Dawnguard!
String.Dest: 逃げるがいい、臆病者め！ 汚らわしいドーンガードのところまで！

String.Source: Wound up turning into a vampire. The Jarl, unable to kill his own son, spent a fortune building this keep and hiring men to guard it.
String.Dest: 息子は結局吸血鬼になった。首長は我が子を殺す事ができず、大金をはたいてこの砦を築き、守りを固めるために人を雇った

String.Source: The first lay at the end of Darkfall Passage, a cavern that represents the absence of enlightenment.
String.Dest: ダークフォール洞窟の闇が無知の象徴とするなら、さながらその出口で最初に差し込む光だ

String.Source: I'm no so easily coerced. I've got my eye on you. Try anything, and you will be the one who regrets it.
String.Dest: 脅迫は無駄だ。隙は見せない。変な真似をしたら、後悔することになるぞ

String.Source: I'm doing my best to not think of him as my father anymore.
String.Dest: 彼はもう父親ではない、そう思うので精一杯ですのよ

String.Source: Anything good?
String.Dest: いいものはありまして？

String.Source: This won't be easy. But we can handle it.
String.Dest: 簡単ではなくてよ。けれどもわたし達ならやれますわ

String.Source: Just... try to make it quick.
String.Dest: ええ… 早く終わらせて下さいましね

String.Source: Ready for more? I certainly am.
String.Dest: 次を探してきてくれる？ 待ちきれないわ

String.Source: Go to Morthal and find Falion. He's the only one I know of in Skyrim that can cure vampirism.
String.Dest: モーサルに行ってファリオンに会うんだ。それを治せるのは、スカイリムでおそらく彼だけだろう

String.Source: When I find you, I'm going to gut you like a deer and feast upon you blood!
String.Dest: 見つけたら鹿のようにはらわたを裂き、血をすすってやろう！

String.Source: A little bit. That's... one of the reasons I wanted to come with you.
String.Dest: 少しは。それも… あなたについてきた理由の1つですわ

String.Source: He won't need either of us anymore.
String.Dest: 父にとって、わたし達はもはや用済みなのですわ

String.Source: The more you fight me, the more you will suffer, mortal.
String.Dest: 抗えば抗うほど苦しみは続くのだぞ

String.Source: I've never seen leaves this color.
String.Dest: こんな色の葉は見た事がありませんわ

String.Source: (Bark)
String.Dest: ワン！

String.Source: Ugh. The smell here... let's try to handle this quickly.
String.Dest: うっ。ここの臭いときたら… 手早く済ませてしまいましょう

String.Source: That's too bad. Do you know how they're doing now?
String.Dest: 残念ですわね。今どうしてるかお分かりには？

String.Source: What a curious city. It's so... open.
String.Dest: すこぶる面白い街ですわね。なんというかすごく… あけっぴろげですわ

String.Source: Good thing we stopped that prophecy, huh?
String.Dest: あの予言が成就するのを阻止できてよかったわね

String.Source: Hold it! He's the one Tolan mentioned.
String.Dest: 待て！ あれはトランが言ってた奴だ

String.Source: Are there... people in your life?
String.Dest: 今まで、あなたの周りに… 仲間はおりましたの？

String.Source: They belong among our kind, not gathering mold in some vagabond's treasure pile.
String.Dest: 我々の同族が所有してるんだ。放浪人の宝の山の中でカビを生やしたりなどしてないよ

String.Source: I've located more dwemer plans.
String.Dest: 新しいドゥーマーの図面のある場所が分かったの

String.Source: Arkay says we're going to win this. Well, probably.
String.Dest: アーケイは、この戦いが勝利に終わると言ってる。多分な

String.Source: Right behind you.
String.Dest: 後ろですわ

String.Source: It'll be good to get out of the sun for a while.
String.Dest: しばらく陽光から逃れるのもいいですわね

String.Source: You've served us all well, friend.
String.Dest: 私達皆に尽くしてくれたわ

String.Source: I've been trying to make my peace with it.
String.Dest: そう思う事で、安心したかったのでしょうね

String.Source: Last I knew he was out scouring Skyrim for more beasts to tame.
String.Dest: 最後に消息を聞いた時は、飼い慣らす野獣をさらに求めてスカイリムを探索していたとの事だ

String.Source: Not going to happen.
String.Dest: あり得ませんわね

String.Source: Die, traitor!
String.Dest: 死ね、裏切り者め！

String.Source: If you can manage that, the Dawnguard still may have use for you.
String.Dest: 君がその件に対処できたら、ドーンガードは君をまだ見捨てないかも知れない

String.Source: I serve my master's will.
String.Dest: 主様の仰せのとおりに

String.Source: Be careful with those crystals. They feel... hungry.
String.Dest: そういうクリスタルには注意なさって。どれも… お腹をすかせてますのよ

String.Source: What is it?
String.Dest: 何だ？

String.Source: If you think it'll help.
String.Dest: それは役に立つと思いますわ

String.Source: I had expected Ysgramor's city to be... bigger.
String.Dest: イスグラモルの都はもっとその… 大きいと思っていましたのよ

String.Source: So, the deed has been done. My brother is dead.
String.Dest: 為すべき事は為され、我が兄弟は死んだ

String.Source: Just... leave me alone for now. I'll be fine.
String.Dest: 今は… そっとしておいて下されば。わたしは大丈夫ですわ

String.Source: I think you'll need to find some arrows, first. Only elven ones will work for this, remember?
String.Dest: まずは矢を見つけないといけませんわ。使えるのはエルフの矢だけですわよ、覚えてまして？

String.Source: They're trolls. They smell like trolls. I can't help that either.
String.Dest: トロールだよ。トロールの臭いがする。どうしようもない

String.Source: I'd like to be able to make a potion without tasting iron flakes, you know?
String.Dest: ポーションは作りたいが、鉄の粉が口に入るのは嫌なんだよ。へへ、わかるだろう？

String.Source: Here's the location of the next set of Dwemer diagrams. Thanks!
String.Dest: 次のドゥーマーの図面がある場所はここよ。お願いね！

String.Source: Since you could've attacked me before now, I'm going to assume this was a little accident on your part.
String.Dest: これまで君には私を襲う機会があったのだから、今回の件はちょっとした事故だと思っておく

String.Source: But not me! I knew it all along!
String.Dest: だが、俺は違う！ ずっと信じていた！

String.Source: The only way to get to my brother is by following in the Initiates' footsteps and traveling from wayshrine to wayshrine just as they did.
String.Dest: 我が兄弟に会いたいなら、新人達と同じ道をたどり、祠から祠へと渡り歩くしかない

String.Source: You deserve to be happy.
String.Dest: あなたはもっと幸せになるべきですわ

String.Source: Oh. I didn't even know. What kind of woman is she?
String.Dest: あら、存じませんでしたわ。どんな奥様なのかしら？

String.Source: Arvak!
String.Dest: アルヴァク！

String.Source: Don't tell me you're that naive.
String.Dest: まさか本気で信じておりませんわよね

String.Source: A basic one? Of course. That is, assuming you know anything about steel smithing. It's pretty simple.
String.Dest: 基本的なもの？ もちろん。この通り、鍛冶を少しでも知っているなら。簡単よ

String.Source: You brought that up before... I think I was a little short with you.
String.Dest: 前にもこの話をしましたね… わたし、ちょっと無愛想すぎでしたかしら

String.Source: Let's make some more stories.
String.Dest: わたし達の物語を紡ぎましょう

String.Source: (Panting)
String.Dest: ハッ、ハッ、ハッ、ハッ、ハッ

String.Source: Back in the Second Era, the Jarl of Riften had a son. Adventurous type, too much for his own good it seems.
String.Dest: 第二紀の時代、リフテンの首長には息子が一人いた。冒険好きで危険をかえりみない性格だった

String.Source: Come on, the bow has to be in this valley somewhere.
String.Dest: さあ行きましょう。弓はこの谷のどこかにあるはずですわ

String.Source: I'm afraid in their current form, they still believe the Chantry to be an active center of worship.
String.Dest: 気の毒な姿になってしまっているが、彼らは今もこの礼拝所が聖地だと信じている

String.Source: Are you prepared to honor the mantras of Auri-El and fill your vessel with His enlightenment?
String.Dest: アーリエルの真言を受ける光栄に浴し、その水差しを悟りの水で満たすか？

String.Source: Auriel's Bow will be mine!
String.Dest: アーリエルの弓は私のものだ！

String.Source: Is that what passes for security with your lot? I can't say that I'm feeling any more confident.
String.Dest: あれがあなた達にとっての用心ですの？ これ以上に自信が湧いてくる話もありませんわね

String.Source: Oh. All right, then.
String.Dest: あら。でしたら構いませんわ

String.Source: I know how that feels. I mean... I know it isn't the same thing. But I was a pretty lonely child, myself.
String.Dest: その気持ち、分かりますわ。もちろん… 同じだという気はございませんの。ただわたしも寂しい子供時代でしたから

String.Source: This better not be all the things you just can't be bothered with.
String.Dest: この件が、あなたの手に負えるといいのですが

String.Source: All right, then. Hold still.
String.Dest: なら構いませんわね。じっとしてて

String.Source: I need you to kill Arch-Curate Vyrthur... my brother.
String.Dest: 兄弟を… 最高司祭のヴィルスールを殺してほしい

String.Source: May Auri-El watch over you.
String.Dest: アーリエルの加護があらん事を

String.Source: Well, I guess now you have one more.
String.Dest: でも、今はもう1つありましてよ

String.Source: Are you sure that's something you want? This isn't like picking out a new outfit. You'll be a creature of the night, like me.
String.Dest: 本気ですの？ 新しい装備品を選ぶのとはわけが違いますわ。夜の申し子になりますのよ、わたしみたいに

String.Source: Wait, stop! I yield!
String.Dest: おい、やめてくれ！ 降参だ！

String.Source: Heard they'd go on midnight raids, pillaging and looting, and then stash the spoils somewhere, guarded by their sigil.
String.Dest: 連中は真夜中に民家を襲い、盗みや略奪を働くそうだ。戦利品はどこかに隠して、印で守っていると聞いた

String.Source: Oh... damn it...
String.Dest: ああ… 何て事ですの…

String.Source: I've discovered the whereabouts of one of the ancient Rings of Blood Magic.
String.Dest: 太古の血の魔法の指輪のひとつがどこにあるか分かったぞ

String.Source: I've been sworn to protect this vale and everything it represents until I die.
String.Dest: 命が尽きるまで、この峡谷とここにまつわるすべてを守り抜かねばならない

String.Source: Lead on.
String.Dest: 案内して下さいましね

String.Source: Well, I think it's time I got back to my work as an alchemist.
String.Dest: さて、錬金術師としての仕事に戻る時が来たようね

String.Source: Stay on your guard.
String.Dest: 油断禁物ですわよ

String.Source: Ugh. I thought this place was supposed to be secret?
String.Dest: この場所は秘密じゃなかったのか？

String.Source: I don't know how you do it, getting them into that pen and putting armor on them. A very special relationship, clearly.
String.Dest: あいつらをどうやって小屋に集めて、防具を着けさせるんだ？ 特別な関係を結んでる事は確かだな

String.Source: Anyway, my mother and I didn't feel like inviting a war with all of Tamriel, so we tried to stop him. That's why I was sealed away with the Scroll.
String.Dest: とにかく、母とわたしは全タムリエルとの戦争を引き起こす気にはなれず、止めようとしたのです。だからこそ星霜の書と共に埋められていたのですわ

String.Source: How can I help?
String.Dest: 何かできる事はあるか？

String.Source: I'll see you soon.
String.Dest: また会いましょう

String.Source: Die, mortal!
String.Dest: 死ね、定命の者め！

String.Source: I've always been fascinated with Dwemer artifacts. I take them apart, poke around in their guts, and try to figure things out - with mixed results.
String.Dest: ドゥーマーの造った物には、いつも驚かされるわ。分解して、中の部品をいじり回して調べるんだけど、うまく理解できる事ばかりじゃないの

String.Source: Shall we continue the fight?
String.Dest: これからも戦いを続けようじゃないか

String.Source: How do we do that?
String.Dest: どうやってやるの？

String.Source: I'll be waiting.
String.Dest: 待っているぞ

String.Source: Arvak! Arvak, where are you? Arvak, please come back! Come back!
String.Dest: アルヴァク！ どこにいるんだ？ アルヴァク、頼むから戻ってきてくれ！

String.Source: The bow has to be in here.
String.Dest: きっと弓はここにありましてよ

String.Source: I'm no fan of the sun, but it would be better than this.
String.Dest: 太陽は好きではありませんけれど、これよりはマシなはずですわ

String.Source: I can tell this is important to you. Would you... do you want me to be just a normal human?
String.Dest: 大事な話をいたしますわ。あなたはわたしを… わたしに、普通の人間になってほしい？

String.Source: My congratulations on defeating Harkon. Clearly, you are the superior vampire.
String.Dest: ハルコンへの勝利を祝福する。紛れもなく、お前は優れた吸血鬼だ

String.Source: They should be among our kind, not laying about unguarded for mortals to find.
String.Dest: 我々の同族が所有してるんだ。定命の者達の目につかないようにしっかり保管されているよ

String.Source: I'm proud of what we've managed to accomplish.
String.Dest: これは偉大な行いよ。誇りに思うわ

String.Source: I can help you get it, but first I must have your assistance.
String.Dest: あれを手に入れたいなら協力してもいいが、その前に手を貸してほしい

String.Source: Deep inside, it brings me joy that the Betrayed weren't to blame for what happened here.
String.Dest: 内心、ここで起こった事が裏切られし者の仕業ではないと知って嬉しいのだ

String.Source: Yeah. Is it just you, or do you have... people in your life?
String.Dest: そうですわ。あなたは一人で生きてきましたの？ それとも、誰かが周りにいた？

String.Source: At that point, you'll have given him everything he's ever wanted.
String.Dest: その時点で、あなたは父のほしい物をすべて渡す事になりましてよ

String.Source: I don't like the look of this...
String.Dest: 見た感じが気に入りませんわ…

String.Source: (Growl)
String.Dest: ウゥーッ…

String.Source: Even with these vampires gone, the fight isn't completely over. Once we're settled back in at the fort, there will be more work to do.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼どもがいなくなっても戦いは続く。砦に戻ったら、仕事が山ほど待っているぞ
