String.Source: You are the new Master; we bow to your power. A power which, I note, includes Auriel's Bow.
String.Dest: お前を新たなマスターに迎え、その力に従おう。アーリエルの弓を含む、その力に

String.Source: Oh. I didn't even know. What kind of man is he?
String.Dest: あら、存じませんでしたわ。どんな旦那様なのかしら？

String.Source: I feel nothing but sympathy for the Betrayed, despite my actions against them.
String.Dest: 裏切られし者に対する気持ちは同情しかない。行動からは想像つかないだろうがな

String.Source: So, if you'd be a dear and collect those plans for me?
String.Dest: その図面を持ってきてもらえたら、助かるんだけど？

String.Source: I'll rip the Dawnguard apart!
String.Dest: ドーンガードなど八つ裂きにしてくれる！

String.Source: The twisted forms you've seen didn't occur overnight. It isn't a plague or a disease that ravaged our species.
String.Dest: お前達が目にする邪悪な姿は、突然現れたわけではない。あれは我が種族を蝕む伝染病のようなものだ

String.Source: I'll drain the life from you!
String.Dest: 命を吸い取ってやる！

String.Source: It should be among our kind, not laying about unguarded for mortals to find.
String.Dest: 我々の同族が所有してるんだ。定命の者達の目につかないようにしっかり保管されているよ

String.Source: I can't say it surprises me. I kind of figured we were heading for this some day.
String.Dest: 別段、不思議な事ではありませんわ。いつかはこうなると思っておりましたもの

String.Source: I'm not sure what they did to this Moth Priest, but he doesn't look right.
String.Dest: 連中がこの聖蚕の僧侶に何をしたか知らないが、どうも大丈夫じゃなさそうだぞ

String.Source: So be it!
String.Dest: ならば！

String.Source: If a line of communication could be established with them, maybe they can find peace.
String.Dest: 彼らとの交流手段が確保できれば、平和な関係が結べるかも知れない

String.Source: Perhaps they'll never return to their former appearance, but over the centuries, I've noticed a rise in their intellect.
String.Dest: 元の姿には戻れないかも知れないが、何世紀もの間に彼らの知性が確かに高まってきているのを感じる

String.Source: All right, let's see what you have.
String.Dest: さて、何がありますかしら

String.Source: Why don't you keep your things, and I'll keep mine.
String.Dest: あなたは自分の荷物をお持ちになって。わたしもそういたしますわ

String.Source: I think we can rebuild here. Make my family's legacy something more respectable.
String.Dest: 新しい家を建ててもいいですわね。家族の残したものを、もっと立派にするためにも

String.Source: I don't think that's something you want. You're a little... I just don't think you're the type.
String.Dest: それは望まぬ方が良いと思いますわ。あなたはちょっと… そのような感じではありませんもの

String.Source: May Auri-El's light guide you in your darkest hours.
String.Dest: 苦難の時も、アーリエルの光の導きがあらん事を

String.Source: They're ghosts of the snow elf priests that tended the wayshrines before being slaughtered by the Betrayed.
String.Dest: 裏切られし者に殺されるその時まで、祠を守っていたスノーエルフの魂だ

String.Source: They're respectable fighters, and I think they see the benefits of having a vampire on their side, now.
String.Dest: 尊敬できる戦士達ですし、今は味方に吸血鬼がいる利点もご存知のはずですわ

String.Source: They swept into the Chantry without warning and began killing everyone without pause.
String.Dest: 奴らは何の前触れもなく礼拝所に押し入り、そこにいた者を手当たり次第に殺していった

String.Source: Very supportive.
String.Dest: 協力的ですのね

String.Source: Let's get back to work.
String.Dest: さあ、仕事に戻りましょう

String.Source: While I doubt we'll ever be truly rid of vampires in Skyrim, you've certainly made it a much safer place for now.
String.Dest: スカイリムからすべての吸血鬼を駆逐できるとは思えないけど、今までの活躍でかなり危険は減ったと思うわ

String.Source: Need something?
String.Dest: 何か探してるのかい？

String.Source: We'll make sure there's nothing left of them.
String.Dest: 毛筋一つたりとも残さず片づけてやる

String.Source: We have Auriel's Bow. We can't lose... right?
String.Dest: 私達はアーリエルの弓を持ってる。失うわけにはいかない… 分かった？

String.Source: I'm as ready as I can be.
String.Dest: 自分なりに覚悟はできてる

String.Source: The trolls will serve us well, I think.
String.Dest: トロールらが役立ちそうだな

String.Source: I'll see you again. Soon.
String.Dest: また、近いうちに会いましょう

String.Source: It's time to end this.
String.Dest: 今こそ終わらせる時よ

String.Source: I could see through my eyes, but I could not control my actions.
String.Dest: 状況は理解してたけど、体が勝手に動いたんだよ

String.Source: How dare you disobey me!
String.Dest: 私に逆らうとは！

String.Source: I can see that. This has been my life for a long time, though. Do you understand that much?
String.Dest: 承知しておりますわ。ですが、ずっとこうして生きてきましたの。それを分かっていまして？

String.Source: Destroy every last one of them!
String.Dest: 一匹残らず倒すんだ！

String.Source: Must... resist...
String.Dest: 抵抗… しなければ…

String.Source: We're done with this when none of them are left standing. Let's go.
String.Dest: 奴らを根絶やしにして初めてこの件は片づいたと言えるんだ。行くぞ

String.Source: Kill their leader before it has a chance to escape!
String.Dest: リーダーを殺すのよ、逃げる機会を与えちゃ駄目！

String.Source: We'll secure the castle. You just get to their master!
String.Dest: 城の安全を確保する。あんたは彼らの主人のもとに行くんだ！

String.Source: Arkay and I will take care of the little ones! You find the leader!
String.Dest: 雑魚はアーケイと俺が引き受ける！ お前はリーダーを探せ！

String.Source: It's fine, it can just be kind of a sore subject.
String.Dest: 構いませんわ、嫌な話なのは、自分で分かっておりますの

String.Source: Me too.
String.Dest: わたしも

String.Source: For the Dawnguard! For Skyrim!
String.Dest: ドーンガード万歳！ スカイリム万歳！

String.Source: Let me address the Dawnguard, and then we'll be off. The men deserve to know that we've finally gained the upper hand.
String.Dest: ドーンガードに話をさせてくれ。それから出発だ。我々がついに有利な状況に立った事を知る権利が彼らにはある

String.Source: (Bark)
String.Dest: ワン！

String.Source: I suppose that's as much as I can hope for.
String.Dest: それがせめてもの願いだ

String.Source: Let's move.
String.Dest: 行きましょう

String.Source: From the castle, you used to just be able to see Solitude over the mountains. It's exactly what I imagined.
String.Dest: お城からは山並みの向こうにソリチュードが見えましたのよ。あの頃に思い描いていた通りの街ですわ

String.Source: Oh, I'm sorry. Didn't mean to bring up a bad memory.
String.Dest: ああ、ごめんなさい。嫌な事を思い出させるつもりはありませんでしたの

String.Source: Good luck out there.
String.Dest: 幸運を祈りますわ

String.Source: Who are the contenders?
String.Dest: 候補者は誰なのかしら？

String.Source: Keep your guard up.
String.Dest: 気を抜かないことね

String.Source: It's like the world is alive again. Just like me.
String.Dest: わたしと一緒に、世界にも生命が戻ったような思いですわ

String.Source: I knew you'd miss me.
String.Dest: わたしでなければダメだと分かっておりましたのよ

String.Source: I used to help my mother tend a garden in the courtyard here.
String.Dest: 母がここの中庭の庭園を世話するのをよく手伝いましたわ

String.Source: I think I'll hang on to my things, thank you.
String.Dest: 自分の物は自分で持ちますわ。ありがとう

String.Source: Rocks and valley, crevices and hiding places. This is the kind of place where hermits and fanatics dwell.
String.Dest: 岩がちな谷間と、裂け目だらけで身をひそめる場所に事欠かない地形。世捨て人や狂信者が住むにはうってつけの場所ですわね

String.Source: This place makes me a little uneasy.
String.Dest: ここにいると少し落ち着かない気分になりますわね

String.Source: I'm okay with the dark, but I've spent more than my share of time in caves already.
String.Dest: 暗いのは平気ですけれど、洞窟にはもう飽き飽きしておりますのよ

String.Source: This land feels... twisted. I'm surprised my father didn't want to live out here.
String.Dest: ここはなんだか… ゆがんだ感じがいたしますわ。父がここに住みたがらなかったのは驚きですわね

String.Source: I am but your humble servant, milady.
String.Dest: 奥様、私はあなたの忠実なしもべです

String.Source: Yes, how may I serve you, milady?
String.Dest: 奥様、ご用は何ですか？

String.Source: They used to call Windhelm, "the City of Kings." In my books, anyway.
String.Dest: ウィンドヘルムは“王の都”と呼ばれておりましたのよ。本にはそう書いてありましたわ

String.Source: It's been a long time since I felt that way and it's been long overdue. My thanks, to both of you.
String.Dest: 昔から思っていた事だが、長らく実現する気配もなかった。お前達に感謝しないとな

String.Source: Glad to see you've taken care of your little problem, and kept it from becoming my problem.
String.Dest: 君が自分の問題に対処できた事と、それが私に飛び火しなかった事をうれしく思うよ

String.Source: This must be that beautiful Skyrim weather I've always heard about.
String.Dest: これが噂に聞くスカイリムの美しい空ですのね

String.Source: What?
String.Dest: 何？

String.Source: Keep strong, and eyes open. We're on a different path now.
String.Dest: 心を強く持って、目の前をしっかりお見すえになって。別々の道を行かなければなりませんのよ

String.Source: Please, let's hurry. I need to get home so I can figure out what's happened.
String.Dest: 急ぎましょう。家に帰って、何が起きたのかを見極めなくては

String.Source: It's so bright out here. I don't know how you stand it.
String.Dest: ここはひどく明るいですわね。あなたはどうして平気でいられますの？

String.Source: Yes, let me show you.
String.Dest: ああ、見せてやろう

String.Source: It looks like some kind of temple.
String.Dest: どうやら聖堂か何かのようですわね

String.Source: If you can prove you're reliable, maybe you can join the Dawnguard. We have ways of dealing with vampires.
String.Dest: 君が頼りになると証明されたら、ドーンガードに参加してもいい。我々は吸血鬼の扱いに慣れている

String.Source: You're lucky Isran hasn't killed you outright. Get cured while you can.
String.Dest: イスランにとどめを刺されずにすんで幸運だったな。早く治療した方がいい

String.Source: I always wondered what the dwarves actually looked like. I hear they're like elves, but with beards.
String.Dest: ドワーフの実物はどんなふうなんだろうとずっと思っておりましたの。エルフに似てるけど、ヒゲを生やしてるんですって

String.Source: And I thought the Soul Cairn was creepy.
String.Dest: ソウル・ケルンは不気味な場所だと思っていましたけど…

String.Source: There's not a whole lot to tell.
String.Dest: 説明できる事は、そう多くありませんわ

String.Source: So this is the grand tour of Skyrim's caves that you're showing me?
String.Dest: すると、これはスカイリムの洞窟巡りという事？

String.Source: Good, let's get inside there. The sun is starting to get to me.
String.Dest: よかった。中に入りましょう。もう陽の光がそこまで来ていますわ

String.Source: (Bark)
String.Dest: ワン！

String.Source: Gunmar, there's an area large enough for you to pen up some trolls, get them armored up and ready for use.
String.Dest: ガンマー、ここには広い場所があるから、トロールを囲いに入れて、武装させて戦闘に備えるといい

String.Source: It... almost doesn't even look real. You know?
String.Dest: とても… この世のものとは思えませんわ

String.Source: Never saw anything like this back on the island.
String.Dest: 島ではこんなのを見た事もありませんでしたのよ

String.Source: Alright! One more set of dwemer plans to go.
String.Dest: さて！ ドゥーマーの図面も、残り1組よ

String.Source: How much longer can you keep this up, Moth Priest?
String.Dest: いつまでもつかな、聖蚕の僧侶よ？

String.Source: This is the kind of thing I've been wanting to see.
String.Dest: こんな光景を見たいと思っておりましたの

String.Source: I never knew it would be this beautiful.
String.Dest: こんなにも美しいとは存じませんでしたわ

String.Source: It's like from the stories I used to hear... the two adventurers seeing the world.
String.Dest: 昔によく聞いた物語みたい… 二人の冒険者が世界中を旅しますのよ

String.Source: I'll remember this.
String.Dest: この事は忘れませんわ

String.Source: I'm glad you're here with me.
String.Dest: あなたが一緒にいてくれて嬉しいですわ

String.Source: Oh wow. This is gorgeous.
String.Dest: はわぁ… すごく豪華ですわね

String.Source: I'm not talking about this with you any more.
String.Dest: あなたとは、もうこの話はいたしませんわ

String.Source: Did you hear something?
String.Dest: 何か聞こえて？

String.Source: I don't know, maybe. Won't know until we get him out of there.
String.Dest: そうかも知れない。奴をあそこから追い出すまで確かな事は言えないよ

String.Source: Here comes another one!
String.Dest: また来たぞ！

String.Source: If there's assistance I can provide, just ask. It's the least I can do.
String.Dest: 何かできる事があれば言ってくれ。私にはそんな事しかできないのだ

String.Source: No... Serana... your own father....
String.Dest: そんな… セラーナ… 実の父をお前は…

String.Source: I'll see you when I'm done. For now, I need to just do this.
String.Dest: 終わったらすぐ行きますわ。今はこれを済ませてしまいたいの

String.Source: Oh. I didn't even know. Is it a happy home?
String.Dest: あら、存じませんでしたわ。幸せな家庭なのかしら？

String.Source: Then behold Auri-El's gift, my child. May it speed your journey to the Inner Sanctum.
String.Dest: では、アーリエルの祝福を受けるがいい。汝の最奥聖域への旅が滞りなき事を

String.Source: Of course, I wouldn't be telling you where to find it if I desired it for myself.
String.Dest: もちろんさ。自分のものにするなら君にそのありかを教えてないよ

String.Source: Die, you traitorous dog!
String.Dest: 死ね、薄汚い裏切り者が！

String.Source: By the blood...
String.Dest: ああ、ご先祖様…

String.Source: Sorine, you'll find room to start your tinkering on that crossbow design you've been working on.
String.Dest: ソリーヌ、懸案中のクロスボウのデザインだが、その作業用のスペースを用意しよう

String.Source: I'll have some for sale soon.
String.Dest: もうすぐ、商品として生産できるわ

String.Source: Here. Let me show you how this works...
String.Dest: これよ。使い方を教えるわね…

String.Source: No, you've proven your strength to him.
String.Dest: 違いますわね、あなたは自分の強さを証明してみせた

String.Source: It belongs among our kind, not gathering mold in some vagabond's treasure pile.
String.Dest: 我々の同族が所有してるんだ。放浪人の宝の山の中でカビを生やしたりなどしてないよ

String.Source: So you take a major decision for me, and make it all about you?
String.Dest: わたしの事で大事な決断をして、その責任を負うつもりですの？

String.Source: I've discovered the whereabouts of a set of ancient Rings of Blood Magic.
String.Dest: 太古の血の魔法の指輪一式がどこにあるか分かったぞ

String.Source: I've located the last known resting place of a set of ancient Amulets of Night Power.
String.Dest: 太古の夜の力のアミュレット一式が眠る最後の場所が分かったぞ

String.Source: Serana isn't yours, she's mine!
String.Dest: セラーナはお前のものではない、私のものだ！

String.Source: Well it was... Thank the Vigilants for ruining that.
String.Dest: あれを滅ぼしてくれた番人には… 感謝してるさ

String.Source: I've located one of the lost ancient Amulets of Night Power.
String.Dest: 太古の夜の力のアミュレットのひとつがどこにあるか分かったぞ

String.Source: What about you? What were your parents like?
String.Dest: あなたはどうなのです？ ご両親はどんな方でしたの？

String.Source: The amulets increase the effectiveness of your vampiric powers.
String.Dest: アミュレットは君の吸血鬼としての力を高めてくれるんだ

String.Source: You know where to find me if you change your mind.
String.Dest: 気が変わりましたら、わたしはいつもの場所におりますわよ

String.Source: Arvak. My horse. We came to this horrible place together. We were attacked by monsters, so I told him to run.
String.Dest: アルヴァク。俺の馬だよ。一緒にこのおぞましい土地にやってきたはいいが、化け物どもに襲われたんで、逃げろと命じたんだ

String.Source: Of course. I wouldn't be telling you where to find it if I desired it for myself.
String.Dest: もちろんさ。自分のものにするなら君にそのありかを教えてないよ

String.Source: Come on. We can talk about this another time.
String.Dest: 行きましょう。この話はいつでもできましてよ

String.Source: There you are. I'm... I'm back.
String.Dest: あなた。わたし… 還ってまいりましたわ

String.Source: You are prey, like all mortals. I banish you!
String.Dest: お前は獲物だ、定命の者の例に漏れずな。立ち去るがいい！

String.Source: There's a courtyard in the castle. I used to help her tend a garden there.
String.Dest: お城には中庭があって、母がその庭園の世話をするのをよく手伝いましたわ

String.Source: They request Auriel's Bow, and I request their assistance. It's been repeated so many times, I can't imagine it any other way.
String.Dest: 誰もがアーリエルの弓を求め、こちらは見返りに手伝いを頼む。数えきれないほど繰り返して、もはや他のやりとりなど想像もできない

String.Source: Hands to yourself.
String.Dest: こっちは大丈夫ですわ

String.Source: So I am. I guess we could use my blood. Do you have any arrows? Elven arrows. I'm not going to just bleed on any old thing.
String.Dest: そうですわね。わたしの血を使ってよろしくてよ。矢は持ってますの？ エルフの矢がいいですわね。古いものはダメですわよ

String.Source: The castle, of course, is yours. We shall follow you, and help spread your influence across Skyrim.
String.Dest: 当然、城はお前のものだ。我らはお前に追従し、その威光をスカイリム中に広げる力となろう

String.Source: Once saw Harkon rip a man in half. He's powerful like you wouldn't believe.
String.Dest: ハルコンが男を真っ二つにするのを見た事がある。信じられないほど強いのよ

String.Source: Run, coward! You're a traitor to your race!
String.Dest: 逃げるがいい、同族を裏切った臆病者め！

String.Source: So, the deed has been done.
String.Dest: 為すべき事が為されたのだな

String.Source: Be a dear and fetch me another set of Dwemer diagrams?
String.Dest: 他のドゥーマーの設計図も持ってきてくれないかしら？

String.Source: In the meantime, if there are any potions you might need, feel free to help yourself.
String.Dest: その間に、もし必要な薬があれば自由に持って行きなさい

String.Source: Anyway, this is all very touching, but don't we have some more important things to worry about right now?
String.Dest: とにかく、とても感動的なお話ですけれど、今はもっと心配しなければならない事がありましてよ？

String.Source: Be a dear and collect these diagrams for me?
String.Dest: 図面を探してきてくれないかしら？

String.Source: Think I'll be sad when we're done collecting these. Who knows though, maybe more plans will turn up in the future.
String.Dest: 全部集まったら、寂しくなると思うわ。また将来他の図面がどこかで見つかるかも知れないけどね

String.Source: Makes everything else worth it.
String.Dest: 来た甲斐がありましたわ

String.Source: I'm starting to think you like this as much as I do!
String.Dest: あなたも楽しくなってきたんじゃない？

String.Source: What? What are you talking about?
String.Dest: 何だって？ 何を言ってるんだ？

String.Source: I think both of our parents have failed us. Just you and me against the world, now.
String.Dest: わたし達二人とも、親に捨てられたのですわ。一緒にこの世界へ立ち向かいましょう

String.Source: But as luck would have it, I've tracked down the location of some actual Dwemer diagram drawings!
String.Dest: でも、ツイてる事に、ドゥーマーの描いた設計図そのものがある場所を突き止めたの！

String.Source: I think even Gunmar's been impressed with what we've managed to do with the Dwemer drawings. Let's see what we can do with these ones!
String.Dest: ドゥーマーの図面から作り出したものには、あのガンマーでさえ驚いたはずよ。今度はどんな発見があるのかしら！

String.Source: We've been so terribly fortunate. I can't wait to see what's in these drawings.
String.Dest: 最高にツイてるわ。この図面に何が描かれてるのか、早く確認したい

String.Source: I just didn't know when.
String.Dest: それがいつになるかは分かりかねましたけれど

String.Source: Like that they were supposed to guard some vampire here, but wound up all becoming vampires themselves when they saw how powerful he was.
String.Dest: ここにいる吸血鬼を護衛するために来たけど、吸血鬼のすごい力を目の当たりにして、自分達も吸血鬼になってしまったんだとか

String.Source: These people seem nervous, which makes me nervous.
String.Dest: ここの人達はなんだか張り詰めているように見えますわ。それでわたしも気が張ってしまいますのね

String.Source: I'd read stories about the Solitude windmill, but I didn't expect it to be that big!
String.Dest: ソリチュードの風車の事は本で読んだことがありますけれど、まさかあんなに大きいなんて！

String.Source: I don't know that name. You say she's Jarl of Solitude? Who supports her?
String.Dest: 聞きおぼえのない名前ですわね。ソリチュードの首長ですって？ 後ろ盾は？

String.Source: Don't say I didn't warn you.
String.Dest: 警告はいたしましてよ

String.Source: It's your choice whether to attempt to deal with them or force your way through.
String.Dest: そいつらを相手に取引してみるか、強引に突破してみるかは自由だ

String.Source: Keep in mind that Redwater Den has fallen into... well, let's just say less reputable members of society now dwell there.
String.Dest: 覚えておけ、レッドウォーターの隠れ家は… まあ、社会であまり信頼できん者達のすみかになっているとだけ言っておこう

String.Source: Welcome back.
String.Dest: お帰り

String.Source: I must have been gone longer than I thought. Definitely longer than we planned.
String.Dest: わたしは思っていた以上に長い間いなくなっていたようですわね。当初の目論見よりは確実に

String.Source: I'll see you soon.
String.Dest: また会いましょう

String.Source: That was a long time ago, but the idea was, and is, a good one. That's why I'm bringing it back.
String.Dest: 大昔の話だが、彼らの理念は昔も今も正しい。だから私はそれを復活させようとしているのだ

String.Source: And so I'm going to give you a chance to get yourself cured.
String.Dest: 治療のチャンスをやろう

String.Source: You think they turned him?
String.Dest: 彼は奴らに変えられたと思う？

String.Source: Well, growing up the way I did, you get used to it.
String.Dest: まあ、わたしみたいな育ち方をしたら、慣れますわよ

String.Source: Good luck.
String.Dest: 幸運を祈る

String.Source: All clean. I feel like I can breathe again for the first time since I was turned.
String.Dest: 清々しいですわ。まるで、姿を変えられてから初めて呼吸するような気分

String.Source: We'll talk more when we're there.
String.Dest: 続きは向こうに着いてからにしましょう

String.Source: Here I am. Human as ever.
String.Dest: これがわたし。元の人間の姿ですの

String.Source: It is time for action.
String.Dest: 正念場だな

String.Source: I guess it doesn't matter now. At least Isran is trying to do something noble with the name.
String.Dest: 今となっては、関係ないわ。少なくともイスランは、その名にかけて高貴な事をやろうとしてる

String.Source: Arkay be with you, my friend.
String.Dest: 友よ、アーケイの加護がありますように

String.Source: Well met, friend.
String.Dest: やあ友よ

String.Source: Is something wrong?
String.Dest: 何か問題でも？

String.Source: By now, my daughter will have told you what we are.
String.Dest: 我々の素性については娘から聞いている事だろう

String.Source: I'm not sure.
String.Dest: 分かりかねますわ

String.Source: My Lady.
String.Dest: お嬢様

String.Source: Leaving the wayshrines unguarded would be violating my sacred duty as a Knight-Paladin of Auriel.
String.Dest: アーリエルの騎士司祭として、祠の守護という聖なる使命を無視してここを離れる事はできない

String.Source: Let someone else rule. I just want to kill and feed.
String.Dest: 支配は他の誰かに任せるわ。私はただ殺して食べたいだけ

String.Source: It is an honor to serve Harkon, is it not?
String.Dest: ハルコンに仕えるのは名誉な事だろう？

String.Source: The Dawnguard will now be dedicated to safeguarding it, making sure that prophecy will never come to pass.
String.Dest: ドーンガードは、弓を守る事に今後は身を捧げよう。あの予言は決して実現させてはならない

String.Source: I wonder what these souls do all day. They look... bored.
String.Dest: こういう魂は日がな一日、何をして過ごしているのかしら？ なんだか… 退屈そうですわね

String.Source: Wait, is he talking about me?
String.Dest: 待って、彼がわたしの事を？

String.Source: May Auri-El keep you free from harm.
String.Dest: アーリエルの守護があらん事を

String.Source: These Falmer are... they're frozen in the ice.
String.Dest: このファルメル達… 氷漬けになっていますわ

String.Source: I wonder how long they've been like this.
String.Dest: 彼らはいつからあんなふうなのかしら

String.Source: I don't think you can ever be ready to kill your parent.
String.Dest: 両親を殺す準備なんて、いつまで待って頂いてもできませんわ

String.Source: There's probably groves like this all over Tamriel. Most people just don't even know what to look for.
String.Dest: タムリエルのあちこちにこんな森がきっとあるはずですわ。みんな何を探すべきなのかすら分かっていないだけですわね

String.Source: The prophecy said that vampires would no longer need to fear the sun. For someone who fancied himself as vampire royalty, that's pretty seductive.
String.Dest: 予言には、吸血鬼達が太陽を恐れなくてもよくなると書かれていたのです。吸血鬼の王を自称する者にはかなり魅力的な内容でしょうね

String.Source: Another victory for the Dawnguard.
String.Dest: またドーンガードの勝利ね

String.Source: We've got enough to worry about right now. You stay focused, and I'll worry about me.
String.Dest: 今は他の問題がたくさんありましてよ。それに集中しなくては。わたしもわたしの問題に集中いたしますわ

String.Source: Only what I've heard.
String.Dest: 話に聞いた事しか知らないが

String.Source: Now, acknowledge me as your master!
String.Dest: 主として我を受け入れよ！

String.Source: Thank you for breaking that foul vampire's hold over me.
String.Dest: ありがとう。あの薄汚い吸血鬼の手に落ちずに済んだよ

String.Source: (Whine)
String.Dest: クゥーン…

String.Source: Find all of them! Don't let any of them get away!
String.Dest: 全員見つけ出せ！ 1人も逃がすな！

String.Source: Are you alright? Come on, we can do this. I know we can.
String.Dest: 大丈夫ですわね？ さあ、きっとやり遂げられますわ

String.Source: Figured.
String.Dest: なるほど

String.Source: That makes sense.
String.Dest: それなら分かりますわ

String.Source: Best of luck to you.
String.Dest: 幸運を祈るよ

String.Source: Yes, they smell like trolls. But do you have to? Consider washing up a bit more often.
String.Dest: そうさ、トロールみたいな悪臭だよ。もう少し頻繁に風呂に入る気もないのか？

String.Source: I despise your presence, mortal!
String.Dest: 忌々しい定命の者め！

String.Source: Well, I'll be out of your hair soon enough.
String.Dest: 離れますわね

String.Source: (Bark)
String.Dest: ワン！

String.Source: Talk to Gunmar if you need materials.
String.Dest: 材料がほしかったら、ガンマーに言うといいわ

String.Source: Sorine and Gunmar are settling in.
String.Dest: ソリーヌとガンマーは腰を落ち着け始めている

String.Source: No... why?
String.Dest: いいえ… どうして？

String.Source: But my master is dead, and his enemies will pay!
String.Dest: だが私の主様は死んだ。かの敵どもは報いを受けるぞ！

String.Source: Stop apologizing for everything.
String.Dest: 何にでも謝るのはおよしになって

String.Source: Leave no vampire in one piece!
String.Dest: 吸血鬼は八つ裂きだ！

String.Source: If you need some help, I'm ready.
String.Dest: わたしの力が必要でしたら、いつでも準備できてましてよ

String.Source: I'll probably stay with the Dawnguard, for as long as they'll let me.
String.Dest: ドーンガードのところにいようと思っておりますわ。彼らに追い出されるまでの話ですけれども

String.Source: We didn't all get to have parents like yours. Sometimes this is just... how it is.
String.Dest: あなたの両親みたいな親の下に生まれて来なくてもよかったでしょうに。まあ… そういうものなのでしょうけど

String.Source: Of course it matters to you, but you don't get to make this decision for me.
String.Dest: 関係があるのは分かりますが、わたしの事で決断を下す必要はなくてよ

String.Source: But I'm afraid that they're well beyond a cure at this point.
String.Dest: 彼らがもはや治療できる状態ではない事を残念に思う

String.Source: Oh. I... I see.
String.Dest: ああ… そうですのね

String.Source: Let's just get this over with. Do you have any elven arrows?
String.Dest: 済ませてしまいましょう。エルフの矢は持っておりますの？

String.Source: Forget it.
String.Dest: 大きなお世話ですわ

String.Source: I'm going to go away for a while. I'll meet you back home when I'm done.
String.Dest: 少しの間、出かけてきますわ。終わったら家に帰ってきますわね

String.Source: I'll speak to Falion. I've heard he knows about these things.
String.Dest: ファリオンと話してみますわ。こういう事に詳しいと聞いておりますの

String.Source: Does it bother you that I'm here?
String.Dest: わたし、お邪魔かしら？

String.Source: I understand.
String.Dest: 分かりますわ

String.Source: (Growl)
String.Dest: ウゥーッ…

String.Source: Enough games, let's finish this!
String.Dest: お遊びは十分だ、決着をつけるぞ！

String.Source: Which friends would those be?
String.Dest: 友達というのは？

String.Source: If Isran is really asking for me, it must be serious. I'll help. Where do you need me to go?
String.Dest: イスランが私を必要としているなら、かなり深刻な事態ね。手を貸さなくちゃ。どこへ行けばいいの？

String.Source: You've already seen my father's obsession. My mother's not a whole lot better, but you'll see that soon enough.
String.Dest: 父の強迫観念は、その目でご覧になったでしょう。母の方だって、それと同じくらいひどいものでしたわ。もうすぐお分かりになりますわよ

String.Source: You've met both of my parents. They're both crazy in their own way.
String.Dest: 両親には会った事がありますわね。それぞれ、違う意味で道を外れた人達ですわ

String.Source: We both know what's going to have to happen once we find the bow.
String.Dest: 弓を見つけたら何が起こるのか、わたし達お互いに

String.Source: It's not that simple. I guess it never is with families, is it?
String.Dest: そんな簡単な話ではございませんの。家族は関係ないと思いませんこと？

String.Source: That letter's the last I've heard of her and mentions where she is. Now please, leave me alone.
String.Dest: あれが彼女から届いた最後の手紙だ。居場所が書いてある。さあ、もう一人にしてくれ

String.Source: You're a good son.
String.Dest: あなたはいい息子ですわ

String.Source: Congratulations, friend. You've won a well-deserved victory here.
String.Dest: おめでとう、尽力の甲斐ある勝利だったな

String.Source: Your blood will be mine!
String.Dest: お前の血はいただく！

String.Source: Let's... uh... let's just keep going.
String.Dest: さあ… うっ… 先に進みましょう

String.Source: No, it's probably not.
String.Dest: いいえ、多分違いますわ

String.Source: Empire? What... what empire?
String.Dest: 帝国？ …どの帝国の事かしら？

String.Source: Only I hear that's not quite how it happened. Secret organization, you see. No one to blame when homes are broken into, things stolen.
String.Dest: だが、聞いた話ではそれは間違いだ。何しろ秘密結社だから、家に侵入されて物を盗まれても、泥棒の素性すら分からないわけだ

String.Source: Arvak, please! You can stop running now!
String.Dest: アルヴァク、頼む！ もう逃げなくていいんだ！

String.Source: It would be nice not to always be so thirsty.
String.Dest: 決して癒されない喉の渇きがなくなるのなら、いいかも知れませんわね

String.Source: It sounds like... that's the last bit of the prophecy. The blood of a Daughter of Coldharbour can corrupt the bow.
String.Dest: そうですわね… 予言の最後の部分ですわ。コールドハーバーの娘の血が弓を汚せばいい

String.Source: Hold it! She's the one Tolan mentioned.
String.Dest: 待て！ あれはトランが言ってた女だ

String.Source: It ends here!
String.Dest: 終わりにしてやる！

String.Source: It's the only way they'll discover that they weren't always malignant... they were once a proud and prosperous race.
String.Dest: 彼ら自身が、生まれついての邪悪な存在でない事を知るには、そうするしかない。かつての彼らは高貴で豊かな種族だったのだから

String.Source: Well, maybe it really is time to resurrect the Dawnguard.
String.Dest: まさに今こそドーンガードを復活させる時だ

String.Source: You must help me find my Arvak. He doesn't deserve to be in a place like this!
String.Dest: アルヴァクを探すのを手伝ってくれ。こんな所に居させたくないんだ！

String.Source: I mean, what do you think my father will do when we bring him the bow?
String.Dest: 弓を届けたら、父は一体何をするつもりだと思いますの？

String.Source: But at that point, he'll have everything he's ever wanted.
String.Dest: でも、その時点で父は、ほしい物をすべて手に入れる事になりますわよ

String.Source: And I thought my father was the delusional one.
String.Dest: わたしは父が理性を失ったと思っておりますわ

String.Source: He just became absorbed... obsessed. It was kind of sick, actually.
String.Dest: 父はそれに熱中… 没頭してしまったのです。病的ですらありましたわ

String.Source: Oh, gods...
String.Dest: ああ、神よ…

String.Source: Come on, let's take it to Dexion.
String.Dest: 行きましょう。デキソンに届けますわよ

String.Source: And I'll be unnecessary once he has it.
String.Dest: わたしも、父が目的を果たした後はきっと用なしですわね

String.Source: Let's just get this over with.
String.Dest: 済ませてしまいましょうか

String.Source: My father... no, not really. I did spend a lot of time with my mother, but she saw me more like a protege than a daughter.
String.Dest: 父が… いえ、違いますの。ほとんど母とばかり一緒におりましたけど、娘というより養女みたいに扱われていましたわ

String.Source: I think you know.
String.Dest: ご存知のはずですわ

String.Source: I will darken the skies!
String.Dest: 空を暗くしてやる！

String.Source: I see. That would explain much.
String.Dest: なるほど。それで説明がついた

String.Source: If? I've been assuming that's where all this is going.
String.Dest: もし？ 全部がそういうものだと思っておりましたわ

String.Source: Arkay tells me the Sun Fire spell can break open those caches, but I've never found one. I think he might be lying to me.
String.Dest: アーケイの話では、宝の隠し場所は太陽の炎の呪文で開くが、どこを探しても見つからない。一杯食わされたのかもな

String.Source: This latest attack proves it's the right time.
String.Dest: 最近起こった襲撃は、時が来た事を告げているに違いない

String.Source: I don't like him any more than you do. But he is my father.
String.Dest: 愛情はかけらもございませんわ。それでも、わたしの父なのです

String.Source: Yes, I can feel your defenses crumbling. You want it to end. You want to give in to me.
String.Dest: 守りが崩れていくのが分かる。早く終われと思っている。屈服したがっているな

String.Source: I want to add some punch to our crossbow capabilities, I've done all I can on my own. I need a little inspiration.
String.Dest: クロスボウの威力を改良したいんだけど、思いつく事は全部試してしまったの。何か新しいアイデアがほしいのよ

String.Source: I hope so.
String.Dest: だとよいですわね

String.Source: I know you didn't know your parents. But if they were anything like mine, you're better off.
String.Dest: あなたに両親がいないのは存じておりますが、わたしの両親みたいなのでしたら、いない方がマシですわよ

String.Source: That's too bad.
String.Dest: それは残念ですわね

String.Source: Please, he's such a loyal creature, and he's been running for so long. You have to save him! A place like this will change you...
String.Dest: 何しろ忠実な奴でね。それ以来ずっと逃げ続けてる。なんとか助けてやってくれ！ こんな所にいたらおかしくなっちまうよ…

String.Source: Your mind was strong, but you're exhausted from the struggle.
String.Dest: 強靭な精神であったが、抗う中で疲弊してきているな

String.Source: I'm working on it, now give me some silence so I can think.
String.Dest: 今やってるところだ。考えをまとめたいから静かにしてくれないか

String.Source: But I can't wait to see these drawings. Go on, get out of here!
String.Dest: それでも、最後の図面を早く見てみたいわ。さあ、行ってきて！

String.Source: Vyrthur and myself are the only two snow elves that remain.
String.Dest: スノーエルフの生き残りは私とヴィルスールだけだ

String.Source: Yes… master…
String.Dest: はい… ご主人様…

String.Source: The people of Skyrim owe you a great deal, whether they know it or not.
String.Dest: 知ってか知らいでか、スカイリムの民に大きな貸しを作ったな

String.Source: What can I do for you?
String.Dest: ご用は何だい？

String.Source: Oh, wonderful. A war of succession. Good to know the world didn't get boring while I was gone.
String.Dest: なるほど、後継者争いですわね。わたしがいない間に世の中が退屈になっていなくて安心いたしましたわ

String.Source: Not as much.
String.Dest: そうでもございませんわ

String.Source: Sorine needs help with her project to improve our crossbows. And if that doesn't interest you...
String.Dest: ソリーヌがクロスボウの改良を手伝ってくれる人を探してる。それに興味がないなら…

String.Source: (Whine)
String.Dest: クゥーン…

String.Source: The Soul Cairn will offer a unique opportunity to continue my studies, and I intend to complete my research.
String.Dest: ソウル・ケルンは研究を続ける特殊な機会を与えてくれる。そして私は研究を完成させるつもりよ

String.Source: Of course, if you've got any more adventures planned...
String.Dest: 願ったりですわ。次の冒険の計画はどんなのかしら…

String.Source: Fought vampires wherever they found them. I aim to continue that mission.
String.Dest: どこであろうが、吸血鬼を発見すると彼らは戦いを挑んだ。私はその任務を遂行し続けたいんだよ

String.Source: They were eventually forced to put him down. The Jarl banished them from the hold, but they stuck to their cause.
String.Dest: やがて彼らはやむなく息子を殺さざるをえなくなった。首長は彼らを砦から追放した。しかし彼らは任務を放棄しなかった

String.Source: And take this as well. Seeing as Saint Jiub has ascended to pure spiritual form, I won't need it any longer.
String.Dest: それと、こいつもくれてやろう。この聖ジウブが真の精霊に姿を変えた以上、もう必要のないものだ

String.Source: That... that wasn't me you were fighting.
String.Dest: あれは… 君と戦うつもりはなかったんだ

String.Source: Oh, wow. All right, well, what do you think my father's going to do once we bring the bow to him?
String.Dest: あらまあ。そう、じゃあ、弓を届けたら、父は何をすると思いまして？

String.Source: If you were anybody else, I'd probably be taking some blood from you for asking that.
String.Dest: あなた以外の人でしたら、そんな事を頼んできたら血を抜き取ってやりましたのに

String.Source: Hiding won't help you!
String.Dest: 隠れてもどうにもならんぞ！

String.Source: You... always say what you think, don't you?
String.Dest: あなたって人は… 思った事をいつでも口にしてしまいますのね

String.Source: You'd better get out of here and get yourself cured.
String.Dest: こんな所にいないで、治療を受けに行った方がいいわよ

String.Source: Arvak?
String.Dest: アルヴァクか？

String.Source: It was the Betrayed... they did something to him, I just don't know why Auri-El would allow this to happen.
String.Dest: 裏切られし者の仕業であろうな… 奴らに何かされたのだ。アーリエルはなぜこんな事を許すのだろうか

String.Source: Their job was to keep the Jarl's son contained within. They took it seriously, and served honorably.
String.Dest: 彼らの役割は、首長の息子を閉じ込めておく事だった。彼らはその仕事を忠実に立派にこなした

String.Source: So, let's get this straight.
String.Dest: それでは、話を整理しますわよ

String.Source: Once we're inside, just keep quiet for a bit. Let me take the lead.
String.Dest: 中に入ったら、しばらく大人しくしていて。段取りはわたしが

String.Source: I don't want to either, but you're going to have to jump. I'll be... right behind you. Above you. Just go.
String.Dest: わたしだっていやですけど、跳ぶしかありませんわ。わたしは… すぐ後ろに続きましてよ。後ろと言っても上の事ですわね。さあ、お先にどうぞ

String.Source: I'll rend the flesh from your bones!
String.Dest: 骨から肉を引き千切ってくれる！

String.Source: I did. But something about you makes me think I can trust you. I hope I'm not wrong.
String.Dest: そういたしましたわ。でもあなたは何故か、信用してもいい気がしておりますの。勘違いじゃなければいいのですが

String.Source: Keep your eyes open, here.
String.Dest: ここは用心なさって

String.Source: Because that means there's still hope that they might one day shed their hatred and learn to believe in Auri-El once again.
String.Dest: 彼らにもまだ望みが残っているという事だ。いつの日か、憎しみを捨てて再びアーリエルを信じるようになるかも知れん

String.Source: A vampire?
String.Dest: 吸血鬼だと？

String.Source: Which just makes you a more dangerous rival.
String.Dest: その時から、父にとってのライバルになったのですわ

String.Source: Look at this. I should've known it was only a matter of time before they found us.
String.Dest: この有り様だよ。奴らが我々を見つけるのは時間の問題だった。それを分かっていれば…

String.Source: And an assault on the Betrayed guarding the Inner Sanctum would only end with my death.
String.Dest: それに、裏切られし者が守る最奥聖域に攻め込んだところで、無駄死にするだけだ

String.Source: You've served Skyrim well.
String.Dest: 君はスカイリムを救ってくれたのだ

String.Source: You dare defy your father?!
String.Dest: 父親に逆らうだと！？

String.Source: You've turned her against me!
String.Dest: 娘を離反させたな！

String.Source: The dwarves may have stolen their sight, but it took many generations for them to become what they are today.
String.Dest: ドワーフに奪われたのは視力だけだが、何世代も経つうちにあのような姿になってしまったのだ

String.Source: But I can see this having its uses. Do you have any elven arrows on you?
String.Dest: さておきこれには使い道があるようですわ。エルフの矢は持っておりますの？

String.Source: I will resist you, monster. I must!
String.Dest: バケモノめ、お前の言いなりにはならないぞ。絶対に！

String.Source: Well met, brother.
String.Dest: こんにちは

String.Source: Not only that, but Auriel's Bow is in safe hands.
String.Dest: それだけではなく、アーリエルの弓も確保したんだな

String.Source: I just hope we weren't too late.
String.Dest: 遅すぎたのでなければいいが

String.Source: And now... I think I can rest. Farewell, my friend, wherever your travels take you.
String.Dest: ようやく… 眠りにつける。名残惜しいけどここでお別れ… 楽しかったよ、じゃあね

String.Source: But... what about you?
String.Dest: けれども… あなたはどうなのかしら？

String.Source: That's what I wanted to hear.
String.Dest: その言葉を待っておりましたの

String.Source: Very funny.
String.Dest: そうか

String.Source: I've only heard stories. Not sure if any of them are true.
String.Dest: 話を耳にしただけよ。本当かどうかは分からない

String.Source: And then preyed on the Rift until finally someone put them down.
String.Dest: それで、リフトを襲ったんだけど、誰かに退治されたんですって

String.Source: Oh, I've read a few things. Heard a few more things. Arkay's told me a bit as well.
String.Dest: ああ、本で読んだ事があるし、噂も耳にした。アーケイからも聞いた事がある

String.Source: Farewell, and good journey milady.
String.Dest: では奥様、よい旅を

String.Source: And it seems we have a problem.
String.Dest: 我々は問題を抱えているようだな

String.Source: I'll make you pay for this, daughter!
String.Dest: 代償は高くつくぞ、娘よ！

String.Source: I'm sorry, I don't feel comfortable giving them to you.
String.Dest: ごめんなさい、これらをあなたに与える気にはなれないの

String.Source: Those vampires put up a hell of a fight.
String.Dest: 手ごわい吸血鬼どもだったわ

String.Source: I really do enjoy killing vampires.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼狩りはなかなか楽しめるものだ

String.Source: I knew you had it in you! Arkay wasn't so sure. Between you and me, I think he didn't expect you to make it.
String.Dest: やってくれると思ってたよ！ アーケイは信じてなかったけどな。ここだけの話、彼はあんたには期待してなかったんだ

String.Source: Let's get indoors. Or in a cave. Anywhere, just out of this.
String.Dest: 建物の中に入りましょう。洞窟でも構いませんわ。とにかく陽の届かない所へ

String.Source: You're all talk.
String.Dest: 口先だけですのね

String.Source: That I am. So I'm guessing you want to just use my blood, then?
String.Dest: ですわね。となれば、わたしの血を使いたいのでしょう？

String.Source: Sure... do you have any arrows, though? They would have to be of elven quality, I'd guess.
String.Dest: もちろんですわ… でも矢は持っておりますの？ おそらくエルフの矢みたいに立派なものでなければ駄目ですわよ

String.Source: Isran will never admit it, but I'm sure he's proud of you.
String.Dest: イスランは認めないだろうけど、きっとあんたの事は鼻が高いはずだよ

String.Source: (Whine)
String.Dest: クゥーン…

String.Source: I wonder if the horse's remains are around here... someplace.
String.Dest: その馬の亡骸… この辺りのどこかにあるのかしら？

String.Source: Is that... oh no. Are we going down there?
String.Dest: あれは… まさか、あそこに降りますの？

String.Source: This is an intriguing change.
String.Dest: 興味深い変化だな

String.Source: It's amazing what I'm able to learn from studying these Dwemer plans.
String.Dest: ドゥーマーの図面から学べる事は計り知れないわ

String.Source: Even before that, we weren't the most normal family. We did worship a daedra, remember?
String.Dest: それ以前も、普通の家庭ではございませんでしたわ。デイドラの信徒だったと言いましたわよね？

String.Source: Probably not.
String.Dest: そうは思いませんわ

String.Source: We need to do all that nonsense to get into the temple, so we can kill your brother and claim Auriel's Bow?
String.Dest: こういう馬鹿げた事をしてまで寺院に入らなければならないのは、あなたの兄弟を殺してアーリエルの弓を手に入れるためという事ですの？

String.Source: I can't help that space is cramped in here, Florentius.
String.Dest: 狭いのは仕方ないぞ、フロレンティウス

String.Source: It would make you a bit weaker when we travel through the Soul Cairn, but we might be able to fix that once we're inside. Maybe.
String.Dest: ソウル・ケルンを通る際に力が弱まってしまうかも知れませんが、中に入ってから解決方法が見つかるかも知れませんわ。その保証はありませんけど

String.Source: Vaaz!
String.Dest: ヴァーズ！

String.Source: If you're here to join up, you need to see Isran. He's up at the fort talking to some Vigilant.
String.Dest: 仲間になりたくて来ているなら、イスランに会うんだ。砦で番人らしき奴と話している

String.Source: Until the "Betrayed" corrupted you. Yes, yes. We've heard this sad story.
String.Dest: “裏切られし者達”に堕落させられるまでは。あらまあ、その悲しいお話ならもう聞きましてよ

String.Source: And now that you've stirred up the vampires against you, you come begging for my protection?
String.Dest: 吸血鬼達を自分で怒らせたくせに、私に守ってほしいと言うのか？

String.Source: New recruits? Hmm.
String.Dest: 新入りだと？ ほう

String.Source: Glad you decided to give it a try. I hope Isran likes you.
String.Dest: 試してみる気になってくれて嬉しい。イスランに気に入られるといいな

String.Source: The blood of a vampire... Auriel's Bow...
String.Dest: 吸血鬼の血… アーリエルの弓…

String.Source: The Vigilants mostly hunt down daedra worshippers, which is why they got torn to pieces when they went up against vampires.
String.Dest: 番人らは主にデイドラの崇拝者を狩っているのだが、だからこそ吸血鬼を相手にした時に壊滅させられてしまったのだ

String.Source: You want to take revenge... on a god?
String.Dest: 復讐がお望みなのかしら… 神に対して？

String.Source: Yes. By destroying it, the vampires hoped to cripple our order's activities in Skyrim.
String.Dest: ああ。吸血鬼らはあれを破壊する事で、我ら教団のスカイリムでの活動を阻害しようと目論んだのだ

String.Source: Well? Ready to join the fight against the damn vampires?
String.Dest: 忌々しい吸血鬼達と戦う覚悟はできたのかな？

String.Source: I'm going to Dimhollow Crypt. Perhaps I can be of some small assistance to you.
String.Dest: ディムホロウ墓地に向かう事にする。少しは助力できるかもな

String.Source: Here to join the Dawnguard? Good.
String.Dest: ドーンガードに入りたい？ いい心がけだ

String.Source: Why do I even post guards? This is the headquarters of the Dawnguard. Well, it used to be, a long time ago.
String.Dest: なぜ見張りを立てる必要がある？ ここはドーンガードの本部だ。まあ、少なくとも昔はそうだった

String.Source: If you change your mind and decide to join the fight before it's too late, talk to Isran at Fort Dawnguard, southeast of Riften.
String.Dest: もし気が変わって、手遅れにならないうちに戦いに加わりたいのであれば、リフテンの南東にあるドーンガード砦に行き、イスランと話せ

String.Source: Uh, crossbow? I've never...
String.Dest: クロスボウかい？ 俺なんか一度も…

String.Source: Where is everybody? This place looks almost deserted.
String.Dest: みんなどこにいるんだろう？ まるで人影がないように見えるけど

String.Source: No... it's not working!
String.Dest: 違う… これでは駄目ですわ！

String.Source: There's an offering altar not terribly far from here. I'm willing to bet that the gem you're looking for is there.
String.Dest: ここからそう遠くない場所に捧げ物の祭壇があるわ。お探しの石はきっとそこにあるはずよ

String.Source: Ha. Those two deserved what they got. Their arrogance had become insufferable.
String.Dest: ハッ、あの二人の傲慢ぶりには耐えがたくなっていたわ。当然の報いよ

String.Source: Are you sure? I'm willing to do it, but you need to think it through.
String.Dest: 本当ですの？ わたしはよろしいけれど、しっかり考えた方がよくてよ

String.Source: We didn't listen to him any more than we did Isran. He was at the Hall when it was attacked...
String.Dest: イスラン同様、ろくに耳を貸さなかったよ。番人の間が襲われた時に、そこにいた…

String.Source: But Auriel should have protected you...
String.Dest: でもアーリエルが守ってくれたはずですわよ…

String.Source: You're not paying attention then. Like most everyone else around here.
String.Dest: まわりを見ていないんだな。ここらにいる連中はほとんどがそうだが

String.Source: Yeah? You change your mind? The Dawnguard could use somebody like you.
String.Dest: おっ？ 気が変わったのか？ あんたならドーンガードの一員として活躍できるかもな

String.Source: That's why our leader Isran is reestablishing the Dawnguard. Real, serious vampire hunters.
String.Dest: ゆえに我らの長であるイスランが、本格的な吸血鬼ハンターの組織であるドーンガードを再興させつつある

String.Source: Feel free to poke around the fort and take what you need. There isn't much yet, but you're welcome to anything you can use.
String.Dest: 好きなだけ砦を散策して、必要なものがあったら持っていってくれ。大したものはないかも知れないが、使えそうなら何だっていい

String.Source: If there's anything I can do before you depart, you must let me know.
String.Dest: 出発前に何かできる事があれば、必ず知らせてちょうだい

String.Source: I know this is difficult for you. I hope you trust me.
String.Dest: 難しい決断なのは分かりますわ。信じてくれるといいのですけれど

String.Source: Isran's inside the fort. He's the one you need to talk to.
String.Dest: イスランは砦の中だ。彼に直談判するといい

String.Source: Talk to Isran. He'll decide if he wants you for the Dawnguard.
String.Dest: イスランと話せ。ドーンガードに必要な人材かどうかは彼が判断する

String.Source: Look, I'll be honest with you. I have no idea. But I'm sure we can find something worth your time.
String.Dest: じゃあ、正直に言おう。見当もつかない。だけど、探せば何か出てくる。損はさせないよ

String.Source: Stay here. I'll go check it out if you open the door back up.
String.Dest: ここにいらして。後ろの扉が開くかどうか見てきますわ

String.Source: You there, boy. Stop skulking in the shadows and step up here. What's your name?
String.Dest: おい、そこの若いの。影でコソコソするのはやめて姿を見せろ。名前は？

String.Source: You know why I'm here. The Vigilants are under attack everywhere. The vampires are much more dangerous than we believed.
String.Dest: ここに来た理由は分かるだろう。番人達がそこら中で襲われている。吸血鬼らは我々が思っていたよりもはるかに危険な存在だ

String.Source: Go on inside. Isran'll want to talk to you.
String.Dest: 中に入れ。イスランが話したいそうだ

String.Source: I suspect now it was Brother Adalvald's journals they were after. He was obsessed with ancient vampire artifacts and burial sites.
String.Dest: どうやら連中はアダルヴァルド修道士の日記を狙っていたようだ。奴は太古の吸血鬼の秘宝や埋葬場所の研究に熱中していた

String.Source: I remember Keeper Carcette telling me repeatedly that Fort Dawnguard is a crumbling ruin, not worth the expense and manpower to repair.
String.Dest: 番人のカルセッテが何度も言ってたな。ドーンガード砦は廃墟寸前だから、人と金を使って修復する価値はないって

String.Source: Potions my friend, potions! Possibly some spells. Maybe some other things I've forgotten about. Actually I'm not sure. Let's see, shall we?
String.Dest: 薬、そう薬だ！ 呪文もあるかも知れない。思い出せないが、他のものも。実は自分でもはっきり分からない。ちょっと見てみよう

String.Source: Let's not waste any more time then.
String.Dest: でしたら、そろそろ本題に移らないといけませんわね

String.Source: Don't worry, I think I can help you.
String.Dest: 心配しないで、手伝えると思うわ

String.Source: Didn't I tell you to step forward? Hmm... Farm boy, eh? What's your weapon?
String.Dest: 前に出ろと言わなかったか？ ふむ… 農民の子か？ お前の武器は何だ？

String.Source: So my daughter applied some of the lessons I taught her about necromancy, did she?
String.Dest: では娘は私が死霊術について教えた中から、いくつかの教訓を生かしたわけね？

String.Source: Gelebor and his kind are easily manipulated fools.
String.Dest: ギレボルもその同胞も、流されやすい愚か者ばかりだ

String.Source: Is there anything else? Could be your last chance.
String.Dest: 他に何かある？ 最後の機会かも知れないわよ

String.Source: Which is where you come in. If killing vampires sounds good to you, go talk to Isran up in the fort. He decides who's Dawnguard material.
String.Dest: そこであんたの出番だ。吸血鬼退治に興味があるなら、砦にいるイスランに会うんだ。ドーンガードにふさわしいかどうかを判断してくれる

String.Source: Report to Isran at Fort Dawnguard. And get moving if you're serious about it. The vampires aren't going to wait around to make their next move.
String.Dest: ドーンガード砦にいるイスランに会え。本気なら急ぐんだ。吸血鬼達は次の行動を起こすのを待ってはくれないぞ

String.Source: The bow! Use the bow!
String.Dest: 弓ですわ！ 弓を使って！

String.Source: You simply need to retrieve the gem. The moment you touch it, your soul essence will be restored.
String.Dest: 石を取り戻すだけでいいのよ。それに触れた瞬間、魂のエキスは元通りになるわ

String.Source: You wouldn't dare. Now shut up and keep on watch.
String.Dest: あなたには無理よ。さあ黙って警戒を続けなさい

String.Source: Which is where you come in. If killing vampires sounds good to you, come talk to Isran at Fort Dawnguard, southeast of Riften.
String.Dest: そこであんたの出番だ。吸血鬼退治に興味があるなら、リフテンの南東にあるドーンガード砦でイスランに会うんだ

String.Source: To come in here alone... a fool like all the rest of them.
String.Dest: ここに一人で来るのは… 他の皆と同じ愚か者よ

String.Source: Tolan, I don't think that's a good idea.
String.Dest: トラン、それはいいアイデアとは思えないが

String.Source: Isran was right all along. We should have listened to his warnings. It's too late for the Vigilants now.
String.Dest: イスランの言っていた事は正しかった。彼の警告に耳を貸すべきだった。番人達はもはや手遅れだよ

String.Source: If you change your mind and decide to join the fight before it's too late, go talk to Isran up in the fort.
String.Dest: もし気が変わって、手遅れにならないうちに戦いに加わりたいのであれば、上の砦にいるイスランと話せ

String.Source: All this talk is making me thirsty. Perhaps another Vigilant will wander in soon.
String.Dest: しゃべってばかりで喉が渇いてきた。また番人が迷い込んでこないものか

String.Source: I wish Lokil would hurry it up. I have half a mind to return to the castle and tell Harkon what a fool he's entrusted this mission to.
String.Dest: ロキルが急いでくれないかしら。城に戻ってハルコンに彼がどれほどの間抜けにこの仕事を任せたか教えたいぐらいよ

String.Source: Yes, a crossbow. Best thing for killing vampires. Just take a few shots at those crates over there.
String.Dest: ああ、クロスボウだ。吸血鬼退治には最適だよ。あそこにある木箱を狙ってちょっと撃ってみろ

String.Source: And I have half a mind to tell Lokil of your disloyalty.
String.Dest: 半ば、ロキルにお前の不実を伝えたくなってくるよ

String.Source: Your soul essence was trapped inside a gem. When you and Serana entered the Soul Cairn, it was "given" to the Ideal Masters as payment.
String.Dest: あなたの魂のエキスは石の中に閉じ込められ、セラーナと一緒にソウル・ケルンへ入った時にアイディール・マスターへ報酬として“捧げられた”の

String.Source: You heard right. I'm glad word's finally starting to get around. But that means it won't be long before the vampires start to take notice as well.
String.Dest: 君の聞いた話は本当だ。いい噂がやっと広まり始めたようだな。だがそれは同時に、噂が吸血鬼の耳に入るのも時間の問題だという事を意味する

String.Source: You Vigilants were never trained for...
String.Dest: 君達番人はまったく訓練を受けてないな…

String.Source: Why are you here, Tolan? The Vigilants and I were finished with each other a long time ago.
String.Dest: なぜここにいるんだ、トラン？ 番人と私の関係はずっと昔に切れたはずだぞ

String.Source: The Hall of the Vigilants is in ruins, my brothers and sisters dead or scattered.
String.Dest: 番人の間は荒れ果て、仲間達は死んだり散り散りになったりしてしまった

String.Source: Uh, my weapon? I mostly just use my pa's axe, when wolves are attacking the goats or something.
String.Dest: 武器？ 親父の斧だよ。ヤギが狼に襲われた時なんかに使うぐらいさ

String.Source: Dimhollow Crypt. Brother Adalvald thought it contained some long-lost vampire artifact. It seems he was right.
String.Dest: ディムホロウ墓地か。あそこにはるか昔の吸血鬼の秘宝があるとアダルヴァルド修道士は考えていたみたいだが、その通りだったようだ

String.Source: My mother taught me a trick or two. I could partially soul trap you, and offer that gem to the Ideal Masters. It might be enough to satisfy them.
String.Dest: 母にいくつか教わりましたの。あなたに部分的な魂縛をかけて、その魂石をアイディール・マスター達に捧げる手がございますわ。それで満足してくれるかも知れませんわよ

String.Source: Fools.
String.Dest: 愚か者め

String.Source: I understand. Take your time.
String.Dest: 分かりますわ。焦る必要はなくてよ

String.Source: Thank you.
String.Dest: ありがとう

String.Source: You were waiting... all this time for someone with my blood to come along.
String.Dest: 待っておりましたのね… ずっと、わたしの血を持つ誰かがやってくるのを

String.Source: I guess I'll see you at Fort Dawnguard.
String.Dest: ドーンガード砦で会う事になりそうね

String.Source: Oh. Good.
String.Dest: あら。そうですのね

String.Source: Well, too bad for you... I intend on keeping it. Let's see if your blood has any power to it!
String.Dest: でもお生憎様。これは渡しませんわよ。あなたの血の力がこれにも通用するかどうか、見てみましょうか！

String.Source: As you wish.
String.Dest: かしこまりました

String.Source: How dare you. I was the Arch-Curate of Auri-El, girl. I had the ears of a god!
String.Dest: 何のつもりだ。私はアーリエルの最高司祭だぞ。この耳は神の耳なのだ！

String.Source: I promise to make this as painless as possible. Hold still.
String.Dest: なるべく痛くないようにいたしますわね。そのまま動かないで…

String.Source: Now that you've retrieved the Elder Scroll, you should be on your way.
String.Dest: 星霜の書を取り戻したのだから、もう行くべきよ

String.Source: Break his shield! Hurry!
String.Dest: 盾を壊して！ 早く！

String.Source: We're vampire hunters. We search out and destroy those bloodsucking scum wherever we find them.
String.Dest: 我々は吸血鬼ハンターを使命としている。あの化け物どもがどこにいようと、探しだして排除する

String.Source: Yes, well... I never wanted any of this to happen. I tried to warn all of you... I am sorry, you know.
String.Dest: ああ… こんな事は望んでなかった。君達みんなに警告しようとしたんだが… すまなかった

String.Source: Stendarr grant that you do not have to face the same test and be found wanting.
String.Dest: そちらが同じ試練にさらされ、力不足が判明しないよう、ステンダールのご加護あれ

String.Source: I'd never do anything that could hurt you.
String.Dest: あなたを傷つけるような事はしたくありませんわ

String.Source: While you're thinking about it, the vampires will be gathering strength in the shadows, waiting to strike.
String.Dest: 君がそれについて考えている間に、吸血鬼達は闇の中で力を蓄え、襲撃の時を待っている事だろう

String.Source: Ha. Isran's going to like you. He's up the hill in the fort. He'll decide if you're Dawnguard material.
String.Dest: ふっ、イスランに気に入られそうだな。彼は丘の上の砦にいる。ドーンガードにふさわしいかどうか、見てくれるだろう

String.Source: Look into my eyes, Serana. You tell me what I am.
String.Dest: この目を見ろ、セラーナ。私は何者だ？

String.Source: Quick, the bow!
String.Dest: 早く弓を！

String.Source: Isran will decide if you've got what it takes. Go on, he's right inside.
String.Dest: 使いものになるかどうかはイスランが見極める。入れ。彼は中にいる

String.Source: Oh, hey there! You here to join the Dawnguard, too?
String.Dest: やあ、あんた！ あんたもドーンガードに入るのかい？

String.Source: Yeargh!
String.Dest: イイヤァ！

String.Source: Oh, well... some... things, I suppose. Remedies, cures, a poison or two.
String.Dest: そうだな、何か… あるだろう。治療薬とか、治療法とか、その他の薬とか

String.Source: Tolan, tell him about, what was it, Dimhollow?
String.Dest: トラン、彼にあの事を教えてやれ。あの… ディムホロウだったかな？

String.Source: Enough, Vyrthur. Give us the bow!
String.Dest: もうよろしいですわ、ヴィルスール。弓をおよこしになって！

String.Source: You've probably killed lots of vampires, huh? I'm sure Isran will sign you right up. Not sure he'll take me. I hope so.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼をいっぱい退治したんだね？ きっとイスランに取り立ててもらえるよ。俺もそうなるといいなあ

String.Source: And now you want to come running to safety with the Dawnguard, is that it?
String.Dest: ドーンガードに守ってほしいというわけか？

String.Source: Isran, Carcette is dead. The Hall of the Vigilants... everyone... they're all dead. You were right, we were wrong. Isn't that enough for you?
String.Dest: イスラン、カルセッテは死んだ。番人の間で… 全員死んだ。お前が正しく、我々が間違っていた。それ以上何を求める？

String.Source: But look around - there's really not much to join yet. I've only just started rebuilding the order.
String.Dest: しかし現状を見てくれ。まだ君を受け入れる準備ができていない。組織の再建を始めてまだ間もないからな

String.Source: I swore I'd have my revenge, no matter what the cost.
String.Dest: どんな犠牲を払ってでも、復讐を果たすと誓ったのだよ

String.Source: A prophecy that lacked a single, final ingredient... the blood of a pure vampire. The blood of a Daughter of Coldharbour.
String.Dest: 予言を完成させる、最後の要素… 純粋なる吸血鬼の血液。コールドハーバーの娘の血液だ

String.Source: It... it was you? You created that prophecy?
String.Dest: あれは… あなたでしたの？ あなたがあの予言を創り出したと？

String.Source: So who are you? What do you want?
String.Dest: 君は誰だ？ 望みは何だ？

String.Source: As you can see, we have some work to do to restore it to its former glory. But maybe you want to help me with that?
String.Dest: ご覧の様に、過去の栄光を取り戻すのは大仕事になる。だが君も協力してくれるのだろう？

String.Source: I'm, uh... my name is Agmaer, sir.
String.Dest: 俺は… いえ、私の名前はアグミルです

String.Source: That must be it. Fort Dawnguard... Wow. Bigger than I expected.
String.Dest: きっとあれがドーンガード砦だよ… うわあ、思ってたより大きいなあ

String.Source: Yes, that's it. Dimhollow Crypt. Brother Adalvald was sure it held some long-lost vampire artifact of some kind.
String.Dest: ああ、そうとも。ディムホロウ墓地。アダルヴァルド修道士はそこにはるか昔の吸血鬼の秘宝か何かがあると確信していた

String.Source: Hey, uh, don't tell Isran I was afraid to meet him by myself. Not the best first impression for a new vampire hunter, I guess.
String.Dest: なあ、俺が1人で会うのを怖がってたって事、イスランには言わないでくれよ。吸血鬼ハンター志願者としちゃ、あんまりいい印象与えないだろうからね

String.Source: Tolan, tell her about, what was it, Dimhollow?
String.Dest: トラン、彼女にあの事を教えてやれ。あの… ディムホロウだったかな？

String.Source: Ha. Isran's going to like you. Go talk to him at Fort Dawnguard, southeast of Riften. He'll decide if you're Dawnguard material.
String.Dest: ふっ、イスランに気に入られそうだな。リフテンの南東にあるドーンガード砦にいるから会ってみるといい。ドーンガードにふさわしいかどうか、見てくれるだろう

String.Source: You're... you're a vampire?
String.Dest: あなたは… 吸血鬼ですの？

String.Source: Haven't you heard that the Hall of the Vigilants was destroyed by vampires? They never took the threat seriously, and now they've paid the price.
String.Dest: 番人の間が吸血鬼達に壊滅させられた話は聞いてないのか？ 奴らの脅威を甘く見ていた代償が高くついたな

String.Source: Do I look like a "sir" to you, boy? I'm not a soldier, and you're not joining the army.
String.Dest: 私の事を“サー”とでも呼びたいのか、新人君？ 私は兵士ではないし、君が入隊する予定もない

String.Source: I know what you think of us. You think we're soft, that we're cowards. You think our deaths proved our weakness.
String.Dest: 考えている事は分かる。我々が弱腰の臆病者で、弱いからこそ死んだのだと

String.Source: That's good enough for me. Go see what the vampires were looking for in this Dimhollow Crypt. With any luck, they'll still be there.
String.Dest: 私にとっては好都合だ。吸血鬼どもがディムホロウ墓地で何を探していたのか確かめようじゃないか。運がよければ、奴らはまだそこにいるはずだ

String.Source: You there. The Dawnguard is looking for anyone willing to fight against the growing vampire menace. What do you say?
String.Dest: そこのあんた。ドーンガードは増しつつある吸血鬼の脅威と戦う気のある者は誰でも受け入れている。興味はあるか？

String.Source: You'll remain mortal, but you'll find yourself weakened within the Soul Cairn.
String.Dest: 定命の体は変わりませんけれども、ソウル・ケルン内では力が弱くなってしまうでしょうね

String.Source: Got a fire in your belly to kill vampires, eh? Good for you.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼と戦いたくてうずうずしてるのか？ 結構な事だ

String.Source: (Whine)
String.Dest: クゥーン…

String.Source: I'll meet you in Dimhollow Crypt. I owe these vampires a debt of vengeance.
String.Dest: ディムホロウ墓地で合流しよう。吸血鬼どもに借りを返さないとな

String.Source: "My pa's axe", Stendarr preserve us.
String.Dest: “私の父親の斧”だ。ステンダールが我々を守って下さる

String.Source: The vampires are much more dangerous than we ever dreamed. The Dawnguard is the only hope now.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼達は想像よりはるかに大きな脅威だ。残された希望はもはやドーンガードだけ

String.Source: Auri-El himself may have been beyond my reach, but his influence on our world wasn't.
String.Dest: アーリエルは手の届かぬ存在だが、その力はこの世界に届いていた

String.Source: The moment I was infected by one of my own Initiates, Auri-El turned his back on me.
String.Dest: 弟子だった新人に感染させられたその瞬間から、アーリエルに見放されたのだ

String.Source: Truth is, I'm a little nervous. I've never done anything like this before. I hope you don't mind if I walk up with you.
String.Dest: 正直、ちょっとビビってるんだ。何しろこういうのは初めてだから。一緒に行っても構わないかな？

String.Source: He fought well though. Jeron and Bresoth were no match for him.
String.Dest: 奮戦していたがな。ジェロンとブレソスは歯が立たなかった

String.Source: All I needed was the blood of a vampire and his own weapon, Auriel's Bow.
String.Dest: 必要なものは吸血鬼の血液と、その武器であるアーリエルの弓だけだった

String.Source: I'll meet you at Dimhollow. It's the least I can do to avenge my fallen comrades.
String.Dest: ディムホロウで待ち合わせよう。倒れた仲間達の仇を討つくらいはやらせてほしい

String.Source: Don't worry, I think we can make a Dawnguard out of you. Here, take this crossbow and let's see how you shoot.
String.Dest: 大丈夫だ。我々が君を立派なドーンガードにしてやろう。ほら、このクロスボウでちょっと腕前を見せてくれ

String.Source: Yes, si... Isran.
String.Dest: 分かりました閣下… いえ… イスラン

String.Source: You are testing my patience.
String.Dest: いつまで待たせる気だ？

String.Source: Leave me in peace.
String.Dest: ほっといてちょうだい

String.Source: When you first transform into a Vampire Lord, you will hover in the air. While you do, you will command the powers of Blood and Night.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼の王に変身すると、初めは体が宙に浮かび上がる。その間は血と、夜の力を操る事ができる

String.Source: You should find no difficulty using the portal any longer.
String.Dest: もう転移門の使用に困難を感じる事はないはずよ

String.Source: Now that the Dawnguard are back, the vampires' reign of terror is about to end.
String.Dest: ドーンガードが戻った今、吸血鬼の恐怖支配が終わるのも間近だ

String.Source: I have everything I need right here.
String.Dest: ここにいればなんの不足もないわ

String.Source: Are you sure that was wise, Lokil? He still might have told us something.
String.Dest: 本当に賢明だったと思う、ロキル？ まだ彼は何か話したかも知れない

String.Source: It's over. He's dead, and the prophecy dies with him.
String.Dest: 終わったな。奴は息絶え、予言も潰えるだろう

String.Source: He was out of control, Garan. It had to be done.
String.Dest: お父様は正気を失っておりましたのよ、ガラン。やむを得ませんでしたわ

String.Source: Way I hear it, Lady Serana's been gone a real long time.
String.Dest: 聞いた話じゃ、セラーナ様はかなり長い間いなくなっていたらしい

String.Source: There's plenty for all.
String.Dest: 不自由などない

String.Source: May Auri-El's glow shield you from your enemy.
String.Dest: アーリエルの光の盾がその身を守らん事を

String.Source: You think I can't tell my own kind? I smelled you almost before my eyes were open.
String.Dest: 自分が何者かも、分からないように見えまして？ 目を開けなくても、匂いで気づくぐらいですわ

String.Source: I'll be here. Don't take too long, now!
String.Dest: ここにおりますから、あまり待たせないで下さいましね！

String.Source: Not fond of vampires, are they?
String.Dest: 吸血鬼はお嫌いでしょう？

String.Source: First thing is to get this fort back into shape. Right now, a vampire could practically walk right in the front door.
String.Dest: まずこの砦を再建しなくては。吸血鬼が入口からすんなり入ってくるのはさすがにまずい

String.Source: Now I'm trying to reestablish the Dawnguard. Take the fight to the vampires for a change. I hope it isn't too late.
String.Dest: 今私はドーンガードを復興して、吸血鬼に戦いを挑み、状況を変えようと奮闘している。手遅れでなければいいのだが

String.Source: I knew I heard something!
String.Dest: 何か聞こえたぞ！

String.Source: Well I don't know what that means. But we need to find out. She must either have something the vampires want, or be someone important to them.
String.Dest: それが何を意味するかはまだ分からないが、突き止めてみよう。おそらく吸血鬼達がほしがるものを彼女が持ってるか、彼女自身が重要なのかのどちらかだろう

String.Source: We hunt down and kill vampires. Haven't you been paying attention?
String.Dest: 我々は吸血鬼を追い詰めて殺す。知らなかったのか？

String.Source: I don't like the feel of this place. I'll wait for you back by the entrance.
String.Dest: ここの雰囲気はどうも好ましくありませんわ。戻って入口のところで待っておりますわね

String.Source: Present yourself to Lord Harkon at once.
String.Dest: 今すぐハルコン卿に会いに行け

String.Source: I'm glad we're finally taking the fight to those monsters.
String.Dest: ついにあの怪物どもに戦いを仕掛けるのか。うれしいな

String.Source: We haven't gotten anywhere ourselves with...
String.Dest: まだ何も進展がないのに…

String.Source: Disgusting creatures.
String.Dest: おぞましい化け物達ですわね

String.Source: I'd... well, I'd come with you, but I don't know if I can trust your friend.
String.Dest: ええと、そうですわね… 一緒に行っても構わないのですが、あなたのお友達を信用していいものかどうか

String.Source: Who said something, Sorine or Gunmar? I thought they'd have learned their lesson by now.
String.Dest: 誰が言ったんだ？ ソリーヌか？ ガンマーか？ 彼らは十分教訓を学んだと思っていたが

String.Source: There you are, father!
String.Dest: 見つけましたわよ、お父様！

String.Source: Yes, of course Lokil. Do not forget who brought you news of the Vigilants' discovery.
String.Dest: ええ、もちろんよロキル。番人の発見を知らせたのが誰か忘れないで

String.Source: Look out! Gargoyles!
String.Dest: 気を付けて！ ガーゴイルですわ！

String.Source: I suppose she's right. I shouldn't let my personal feelings get in the way.
String.Dest: 彼女が正しいようだな。個人的な感情をここで挟むべきではない

String.Source: Well I don't know what that means. But we need to find out. She must either have something the vampires want, or be someone important to them.
String.Dest: それが何を意味するかはまだ分からないが、突き止めてみよう。おそらく吸血鬼達がほしがるものを彼女が持ってるか、彼女自身が重要なのかのどちらかだろう

String.Source: It's time for you to suffer!
String.Dest: 今度はお父様が苦しむ番ですわ！

String.Source: Isran knows how to fight those monsters. He's been preparing for this day for a long time.
String.Dest: イスランはあの怪物どもとの戦い方を知っている。長い間この日に備えてきたんだ

String.Source: Tough day for you!
String.Dest: 散々な日にして差し上げますわ！

String.Source: He's a... powerful man. Or at least used to be.
String.Dest: 彼は… 凄い力を持っていますわ。少なくとも、ある時点ではそうだった

String.Source: So they have everything they wanted, and we're left with nothing.
String.Dest: つまり奴らはほしいものをすべて手に入れたというわけだ。こっちには何も残されてないのに

String.Source: Harkon will reward us richly for this.
String.Dest: ハルコンはたっぷり見返りをくれるはず

String.Source: I won't fall for your tricks!
String.Dest: その手には乗らなくてよ！

String.Source: Lord Harkon, defeated. I never imagined I'd see the day.
String.Dest: ハルコン卿の敗北。この日を見るとは想像もしなかった

String.Source: Yes, it is, and it's mine.
String.Dest: ええ。わたしのものですわ

String.Source: Did you at least find out what the vampires were looking for in there?
String.Dest: 少なくとも、吸血鬼達があそこで何を探していたのかは分かったか？

String.Source: Another adventure.
String.Dest: 新たな冒険の始まりですわね

String.Source: As you've been traveling in the Soul Cairn, your body has become attuned to it.
String.Dest: ソウル・ケルンを旅した事で、あなたの身体はかの地に同調したの

String.Source: I just don't feel comfortable sharing that moment with a total stranger, I'm sorry.
String.Dest: 赤の他人にその場を見られるのはどうも落ち着きませんの

String.Source: But this is something different. I'd say do what she wants. Take her home, and see who else is in this castle.
String.Dest: でもそういうわけにもいかないから、好きにさせてやろう。彼女を連れて帰って、この城に他の誰かがいるのかを探ってみようか

String.Source: My family used to live on an island to the west of Solitude. I would guess they still do.
String.Dest: 昔は、家族でソリチュードの西にある島に住んでおりましたの。今もそこにいると思いますわ

String.Source: You fight worse than you smell!
String.Dest: 臭いも酷ければ、戦いぶりも酷いですわね！

String.Source: Go now, and carry out this task. This is my command!
String.Dest: お前に命ずる。行け、そして使命を果たせ！

String.Source: That's it? All right.
String.Dest: あれがそうですの？ 分かりましたわ

String.Source: Back to dust!
String.Dest: 塵に還りなさい！

String.Source: Arvak...You saved him! His soul is free, I can feel it!
String.Dest: あんたはアルヴァクを救ってくれた！ あいつの魂は自由だ！

String.Source: This won't end well for you!
String.Dest: ろくな結果になりませんわよ！

String.Source: If he can maintain some appearance of normalcy, I'll allow him to stay.
String.Dest: 彼がまともに振る舞う事ができるなら、滞在を許そう

String.Source: What now?
String.Dest: 今度は何？

String.Source: A final warning... be wary, for you can only hold your Vampire Lord form for a brief time.
String.Dest: 最後に警告しておくが、吸血鬼の王としての変身時間はごくわずかなので注意が必要だ

String.Source: Is he... like me?
String.Dest: わたしと… 同じですの？

String.Source: That's what everybody says, right up until they find their throat being ripped out by a pack of hungry vampires.
String.Dest: みんなそう言うんだ。飢えた吸血鬼の一団に喉笛を食い千切られるまではな

String.Source: What do you need?
String.Dest: 何が必要ですの？

String.Source: May Auri-El's light guide you in your darkest hours.
String.Dest: 苦難の時も、アーリエルの光の導きがあらん事を

String.Source: I just need to be alone. For a while. There's a lot of feelings wrapped up in this old place, and I don't think you're quite ready for them.
String.Dest: しばらく独りでいたいだけですわ。ここには昔からの想いが色々と眠っていて、それらにつき合わせるにはまだ早い気がするのです

String.Source: So go and meet your beloved Stendarr.
String.Dest: 最愛のステンダールとやらの所に行くがいい

String.Source: That's... complicated. And I'm not totally sure if I can trust you.
String.Dest: それは… 複雑ですわね。それに、あなたが信用できるかどうか分かりかねますわ

String.Source: I don't want to step on anyone's toes. Come back to me when you're alone.
String.Dest: 人が嫌がる事はいたしませんわ。寂しくなったら、お戻りになられて

String.Source: I suppose you're lucky you're not dead. Or worse, one of them.
String.Dest: 君がまだ生きてるのは幸運だよ。あるいはもっと悪い事に… つまり奴らの仲間にならずに済んだのは

String.Source: Don't let me stand in your way, then.
String.Dest: でしたら、あなたの邪魔はしたくありませんわ

String.Source: I think it is, actually.
String.Dest: 実際、そうだと思いますわ

String.Source: That is all I have to teach you. If you wish to be reminded of these lessons, you need only ask.
String.Dest: 教える事は以上だ。もう一度聞きたければ、申し出るがいい

String.Source: Vampire, yes.
String.Dest: そう、吸血鬼ですのよ

String.Source: Not until you get rid of whoever your other friend is.
String.Dest: 他の仲間と別れてきてくれましたらね

String.Source: Come on, stoneskin!
String.Dest: かかっておいでませ、石肌の化け物！

String.Source: Good. I assume you took care of that little infestation. Did you figure out what they were looking for in there?
String.Dest: よし。あの侵入者に対処してくれたようだな。奴らがあそこで何を探していたのか分かったか？

String.Source: I have a task that will test your new powers, but first, do you have any questions?
String.Dest: お前の新たな力が試される使命があるが、その前に質問は？

String.Source: Where did you get to?
String.Dest: どこに行きまして？

String.Source: Never seen a crossbow before, eh? Not surprised. Kind of a Dawnguard specialty. Nothing better for putting down vampires.
String.Dest: クロスボウを見るのは初めてか？ 無理もない。ドーンガードの専用品に近いからな。吸血鬼を倒すにはもってこいだ

String.Source: Got it.
String.Dest: よしなに

String.Source: Oh no you don't!
String.Dest: いや、やめて！

String.Source: I'm not going to waste my time making sure your friend doesn't get killed. When it's just you and me, we can go.
String.Dest: 味方の命を守る事に必死になって、時間を無駄にしたくはありませんの。あなたと二人だけなら、すぐ出発いたしますわ

String.Source: Goodbye, hero! Take good care of Arvak for me! Such a good horse...
String.Dest: あばよ、ヒーロー！ アルヴァクを可愛がってやってくれよ！ できた馬だからな…

String.Source: I need someone out in the field, taking the fight to the damn vampires, while we're getting the fort back into shape...
String.Dest: 我々が砦を再建してる間に、外の世界で吸血鬼達に戦いを挑む者が必要なんだ

String.Source: Descend to the ground, and you can attack with your claws and feed upon your prey to regain your strength.
String.Dest: 地面に下りれば爪で攻撃し、獲物を糧にして力を取り戻す事ができる

String.Source: Done and done.
String.Dest: 片付きましてよ

String.Source: Perhaps you should. I count some of the oldest and most powerful vampires in Skyrim among the members of my court.
String.Dest: そうするといいかもな。我が臣下にはスカイリムで最も古く、強大な吸血鬼らの何体かが属している

String.Source: I don't think the vampires would be stupid enough to attack us here, but you never know.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼がここで私達を襲撃するほど愚かだとは思わないけど、どうかしらね

String.Source: Could you tell your companion to head home?
String.Dest: お供を家に送り返してもらえるかしら？

String.Source: I will find you. Then you will beg me to let you die.
String.Dest: 必ず見つけ出して、慈悲を乞わせてやるわ

String.Source: I hope the vampires try to attack us here. A lot easier than hunting them down in their holes.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼がここで我々を襲撃するといいのに。穴の中で追跡するよりずっと簡単だ

String.Source: A woman? Trapped in there? That doesn't make any sense. Who is she? More importantly, where is she?
String.Dest: 女が？ 閉じ込められてる？ どういう事だ。その女は誰なんだ？ それよりもっと大事な事だが… 彼女はどこにいる？

String.Source: Die Dawnguard!
String.Dest: 死ね、ドーンガード！

String.Source: May Auri-El's radiance fill your heart with joy.
String.Dest: アーリエルの光がその心を喜びで満たさん事を

String.Source: I don't think so.
String.Dest: そうは思いませんわね

String.Source: That's not a name I know. And it doesn't sound like a name a group of vampires would choose.
String.Dest: そのお名前は存じませんわ。それに、吸血鬼が自分達で付けそうな名前でもございませんわね

String.Source: And frankly, I need to get home to figure out what's happening.
String.Dest: それに実のところ、何が起こっているのか確かめに、家に帰りたいのですわ

String.Source: We're going to a place I've never been... and we're goind to see my mother. After all these years.
String.Dest: わたしが行った事もない場所におもむいて、母と会う事になるなんて… 何年ぶりになるのかしら

String.Source: I'm not going to die like this!
String.Dest: こんなふうに死ぬつもりはありませんのよ！

String.Source: You're not getting the best of me!
String.Dest: わたしには勝てませんことよ！

String.Source: He'll help you get around this wretched place, but I'm sure he'd be much happier someplace sunnier.
String.Dest: あいつがいれば、このろくでもない土地を動き回るのに便利だよ。もっと明るい所の方が喜ぶけどね

String.Source: Feed upon those who are sleeping, and your vulnerability to sunlight will diminish along with your powers.
String.Dest: 眠っている者の血を吸えば、力と共に太陽光に対するぜい弱性も弱まっていく

String.Source: It's only for Serana's sake that I have let you live.
String.Dest: セラーナに免じて生かしてやっているに過ぎん

String.Source: But I have something for you to do, since you're asking.
String.Dest: でも君が望むなら、少々やってほしい事がある

String.Source: I... don't know who that is.
String.Dest: 存じませんわ… 誰なのかしら

String.Source: Over time, your powers will grow in strength and you will find new ways to use your gifts.
String.Dest: 時間と共に力が成長し、恩恵の新たな使い方が見えてくる事だろう

String.Source: You would dare address me?
String.Dest: 誰に口を利いている？

String.Source: I guess this is it. Wish me luck.
String.Dest: いよいよみたいだ。幸運を祈ってくれ

String.Source: Not just vampires. We are among the oldest and most powerful vampires in Skyrim.
String.Dest: 吸血鬼であるだけではない。我々はスカイリムの吸血鬼の中でも最も古く、最も強大な一族だ

String.Source: Got to keep alert. We don't want to get caught napping like the Vigilants did.
String.Dest: 用心しないとな。番人達のように寝込みを襲われたらたまらない

String.Source: Fine, then.
String.Dest: そう、なら結構ですわ

String.Source: Can't you tell your own kind? I smelled you almost before my eyes were open.
String.Dest: 自分の種族もお分かりになりませんの？ 目を開けなくても、匂いだけで分かるぐらいですのに

String.Source: I'll wait for you at the dock.
String.Dest: 波止場で待っておりますわよ

String.Source: Is he working for my father?
String.Dest: 父の下で働いておりますの？

String.Source: May Auri-El's warmth imbue your body with strength.
String.Dest: その身がアーリエルの力で満たされん事を

String.Source: Jeron was furious to be left guarding the door.
String.Dest: ジェロンの奴、扉の番なんかやらされてカンカンだったわね

String.Source: The feast never ends here in Castle Volkihar.
String.Dest: ここヴォルキハル城では日夜宴が催されている

String.Source: With experience, your powers will grow and you will discover new ways to use them.
String.Dest: 慣れてくれば力が成長し、新たな使い方が見えてくる事だろう

String.Source: Too slow!
String.Dest: 遅くてよ！

String.Source: Are you taking me to him?
String.Dest: わたしを彼の所へ連れて行きますの？

String.Source: This is what your obsession brings you!
String.Dest: これがお父様のこだわりの結果ですのよ！

String.Source: Only thing that stood out for me was Auriel's Bow. That's a powerful weapon, and I sure as Oblivion don't want the vampires to get hold of it.
String.Dest: 私にとって意味があるのは、アーリエルの弓だけだった。吸血鬼には絶対渡したくない強力な武器だ

String.Source: I was expecting someone from my family. I don't recognize you. Are you one of my father's little acolytes?
String.Dest: 家族の誰かだと思いましたの。あなたの事は知りませんわ。父に仕えてる人ですの？

String.Source: I'll be at the dock whenever you're ready.
String.Dest: 準備ができましたらいつでも波止場にいらっしゃって

String.Source: Nothing else?
String.Dest: 他には？

String.Source: Stay back!
String.Dest: お下がりになって！

String.Source: Sit down and enjoy yourself.
String.Dest: まあ掛けてくつろいでくれ

String.Source: I wish I could say that I did, but without the other two Scrolls, the picture will remain incomplete.
String.Dest: その件は対処済みと言いたいところだが、書があと2つそろわなければ全体像はつかめんよ

String.Source: I was going to say the same thing to you.
String.Dest: 同じ事を言おうと思っておりましたの

String.Source: I... I suppose this is difficult for you.
String.Dest: 私は… 君には難しいと思うが

String.Source: I'll never tell you anything, vampire. My oath to Stendarr is stronger than any suffering you can inflict on me.
String.Dest: 言ったろう。何の話か分からないな

String.Source: Well, well. You made it. Good. Isran's in the fort. He'll get you sorted out.
String.Dest: おお、無事に着いたか。イスランは砦にいる。話せば色々分かるはずだ

String.Source: Home? Where's that?
String.Dest: 家だと？ それはどこに？

String.Source: Good. Go and speak to Garan Marethi. Tell him it is time. He will understand.
String.Dest: よし。ガラン・マレシに時が満ちたと伝えるがいい。それで分かるはずだ

String.Source: I need to speak to you, stranger. Now.
String.Dest: 見知らぬ者よ、今すぐ話がある

String.Source: This day was always coming!
String.Dest: いつかこの日が来ると思っていましたわ！

String.Source: I never forget who my friends are. Or my enemies.
String.Dest: 誰が仲間で、誰が敵なのか、忘れなどしない

String.Source: Right. So they have this woman, and an Elder Scroll.
String.Dest: なるほど。ではその女性も、そして星霜の書も連中の手の中にあるというわけだ

String.Source: I did what needed to be done. Nothing more.
String.Dest: わたくしはなすべき事をした。ただそれだけですわ

String.Source: My lady, you have my deepest sympathies. I am sure this was not easy for you.
String.Dest: お嬢様、心からお悔やみ申し上げます。さぞつらかった事でしょう

String.Source: Tolan was telling me about some cave that the Vigilants were poking around in. Seemed to think it was related to these recent vampire attacks.
String.Dest: 番人達がある洞窟を探ってたとトランが言っていたな。最近の吸血鬼の攻撃とそこの関連性を調べていたらしい

String.Source: And so you delivered her to them.
String.Dest: では、君が彼女を奴らのところに送り込んだんだな

String.Source: For centuries we lived here, far from the cares of the world. All that ended when my wife betrayed me and stole away that which I valued most.
String.Dest: 我々は世の気苦労から遠く離れ、何世紀もここで暮らしてきた。しかしそんな時代も、妻が私を裏切り、もっとも大切にしていたものを奪い去った事で終わりを告げた

String.Source: Come on. It's just around the side.
String.Dest: さあ。横手に回りましょう

String.Source: I'm not going to do that for you.
String.Dest: あなたの代わりにして差し上げるつもりはありませんわ

String.Source: Then people stopped taking the threat seriously, the Dawnguard was disbanded, and the vampires came creeping back.
String.Dest: だが人々は奴らの脅威を軽視し始めた。そしてドーンガードは解散して、吸血鬼が再びはびこるようになったのだ

String.Source: You have done me a great service, and now you must be rewarded.
String.Dest: 多大な貢献に対し、ほうびをとらせねばな

String.Source: I'm over here!
String.Dest: わたしはこちらよ！

String.Source: Your powers are nothing!
String.Dest: 通用しませんわよ！

String.Source: How many of you are there?!
String.Dest: 一体何人おりますの！？

String.Source: In the old days, the Dawnguard kept all of Skyrim safe from those bloodsucking scum.
String.Dest: 昔はドーンガードがスカイリム全体を、あの血を吸うバケモノ達から守っていた

String.Source: Very well. I am Harkon, lord of this court. By now, my daughter will have told you what we are.
String.Dest: いいだろう。私の名はハルコン、この一族を率いている。我々の素性については娘から聞いている事だろう

String.Source: If you want me to come along, it has to just be me and you.
String.Dest: 一緒に行ってほしいのでしたら、二人だけというのが条件ですわよ

String.Source: I don't trust that man, and I don't want him here.
String.Dest: あの男は信用できない。ここにはいてほしくないな

String.Source: I was expecting someone... like me, at least.
String.Dest: 誰か他の… わたしと同じ種類の人だと思っておりましたわ

String.Source: Find your own thrall. This one's mine.
String.Dest: 他をあたって。これは私の従徒よ

String.Source: Finished?
String.Dest: 済みまして？

String.Source: Well? I'm waiting.
String.Dest: で？ どうしたのだ？

String.Source: Damn fool. I told him not to go. The Vigilants always had more bravery than sense.
String.Dest: 能なしめが。彼には行くなと言ったのに。番人達は血の気が多くて困るな

String.Source: You can't hide, father!
String.Dest: 隠れても無駄ですわ、お父様！

String.Source: I'm gonna have to kill you... again!
String.Dest: 殺すしかありませんわ… もう一度！

String.Source: He's such a loyal beast. Here, I'll teach you how to call him to you.
String.Dest: あいつはすごく忠実でね。どれ、呼び方を教えてやろう

String.Source: No, we are vampires, among the oldest and most powerful in Skyrim.
String.Dest: 訂正しよう。我々は吸血鬼、スカイリムにおいて最も古く、最も強大な種族だ

String.Source: He knew nothing. He served his purpose by leading us to this place. Now it is up to us to bring Harkon the prize.
String.Dest: 奴は何も知らなかった。我々をこの場所に導いた時点で用済みという事だ。後は我々がハルコンに宝を届けるまで

String.Source: Ha. Nothing can destroy an Elder Scroll. Worry more about protecting your hide, and let me worry about my things.
String.Dest: 星霜の書を滅せられるものなどございませんわ。ご自身を守る事だけを心配されてはいかがでしょう？ わたしの事はわたしがやりますから

String.Source: Suit yourself.
String.Dest: お好きなように

String.Source: So let me take the lead in there.
String.Dest: だから中ではわたしにお任せを

String.Source: Were you looking for me?
String.Dest: わたしを探しておりましたの？

String.Source: Peace at last...
String.Dest: ようやく平穏が…

String.Source: Get rid of this interloper and you and I can be on our way.
String.Dest: この侵入者をどうにかして、出発はそれからですわね

String.Source: I thought Lokil knew what he was doing. This is taking too long.
String.Dest: ロキルを信頼していたけど、ちょっと時間がかかり過ぎだわ

String.Source: Let me know if you want me along.
String.Dest: わたしと行きたい時は教えて下さいましね

String.Source: Teamwork, right there.
String.Dest: チームワークの勝利ですわ

String.Source: I'm a loyal servant of the lord of the castle, nothing more.
String.Dest: 俺は城主の忠実なしもべだ。それ以上の者じゃない

String.Source: I'm on it.
String.Dest: やっておりますわ

String.Source: May Auri-El's brilliance illuminate your path.
String.Dest: アーリエルの光が行く手を照らさん事を

String.Source: The Moth Priest can stay here for now. As for the vampire, I still don't trust it, so keep it on a leash.
String.Dest: 聖蚕の僧侶は、ひとまずここにいても構わない。だが例の吸血鬼は、まだ信用できんな。首輪をつけておいた方がいいと思うが

String.Source: The two of them just never got along. That's why Isran didn't have you go looking for him when he sent you after us.
String.Dest: 彼らの関係はずっと険悪なの。だからイスランも、あなたに彼を探しに行かせず、私達のところへ来させたのよ

String.Source: Did you see where it went?
String.Dest: どこに行ったか見まして？

String.Source: I still remember how to fight!
String.Dest: 戦い方ならまだ憶えてますの！

String.Source: I've waited a long time for my chance to move up in the court.
String.Dest: 出世の機会をずっと伺っていたのよ

String.Source: That would fit with the rest of it... I don't like it, but you did right to play along. We need to find out what this is all about.
String.Dest: それでしっくりくるな… 気に食わないが、君はうまくやってくれた。この件の真相を解明しよう

String.Source: I can't do everything for you.
String.Dest: なんでもして差し上げるわけにはいかなくてよ

String.Source: Not quite, though I can see how an outsider might arrive at that conclusion.
String.Dest: 正確には違うが、部外者がその結論に達するのは無理もない事だ

String.Source: Trust me. I lived in that castle for a very long time and I know every nook and cranny.
String.Dest: お任せあれ。あの城には長い間住んでいましたから、あそこの事なら隅から隅まで知っていますの

String.Source: I'm not known for my patience.
String.Dest: 私は気が短いのだ

String.Source: Don't think that'll keep them from turning on you eventually. They'll figure out what you are.
String.Dest: それでいつまでも、彼らの目をごまかせるとは思えませんわ。遠からず正体に気づかれましてよ

String.Source: There is much to learn, but if you master the powers of the Vampire Lord, few enemies will be able to stand against you.
String.Dest: 学ぶ事は多々あるが、吸血鬼の王として力を体得すれば、お前に抗える敵はごくわずかとなるだろう

String.Source: Someone is here. Find them!
String.Dest: 誰かいるぞ。見つけ出せ！

String.Source: And we will not return without it. Vingalmo and Orthjolf will make way for me after this.
String.Dest: そして手に入れるまでは帰らない。事が終われば、ヴィンガルモとオースユルフは裸足で逃げ出すだろうな

String.Source: Look, this whole blood ritual is a bit personal. I'd rather not have a bigger audience than I need to.
String.Dest: 血の儀式はかなり個人的な事なのです。必要以上に見られるのは落ち着きませんわ

String.Source: Well, I don't take just anyone into the secret parts of the place I grew up.
String.Dest: わたしが育ったところの秘密の場所には、誰でも入れるわけではございませんの

String.Source: Suit yourself.
String.Dest: どうぞよしなに

String.Source: Of course! Let's go.
String.Dest: もちろんですわ！ さあ行きましょう

String.Source: Why would someone who isn't... like me... come all the way down here?
String.Dest: わたし達の仲間でもない人が、こんなところまで何をしにいらっしゃいましたの？

String.Source: Here, take this one and give it a try. You'll want to get to know how to use it if you really plan to join the Dawnguard.
String.Dest: こいつを持っていって使ってみるといい。本気でドーンガードの一員になるなら、使い方を身につけておくべきだ

String.Source: I believe you, Vigilant. And I don't think you even know what you've found here.
String.Dest: その言葉を信じよう、番人よ。どうやら自分が見つけたものの意味すら理解していないのだろう

String.Source: I leave politics to others. I serve the lord of the castle.
String.Dest: 権力闘争には興味がないの。私が仕えるのはあくまでもこの城の主よ

String.Source: Of course, my dear. All will be well now.
String.Dest: もちろんだ。これですべて良くなる

String.Source: Well, look. Kill me, you've killed one vampire. But if people are after me, there's something bigger going on.
String.Dest: なら、わたしを殺せば、吸血鬼を1人仕留めた事になりますわ。けれども、大勢がわたしを追うのは、何かもっと大変な事が起きている証拠ですのよ

String.Source: If you want me to come along, it has to just be me and you.
String.Dest: 一緒に行ってほしいのでしたら、二人だけというのが条件ですわよ

String.Source: Now it's a race to claim the remaining Scrolls and discover what part Auriel's Bow has to play in this prophecy.
String.Dest: 残りの書を手に入れて、この予言におけるアーリエルの弓の役割を誰が先に解き明かすのか… 競争だな

String.Source: It's... complicated. I can't really talk about it. I'm sorry.
String.Dest: ややこしい話なのです。悪しからず、話せるような内容ではございませんわ

String.Source: Look out! Gargoyles!
String.Dest: 気を付けて！ ガーゴイルですわ！

String.Source: Here we go, let's get the blood flowing again.
String.Dest: さあ、もうひと暴れして差し上げますわよ

String.Source: What have you got?
String.Dest: 腕前を見せてご覧なさい

String.Source: Let's just say a tiny part of you rubbed off on it, and in its place, a bit of the Soul Cairn filled the void.
String.Dest: つまり、あなたのほんの一部がかの地に乗り移って、代わりに、ソウル・ケルンのかけらがその隙間を埋めたのよ

String.Source: Unh... who are you?
String.Dest: ああ… あなたはどちら様？

String.Source: I'm waiting to hear what any of this means.
String.Dest: こいつがどういう事なのか早く聞かせてくれ

String.Source: I heard a lot of vague nonsense. You could interpret that a hundred different ways.
String.Dest: あいまいすぎて無意味な話は山ほど耳にした。解釈が百通りもあるような事をな

String.Source: With each passing day that you do not feed, that weakness will become more deadly, but your powers will also become stronger.
String.Dest: 血を吸わずにいれば一日ごとにその弱点が致命的なものとなっていくが、同時に力も強大になっていくだろう

String.Source: Changed your mind, huh? The Dawnguard could use somebody like you.
String.Dest: 気が変わったんだな？ あんたならドーンガードの一員として活躍できるかもな

String.Source: He's a very powerful man. Or he was at one point. I'm surprised another vampire hasn't heard of him.
String.Dest: 彼は凄い力を持っていますの。少なくとも、ある時点ではそうだった。他の吸血鬼が彼を知らないのが不思議ですわ

String.Source: Are you one of my father's little acolytes?
String.Dest: 父に仕えている人？

String.Source: You're not going to keep me in here!
String.Dest: 縛りつけられるのはごめんこうむりますわ！
